### [152] [Multimodal Claim Extraction for Fact-Checking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16311)
*Joycelyn Teo,Rui Cao,Zhenyun Deng,Zifeng Ding,Michael Sejr Schlichtkrull,Andreas Vlachos*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出了首个社交媒体多模态声明提取基准，评估了现有MLLMs的不足，并提出了意图感知框架MICE来改进


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动事实核查方法主要关注纯文本声明提取，忽视了社交媒体中多模态（文本+图像）虚假信息的挑战。社交媒体帖子通常包含简短非正式文本与图像（如梗图、截图、照片）的组合，这既不同于纯文本声明提取，也不同于图像描述或视觉问答等已研究较多的多模态任务。

Method: 1. 创建首个社交媒体多模态声明提取基准，包含真实社交媒体帖子（文本+图像）和基于事实核查的金标准声明标注；2. 提出三部分评估框架（语义对齐、忠实度、去语境化）；3. 引入MICE（意图感知框架），通过建模修辞意图和上下文线索来改进多模态声明提取。

Result: 评估显示现有最先进的多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在建模修辞意图和上下文线索方面存在困难。提出的MICE框架在意图关键案例中显示出改进效果。

Conclusion: 多模态声明提取是自动事实核查的重要挑战，需要专门的方法来处理社交媒体中文本和图像的组合。意图感知方法能够更好地处理修辞意图和上下文线索，为多模态虚假信息检测提供了新方向。

Abstract: Automated Fact-Checking (AFC) relies on claim extraction as a first step, yet existing methods largely overlook the multimodal nature of today's misinformation. Social media posts often combine short, informal text with images such as memes, screenshots, and photos, creating challenges that differ from both text-only claim extraction and well-studied multimodal tasks like image captioning or visual question answering. In this work, we present the first benchmark for multimodal claim extraction from social media, consisting of posts containing text and one or more images, annotated with gold-standard claims derived from real-world fact-checkers. We evaluate state-of-the-art multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) under a three-part evaluation framework (semantic alignment, faithfulness, and decontextualization) and find that baseline MLLMs struggle to model rhetorical intent and contextual cues. To address this, we introduce MICE, an intent-aware framework which shows improvements in intent-critical cases.

</details>


### [153] [CFMS: Towards Explainable and Fine-Grained Chinese Multimodal Sarcasm Detection Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16372)
*Junzhao Zhang,Hsiu-Yuan Huang,Chenming Tang,Yutong Yang,Yunfang Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 构建了首个中文社交媒体细粒度多模态讽刺检测数据集CFMS，包含2,796个高质量图文对，提供三层标注框架，并提出强化学习增强的上下文学习策略PGDS来优化示例选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态讽刺检测基准存在标注粒度粗和文化覆盖有限的问题，阻碍了细粒度语义理解研究。需要构建针对中文社交媒体的细粒度数据集，并开发更有效的模型方法。

Method: 1) 构建CFMS数据集：包含2,796个高质量中文社交媒体图文对，提供三层标注（讽刺识别、目标识别、解释生成）；2) 创建中英文平行隐喻子集（各200条）；3) 提出PGDS方法：基于强化学习的上下文学习策略，动态优化示例选择。

Result: CFMS为构建可靠的多模态讽刺理解系统提供了坚实基础；PGDS方法在关键任务上显著优于现有基线；细粒度解释标注能有效指导AI生成具有明确讽刺意图的图像；当前模型在隐喻推理方面存在显著局限性。

Conclusion: CFMS填补了中文社交媒体细粒度多模态讽刺检测的空白，PGDS方法通过动态优化示例选择提升了模型性能，为多模态语义理解研究提供了有价值的资源和工具。

Abstract: Multimodal sarcasm detection has recently garnered significant attention. However, existing benchmarks suffer from coarse-grained annotations and limited cultural coverage, which hinder research into fine-grained semantic understanding. To address this, we construct CFMS, the first fine-grained multimodal sarcasm dataset tailored for Chinese social media. It comprises 2,796 high-quality image-text pairs and provides a triple-level annotation framework: sarcasm identification, target recognition, and explanation generation. We find that the fine-grained explanation annotations effectively guide AI in generating images with explicit sarcastic intent. Furthermore, we curate a high-consistency parallel Chinese-English metaphor subset (200 entries each), revealing significant limitations of current models in metaphoric reasoning. To overcome the constraints of traditional retrieval methods, we propose a Reinforcement Learning-augmented In-Context Learning strategy (PGDS) to dynamically optimize exemplar selection. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CFMS provides a solid foundation for building reliable multimodal sarcasm understanding systems, and the PGDS method significantly outperforms existing baselines on key tasks. Our data and code are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/CFMS-E8F9.

</details>


### [154] [SynopticBench: Evaluating Vision-Language Models on Generating Weather Forecast Discussions of the Future](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16451)
*Timothy B. Higgins,Antonios Mamalakis,Chirag Agarwal*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: SynopticBench数据集和SPACE评估框架：用于评估视觉语言模型在天气预测文本生成任务上的性能，包含136万条天气讨论文本与气象图像配对数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在复杂多模态任务上取得显著进展，但气象数据文本生成面临独特挑战：大气是混沌系统，时空尺度变化快速。需要可验证地量化现有VLMs在天气预报数据上的有效性。

Method: 1. 构建SynopticBench数据集：包含1,367,041条美国国家气象局区域预报讨论文本样本，配对500mb位势高度、2米温度、850mb风速等气象预报图像。
2. 提出SPACE评估框架：用于有效评估天气现象文本描述质量的新颖评估方法。

Result: 通过最先进VLMs生成预报讨论的广泛实验显示：现有评估指标在该领域存在敏感性，为天气和气候文本生成的进一步探索提供了基础。

Conclusion: 该工作为评估VLMs在气象文本生成任务上的性能提供了高质量数据集和专门评估框架，揭示了现有评估指标的局限性，推动了天气和气候文本生成领域的研究。

Abstract: Recent advances in visual-language models (VLMs) have led to significant improvements in a plethora of complex multimodal tasks like image captioning, report generation, and visual perception. However, generating text from meteorological data is highly challenging because the atmosphere is a chaotic system that is rapidly changing at various spatial and temporal scales. Given the complexity of atmospheric phenomena, it is critical to verifiably quantify the effectiveness of existing VLMs on weather forecasting data. In this work, we present SynopticBench, a high-quality dataset consisting of 1,367,041 text samples of Area Forecast Discussions created by the National Weather Service over the continental United States paired to images of 500mb geopotential height, 2 meter temperature, and 850mb wind velocity in weather forecasts. We also present Synoptic Phenomena Alignment and Coverage Evaluation (SPACE), a novel evaluation framework that can be used to effectively estimate the quality of text descriptions of synoptic weather phenomena. Extensive experiments on generating forecast discussions using state-of-the-art VLMs show the sensitivity of existing evaluation metrics in this domain and enable further exploration into synoptic weather and climate text generation.

</details>


### [155] [CBRS: Cognitive Blood Request System with Bilingual Dataset and Dual-Layer Filtering for Multi-Platform Social Streams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16665)
*Anik Saha,Mst. Fahmida Sultana Naznin,Zia Ul Hassan Abdullah,Anisa Binte Asad,K. G. Subarno Bithi,A. B. M. Alim Al Islam*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: CBRS是一个多平台框架，使用双层次架构从社交媒体流中高效过滤和解析献血请求，在低资源环境下实现高精度信息提取。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社交媒体上的紧急献血请求常被海量信息淹没，传统应用系统依赖手动输入，在低资源环境中难以有效响应，导致关键信息延迟。

Method: 1) 构建包含11K条孟加拉语、英语和音译孟加拉语的献血请求数据集；2) 采用成本效益高的双层次架构；3) 使用LoRA微调的Llama-3.2-3B模型进行解析；4) 包含对抗性负样本增强鲁棒性。

Result: 过滤任务达到99%准确率和精确率；解析任务中LoRA微调的Llama-3.2-3B模型实现92%零样本准确率，比基础模型提升41.54%，超过GPT-4o-mini、Gemini-2.0-Flash等LLM的少样本性能，同时减少35倍输入token使用。

Conclusion: CBRS为时间敏感、目标导向的任务提供了可扩展、包容性强的信息提取基础，特别是在低资源语言环境中具有实用价值。

Abstract: Urgent blood donation seeking posts and messages on social media often go unnoticed due to the overwhelming volume of daily communications. Traditional app-based systems, reliant on manual input, struggle to reach users in low-resource settings, delaying critical responses. To address this, we introduce the Cognitive Blood Request System (CBRS), a multi-platform framework that efficiently filters and parses blood donation requests from social media streams using a cost-efficient dual-layered architecture. To do so, we curate a novel dataset of 11K parsed blood donation request messages in Bengali, English, and transliterated Bengali, capturing the linguistic diversity of real social media communications. The inclusion of adversarial negatives further enhances the robustness of our model. CBRS achieves an impressive 99% accuracy and precision in filtering, surpassing benchmark methods. In the parsing task, our LoRA finetuned Llama-3.2-3B model achieves 92% zero-shot accuracy, surpassing the base model by 41.54% and exceeding the few-shot performance of GPT-4o-mini, Gemini-2.0-Flash, and other LLMs, while resulting in a 35X reduction in input token usage. This work lays a robust foundation for scalable, inclusive information extraction in time-sensitive, object-focused tasks. Our code, dataset, and trained models are publicly available at [https://github.com/aaniksahaa/CBRS](https://github.com/aaniksahaa/CBRS).

</details>


### [156] [Improving LLM Code Reasoning via Semantic Equivalence Self-Play with Formal Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17010)
*Antonio Valerio Miceli Barone,Poon Tsz Nok*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出一个用于Haskell语义等价性的自博弈框架，利用形式验证指导生成器和评估器之间的对抗训练，通过Liquid Haskell证明验证等价性，基于执行的对抗示例验证不等价性，并采用难度感知课程学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决程序语义等价性验证的挑战，传统方法依赖人工标注或启发式规则，难以扩展到复杂程序。希望通过形式验证与对抗训练相结合，提升模型对程序语义的理解和推理能力。

Method: 1. 自博弈框架：生成器产生程序对，评估器判断等价性；2. 形式验证：使用Liquid Haskell进行等价性证明；3. 对抗训练：基于执行的对抗示例验证不等价性；4. 课程学习：难度感知的渐进式训练；5. 数据集：发布OpInstruct-HSx（约28k已验证Haskell程序）。

Result: 评估器在下游任务中表现出良好的迁移能力：在EquiBench上获得最高13.3个百分点的准确率提升，在PySecDB上也有持续改进。消融研究表明：不等价监督提供数据量，但等价性证明对模型推理能力至关重要。

Conclusion: 形式验证指导的对抗训练能有效提升程序语义等价性判断能力，等价性证明是模型获得推理能力的关键因素。框架和数据集已开源。

Abstract: We introduce a self-play framework for semantic equivalence in Haskell, utilizing formal verification to guide adversarial training between a generator and an evaluator. The framework leverages Liquid Haskell proofs for validating equivalence and execution-based counterexamples for inequivalence, organized via a difficulty-aware curriculum. To facilitate this, we release \textbf{OpInstruct-HSx}, a synthetic dataset of $\approx$28k validated Haskell programs. Empirical experiments show that our evaluator transfers effectively to downstream tasks, achieving up to 13.3pp accuracy gain on EquiBench and consistent gains on PySecDB. Ablation studies on the SEQ-SINQ regimes indicate that while inequivalence supervision provides data volume, equivalence proofs are uniquely responsible for the model's reasoning capabilities. The entire training pipeline and dataset are publicly released on GitHub and Hugging Face respectively.

</details>


### [157] [From Legal Text to Executable Decision Models: Evaluating Structured Representations for Legal Decision Model Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17153)
*David Graus*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 研究探索了使用LLM将法律文本转化为可执行决策模型的可行性，发现添加输入输出约束能显著提升生成质量，但结构相似性与功能等价性并不完全一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将法律文本自动转化为可执行决策逻辑是法律信息学的长期挑战。虽然LLM的出现带来了新希望，但仍需要大量手动编码和评估。本研究利用荷兰环境与规划法的真实数据集，探索中间结构化表示是否能改进LLM生成可执行决策模型的能力。

Method: 使用荷兰政府平台Omgevingsloket的真实数据集，包含生产级决策模型与对应法律文本。比较四种输入条件：原始法律文本、添加语义角色标签的文本、添加输入输出约束的文本、同时添加两者的文本。通过结构评估（图核相似度和描述统计）和结果评估（功能等价性测试）两个维度进行评价。

Result: 输入输出约束带来显著改进（相似度提升37-54%），语义角色标签效果有限。生成的模型在51-53%的测试场景中与黄金标准匹配，尽管生成的模型通常更小更简单。LLM能消除45-55%的冗余传递逻辑。结构相似性与结果等价性是互补的，两者不完全一致。

Conclusion: 中间结构化表示特别是输入输出约束能有效提升LLM生成可执行决策模型的质量。结构相似性和功能等价性评估需要结合使用。研究公开了95个生产决策模型数据集和实验代码，促进可复现性。

Abstract: Transforming legal text into executable decision logic is a longstanding challenge in legal informatics. With the rise of LLMs, this task has gained renewed interest, but remains challenging due to requiring extensive manual coding and evaluation. We use a unique real-world dataset that pairs production-grade decision models with legal text from the Dutch Environment and Planning Act. These models power the Omgevingsloket government platform, where citizens check permit requirements for environmental activities. We study whether intermediate structured representations can improve LLM-based generation of executable decision models from legal text. We compare four input conditions: raw legal text, text enriched with semantic role labels, text enriched with input and output constraints, and text enriched with both. We evaluate along two dimensions: structural evaluation, through similarity to gold decision models with graph kernels and graphs' descriptive statistics, and outcome evaluation, through functional equivalence by executing models on pre-configured test scenarios. Our findings show that I/O constraints provide the dominant improvement (+37-54% similarity over baseline), while semantic role labels show modest improvements. Outcome evaluation shows that generated models match the gold standard on 51-53% of test scenarios, even though generated models are typically smaller and simpler. We find LLMs eliminate redundant pass-through logic that comprises up to 45-55% of nodes. Importantly, structural similarity and outcome equivalence are complementary: structural similarity does not guarantee outcome equivalence, and vice versa. To facilitate reproducibility, we publicly release our dataset of 95 production decision models with associated legal text and all experimental code.

</details>


### [158] [Learning to Control Summaries with Score Ranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17197)
*Hongye Liu,Liang Ding,Ricardo Henao*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于细粒度模型评估分数的损失函数，用于同时提升摘要质量并实现对特定质量维度（如完整性、简洁性）的控制，解决了现有方法在维度间权衡时缺乏可控性的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前摘要研究主要关注同时优化多个质量维度（完整性、简洁性、忠实性），但忽视了在维度间存在权衡时对单个维度的可控生成。例如，提高简洁性可能损害完整性，反之亦然。

Method: 提出一种损失函数，将模型输出与细粒度的模型评估分数（如FineSurE）对齐，既能提升整体摘要质量，又能实现维度特定的控制。在三个预训练模型（LLaMA、Qwen、Mistral）上进行实验。

Result: 该方法在保持与最先进摘要模型相当性能的同时，独特地提供了对单个质量维度的强可控性。

Conclusion: 通过将模型输出与细粒度评估分数对齐，能够同时提升摘要质量并实现对特定质量维度的控制，解决了现有方法在维度权衡时缺乏可控性的问题。

Abstract: Recent advances in summarization research focus on improving summary quality across multiple criteria, such as completeness, conciseness, and faithfulness, by jointly optimizing these dimensions. However, these efforts largely overlook the challenge of controlling summary generation with respect to individual criteria, especially in the presence of their inherent trade-offs. For example, enhancing conciseness can compromise completeness, and vice versa. In this work, we address this gap by proposing a loss function that aligns model outputs with fine-grained, model-based evaluation scores (e.g., from FineSurE), enabling both improvement in summary quality and dimension-specific control. Our approach improves the overall quality of summaries while maintaining the ability to selectively prioritize one criterion over others. Experiments on three pretrained models (LLaMA, Qwen, and Mistral) demonstrate that our method achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art summarizers, while uniquely offering strong controllability over individual quality dimensions.

</details>


### [159] [Calibrating Model-Based Evaluation Metrics for Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17200)
*Hongye Liu,Dhanajit Brahma,Ricardo Henao*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出无需参考摘要、人工标注或昂贵模型指标的摘要评估框架，以及校准方法GIRB，在7个数据集上优于现有基线


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于模型的摘要评估方法需要大语言模型，预测分数经常校准不良，且评估单文档不同摘要的平均质量通常需要多个参考摘要，限制了可靠性

Method: 提出无需参考摘要、人工标注或昂贵模型指标的通用框架，生成个体和平均代理分数；提出组等渗回归分箱(GIRB)校准方法，调整原始预测以更好对齐真实评估指标

Result: 在7个数据集上的实验表明，该方法一致优于现有基线方法

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一种更可靠、更高效的摘要评估解决方案，可扩展到其他连续值和离散值任务

Abstract: Recent advances in summary evaluation are based on model-based metrics to assess quality dimensions, such as completeness, conciseness, and faithfulness. However, these methods often require large language models, and predicted scores are frequently miscalibrated, limiting their reliability. Moreover, evaluating the average quality across different summaries for a single document typically requires access to multiple reference summaries. Here, we propose a general framework that generates individual and average proxy scores without relying on reference summaries, human annotations, or expensive model-based metrics. We also propose group isotonic regression binning (GIRB), a calibration method that adjusts the raw predictions to better align with ground-truth evaluation metrics. While we focus on continuous-value scenarios, such as summarization, the method is applicable to discrete-value tasks, such as question answering. Experiments on seven datasets demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms existing baselines.

</details>


### [160] [Rethinking Meeting Effectiveness: A Benchmark and Framework for Temporal Fine-grained Automatic Meeting Effectiveness Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17260)
*Yihang Li,Chenhui Chu*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出基于LLM的会议有效性自动评估新范式，通过细粒度时间分段评估会议目标达成率，并发布AMI-ME数据集和评估框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前会议评估依赖事后调查，存在可扩展性、成本和可重复性限制，且单一分数无法捕捉协作讨论的动态特性。需要更细粒度、自动化的评估方法。

Method: 定义有效性为随时间的目标达成率，将会议划分为主题片段进行评估。构建AMI-ME数据集（130个会议，2459个人工标注片段），开发基于LLM作为评判者的自动评估框架，对每个片段相对于整体会议目标进行评分。

Result: 建立了该新任务的全面基准，验证了框架在不同会议类型（从商业场景到非结构化讨论）的泛化能力，并评估了从原始语音到评估的端到端系统性能。

Conclusion: 提出的框架有效，为未来会议分析和多方对话研究提供了强基线。数据集和代码将公开可用。

Abstract: Evaluating meeting effectiveness is crucial for improving organizational productivity. Current approaches rely on post-hoc surveys that yield a single coarse-grained score for an entire meeting. The reliance on manual assessment is inherently limited in scalability, cost, and reproducibility. Moreover, a single score fails to capture the dynamic nature of collaborative discussions. We propose a new paradigm for evaluating meeting effectiveness centered on novel criteria and temporal fine-grained approach. We define effectiveness as the rate of objective achievement over time and assess it for individual topical segments within a meeting. To support this task, we introduce the AMI Meeting Effectiveness (AMI-ME) dataset, a new meta-evaluation dataset containing 2,459 human-annotated segments from 130 AMI Corpus meetings. We also develop an automatic effectiveness evaluation framework that uses a Large Language Model (LLM) as a judge to score each segment's effectiveness relative to the overall meeting objectives. Through substantial experiments, we establish a comprehensive benchmark for this new task and evaluate the framework's generalizability across distinct meeting types, ranging from business scenarios to unstructured discussions. Furthermore, we benchmark end-to-end performance starting from raw speech to measure the capabilities of a complete system. Our results validate the framework's effectiveness and provide strong baselines to facilitate future research in meeting analysis and multi-party dialogue. Our dataset and code will be publicly available. The AMI-ME dataset and the Automatic Evaluation Framework are available at: this URL.

</details>


### [161] [Still Between Us? Evaluating and Improving Voice Assistant Robustness to Third-Party Interruptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17358)
*Dongwook Lee,Eunwoo Song,Che Hyun Lee,Heeseung Kim,Sungroh Yoon*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了TPI-Train数据集和TPI-Bench评估框架，用于解决口语语言模型无法区分第三方打断的问题，通过强调声学线索而非语义捷径来提升多说话人场景下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前的口语语言模型在实际部署中缺乏区分第三方打断与主要用户持续对话的能力，容易在上下文切换时失败。现有方法过度依赖文本语义而忽视声学线索，导致在多说话人交互场景中表现不佳。

Method: 1) 创建TPI-Train数据集（88K实例），包含说话人感知的困难负样本，强制模型优先考虑声学线索；2) 开发TPI-Bench评估框架，系统评估打断处理策略和欺骗性语境下的说话人区分能力。

Result: 实验表明，提出的数据集设计有效缓解了语义捷径学习问题（模型过度依赖语义上下文而忽视关键的声学信号）。该框架为口语语言模型提供了更鲁棒的多方交互能力。

Conclusion: 这项工作为克服口语语言模型中文本主导的单模态依赖奠定了基础，推动了更鲁棒的多方口语交互研究。代码已公开可用。

Abstract: While recent Spoken Language Models (SLMs) have been actively deployed in real-world scenarios, they lack the capability to discern Third-Party Interruptions (TPI) from the primary user's ongoing flow, leaving them vulnerable to contextual failures. To bridge this gap, we introduce TPI-Train, a dataset of 88K instances designed with speaker-aware hard negatives to enforce acoustic cue prioritization for interruption handling, and TPI-Bench, a comprehensive evaluation framework designed to rigorously measure the interruption-handling strategy and precise speaker discrimination in deceptive contexts. Experiments demonstrate that our dataset design mitigates semantic shortcut learning-a critical pitfall where models exploit semantic context while neglecting acoustic signals essential for discerning speaker changes. We believe our work establishes a foundational resource for overcoming text-dominated unimodal reliance in SLMs, paving the way for more robust multi-party spoken interaction. The code for the framework is publicly available at https://tpi-va.github.io

</details>


### [162] [Who Watches the Watchmen? Humans Disagree With Translation Metrics on Unseen Domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17393)
*Finn Schmidt,Jan Philip Wahle,Terry Ruas,Bela Gipp*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了机器翻译自动评估指标在领域迁移下的鲁棒性，通过构建跨领域错误跨度标注数据集CD-ESA，发现指标在考虑人类标注变异后鲁棒性显著下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器翻译自动评估指标主要在WMT基准上开发，其在不同领域间的鲁棒性不明确。先前研究在分析未见领域时，混杂了翻译系统、标注者或评估条件的变化，导致领域效应与人类标注噪声难以区分。

Method: 构建系统性多标注者跨领域错误跨度标注数据集CD-ESA，包含18.8k个人类错误跨度标注，涵盖三个语言对。在每个语言对内固定标注者，评估相同六个翻译系统在一个已见新闻领域和两个未见技术领域的表现。

Result: 自动评估指标在片段级别对领域迁移表现出惊人的鲁棒性（一致性达0.69），但考虑人类标注变异后这种鲁棒性基本消失。平均标注可将标注者间一致性提高+0.11。指标在未见化学领域表现较差（标注者间一致性0.78-0.83 vs. 0.96）。

Conclusion: 建议在不同领域评估时，将指标-人类一致性对比于标注者间一致性，而非仅比较原始指标-人类一致性。这有助于更准确地评估指标在跨领域场景下的表现。

Abstract: Automatic evaluation metrics are central to the development of machine translation systems, yet their robustness under domain shift remains unclear. Most metrics are developed on the Workshop on Machine Translation (WMT) benchmarks, raising concerns about their robustness to unseen domains. Prior studies that analyze unseen domains vary translation systems, annotators, or evaluation conditions, confounding domain effects with human annotation noise.
  To address these biases, we introduce a systematic multi-annotator Cross-Domain Error-Span-Annotation dataset (CD-ESA), comprising 18.8k human error span annotations across three language pairs, where we fix annotators within each language pair and evaluate translations of the same six translation systems across one seen news domain and two unseen technical domains. Using this dataset, we first find that automatic metrics appear surprisingly robust to domain-shifts at the segment level (up to 0.69 agreement), but this robustness largely disappears once we account for human label variation. Averaging annotations increases inter-annotator agreement by up to +0.11. Metrics struggle on the unseen chemical domain compared to humans (inter-annotator agreement of 0.78-0.83 vs. 0.96).
  We recommend comparing metric-human agreement against inter-annotator agreement, rather than comparing raw metric-human agreement alone, when evaluating across different domains.

</details>


### [163] [DuConTE: Dual-Granularity Text Encoder with Topology-Constrained Attention for Text-attributed Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17411)
*Lexuan Liang,Tao Zou,Xuxiang Ta,Zekun Qiu*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: DuConTE提出了一种双粒度文本编码器，通过拓扑约束注意力机制，在词令牌粒度和节点粒度上同时编码文本语义，并利用图结构指导语义交互，显著提升了文本属性图的节点分类性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理文本属性图时存在两个主要问题：1）在语言模型编码阶段仅进行词令牌粒度的语义交互；2）忽略了不同节点文本之间的结构依赖关系。这限制了模型捕捉图结构指导下的语义关联的能力。

Method: 提出DuConTE模型，采用两个预训练语言模型的级联架构：第一个在词令牌粒度编码语义，第二个在节点粒度编码语义。在自注意力计算中，基于节点连通性动态调整注意力掩码矩阵，引导模型学习图结构指导的语义关联。在从词令牌嵌入组合节点表示时，分别评估中心节点上下文和邻域上下文中令牌的重要性。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，DuConTE在大多数数据集上达到了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: DuConTE通过双粒度编码和拓扑约束注意力机制，有效整合了文本语义和图结构信息，为文本属性图处理提供了更强大的方法。

Abstract: Text-attributed graphs integrate semantic information of node texts with topological structure, offering significant value in various applications such as document classification and information extraction. Existing approaches typically encode textual content using language models (LMs), followed by graph neural networks (GNNs) to process structural information. However, during the LM-based text encoding phase, most methods not only perform semantic interaction solely at the word-token granularity, but also neglect the structural dependencies among texts from different nodes. In this work, we propose DuConTE, a dual-granularity text encoder with topology-constrained attention. The model employs a cascaded architecture of two pretrained LMs, encoding semantics first at the word-token granularity and then at the node granularity. During the self-attention computation in each LM, we dynamically adjust the attention mask matrix based on node connectivity, guiding the model to learn semantic correlations informed by the graph structure. Furthermore, when composing node representations from word-token embeddings, we separately evaluate the importance of tokens under the center-node context and the neighborhood context, enabling the capture of more contextually relevant semantic information. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that DuConTE achieves state-of-the-art performance on the majority of them.

</details>


### [164] [Peerispect: Claim Verification in Scientific Peer Reviews](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17667)
*Ali Ghorbanpour,Soroush Sadeghian,Alireza Daghighfarsoodeh,Sajad Ebrahimi,Negar Arabzadeh,Seyed Mohammad Hosseini,Ebrahim Bagheri*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: Peerispect是一个交互式系统，用于自动化验证同行评审中的声明，通过提取评审中的可核查声明、从稿件中检索相关证据，并使用自然语言推理进行验证，以提高评审的公平性和可问责性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 同行评审是科学出版的核心环节，但评审者经常包含主观、修辞性或与提交工作不符的声明。在大型会议和期刊的规模下，手动检查这些声明的依据是不可行的。需要自动化工具来评估评审声明的真实性和可验证性，以确保公平性和可问责性。

Method: Peerispect采用模块化的信息检索（IR）流程：1）从同行评审中提取值得核查的声明；2）从稿件中检索相关证据；3）通过自然语言推理验证声明。系统提供可视化界面，直接在论文中高亮显示证据，支持快速检查和解释。系统设计为模块化架构，支持替代的检索器、重排序器和验证器。

Result: 开发了Peerispect系统，包括公开可用的演示应用（https://app.reviewer.ly/app/peerispect）、API服务（https://github.com/Reviewerly-Inc/Peerispect）和视频教程。系统为评审者、作者和程序委员会提供了实用的工具，用于自动化验证评审声明。

Conclusion: Peerispect通过自动化声明级验证，解决了同行评审中的主观性和不准确性问题，提高了评审过程的公平性和可问责性。模块化设计使其具有灵活性和可扩展性，适用于大规模科学出版环境。

Abstract: Peer review is central to scientific publishing, yet reviewers frequently include claims that are subjective, rhetorical, or misaligned with the submitted work. Assessing whether review statements are factual and verifiable is crucial for fairness and accountability. At the scale of modern conferences and journals, manually inspecting the grounding of such claims is infeasible. We present Peerispect, an interactive system that operationalizes claim-level verification in peer reviews by extracting check-worthy claims from peer reviews, retrieving relevant evidence from the manuscript, and verifying the claims through natural language inference. Results are presented through a visual interface that highlights evidence directly in the paper, enabling rapid inspection and interpretation. Peerispect is designed as a modular Information Retrieval (IR) pipeline, supporting alternative retrievers, rerankers, and verifiers, and is intended for use by reviewers, authors, and program committees. We demonstrate Peerispect through a live, publicly available demo (https://app.reviewer.ly/app/peerispect) and API services (https://github.com/Reviewerly-Inc/Peerispect), accompanied by a video tutorial (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pc9RkvkUh14).

</details>


### [165] [Mira-Embeddings-V1: Domain-Adapted Semantic Reranking for Recruitment via LLM-Synthesized Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17738)
*Zhaohua Liang,Zhilin Wang,Renjie Cao,Yining Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出mira-embeddings-v1，一个用于招聘领域的语义重排序系统，通过LLM合成训练数据重塑嵌入空间，并使用轻量级重排序头纠正边界混淆问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 招聘中的候选人筛选通常采用两阶段检索和重排序流程，在有限的审核预算下以召回率为主要目标。现有系统需要在没有大规模人工标注数据的情况下，提高候选人的排序质量。

Method: 1) 使用五阶段提示管道从真实职位描述生成多样化的正样本和硬负样本；2) 应用两轮LoRA适配：JD-JD对比训练，然后是JD-CV三元组对齐；3) 使用BoundaryHead MLP对Top-K结果进行重排序，区分相同职位但不同范围的岗位。

Result: 在300个真实JD的本地池中，Recall@50从68.89%提升到77.55%，Precision@10从35.77%提升到39.62%。在包含44,138个候选人的全局池中，Recall@200达到0.7047，相比基线的0.5969有显著提升。

Conclusion: LLM合成的监督数据结合边界感知的重排序方法，无需重型交叉编码器即可获得稳健的性能提升，为招聘领域的语义匹配提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Candidate sourcing for recruiters is best viewed as a two-stage retrieval and reranking pipeline with recall as the primary objective under a limited review budget. An upstream production retriever first returns a candidate shortlist for each job description (JD), and our goal is to rerank that shortlist so that qualified candidates appear as high as possible. We present mira-embeddings-v1, a semantic reranking system for the recruitment domain that reshapes the embedding space with LLM-synthesized training data and corrects boundary confusions with a lightweight reranking head. Starting from real JDs, we build a five-stage prompt pipeline to generate diverse positive and hard negative samples that sculpt the semantic space from multiple angles. We then apply a two-round LoRA adaptation: JD--JD contrastive training followed by JD--CV triplet alignment on a heterogeneous text dataset. Importantly, these gains require no large-scale manually labeled industrial training pairs: a modest set of real JDs is expanded into supervision through LLM synthesis. Finally, a BoundaryHead MLP reranks the Top-K results to distinguish between roles that share the same title but differ in scope. On a local pool of 300 real JDs with candidates from an upstream production retriever, mira-embeddings-v1 improves Recall@50 from 68.89% (baseline) to 77.55% while lifting Precision@10 from 35.77% to 39.62%. On a supportive global pool over 44,138 candidates judged by a Qwen3-32B rubric, it achieves Recall@200 of 0.7047 versus 0.5969 for the baseline. These results show that LLM-synthesized supervision with boundary-aware reranking yields robust gains without a heavy cross-encoder.

</details>


### [166] [Automatic Slide Updating with User-Defined Dynamic Templates and Natural Language Instructions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17894)
*Kun Zhou,Jiakai He,Wenmian Yang,Zhensheng Wang,Yiquan Zhang,Weijia Jia*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: DynaSlide是一个大规模基准测试，用于通过自然语言指令动态更新用户提供的幻灯片模板，包含20,036个真实世界的指令-执行三元组。SlideAgent是一个基于代理的框架，结合多模态幻灯片解析、自然语言指令定位和工具增强推理，用于更新表格、图表和文本结论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 演示幻灯片是数据驱动报告的主要媒介，但保持复杂的分析型幻灯片最新仍然非常耗时。现有的自动化方法大多遵循固定的模板填充，无法支持多样化、用户创作的幻灯片动态更新。

Method: 提出了SlideAgent框架，结合多模态幻灯片解析、自然语言指令定位和工具增强推理。该框架能够解析用户提供的幻灯片模板，理解自然语言指令，并使用工具增强的推理来更新表格、图表和文本内容，同时保持布局和样式。

Result: 创建了DynaSlide基准测试，包含20,036个真实世界的指令-执行三元组，基于共享外部数据库和商业报告幻灯片。SlideAgent在DynaSlide上提供了强大的参考基线，同时设计了端到端和组件级别的评估协议。

Conclusion: 该研究定义了"通过自然语言指令在用户提供模板上进行动态幻灯片更新"的任务，并提出了相应的基准测试和解决方案。SlideAgent展示了在保持布局和样式的同时更新内容的可行性，为未来研究提供了重要参考。

Abstract: Presentation slides are a primary medium for data-driven reporting, yet keeping complex, analytics-style decks up to date remains labor-intensive. Existing automation methods mostly follow fixed template filling and cannot support dynamic updates for diverse, user-authored slide decks. We therefore define "Dynamic Slide Update via Natural Language Instructions on User-provided Templates" and introduce DynaSlide, a large-scale benchmark with 20,036 real-world instruction-execution triples (source slide, user instruction, target slide) grounded in a shared external database and built from business reporting slides under bring-your-own-template (BYO-template) conditions. To tackle this task, we propose SlideAgent, an agent-based framework that combines multimodal slide parsing, natural language instruction grounding, and tool-augmented reasoning for tables, charts, and textual conclusions. SlideAgent updates content while preserving layout and style, providing a strong reference baseline on DynaSlide. We further design end-to-end and component-level evaluation protocols that reveal key challenges and opportunities for future research. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/XiaoZhou2024/SlideAgent.

</details>


### [167] [ReCoQA: A Benchmark for Tool-Augmented and Multi-Step Reasoning in Real Estate Question and Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17944)
*Yindong Zhang,Wenmian Yang,Yiquan Zhang,Weijia Jia*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: ReCoQA是一个包含29,270个房地产实例的大规模基准测试，用于评估代理在混合工作流（数据库查询+外部API）中的表现，并提出了HIRE-Agent分层框架作为强基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前缺乏能够反映混合工作流（结合数据库查询和外部API）的基准测试，这使得开发能够处理碎片化、多源信息的智能体变得困难。

Method: 1) 提出ReCoQA基准测试，包含机器可验证的中间步骤监督（结构化意图标签、SQL查询、API调用）；2) 提出HIRE-Agent分层框架，采用理解-规划-执行架构，包含前端解析器、规划监督器和执行专家。

Result: HIRE-Agent在ReCoQA基准上表现出色，证明了分层协作对于复杂现实世界推理任务的必要性，为后续研究提供了强基线。

Conclusion: ReCoQA基准测试填补了混合工作流评估的空白，HIRE-Agent的分层框架为处理碎片化、多源信息的智能体开发提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Developing agents capable of navigating fragmented, multi-source information remains challenging, primarily due to the scarcity of benchmarks reflecting hybrid workflows combining database querying with external APIs. To bridge this gap, we introduce ReCoQA, a large-scale benchmark of 29,270 real-estate instances featuring machine-verifiable supervision for intermediate steps, including structured intent labels, SQL queries, and API calls. Complementarily, we propose HIRE-Agent, a hierarchical framework instantiating an understand-plan-execute architecture as a strong baseline. By orchestrating a Front-end parser, a planning Supervisor, and execution Specialists, HIRE-Agent effectively integrates heterogeneous evidence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HIRE-Agent constitutes a strong baseline and substantiates the necessity of hierarchical collaboration for complex, real-world reasoning tasks.

</details>


### [168] [SignDPO: Multi-level Direct Preference Optimisation for Skeleton-based Gloss-free Sign Language Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18034)
*Muxin Pu,Xiao-Ming Wu,Mei Kuan Lim,Chun Yong Chong,Wei Li,Chen Change Loy*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: SignDPO：用于手语翻译的多层次直接偏好优化框架，通过空间、时间和语言三个维度的偏好对齐，提升骨架手语翻译的语义准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于骨架的手语翻译模型主要使用最大似然估计，受限于模仿范式，缺乏对细粒度时空细微差别的判别敏感性，容易导致语义漂移。需要从简单的序列模仿转向结构化偏好对齐。

Method: 1) 分层扰动策略：自动构建全局和局部粒度的空间和时间非偏好样本；2) 自引导机制：利用解码器交叉注意力分数识别和扰动语义显著的骨架区域；3) 自动语言级偏好生成器：微调专用扰动模型捕获复杂输出级失败模式。

Result: 在CSL-Daily、How2Sign和OpenASL三个基准测试中，SignDPO始终优于最先进的无词汇方法，甚至可与成熟的基于词汇方法相媲美。

Conclusion: 多层次偏好对齐是弥合高熵骨架轨迹与离散语言语义之间差距的强大范式，为手语翻译提供了一种有效的优化框架。

Abstract: We present SignDPO, a novel multi-level Direct Preference Optimisation (DPO) framework designed to enhance the alignment of skeleton-based Sign Language Translation. While current skeleton-based models have made significant progress using Maximum Likelihood Estimation, they are primarily constrained by an imitation-based paradigm that lacks discriminative sensitivity to the fine-grained spatio-temporal nuances of sign language, often leading to semantic drift. To address this, SignDPO shifts the optimisation goal from simple sequence mimicry to structured preference alignment across spatial, temporal, and linguistic dimensions. Our framework involves three key designs. First, we introduce a hierarchical perturbation strategy to construct spatial and temporal non-preferred samples at both global and local granularities automatically. Second, we propose a self-guiding mechanism that leverages decoder cross-attention scores to identify and perturb semantically salient skeletal regions, forcing the model to distinguish genuine sign signals from structural distortions. Third, we establish an automated language-level preference generator by fine-tuning a dedicated perturbation model, capturing complex output-level failure modes without manual annotation. Extensive experiments on three widely adopted benchmarks, CSL-Daily, How2Sign, and OpenASL, demonstrate that SignDPO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art gloss-free methods and even rivals established gloss-based ones. Our results suggest that multi-level preference alignment is a powerful paradigm for bridging the gap between high-entropy skeletal trajectories and discrete linguistic semantics.

</details>


### [169] [FLiP: Towards understanding and interpreting multimodal multilingual sentence embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18109)
*Santosh Kesiraju,Bolaji Yusuf,Šimon Sedláček,Oldřich Plchot,Petr Schwarz*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: FLiP模型通过因子化线性投影分析预训练句子嵌入空间，能够从多语言、多模态和API嵌入中恢复超过75%的词汇内容，揭示编码器的模态和语言偏见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有句子嵌入评估主要依赖下游任务，缺乏对嵌入空间内在特性的理解。作者希望开发一种诊断工具，直接分析预训练句子嵌入空间的内容和偏见，而不依赖传统评估任务。

Method: 提出因子化线性投影（FLiP）模型，训练线性投影从句子嵌入中恢复词汇内容。在多种句子编码器（多语言的LaBSE、多模态的SONAR、API-based的Gemini）上进行实验，覆盖高资源和中资源语言。

Result: FLiP能够从嵌入中恢复超过75%的词汇内容，显著优于非因子化基线。分析揭示了所选句子编码器在模态和语言上的偏见，为实践者提供了内在洞察。

Conclusion: FLiP是一种有效的诊断工具，能够深入理解句子嵌入空间，揭示编码器的内在特性，为模型分析和选择提供新视角。

Abstract: This paper presents factorized linear projection (FLiP) models for understanding pretrained sentence embedding spaces. We train FLiP models to recover the lexical content from multilingual (LaBSE), multimodal (SONAR) and API-based (Gemini) sentence embedding spaces in several high- and mid-resource languages. We show that FLiP can recall more than 75% of lexical content from the embeddings, significantly outperforming existing non-factorized baselines. Using this as a diagnostic tool, we uncover the modality and language biases across the selected sentence encoders and provide practitioners with intrinsic insights about the encoders without relying on conventional downstream evaluation tasks. Our implementation is public https://github.com/BUTSpeechFIT/FLiP.

</details>


### [170] [FreezeEmpath: Efficient Training for Empathetic Spoken Chatbots with Frozen LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18159)
*Yun Hong,Yan Zhou,Yang Feng*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: FreezeEmpath：一种基于冻结LLM参数的高效端到端共情语音聊天机器人，仅使用现有语音指令数据和语音情感识别数据进行训练，无需昂贵的共情语音指令数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于LLM的共情语音聊天机器人面临三大挑战：1）依赖昂贵的共情语音指令数据；2）生成语音缺乏情感表现力；3）跨模态共情指令微调可能导致灾难性遗忘和通用能力下降。需要一种更简单高效的训练方法。

Method: 提出FreezeEmpath，一种端到端共情语音聊天机器人。核心创新是保持LLM参数冻结，仅使用现有语音指令数据和语音情感识别数据进行训练，避免了对昂贵共情语音数据的依赖，同时防止了灾难性遗忘。

Result: 实验表明FreezeEmpath能够生成情感丰富的语音，在共情对话、语音情感识别和语音问答任务中优于其他共情模型，证明了训练策略的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过冻结LLM参数并利用现有语音数据，FreezeEmpath提供了一种简单高效的共情语音聊天机器人训练方法，解决了数据依赖和灾难性遗忘问题，同时保持了情感表现力。

Abstract: Empathy is essential for fostering natural interactions in spoken dialogue systems, as it enables machines to recognize the emotional tone of human speech and deliver empathetic responses. Recent research has made significant progress in developing empathetic spoken chatbots based on large language models (LLMs). However, several challenges still exist when training such models, including reliance on costly empathetic speech instruction data and a lack of emotional expressiveness in the generated speech. Finetuning LLM with cross-modal empathetic instruction data may also lead to catastrophic forgetting and a degradation of its general capability. To address these challenges, we propose FreezeEmpath, an end-to-end empathetic spoken chatbot trained in a simple and efficient manner. The entire training process relies solely on existing speech instruction data and speech emotion recognition (SER) data, while keeping the LLM's parameters frozen. Experiments demonstrate that FreezeEmpath is able to generate emotionally expressive speech and outperforms other empathetic models in empathetic dialogue, SER, and SpokenQA tasks, demonstrating the effectiveness of our training strategy.

</details>


### [171] [Model in Distress: Sentiment Analysis on French Synthetic Social Media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18226)
*Pierre-Carl Langlais,Pavel Chizhov,Yannick Detrois,Carlos Rosas Hinostroza,Ivan P. Yamshchikov,Bastien Perroy*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出一个可泛化的合成数据生成管道，用于客户反馈分析，通过回译生成170万条法语推文合成数据，训练6亿参数推理模型，在客户困扰检测任务上达到77-79%准确率，媲美SOTA专有LLM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决社交媒体客户反馈分析的三大挑战：标注数据成本高、多语言评估集稀缺、隐私问题阻碍数据共享和可复现性。

Method: 开发通用合成数据生成管道，采用回译技术结合微调模型，从小规模种子语料生成170万条合成推文，并生成合成推理轨迹，训练6亿参数的英语和法语推理模型。

Result: 训练出的推理模型在人工标注评估数据上达到77-79%准确率，匹配或超越SOTA专有LLM和专用编码器，同时降低标注成本并保护用户隐私。

Conclusion: 该方法可扩展到其他用例和语言，为低资源语言和隐私敏感场景下的NLP任务提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Automated analysis of customer feedback on social media is hindered by three challenges: the high cost of annotated training data, the scarcity of evaluation sets, especially in multilingual settings, and privacy concerns that prevent data sharing and reproducibility. We address these issues by developing a generalizable synthetic data generation pipeline applied to a case study on customer distress detection in French public transportation. Our approach utilizes backtranslation with fine-tuned models to generate 1.7 million synthetic tweets from a small seed corpus, complemented by synthetic reasoning traces. We train 600M-parameter reasoners with English and French reasoning that achieve 77-79% accuracy on human-annotated evaluation data, matching or exceeding SOTA proprietary LLMs and specialized encoders. Beyond reducing annotation costs, our pipeline preserves privacy by eliminating the exposure of sensitive user data. Our methodology can be adopted for other use cases and languages.

</details>


### [172] [Where Do Self-Supervised Speech Models Become Unfair?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18249)
*Felix Herron,Maja Hjuler,Solange Rossato,Alexandre Allauzen,François Portet*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文首次对预训练自监督语音编码器模型（S3Ms）进行了分层公平性分析，发现这些模型从第一层开始就存在对某些说话者群体的偏见，并且说话者识别（SID）和自动语音识别（ASR）任务在分层偏见模式上呈现相反关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语音编码器模型已知在某些说话者群体上表现更好，但缺乏从技术层面解释这种偏见原因的研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，首次对预训练自监督语音编码器模型进行分层公平性分析。

Method: 对预训练自监督语音编码器模型（S3Ms）进行分层公平性分析，探测每个嵌入层在说话者识别（SID）和自动语音识别（ASR）任务中的表现。研究包括原始预训练模型和经过ASR微调的模型。

Result: 发现S3Ms从第一层开始就对某些说话者群体产生偏见；SID偏见在最小化整体SID错误的层中最小化，而ASR偏见在最小化整体ASR错误的层中最大化；ASR微调后这种相反的偏见/错误关系仍然存在，表明偏见在预训练阶段就已建立且难以消除。

Conclusion: 语音编码器模型在预训练阶段就建立了对某些说话者群体的偏见，这种偏见在模型的不同层中呈现任务特定的模式，且难以通过微调完全消除，这对公平语音技术发展提出了重要挑战。

Abstract: Speech encoder models are known to model members of some speaker groups (SGs) better than others. However, there has been little work in establishing why this occurs on a technological level. To our knowledge, we present the first layerwise fairness analysis of pretrained self-supervised speech encoder models (S3Ms), probing each embedding layer for speaker identification (SID) automatic speech recognition (ASR). We find S3Ms produce embeddings biased against certain SGs for both tasks, starting at the very first latent layers. Furthermore, we find opposite patterns of layerwise bias for SID vs ASR for all models in our study: SID bias is minimized in layers that minimize overall SID error; on the other hand, ASR bias is maximized in layers that minimize overall ASR error. The inverse bias/error relationship for ASR is unaffected when probing S3Ms that are finetuned for ASR, suggesting SG-level bias is established during pretraining and is difficult to remove.

</details>


### [173] [An Existence Proof for Neural Language Models That Can Explain Garden-Path Effects via Surprisal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18293)
*Ryo Yoshida,Shinnosuke Isono,Taiga Someya,Yohei Oseki,Tatsuki Kuribayashi*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 通过微调语言模型在花园路径句子上，研究发现可以构建一个神经语言模型，其惊奇度既能解释花园路径效应，又能预测自然语料库中的人类阅读时间，为惊奇度理论提供了存在性证明。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 惊奇度理论假设人类句子处理难度与惊奇度（给定上下文下单词的负对数概率）线性相关。虽然神经语言模型的惊奇度能解释简单句子的处理难度，但在需要句法消歧的花园路径句子上严重低估了处理难度。这导致有人认为这类句子的处理难度不能简化为惊奇度，但可能是神经语言模型与人类在下一词预测上存在差异。

Method: 研究没有使用现成的神经语言模型，而是对这些模型在花园路径句子上进行微调，以使基于惊奇度的阅读时间估计更好地与实际人类阅读时间对齐。通过这种方法探索是否能构建一个既能解释花园路径效应又能保持一般语言模型能力的神经语言模型。

Result: 微调后的语言模型没有过拟合，成功捕捉了保留测试集上花园路径项目的人类阅读减速现象；它们甚至提高了对自然语料库中人类阅读时间的预测能力，并保持了一般的语言模型能力。

Conclusion: 研究为能够通过惊奇度同时解释花园路径效应和自然阅读时间的神经语言模型提供了存在性证明，但也提出了一个理论问题：什么样的证据才能真正证伪惊奇度理论？

Abstract: Surprisal theory hypothesizes that the difficulty of human sentence processing increases linearly with surprisal, the negative log-probability of a word given its context. Computational psycholinguistics has tested this hypothesis using language models (LMs) as proxies for human prediction. While surprisal derived from recent neural LMs generally captures human processing difficulty on naturalistic corpora that predominantly consist of simple sentences, it severely underestimates processing difficulty on sentences that require syntactic disambiguation (garden-path effects). This leads to the claim that the processing difficulty of such sentences cannot be reduced to surprisal, although it remains possible that neural LMs simply differ from humans in next-word prediction. In this paper, we investigate whether it is truly impossible to construct a neural LM that can explain garden-path effects via surprisal. Specifically, instead of evaluating off-the-shelf neural LMs, we fine-tune these LMs on garden-path sentences so as to better align surprisal-based reading-time estimates with actual human reading times. Our results show that fine-tuned LMs do not overfit and successfully capture human reading slowdowns on held-out garden-path items; they even improve predictive power for human reading times on naturalistic corpora and preserve their general LM capabilities. These results provide an existence proof for a neural LM that can explain both garden-path effects and naturalistic reading times via surprisal, but also raise a theoretical question: what kind of evidence can truly falsify surprisal theory?

</details>


### [174] [On the Importance and Evaluation of Narrativity in Natural Language AI Explanations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18311)
*Mateusz Cedro,David Martens*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出将叙事结构引入可解释AI，开发了七个自动指标来评估解释的叙事质量，并提出了通用的XAI叙事生成规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前XAI方法主要生成静态特征重要性列表，虽然能说明什么影响了预测，但不能解释为什么发生预测。从社会科学和语言学角度看，叙事形式的解释更能支持人类理解。

Method: 基于叙事解释的四个特性（连续结构、因果机制、语言流畅性、词汇多样性），提出了七个自动指标来量化解释的叙事质量，并在六个数据集上对现有方法进行基准测试。

Result: 提出的指标比标准NLP指标更能可靠地区分描述性和叙事性解释，标准NLP指标可能被无解释内容的同义反复文本匹配或超越。

Conclusion: 叙事形式的XAI解释能更好地支持人类理解，提出的指标和生成规则为开发更有效的解释方法提供了框架。

Abstract: Explainable AI (XAI) aims to make the behaviour of machine learning models interpretable, yet many explanation methods remain difficult to understand. The integration of Natural Language Generation into XAI aims to deliver explanations in textual form, making them more accessible to practitioners. Current approaches, however, largely yield static lists of feature importances. Although such explanations indicate what influences the prediction, they do not explain why the prediction occurs. In this study, we draw on insights from social sciences and linguistics, and argue that XAI explanations should be presented in the form of narratives. Narrative explanations support human understanding through four defining properties: continuous structure, cause-effect mechanisms, linguistic fluency, and lexical diversity. We show that standard Natural Language Processing (NLP) metrics based solely on token probability or word frequency fail to capture these properties and can be matched or exceeded by tautological text that conveys no explanatory content. To address this issue, we propose seven automatic metrics that quantify the narrative quality of explanations along the four identified dimensions. We benchmark current state-of-the-art explanation generation methods on six datasets and show that the proposed metrics separate descriptive from narrative explanations more reliably than standard NLP metrics. Finally, to further advance the field, we propose a set of problem-agnostic XAI Narrative generation rules for producing natural language XAI explanations, so that the resulting XAI Narratives exhibit stronger narrative properties and align with the findings from the linguistic and social science literature.

</details>


### [175] [ComPASS: Towards Personalized Agentic Social Support via Tool-Augmented Companionship](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18356)
*Zhaopei Huang,Yanfeng Jia,Jiayi Zhao,Xinjie Zhang,Wenxuan Wang,Qin Jin*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: ComPASS：一个基于社会支持心理学的工具增强型对话系统，通过外部工具执行多样化行动来提供实质性陪伴，构建了首个个性化社会支持基准并微调了专用模型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有共情对话系统在响应形式和内容上受限，难以满足不同用户和情境的多样化需求。需要让智能体能够执行实质性行动而不仅仅是生成对话，基于心理学中的"社会支持"概念提供更人性化的陪伴

Method: 1) 设计了12个面向用户的多媒体应用工具，覆盖人机交互中的各类社会支持行为；2) 通过多步骤自动合成和人工精炼构建了首个个性化社会支持基准ComPASS-Bench；3) 基于该基准合成工具使用记录微调Qwen3-8B模型得到ComPASS-Qwen

Result: 评估显示：LLMs能高成功率生成有效的工具调用请求，但在最终响应质量上仍有显著差距；工具增强的响应比直接生成共情对话表现更好；微调的ComPASS-Qwen相比基础模型有显著提升，性能可与多个大规模模型相媲美

Conclusion: 工具增强的社会支持系统能提供更实质性、多样化的陪伴，通过专用基准和模型微调能显著提升性能，为构建更人性化的交互系统提供了新方向

Abstract: Developing compassionate interactive systems requires agents to not only understand user emotions but also provide diverse, substantive support. While recent works explore empathetic dialogue generation, they remain limited in response form and content, struggling to satisfy diverse needs across users and contexts. To address this, we explore empowering agents with external tools to execute diverse actions. Grounded in the psychological concept of "social support", this paradigm delivers substantive, human-like companionship. Specifically, we first design a dozen user-centric tools simulating various multimedia applications, which can cover different types of social support behaviors in human-agent interaction scenarios. We then construct ComPASS-Bench, the first personalized social support benchmark for LLM-based agents, via multi-step automated synthesis and manual refinement. Based on ComPASS-Bench, we further synthesize tool use records to fine-tune the Qwen3-8B model, yielding a task-specific ComPASS-Qwen. Comprehensive evaluations across two settings reveal that while the evaluated LLMs can generate valid tool-calling requests with high success rates, significant gaps remain in final response quality. Moreover, tool-augmented responses achieve better overall performance than directly producing conversational empathy. Notably, our trained ComPASS-Qwen demonstrates substantial improvements over its base model, achieving comparable performance to several large-scale models. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/hzp3517/ComPASS.

</details>


### [176] [IceBreaker for Conversational Agents: Breaking the First-Message Barrier with Personalized Starters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18375)
*Hongwei Zheng,Weiqi Wu,Zhengjia Wang,Guanyu Jiang,Haoming Li,Tianyu Wu,Yongchun Zhu,Jingwu Chen,Feng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: IceBreaker提出对话启动生成技术，通过共振感知兴趣蒸馏和交互导向启动生成，解决用户有模糊需求但无明确查询意图时的"首消息障碍"，在大型对话代理产品中显著提升用户活跃度和点击率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对话系统主要关注在对话进行中的激活，但忽视了对话启动阶段的瓶颈。用户在对话开始时可能有模糊需求但无明确查询意图，形成"首消息障碍"，导致对话无法开始。需要解决冷启动问题，引导用户进入对话。

Method: IceBreaker将人类破冰过程建模为两步握手：1) 共振感知兴趣蒸馏：从会话摘要中提取触发兴趣，唤起用户共鸣；2) 交互导向启动生成：通过个性化偏好对齐和自增强循环优化，最大化用户参与度。

Result: 在世界上最大的对话代理产品之一的在线A/B测试中，IceBreaker将用户活跃天数提升了+0.184%，点击率提升了+9.425%，并已部署到生产环境中。

Conclusion: IceBreaker成功解决了对话启动阶段的冷启动问题，通过个性化启动生成有效引导用户进入对话，显著提升了用户参与度，为对话系统的主动式交互提供了新方向。

Abstract: Conversational agents, such as ChatGPT and Doubao, have become essential daily assistants for billions of users. To further enhance engagement, these systems are evolving from passive responders to proactive companions. However, existing efforts focus on activation within ongoing dialogues, while overlooking a key real-world bottleneck. In the conversation initiation stage, users may have a vague need but no explicit query intent, creating a first-message barrier where the conversation holds before it begins. To overcome this, we introduce Conversation Starter Generation: generating personalized starters to guide users into conversation. However, unlike in-conversation stages where immediate context guides the response, initiation must operate in a cold-start moment without explicit user intent. To pioneer in this direction, we present IceBreaker that frames human ice-breaking as a two-step handshake: (i) evoke resonance via Resonance-Aware Interest Distillation from session summaries to capture trigger interests, and (ii) stimulate interaction via Interaction-Oriented Starter Generation, optimized with personalized preference alignment and a self-reinforced loop to maximize engagement. Online A/B tests on one of the world's largest conversational agent products show that IceBreaker improves user active days by +0.184% and click-through rate by +9.425%, and has been deployed in production.

</details>


### [177] [LQM: Linguistically Motivated Multidimensional Quality Metrics for Machine Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18490)
*Samar M. Magdy,Fakhraddin Alwajih,Abdellah El Mekki,Wesam El-Sayed,Muhammad Abdul-Mageed*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: LQM是一个针对机器翻译的多维质量评估框架，专门解决阿拉伯语等多语体语言中的方言和文化特定错误，通过六个语言学层次进行错误诊断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MT评估框架大多是语言无关的，但无法捕捉阿拉伯语等多语体语言中的方言和文化特定错误。这些错误源于语言变体、内容覆盖和语用适当性等方面的不匹配，而不仅仅是表面形式的问题。

Method: 提出了LQM：基于语言学的多维质量评估框架，包含六个语言学层次：社会语言学、语用学、语义学、形态句法学、正字法和字形学。构建了包含7种阿拉伯语方言的3,850句平行语料库，对6个LLM进行零样本评估，并进行专家级人工标注。

Result: 产生了6,113个标注错误片段，涵盖3,495个错误句子，以及严重性加权的质量分数。虽然验证于阿拉伯语，但LQM是语言无关的框架，可应用于其他语言。

Conclusion: LQM提供了一个全面的语言学驱动框架，用于评估多语体语言中的MT错误，弥补了现有评估方法的不足，特别适用于方言和文化特定错误的检测。

Abstract: Existing MT evaluation frameworks, including automatic metrics and human evaluation schemes such as Multidimensional Quality Metrics (MQM), are largely language-agnostic. However, they often fail to capture dialect- and culture-specific errors in diglossic languages (e.g., Arabic), where translation failures stem from mismatches in language variety, content coverage, and pragmatic appropriateness rather than surface form alone.We introduce LQM: Linguistically Motivated Multidimensional Quality Metrics for MT. LQM is a hierarchical error taxonomy for diagnosing MT errors through six linguistically grounded levels: sociolinguistics, pragmatics, semantics, morphosyntax, orthography, and graphetics (Figure 1). We construct a bidirectional parallel corpus of 3,850 sentences (550 per variety) spanning seven Arabic dialects (Egyptian, Emirati, Jordanian, Mauritanian, Moroccan, Palestinian, and Yemeni), derived from conversational, culturally rich content. We evaluate six LLMs in a zero-shot setting and conduct expert span-level human annotation using LQM, producing 6,113 labeled error spans across 3,495 unique erroneous sentences, along with severity-weighted quality scores. We complement this analysis with an automatic metric (spBLEU). Though validated here on Arabic, LQM is a language-agnostic framework designed to be easily applied to or adapted for other languages. LQM annotated errors data, prompts, and annotation guidelines are publicly available at https://github.com/UBC-NLP/LQM_MT.

</details>


### [178] [Diagnosing LLM-based Rerankers in Cold-Start Recommender Systems: Coverage, Exposure and Practical Mitigations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16318)
*Ekaterina Lemdiasova,Nikita Zmanovskii*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 对冷启动电影推荐中交叉编码器重排器的系统诊断研究，发现LLM重排器在召回覆盖率、曝光偏差和分数区分度方面存在严重问题，流行度排名显著优于LLM重排


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM和交叉编码器重排器在改进推荐系统方面受到关注，特别是在冷启动场景中。然而实际部署显示LLM方法与简单基线之间存在显著性能差距，需要系统诊断研究来理解这些差距的原因

Method: 使用Serendipity-2018数据集，在冷启动电影推荐场景中对交叉编码器重排器进行系统诊断研究。通过500个用户的多随机种子控制实验，分析三个关键失败模式：召回覆盖率、曝光偏差和分数区分度

Result: 识别出三个关键失败模式：1) 候选生成召回覆盖率低(recall@200=0.109 vs 基线0.609)；2) 严重曝光偏差(重排器集中在3个独特项目 vs 随机基线497个)；3) 相关与不相关项目间分数区分度小(平均差异=0.098, Cohen's d=0.13)。流行度排名显著优于LLM重排(HR@10: 0.268 vs 0.008, p<0.001)

Conclusion: 性能差距主要归因于检索阶段限制而非重排器能力。提出可操作建议：混合检索策略、候选池大小优化和分数校准技术。所有代码、配置和实验结果已开源供复现

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) and cross-encoder rerankers have gained attention for improving recommender systems, particularly in cold-start scenarios where user interaction history is limited. However, practical deployment reveals significant performance gaps between LLM-based approaches and simple baselines. This paper presents a systematic diagnostic study of cross-encoder rerankers in cold-start movie recommendation using the Serendipity-2018 dataset. Through controlled experiments with 500 users across multiple random seeds, we identify three critical failure modes: (1) low retrieval coverage in candidate generation (recall@200 = 0.109 vs. 0.609 for baselines), (2) severe exposure bias with rerankers concentrating recommendations on 3 unique items versus 497 for random baseline, and (3) minimal score discrimination between relevant and irrelevant items (mean difference = 0.098, Cohen's d = 0.13). We demonstrate that popularity-based ranking substantially outperforms LLM reranking (HR@10: 0.268 vs. 0.008, p < 0.001), with the performance gap primarily attributable to retrieval stage limitations rather than reranker capacity. Based on these findings, we provide actionable recommendations including hybrid retrieval strategies, candidate pool size optimization, and score calibration techniques. All code, configurations, and experimental results are made available for reproducibility.

</details>


### [179] [Omni-Embed-Audio: Leveraging Multimodal LLMs for Robust Audio-Text Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18360)
*HaeJun Yoo,Yongseop Shin,Insung Lee,Myoung-Wan Koo,Du-Seong Chang*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: OEA利用多模态LLM构建音频检索编码器，引入用户意图查询评估检索鲁棒性，在文本检索和困难负样本区分上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音频-文本检索系统基于CLAP在传统基准上表现良好，但这些基准使用标题式查询，与真实搜索行为差异大，无法充分评估实际检索鲁棒性。

Method: 提出OEA检索编码器，利用具有原生音频理解能力的多模态LLM。引入用户意图查询（UIQs）包含五种自然搜索行为：问题、命令、关键词标签、改写和基于排除的负查询。针对负查询开发困难负样本挖掘流程，并提出区分度指标（HNSR, TFR）。

Result: 在AudioCaps、Clotho和MECAT数据集上，OEA在文本到音频检索性能上与最先进的M2D-CLAP相当，但在两个关键领域有明显优势：1）文本到文本检索相对提升22%；2）困难负样本区分度显著提升（HNSR@10提升4.3个百分点，TFR@10相对提升34.7%）。

Conclusion: LLM骨干网络为复杂查询提供更优越的语义理解能力，多模态LLM在音频检索中展现出更好的语义理解优势。

Abstract: Audio-text retrieval systems based on Contrastive Language-Audio Pretraining (CLAP) achieve strong performance on traditional benchmarks; however, these benchmarks rely on caption-style queries that differ substantially from real-world search behavior, limiting their assessment of practical retrieval robustness. We present Omni-Embed-Audio (OEA), a retrieval-oriented encoder leveraging multimodal LLMs with native audio understanding. To systematically evaluate robustness beyond caption-style queries, we introduce User-Intent Queries (UIQs) - five formulations reflecting natural search behaviors: questions, commands, keyword tags, paraphrases, and exclusion-based negative queries. For negative queries, we develop a hard negative mining pipeline and propose discrimination metrics (HNSR, TFR) assessing models' ability to suppress acoustically similar distractors. Experiments on AudioCaps, Clotho, and MECAT show that OEA achieves comparable text-to-audio retrieval performance to state-of-the-art M2D-CLAP, while demonstrating clear advantages in two critical areas: (1) dominant text-to-text retrieval (+22% relative improvement), and (2) substantially superior hard negative discrimination (+4.3%p HNSR@10, +34.7% relative TFR@10), revealing that LLM backbones provide superior semantic understanding of complex queries.

</details>


### [180] [Brain-CLIPLM: Decoding Compressed Semantic Representations in EEG for Language Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16370)
*Xiaoli Yang,Huiyuan Tian,Yurui Li,Jianyu Zhang,Shijian Li,Gang Pan*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出Brain-CLIPLM框架，将EEG到文本解码重新定义为语义压缩恢复而非完整句子重建，通过对比学习提取语义锚点，再使用检索增强LLM进行句子重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非侵入性脑电图（EEG）信号的信噪比低、信息带宽有限，传统方法假设能从EEG中恢复完整句子级语言结构可能不成立。作者提出语义压缩假说，认为EEG编码的是压缩的语义锚点而非完整语言结构。

Method: 提出Brain-CLIPLM两阶段框架：1）通过对比学习从EEG中提取语义锚点；2）使用检索增强的大型语言模型（LLM）配合思维链（CoT）推理进行句子重建。遵循粒度匹配原则，使解码复杂度与神经信息容量对齐。

Result: 在苏黎世认知语言处理语料库上，Brain-CLIPLM达到67.55% top-5和85.00% top-25句子检索准确率，显著优于直接解码基线。跨被试评估确认了稳健的泛化能力。控制分析表明EEG表示携带超越语言模型先验的句子特定信息。

Conclusion: EEG到文本解码更适合被框架化为恢复压缩的语义内容而非重建完整句子，为非侵入性脑机接口提供了生物学基础和数据高效的途径。

Abstract: Decoding natural language from non-invasive electroencephalography (EEG) remains fundamentally limited by low signal-to-noise ratio and restricted information bandwidth. This raises a fundamental question regarding whether sentence-level linguistic structure can be reliably recovered from such signals. In this work, we suggest that this assumption may not hold under realistic information constraints, and instead propose a semantic compression hypothesis in which EEG signals encode a compressed set of semantic anchors rather than full linguistic structure. Under our new perspective, direct sentence reconstruction becomes an overparameterized objective relative to the intrinsic information capacity of EEG. To address this mismatch, we introduce Brain-CLIPLM, a two-stage framework that decomposes EEG-to-text decoding into semantic anchor extraction via contrastive learning and sentence reconstruction using a retrieval-grounded large language model (LLM) with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, following a granularity matching principle that aligns decoding complexity with neural information capacity. Evaluated on the Zurich Cognitive Language Processing Corpus, Brain-CLIPLM achieves 67.55\% top-5 and 85.00\% top-25 sentence retrieval accuracy, significantly outperforming direct decoding baseline, while cross-subject evaluation confirms robust generalization. Control analyses, including permutation testing, further demonstrate that EEG-derived representations carry sentence-specific information beyond language model priors. These results suggest that EEG-to-text decoding is better framed as recovering compressed semantic content rather than reconstructing full sentences, providing a biologically grounded and data-efficient pathway for non-invasive brain-computer interfaces.

</details>


### [181] [Evaluating Adaptive Personalization of Educational Readings with Simulated Learners](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16744)
*Ryan T. Woo,Anmol Rao,Aryan Keluskar,Yinong Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出一个基于理论驱动的模拟学习者框架，用于评估教育阅读材料的自适应个性化。系统从开放教科书构建学习目标和知识组件本体，在浏览器中管理本体图谱，标记教科书内容，并生成对齐的阅读评估对。模拟读者通过记忆模型学习，使用BKT驱动自适应。在三个学科中测试，计算机科学显著改善，无机化学有积极但不显著增益，普通生物学中性至轻微负面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个系统化的框架来评估教育阅读材料的自适应个性化效果，解决传统评估方法缺乏理论基础和难以大规模测试的问题。通过模拟学习者来系统研究不同学科领域中自适应阅读策略的有效性。

Method: 1) 从开放教科书构建学习目标和知识组件本体；2) 在浏览器中管理本体图谱；3) 标记教科书内容块；4) 生成对齐的阅读评估对；5) 使用Construction-Integration记忆模型模拟读者学习；6) 结合DIME读者因素、KREC错误概念修正和New Dale-Chall可读性信号；7) 基于学习者记忆状态进行答案选择；8) 使用BKT（贝叶斯知识追踪）驱动自适应调整。

Result: 在三个学科领域测试：1) 计算机科学：自适应阅读显著改善学习效果；2) 无机化学：有积极但不显著的增益；3) 普通生物学：中性至轻微负面效果。每个条件使用50个模拟学习者进行匹配队列测试。

Conclusion: 自适应个性化阅读的效果具有学科依赖性，在计算机科学领域效果显著，但在其他学科中效果有限或不确定。该方法为教育技术评估提供了理论驱动的模拟框架。

Abstract: We present a framework for evaluating adaptive personalization of educational reading materials with theory-grounded simulated learners. The system builds a learning-objective and knowledge-component ontology from open textbooks, curates it in a browser-based Ontology Atlas, labels textbook chunks with ontology entities, and generates aligned reading-assessment pairs. Simulated readers learn from passages through a Construction-Integration-inspired memory model with DIME-style reader factors, KREC-style misconception revision, and an open New Dale-Chall readability signal. Answers are produced by score-based option selection over the learner's explicit memory state, while BKT drives adaptation. Across three sampled subject ontologies and matched cohorts of 50 simulated learners per condition, adaptive reading significantly improved outcomes in computer science, yielded smaller positive but inconclusive gains in inorganic chemistry, and was neutral to slightly negative in general biology.

</details>


### [182] [Towards Intelligent Legal Document Analysis: CNN-Driven Classification of Case Law Texts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17674)
*Moinul Hossain,Sourav Rabi Das,Zikrul Shariar Ayon,Sadia Afrin Promi,Ahnaf Atef Choudhury,Shakila Rahman,Jia Uddin*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出一个轻量级但高精度的法律引用处理分类框架，结合词形还原预处理、子词感知FastText嵌入和多核一维CNN，在25,000个法律文档上达到97.26%准确率，比BERT等基线模型更优且推理速度快13倍以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 法律从业者和司法机构面临日益增长的法律案例文档，这些文档具有正式化语言、长句结构和高度专业化术语的特点，使得人工分类既耗时又容易出错。需要开发高效的自动化解决方案来处理法律文档分析。

Method: 采用轻量级框架，结合词形还原预处理、子词感知FastText嵌入和多核一维卷积神经网络（CNN）。使用25,000个标注法律文档的公开语料库，采用75/25的训练-测试划分。

Result: 在25,000个法律文档上达到97.26%的分类准确率和96.82%的宏观F1分数，优于微调BERT、LSTM+FastText、CNN+随机嵌入和TF-IDF KNN等基线模型。AUC-ROC达到97.83%，仅需510万参数，每文档推理延迟0.31毫秒，比BERT快13倍以上。

Conclusion: 精心设计的卷积架构是重型Transformer的可扩展、资源高效替代方案，适用于智能法律文档分析。残差错误仅限于语义相邻的引用类别，表明模型具有良好的语义理解能力。

Abstract: Legal practitioners and judicial institutions face an ever-growing volume of case-law documents characterised by formalised language, lengthy sentence structures, and highly specialised terminology, making manual triage both time-consuming and error-prone. This work presents a lightweight yet high-accuracy framework for citation-treatment classification that pairs lemmatisation-based preprocessing with subword-aware FastText embeddings and a multi-kernel one-dimensional Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Evaluated on a publicly available corpus of 25,000 annotated legal documents with a 75/25 training-test partition, the proposed system achieves 97.26% classification accuracy and a macro F1-score of 96.82%, surpassing established baselines including fine-tuned BERT, Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) with FastText, CNN with random embeddings, and a Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency (TF-IDF) k-Nearest Neighbour (KNN) classifier. The model also attains the highest Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic (AUC-ROC) curve of 97.83% among all compared systems while operating with only 5.1 million parameters and an inference latency of 0.31 ms per document - more than 13 times faster than BERT. Ablation experiments confirm the individual contribution of each pipeline component, and the confusion matrix reveals that residual errors are confined to semantically adjacent citation categories. These findings indicate that carefully designed convolutional architectures represent a scalable, resource-efficient alternative to heavyweight transformers for intelligent legal document analysis.

</details>


### [183] [Modeling Multiple Support Strategies within a Single Turn for Emotional Support Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17972)
*Jie Zhu,Huaixia Dou,Junhui Li,Lifan Guo,Feng Chen,Jinsong Su,Chi Zhang,Fang Kong*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 该论文重新定义情感支持对话任务为多策略话语生成，提出两种生成方法（All-in-One和One-by-One），并通过强化学习增强认知推理，在ESConv数据集上验证了多策略话语的可行性和优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有情感支持对话研究通常假设每个支持者话语只对应单一策略，但真实世界的情感支持交流中，单个话语往往包含多个支持策略。论文旨在探索多策略话语生成的可行性和优势。

Method: 提出两种多策略话语生成方法：1) All-in-One：在单个解码步骤中预测所有策略-响应对；2) One-by-One：迭代生成策略-响应对直到完成。两种方法都通过强化学习增强认知推理，以改进策略选择和响应组合。

Result: 在ESConv数据集上的实验结果表明，提出的方法能有效建模多策略话语，提高了支持质量和对话成功率。这是首个系统性的实证证据，表明在单个话语中允许使用多个支持策略对情感支持对话既可行又有益。

Conclusion: 多策略话语生成是情感支持对话的有效方法，通过强化学习增强的认知推理能显著提升支持质量。这项工作为情感支持对话系统设计提供了新的视角和方法。

Abstract: Emotional Support Conversation (ESC) aims to assist individuals experiencing distress by generating empathetic and supportive dialogue. While prior work typically assumes that each supporter turn corresponds to a single strategy, real-world supportive communication often involves multiple strategies within a single utterance. In this paper, we revisit the ESC task by formulating it as multi-strategy utterance generation, where each utterance may contain one or more strategy-response pairs. We propose two generation methods: All-in-One, which predicts all strategy-response pairs in a single decoding step, and One-by-One, which iteratively generates strategy-response pairs until completion. Both methods are further enhanced with cognitive reasoning guided by reinforcement learning to improve strategy selection and response composition. We evaluate our models on the ESConv dataset under both utterance-level and dialogue-level settings. Experimental results show that our methods effectively model multi-strategy utterances and lead to improved supportive quality and dialogue success. To our knowledge, this work provides the first systematic empirical evidence that allowing multiple support strategies within a single utterance is both feasible and beneficial for emotional support conversations. All code and data will be publicly available at https://github.com/aliyun/qwen-dianjin.

</details>


### [184] [PRISMA: Preference-Reinforced Self-Training Approach for Interpretable Emotionally Intelligent Negotiation Dialogues](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18354)
*Prajwal Vijay Kajare,Priyanshu Priya,Bikash Santra,Asif Ekbal*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: PRISMA是一个可解释的情感智能谈判对话系统，通过ENS-CoT推理机制和DPO增强的自训练，在求职面试和资源分配两个领域生成情感感知的谈判响应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 情感在谈判结果中起关键作用，影响信任、合作和长期关系。开发能够识别并战略性地响应情感的谈判对话系统对于创建更有效的人本交互至关重要。除了生成情感适当的响应外，可解释性（理解系统如何生成特定情感感知响应）对于培养可靠性和建立融洽关系至关重要。

Method: 提出ENS-CoT（情感感知谈判策略链式思维）推理机制，模仿人类谈判的情感感知、理解、使用和管理过程。基于此创建两个新数据集：JobNego（求职面试谈判）和ResNego（资源分配谈判）。使用这些数据集通过DPO增强的自训练开发PRISMA系统，引导智能体生成更准确、可解释且情感适当的谈判响应。

Result: 在JobNego和ResNego数据集上的自动和人工评估表明，PRISMA显著增强了可解释性，生成了适当的情感感知响应，同时提高了整体谈判效果。

Conclusion: PRISMA通过ENS-CoT推理机制和DPO增强训练，成功开发了一个可解释的情感智能谈判对话系统，在情感感知响应生成和谈判效果方面表现出色。

Abstract: Emotion plays a pivotal role in shaping negotiation outcomes, influencing trust, cooperation, and long-term relationships. Developing negotiation dialog systems that can recognize and respond strategically to emotions is, therefore, essential to create more effective human-centered interactions. Beyond generating emotionally appropriate responses, interpretability - understanding how a system generates a particular emotion-aware response, is critical for fostering reliability and building rapport. Driven by these aspects, in this work, we introduce PRISMA, an interpretable emotionally intelligent negotiation dialogue system targeting two application domains, viz. job interviews and resource allocation. To enable interpretability, we propose an Emotion-aware Negotiation Strategy-informed Chain-of-Thought (ENS-CoT) reasoning mechanism, which mimics human negotiation by perceiving, understanding, using, and managing emotions. Leveraging ENS-CoT, we curate two new datasets: JobNego (for job interview negotiation) and ResNego (for resource allocation negotiation). We then leverage these datasets to develop PRISMA by augmenting self-training with Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), guiding agents toward more accurate, interpretable, and emotionally appropriate negotiation responses. Automatic and human evaluation on JobNego and ResNego datasets demonstrate that PRISMA substantially enhances interpretability and generates appropriate emotion-aware responses, while improving overall negotiation effectiveness.

</details>


### [185] [BhashaSutra: A Task-Centric Unified Survey of Indian NLP Datasets, Corpora, and Resources](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18423)
*Raghvendra Kumar,Devankar Raj,Sriparna Saha*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 关于印度语言NLP资源的首次统一调查，涵盖200+数据集、50+基准测试和100+模型工具，分析语言现象、领域和模态，识别数据稀疏性、语言覆盖不均等挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 印度拥有22种官方语言和数百种边缘化方言，NLP数据集、基准测试和预训练模型快速增长，但缺乏专门针对印度语言的资源整合调查。现有综述要么关注少数高资源语言，要么将印度语言纳入更广泛的多语言环境中，限制了低资源和文化多样性语言的覆盖。

Method: 对印度NLP资源进行首次统一调查，涵盖文本、语音、多模态和文化基础任务，按语言现象、领域和模态组织资源，分析标注、评估和模型设计趋势。

Result: 收集整理了200多个数据集、50多个基准测试和100多个模型、工具和系统，识别出数据稀疏性、语言覆盖不均、文字多样性和文化领域泛化有限等持续挑战。

Conclusion: 该调查为印度语言生态系统中的公平、文化基础和可扩展NLP研究提供了整合基础，有助于推动该领域的发展。

Abstract: India's linguistic landscape, spanning 22 scheduled languages and hundreds of marginalized dialects, has driven rapid growth in NLP datasets, benchmarks, and pretrained models. However, no dedicated survey consolidates resources developed specifically for Indian languages. Existing reviews either focus on a few high-resource languages or subsume Indian languages within broader multilingual settings, limiting coverage of low-resource and culturally diverse varieties. To address this gap, we present the first unified survey of Indian NLP resources, covering 200+ datasets, 50+ benchmarks, and 100+ models, tools, and systems across text, speech, multimodal, and culturally grounded tasks. We organize resources by linguistic phenomena, domains, and modalities; analyze trends in annotation, evaluation, and model design; and identify persistent challenges such as data sparsity, uneven language coverage, script diversity, and limited cultural and domain generalization. This survey offers a consolidated foundation for equitable, culturally grounded, and scalable NLP research in the Indian linguistic ecosystem.

</details>


### [186] [The impact of postediting on AI generative translation in Yemeni context: Translating literary prose by ChatGPT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16704)
*Nasim Al-wagieh,Mohammed Q. Shormani*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 研究探讨ChatGPT-4在文学翻译中的应用，通过30位专业译者评估发现AI虽提升翻译速度，但在处理文化、风格和修辞方面仍有局限，需要人工后期编辑，特别是小说和戏剧翻译。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索人工智能（特别是ChatGPT-4）在文学翻译中的作用，评估AI翻译的质量和局限性，以及确定在多大程度上需要人工后期编辑来确保文学翻译的质量和文化适应性。

Method: 采用混合方法，招募30位专业译者，让他们评估和后期编辑AI生成的阿拉伯语和英语文学文本翻译，通过定性和定量分析来评估AI翻译的质量和人工干预的必要性。

Result: 结果显示AI提高了翻译速度和可访问性，但在处理文化、风格和修辞语言方面存在局限。参与者普遍确认需要人工后期编辑，特别是在小说和戏剧翻译中。研究发现人机协作模式正在形成，而非取代人类译者。

Conclusion: 结论是AI应作为支持工具使用，而人类专业知识对于确保翻译质量和文化适宜性仍然至关重要。研究支持人机协作的翻译模式。

Abstract: This study examines the role of artificial intelligence in translation, focusing on ChatGPT, specifically ChatGPT-4, and the extent to which human postediting is required in literary translation. A mixed-method approach was adopted, involving 30 professional translators who evaluated and postedited AI-generated translations of selected Arabic and English literary texts. The results show that although AI improves translation speed and accessibility, it remains limited in handling cultural, stylistic, and figurative aspects of language. Participants generally confirmed the necessity of human postediting, particularly in novels and drama. The findings indicate that emerging human-machine collaboration model rather than replacement of human translators. The study concludes that AI should be used as a supportive tool, while human expertise remains essential for ensuring translation quality and cultural appropriateness.

</details>


### [187] [Foundational Study on Authorship Attribution of Japanese Web Reviews for Actor Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16376)
*Hiroshi Matsubara,Shingo Matsugaya,Taichi Aoki,Masaki Hashimoto*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了基于风格特征进行作者归属分析在威胁情报中支持行为者分析的适用性，使用日本评论数据比较了四种方法，发现BERT微调在小规模作者上表现最佳，但在作者数量达到数百时TF-IDF+逻辑回归在准确性、稳定性和计算成本方面更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索作者归属分析在威胁情报中的应用潜力，特别是针对暗网论坛的行为者分析。作为未来应用于暗网论坛的基础性步骤，研究首先使用明网（clear web）的日本评论数据进行实验验证。

Method: 研究使用乐天市场的日本评论数据构建数据集，比较了四种方法：1) TF-IDF+逻辑回归，2) BERT嵌入+逻辑回归，3) BERT微调，4) 度量学习+k近邻。实验包括Top-k评估和错误分析。

Result: BERT微调在小规模作者上表现最佳，但当作者数量增加到数百时，训练变得不稳定。此时TF-IDF+逻辑回归在准确性、稳定性和计算成本方面表现更优。Top-k评估显示候选筛选具有实用性，错误分析发现模板文本、主题依赖和文本长度是导致误分类的主要因素。

Conclusion: 作者归属分析在威胁情报中具有应用潜力，但需要考虑方法的选择。对于大规模作者场景，传统的TF-IDF+逻辑回归方法可能比深度学习模型更实用。研究为未来在暗网论坛中的应用提供了技术基础。

Abstract: This study investigates the applicability of authorship attribution based on stylistic features to support actor analysis in threat intelligence. As a foundational step toward future application to dark web forums, we conducted experiments using Japanese review data from clear web sources. We constructed datasets from Rakuten Ichiba reviews and compared four methods: TF-IDF with logistic regression (TF-IDF+LR), BERT embeddings with logistic regression (BERT-Emb+LR), BERT fine-tuning (BERT-FT), and metric learning with $k$-nearest neighbors (Metric+kNN). Results showed that BERT-FT achieved the best performance; however, training became unstable as the number of authors scaled to several hundred, where TF-IDF+LR proved superior in terms of accuracy, stability, and computational cost. Furthermore, Top-$k$ evaluation demonstrated the utility of candidate screening, and error analysis revealed that boilerplate text, topic dependency, and short text length were primary factors causing misclassification.

</details>


### [188] [Aligning Backchannel and Dialogue Context Representations via Contrastive LLM Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16622)
*Livia Qian,Gabriel Skantze*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 论文提出两阶段框架：先微调大语言模型获取对话上下文表示，再学习对话上下文与反馈信号（backchannel）的联合嵌入空间，以探索反馈信号的词汇-韵律形式与语用意义的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 反馈信号（如"yeah"、"mhm"、"right"）的词汇形式和韵律特征共同传达语用意义，但现有计算研究主要关注预测反馈时机，而词汇-韵律形式与意义之间的关系尚未得到充分探索。

Method: 两阶段框架：1）在对话转录文本上微调大语言模型，获取丰富的上下文表示；2）学习对话上下文和反馈信号实现的联合嵌入空间。通过三元相似性判断（韵律和跨词汇）和上下文-反馈信号适配性任务进行评估。

Result: 学习的投影显著改善了上下文-反馈信号检索性能，优于先前方法。研究发现反馈信号形式对扩展对话上下文高度敏感，学习的嵌入比原始WavLM特征更符合人类判断。

Conclusion: 该框架成功建立了对话上下文与反馈信号形式-意义关系的计算模型，为理解反馈信号的语用功能提供了新方法，并在多个评估任务中表现出优越性。

Abstract: Backchannels (e.g., `yeah', `mhm', and `right') are short, non-interruptive feedback signals whose lexical form and prosody jointly convey pragmatic meaning. While prior computational research has largely focused on predicting backchannel timing, the relationship between lexico-prosodic form and meaning remains underexplored. We propose a two-stage framework: first, fine-tuning large language models on dialogue transcripts to derive rich contextual representations; and second, learning a joint embedding space for dialogue contexts and backchannel realizations. We evaluate alignment with human perception via triadic similarity judgments (prosodic and cross-lexical) and a context-backchannel suitability task. Our results demonstrate that the learned projections substantially improve context-backchannel retrieval compared to previous methods. In addition, they reveal that backchannel form is highly sensitive to extended conversational context and that the learned embeddings align more closely with human judgments than raw WavLM features.

</details>


### [189] [IYKYK (But AI Doesn't): Automated Content Moderation Does Not Capture Communities' Heterogeneous Attitudes Towards Reclaimed Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16654)
*Christina Chance,Rebecca Pattichis,Arjun Subramonian,James He,Shruti Narayanan,Saadia Gabriel,Kai-Wei Chang*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该研究通过定量和定性方法分析LGBTQIA+、黑人和女性社区对污名化词汇（如f-word、n-word、b-word）回收使用的态度，发现群体内标注者之间存在显著分歧，自动仇恨言论检测工具与人类判断对齐度差，凸显了在线污名化词汇解释的主观性和语境依赖性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘化社区在线回收使用污名化词汇是常见的身份认同和团结表达方式，但当前的AI内容审核工具无法区分回收使用和仇恨使用，导致边缘化声音被压制。研究旨在理解不同社区对污名化词汇回收使用的态度和判断标准。

Method: 采用混合研究方法：1）收集并分析来自LGBTQIA+、黑人和女性社区的在线污名化词汇使用语料库，包含标注者对文本是否应标记为仇恨言论的判断；2）进行半结构化访谈了解标注者的生活经历和判断依据；3）比较人类标注与Perspective API自动评估结果。

Result: 1）所有社区和标注问题中标注者间一致性低，表明群体内成员对污名化词汇解释存在显著分歧；2）人类标注与Perspective API自动评估对齐度差；3）文本特征如词汇使用是否贬义、是否针对自己等与仇恨言论判断更相关；4）生活经历和个人历史差异导致判断差异。

Conclusion: 边缘化社区对在线污名化词汇的解释具有固有的主观性和语境依赖性，当前AI审核工具无法有效处理这种复杂性。研究强调了开发更细致、考虑身份和意图上下文的审核系统的重要性。

Abstract: Reclaimed slur usage is a common and meaningful practice online for many marginalized communities. It serves as a source of solidarity, identity, and shared experience. However, contemporary automated and AI-based moderation tools for online content largely fail to distinguish between reclaimed and hateful uses of slurs, resulting in the suppression of marginalized voices. In this work, we use quantitative and qualitative methods to examine the attitudes of social media users in LGBTQIA+, Black, and women communities around reclaimed slurs targeting our focus groups including the f-word, n-word, and b-word. With social media users from these communities, we collect and analyze an annotated online slur usage corpus. The corpus includes annotators' perceptions of whether an online text containing a slur should be flagged as hate speech, as well as contextual features of the slur usage. Across all communities and annotation questions, we observe low inter-annotator agreement, indicating substantial disagreement among in-group annotators. This is compounded by the fact that, absent clear contextual signals of identity and intent, even in-group members may disagree on how to interpret reclaimed slur usage online.
