Semi-structured interviews with annotators suggest that differences in lived experience and personal history contribute to this variation as well. We find poor alignment between annotator judgments and automated hate speech assessments produced by Perspective API. We further observe that certain features of a text such as whether the slur usage was derogatory and if the slur was targeted at oneself are more associated with whether annotators report the text as hate speech. Together, these findings highlight the inherent subjectivity and contextual nature of how marginalized communities interpret slurs online.

</details>


### [190] [Detecting Alarming Student Verbal Responses using Text and Audio Classifier](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16717)
*Christopher Ormerod,Gitit Kehat*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合文本和音频分类器的混合框架，用于检测学生回答中的潜在问题，以改进自动言语评分系统的安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动言语评分系统存在安全漏洞，传统方法仅关注内容或韵律特征，无法全面检测学生回答中的潜在问题。当需要及时干预时，这种局限性可能带来风险。

Method: 提出混合框架：1) 文本分类器基于回答内容检测问题；2) 音频分类器基于韵律标记检测问题。结合两种模态的信息来克服传统系统的局限性。

Result: 该方法在识别潜在问题回答方面实现了增强的性能，能够加速人工审查过程，在需要及时干预的情况下可能挽救生命。

Conclusion: 结合内容和韵律的混合方法能够更有效地检测学生回答中的潜在问题，提高自动言语评分系统的安全性。

Abstract: This paper addresses a critical safety gap in the use Automated Verbal Response Scoring (AVRS). We present a novel hybrid framework for troubled student detection that combines a text classifier, trained to detect responses based on their content, and an audio classifier, trained to detect responses using prosodic markers. This approach overcomes key limitations of traditional AVRS systems by considering both content and prosody of responses, achieving enhanced performance in identifying potentially concerning responses. This system can expedite the review process by humans, which can be life-saving particularly when timely intervention may be crucial.

</details>


### [191] [When Misinformation Speaks and Converses: Rethinking Fact-Checking in Audio Platforms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16767)
*Chaewan Chun,Delvin Ce Zhang,Dongwon Lee*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该立场论文指出音频平台已成为错误信息传播的主要渠道，但现有事实核查方法主要针对书面内容，忽视了音频作为口语和对话媒介的独特特性，需要重新设计针对音频的事实核查流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 音频平台（播客、语音消息、直播等）已成为公共话语的重要渠道，也是错误信息传播的主要途径。现有事实核查方法主要针对书面内容，忽视了音频作为口语和对话媒介的独特特性，包括语调、节奏、情感等说服性元素，以及跨话轮、多说话者、多集数的对话结构。

Method: 这是一篇立场论文，采用综合分析方法：1）跨模态和跨平台的证据整合；2）现有数据集和方法分析；3）识别传统方法在音频事实核查中的失败原因；4）提出重新设计事实核查流程的理论框架。

Result: 研究发现音频错误信息具有双重特性：口语性（通过韵律、节奏、情感传递说服力）和对话性（跨话轮、说话者和剧集展开）。这些特性引入了传统方法很少遇到的验证困难，现有基于转录的流程无法有效处理。

Conclusion: 推进事实核查需要围绕音频的口语和对话现实重新设计验证流程，不能简单地将音频视为带转录的文本内容。需要开发专门针对音频特性的新方法和技术。

Abstract: Audio platforms have evolved beyond entertainment. They have become central to public discourse, from podcasts and radio to WhatsApp voice notes and live streams. With millions of shows and hundreds of millions of listeners, audio platforms are now a major channel for misinformation. Yet existing fact-checking pipelines are mostly designed for written claims, overlooking the unique properties of spoken media. We argue that audio misinformation is not merely textual content with transcripts: it is structurally different because it is both spoken - carrying persuasive force through prosody, pacing, and emotion - and conversational - unfolding across turns, speakers, and episodes. These dual properties introduce verification difficulties that traditional methods rarely face. This position paper synthesizes evidence across modalities and platforms, examines datasets and methods, and highlights why existing pipelines fail on audio. We argue that advancing fact-checking requires rethinking verification pipelines around the spoken and conversational realities of audio.

</details>


### [192] [A Community-Based Approach for Stance Distribution and Argument Organization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16852)
*Rudra Ranajee Saha,Laks V. S. Lakshmanan,Raymond T. Ng*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种无监督的基于图的方法，用于社区化组织论点，帮助用户理解和导航复杂的论证景观，通过构建包含多种关系类型的交互图并进行社区检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线辩论平台和社交媒体上关于争议话题的论证内容激增，虽然这些多元视角有助于培养批判性思维和打破信息茧房，但海量复杂的论点使得读者难以有效综合和理解不同观点。

Method: 无监督的图基方法：分析主题聚焦的文章集合，构建包含多种关系类型的丰富交互图（主题相似性、语义连贯性、共享关键词、共同实体），然后使用社区检测识别论点社区，并通过策略性图操作简化社区以呈现可消化的关键论证模式摘要。

Result: 实验结果表明，该系统能够识别有意义的论点社区，并以可解释的方式呈现，促进用户对复杂社会政治辩论的理解。该方法无需训练数据，能有效处理数百篇文章，同时保留论点间的细微关系。

Conclusion: 提出的无监督图基方法能够有效组织复杂论证内容，帮助用户导航和理解多元观点，为处理大规模论证内容提供了实用工具。

Abstract: The proliferation of online debate platforms and social media has led to an unprecedented volume of argumentative content on controversial topics from multiple perspectives. While this wealth of perspectives offers opportunities for developing critical thinking and breaking filter bubbles (Pariser 2011), the sheer volume and complexity of arguments make it challenging for readers to synthesize and comprehend diverse viewpoints effectively. We present an unsupervised graph-based approach for community-based argument organization that helps users navigate and understand complex argumentative landscapes. Our system analyzes collections of topic-focused articles and constructs a rich interaction graph by capturing multiple relationship types between arguments: topic similarity, semantic coherence, shared keywords, and common entities. We then employ community detection to identify argument communities that reveal homogeneous and heterogeneous viewpoint distributions. The detected communities are simplified through strategic graph operations to present users with digestible, yet comprehensive summaries of key argumentative patterns. Our approach requires no training data and can effectively process hundreds of articles while preserving nuanced relationships between arguments. Experimental results demonstrate our system's ability to identify meaningful argument communities and present them in an interpretable manner, facilitating users' understanding of complex socio-political debates.

</details>


### [193] [Beyond Black-Box Labels: Interpretable Criteria for Diagnosing SubjectiveNLP Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17022)
*Nisrine Rair,Alban Goupil,Valeriu Vrabie,Emmanuel Chochoy*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种模式级诊断方法，用于在确定黄金标签前审计专家设计的标注模式，通过多标注者标准判断分离不稳定标准和系统性重叠两种失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主观NLP数据集通常将标注者判断聚合为单一黄金标签，难以诊断分歧是源于标准不清晰、类别界限模糊还是合理的多元性。需要一种在确定黄金标签前就能审计标注模式的方法。

Method: 提出模式级诊断方法，仅使用多标注者的标准判断，分离两种失败模式：1) 不稳定标准（难以操作化的边界），2) 系统性重叠（互斥类别间的边界模糊）。应用于商业文档的说服价值提取任务。

Result: 发现分歧并非分散：不稳定性集中在少数标准上，而近一半覆盖的句子激活了多个类别。这些信号与领域专家的分歧点一致，为收紧指南、修订类别结构或重新考虑标注范式提供了基于证据的审计。

Conclusion: 模式级诊断方法能在黄金标签确定前有效审计标注模式，识别不稳定标准和系统性重叠问题，为改进标注质量提供实证基础。

Abstract: Subjective NLP datasets typically aggregate annotator judgments into a single gold label, making it difficult to diagnose whether disagreement reflects unclear criteria, collapsed distinctions, or legitimate plurality. We propose a \emph{schema-level diagnostic} for auditing expert-designed annotation schemas \emph{prior to} gold-label commitment, using only multi-annotator criterion judgments. The diagnostic separates two failure modes: unstable criteria with hard-to-operationalize boundaries, and systematic overlap that blurs the boundaries between mutually exclusive categories. Applied to persuasive value extraction in commercial documents, we find that disagreement is not diffuse: instability concentrates in a few criteria, while nearly half of covered sentences activate multiple categories. These signals align with where domain experts disagree, yielding an evidence-based audit for tightening guidelines, revising category structure, or reconsidering the annotation paradigm.

</details>


### [194] [Dynamic Emotion and Personality Profiling for Multimodal Deception Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17037)
*Li Zheng,Yanyi Luo,Hao Fei,Yuzhe Ding,Yujie Huang,Fei Li,Chong Teng,Donghong Ji*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出Rel-DDEP框架，通过多模态可靠性加权融合实现欺骗、情绪和人格的联合检测，在DDEP数据集上显著超越现有方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有欺骗检测方法缺乏样本级别的动态情绪和人格标注，而这两者对欺骗检测至关重要。需要建立包含动态标注的多模态数据集和融合框架

Method: 1) 提出多模型多提示标注方案和严格标签质量评估标准，建立DDEP多模态数据集；2) 提出Rel-DDEP框架，将模态特征映射到高维高斯分布空间量化不确定性，进行可靠性加权融合，包含对齐模块和排序约束模块

Result: 在MDPE和DDEP数据集上，Rel-DDEP在三个任务上显著超越现有SOTA基线：欺骗检测F1提升2.53%，情绪检测提升2.66%，人格检测提升9.30%

Conclusion: 验证了为每个样本标注动态情绪和人格标签的必要性，以及可靠性加权融合的有效性，为多模态欺骗检测提供了新方法

Abstract: Deception detection is of great significance for ensuring information security and conducting public opinion analysis, with personality factors and emotion cues playing a critical role. However, existing methods lack sample-level dynamic annotations for emotions and personality.In this paper, we propose an innovative multi-model multi-prompt annotation scheme and a strict label quality evaluation standard, and establish a multimodal joint detection dataset DDEP for deception, emotion, and personality. Meanwhile, we propose Rel-DDEP, an adaptive reliability-weighted fusion framework. Our framework quantifies uncertainty by mapping modal features to a high-dimensional Gaussian distribution space. It then performs reliability-weighted fusion and incorporates an alignment module and a sorting constraint module to achieve joint detection of deception, emotion, and personality. Experimental results on the MDPE and DDEP datasets show that our Rel-DDEP significantly outperforms the existing state-of-the-art baseline models in three tasks. The F1 score of the deception detection increases by 2.53%, that of the emotion detection increases by 2.66%, and that of the personality detection increases by 9.30%. The experiments fully verify the necessity of annotating dynamic emotion and personality labels for each sample and the effectiveness of reliability-weighted fusion.

</details>


### [195] [RoIt-XMASA: Multi-Domain Multilingual Sentiment Analysis Dataset for Romanian and Italian](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17134)
*Andrei-Marius Avram,Aureliu Valentin Antonie,Cosmin-Mircea Croitoru,Vlad Andrei Muntean,Dumitru-Clementin Cercel*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: RoIt-XMASA扩展了跨语言多领域亚马逊情感分析数据集至意大利语和罗马尼亚语，提出多目标对抗训练框架，在XLM-R上实现66.23% F1分数，比基线提升4.64%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决跨语言和跨领域情感分析中的挑战，特别是在资源相对较少的语言（意大利语和罗马尼亚语）上，同时处理领域适应性问题

Method: 提出多目标对抗训练框架，使用元学习系数进行损失反转，动态平衡情感判别与领域和语言不变性；扩展数据集包含36,000标注样本和202,141未标注样本

Result: XLM-R使用该方法达到66.23% F1分数，比基线提升4.64%；Llama-3.1-8B在少样本评估中达到58.43% F1分数，显示提示方法与微调方法的权衡

Conclusion: 多目标对抗训练能有效提升跨语言跨领域情感分析性能，但大型语言模型的少样本学习与任务特定微调之间存在效率与性能的权衡

Abstract: We present RoIt-XMASA, a multilingual dataset that extends the Cross-lingual Multi-domain Amazon Sentiment Analysis to Italian and Romanian, comprising 36,000 labeled reviews across three domains (books, movies, and music) and 202,141 unlabeled samples. To address cross-lingual and cross-domain challenges, we propose a multi-target adversarial training framework that employs loss reversal with meta-learned coefficients to dynamically balance sentiment discrimination with domain and language invariance. XLM-R achieves an F1-score of 66.23% with our approach, outperforming the baseline by 4.64%. Few-shot evaluation shows that Llama-3.1-8B achieves 58.43% F1-score, revealing a meaningful trade-off between the efficiency of prompting-based approaches and the higher performance of task-specific fine-tuning.

</details>


### [196] [Contrastive Analysis of Linguistic Representations in Large Language Model Outputs through Structured Synthetic Data Generation and Abstracted N-gram Associations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17398)
*S. A. Desimone,L. Alonso Alemany*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一个通过对比合成文本生成和统计分析来发现不同社会群体语言和话语模式的框架，旨在识别微妙偏见表达而非基于预设词汇列表


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有偏见检测方法通常基于预定义的词汇列表或孤立句子，无法捕捉语境化的微妙偏见表达。需要一种能够分析真实语境中语言使用模式的方法，以发现更隐蔽的社会偏见

Method: 1) 使用情境场景和群体标记的受控组合生成上下文数据，创建仅群体不同但叙事条件可比的文本最小对；2) 将语言形式泛化，使用改进的点互信息量化语言抽象与群体的关联；3) 采用片段排序策略优先分析高浓度偏见语言信号的文本段

Result: 开发了一个系统性的方法论框架，能够：1) 生成对比文本对用于偏见分析；2) 量化语言模式与群体的统计关联；3) 识别语境中高浓度偏见表达；4) 连接定量分析与定性解释

Conclusion: 该框架提供了一种更细致、语境化的偏见检测方法，能够发现传统方法遗漏的微妙偏见表达，为专家评估语言表达的有害潜力提供了量化基础

Abstract: We present a methodological framework to discover linguistic and discursive patterns associated to different social groups through contrastive synthetic text generation and statistical analysis. In contrast with previous approaches, we aim to characterize subtle expressions of bias, instead of diagnosing bias through a pre-determined list of words or expressions. We are also working with contextualized data instead of isolated words or sentences. Our methodology applies to textual productions in any genre, encompassing narrative, task-oriented or dialogic. Contextualized data are generated using controlled combinations of situational scenarios and group markers, creating minimal pairs of texts that differ only in the referenced group while maintaining comparable narrative conditions. To facilitate robust analysis, linguistic forms are generalized and associations between linguistic abstractions and groups are quantified using a variant of pointwise mutual information to detect expressions that appear disproportionately across groups. A fragment-ranking strategy then prioritizes text segments with a high concentration of biased linguistic signals, which allows for experts to assess the harmful potential of linguistic expressions in context, bridging quantitative analysis and qualitative interpretation.

</details>


### [197] [MoVE: Translating Laughter and Tears via Mixture of Vocalization Experts in Speech-to-Speech Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17435)
*Szu-Chi Chen,I-Ning Tsai,Yi-Cheng Lin,Sung-Feng Huang,Hung-yi Lee*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 论文提出MoVE架构，通过混合LoRA专家和软权重路由来保留语音翻译中的非语言发声（如笑声、哭声），在英中语音翻译中能保留76%的目标非语言发声，而现有系统最多只能保留14%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前语音到语音翻译系统虽然语义准确度高，但会剥离传达语用意图的非语言发声（如笑声、哭泣），这严重限制了实际应用价值。需要解决数据稀缺和模型表达能力不足的问题。

Method: 1) 提出可扩展的表达性数据集合成流程；2) 提出MoVE架构，包含表达性专用适配器和软权重路由器，混合专家以捕捉混合表达状态；3) 利用预训练AudioLLM实现数据高效性。

Result: 在英中语音翻译任务中，MoVE能重现76%的目标非语言发声，而现有系统最多只能保留14%。在人类评估中，MoVE获得最高的自然度和情感保真度评分。仅需30分钟的精选数据就能达到强性能。

Conclusion: MoVE架构通过混合专家方法和预训练模型的数据效率，有效解决了语音翻译中非语言发声保留的问题，显著提升了系统的表达能力和实际应用价值。

Abstract: Recent Speech-to-Speech Translation (S2ST) systems achieve strong semantic accuracy yet consistently strip away non-verbal vocalizations (NVs), such as laughter and crying that convey pragmatic intent, which severely limits real-world utility. We address this via three contributions. First, we propose a synthesis pipeline for building scalable expressive datasets to overcome the data scarcity limitation. Second, we propose MoVE, a Mixture-of-LoRA-Experts architecture with expressive-specialized adapters and a soft-weighting router that blends experts for capturing hybrid expressive states. Third, we show pretrained AudioLLMs enable striking data efficiency: 30 minutes of curated data is enough for strong performance. On English-Chinese S2ST, while comparing with strong baselines, MoVE reproduces target NVs in 76% of cases and achieves the highest human-rated naturalness and emotional fidelity among all compared systems, where existing S2ST systems preserve at most 14% of NVs.

</details>


### [198] [MAPLE: A Meta-learning Framework for Cross-Prompt Essay Scoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17569)
*Salam Albatarni,May Bashendy,Sohaila Eltanbouly,Tamer Elsayed*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: MAPLE：基于元学习和原型网络的跨提示自动作文评分框架，在英语和阿拉伯语数据集上取得SOTA性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动作文评分系统在跨提示设置中面临泛化挑战，需要能够处理未见写作提示的鲁棒方法

Method: 提出MAPLE框架，结合元学习和原型网络，学习跨不同写作提示的可迁移表示

Result: 在ELLIPSE和LAILA数据集上分别提升8.5和3点QWK分数，在ASAP数据集上多个特征上也有改进

Conclusion: 元学习方法在构建鲁棒的跨提示自动作文评分系统方面具有潜力

Abstract: Automated Essay Scoring (AES) faces significant challenges in cross-prompt settings, where models must generalize to unseen writing prompts. To address this limitation, we propose MAPLE, a meta-learning framework that leverages prototypical networks to learn transferable representations across different writing prompts. Across three diverse datasets (ELLIPSE and ASAP (English), and LAILA (Arabic)), MAPLE achieves state-of-the-art performance on ELLIPSE and LAILA, outperforming strong baselines by 8.5 and 3 points in QWK, respectively. On ASAP, where prompts exhibit heterogeneous score ranges, MAPLE yields improvements on several traits, highlighting the strengths of our approach in unified scoring settings. Overall, our results demonstrate the potential of meta-learning for building robust cross-prompt AES systems.

</details>


### [199] [Does Welsh media need a review? Detecting bias in Nation.Cymru's political reporting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17628)
*Cai Parry-Jones*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文开发了一个两阶段NLP流程（RoBERTa偏见检测+LLM情感分类）来分析威尔士媒体Nation.Cymru的政治偏见，发现Reform UK受到偏见报道的频率是Plaid Cymru的两倍，且负面情感更强。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 威尔士政治环境中存在媒体偏见的指控，但缺乏计算分析验证。本研究旨在通过自然语言处理技术，首次对威尔士主要政治新闻媒体Nation.Cymru进行系统性偏见分析，为相关讨论提供实证依据。

Method: 采用两阶段NLP流程：1) 使用RoBERTa模型进行高效偏见检测；2) 使用大型语言模型对检测到的偏见标签进行目标属性情感分类。分析了2022-2026年间15,583个政党提及。

Result: 主要分析发现：Reform UK受到偏见框架的频率是Plaid Cymru的两倍，平均负面情感强度超过三倍（p<0.001）。次要分析显示：Plaid Cymru在所有政党中独树一帜，获得明显更有利的框架。

Conclusion: 研究提供了威尔士单一政治媒体中存在可测量差异框架的证据，支持对威尔士媒体覆盖进行更广泛审查的呼吁。两阶段流程为扩展到其他媒体生态系统提供了低成本、可复制的框架。

Abstract: Wales' political landscape has been marked by growing accusations of bias in Welsh media. This paper takes the first computational step toward testing those claims by examining Nation.Cymru, a prominent Welsh political news outlet. I use a two-stage natural language processing (NLP) pipeline: (1) a robustly optimized BERT approach (RoBERTa) bias detector for efficient bias discovery and (2) a large language model (LLM) for target-attributed sentiment classification of bias labels from (1). A primary analysis of 15,583 party mentions across 2022-2026 news articles finds that Reform UK attracts biased framing at twice the rate of Plaid Cymru and over three times as negative in mean sentiment (p<0.001). A secondary analysis across four parties across both news and opinion articles shows that Plaid Cymru is the outlier, receiving markedly more favourable framing than any other party. These findings provide evidence of measurable differential framing in a single Welsh political media outlet, supporting calls for a broader review of Welsh media coverage. Furthermore, the two-stage pipeline offers a low-cost, replicable framework for extending this analysis to other Welsh outlets, as well as media ecosystems outside of Wales.

</details>


### [200] [On the Emergence of Syntax by Means of Local Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17857)
*Zichao Wei*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 一个仅18,658参数的两维神经细胞自动机，仅通过1比特边界信号监督，在算术表达式语法成员问题上训练后，自发组织成名为Proto-CKY的空间扩展表示，展现出超越正则语言的表达能力、结构泛化能力和语法结构对齐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索句法处理是否能从纯粹的局部相互作用中自发涌现。研究最小系统中，通过简单监督信号，神经网络是否能自发形成复杂的句法处理能力。

Method: 使用18,658参数的两维神经细胞自动机(NCA)，仅用1比特边界信号监督，在算术表达式语法的成员问题上进行训练。训练后分析其内部L×L网格的自组织行为。

Result: 系统自发组织成名为Proto-CKY的空间扩展表示，满足三个句法处理标准：超越正则语言的表达能力、超出训练分布的结构泛化能力、内部组织与语法结构定量对齐(Pearson r≈0.71)。在四个上下文无关文法上独立涌现，并在扰动后自发再生。

Conclusion: Proto-CKY是CKY算法的功能对齐但形式不同的物理原型，是数学理想在物理基质上的具体实例化，两者之间的系统距离携带了关于基质本身的信息。

Abstract: Can syntactic processing emerge spontaneously from purely local interaction? We present a concrete instance on a minimal system: an 18,658-parameter two-dimensional neural cellular automaton (NCA), supervised by nothing more than a 1-bit boundary signal, is trained on the membership problem of an arithmetic-expression grammar. After training, its internal $L \times L$ grid spontaneously self-organizes into an ordered, spatially extended representation that we name Proto-CKY. This representation satisfies three operational criteria for syntactic processing: expressive power beyond the regular languages, structural generalization beyond the training distribution, and an internal organization quantitatively aligned with grammatical structure (Pearson $r \approx 0.71$). It emerges independently on four context-free grammars and regenerates spontaneously after perturbation. Proto-CKY is functionally aligned with the CKY algorithm but formally distinct from it: it is a physical prototype, a concrete instantiation of a mathematical ideal on a physical substrate, and the systematic distance between the two carries information about the substrate itself.

</details>


### [201] [Modeling Human Perspectives with Socio-Demographic Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18069)
*Leixin Zhang,Cagri Coltekin*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出Socio-Contrastive Learning方法，联合建模标注者视角并学习社会人口统计特征表示，通过融合社会人口特征和文本表示来预测标注者视角，优于标准拼接方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在NLP任务中，标注分歧常反映有效的主观视角。现有研究通常关注单一人口统计因素或有限组合，但现实世界中标注者视角受复杂社会背景影响，更细粒度的人口统计属性能更好解释人类视角。

Method: 提出Socio-Contrastive Learning方法，联合建模标注者视角并学习社会人口统计表示，有效融合社会人口特征和文本表示来预测标注者视角。

Result: 该方法在预测标注者视角方面优于标准拼接方法，学习到的表示还能分析和可视化人口统计因素如何与标注者视角变化相关。

Conclusion: Socio-Contrastive Learning为融合社会人口特征和文本表示提供有效方法，能更好理解和分析标注者视角与人口统计因素的关系。

Abstract: Humans often hold different perspectives on the same issues. In many NLP tasks, annotation disagreement can reflect valid subjective perspectives. Modeling annotator perspectives and understanding their relationship with other human factors, such as socio-demographic attributes, have received increasing attention. Prior work typically focuses on single demographic factors or limited combinations. However, in real-world settings, annotator perspectives are shaped by complex social contexts, and finer-grained socio-demographic attributes can better explain human perspectives. In this work, we propose Socio-Contrastive Learning, a method that jointly models annotator perspectives while learning socio-demographic representations. Our method provides an effective approach for the fusion of socio-demographic features and textual representations to predict annotator perspectives, outperforming standard concatenation-based methods. The learned representations further enable analysis and visualization of how demographic factors relate to variation in annotator perspectives. Our code is available at GitHub: https://github.com/Leixin-Zhang/Socio_Contrastive_Learning

</details>


### [202] [Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Model for Fake News Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18112)
*Yiheng Li,Weihai Lu,Hanyi Yu,Yue Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: RAMM是一个用于多模态多领域假新闻检测的检索增强模型，通过MLLM骨干网络、抽象叙事对齐模块和语义表示对齐模块，解决跨实例叙事一致性和领域特定知识推理的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态多领域假新闻检测面临两大挑战：1) 现有模型孤立评估每条新闻，无法捕捉跨实例的叙事一致性，难以应对社交媒体驱动的集群式假新闻传播；2) 传统模型仅依赖训练时编码的参数知识，难以泛化到新领域或数据稀缺领域（如新兴事件或小众话题）。

Method: RAMM采用三阶段方法：1) 使用多模态大语言模型（MLLM）作为骨干网络，从新闻样本中捕捉跨模态语义信息；2) 引入抽象叙事对齐模块，自适应地从不同领域的多样化实例中提取抽象叙事一致性，聚合相关知识；3) 设计语义表示对齐模块，将模型的决策范式与人类对齐，从直接基于多模态特征的推理转向基于实例的类比推理过程。

Result: 在三个公开数据集上的广泛实验验证了RAMM方法的有效性，表明该方法能够有效解决跨实例叙事一致性和领域特定知识推理的挑战。

Conclusion: RAMM通过检索增强的多模态模型架构，成功解决了假新闻检测中的跨实例叙事一致性和领域泛化问题，为多模态多领域假新闻检测提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: In recent years, multimodal multidomain fake news detection has garnered increasing attention. Nevertheless, this direction presents two significant challenges: (1) Failure to Capture Cross-Instance Narrative Consistency: existing models usually evaluate each news in isolation, fail to capture cross-instance narrative consistency, and thus struggle to address the spread of cluster based fake news driven by social media; (2) Lack of Domain Specific Knowledge for Reasoning: conventional models, which rely solely on knowledge encoded in their parameters during training, struggle to generalize to new or data-scarce domains (e.g., emerging events or niche topics). To tackle these challenges, we introduce Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Model for Fake News Detection (RAMM). First, RAMM employs a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) as its backbone to capture cross-modal semantic information from news samples. Second, RAMM incorporates an Abstract Narrative Alignment Module. This component adaptively extracts abstract narrative consistency from diverse instances across distinct domains, aggregates relevant knowledge, and thereby enables the modeling of high-level narrative information. Finally, RAMM introduces a Semantic Representation Alignment Module, which aligns the model's decision-making paradigm with that of humans - specifically, it shifts the model's reasoning process from direct inference on multimodal features to an instance-based analogical reasoning process. Extensive experimental results on three public datasets validate the efficacy of our proposed approach. Our code is available at the following link: https://github.com/li-yiheng/RAMM

</details>


### [203] [Transition-Matrix Regularization for Next Dialogue Act Prediction in Counselling Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18539)
*Eric Rudolph,Philipp Steigerwald,Jens Albrecht*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出一种KL正则化方法，将语料库中的对话流统计信息融入下一对话行为预测，在德语心理咨询数据集上显著提升性能，且能跨语言和领域迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于预训练编码器的下一对话行为预测模型往往忽略对话流统计规律，而语料库中的对话行为转换模式包含有价值的先验知识，可以弥补数据稀疏场景下的不足。

Method: 提出KL正则化项，将模型预测的对话行为分布与语料库统计的转换模式对齐。在60类德语心理咨询分类任务上，使用5折交叉验证评估，并进行跨数据集（HOPE）验证。

Result: 方法显著提升宏F1分数9-42%（相对提升），大幅改善对话流对齐。跨语言和领域验证有效，且对较弱基线模型提升更明显。轻量级对话流先验能有效补充预训练编码器。

Conclusion: 对话流统计先验能有效增强预训练编码器，特别是在细粒度、数据稀疏的对话任务中。KL正则化提供了一种简单有效的融合方式。

Abstract: This paper studies how empirical dialogue-flow statistics can be incorporated into Next Dialogue Act Prediction (NDAP). A KL regularization term is proposed that aligns predicted act distributions with corpus-derived transition patterns. Evaluated on a 60-class German counselling taxonomy using 5-fold cross-validation, this improves macro-F1 by 9--42% relative depending on encoder and substantially improves dialogue-flow alignment. Cross-dataset validation on HOPE suggests that improvements transfer across languages and counselling domains. In systematic ablations across pretrained encoders and architectures, the findings indicate that transition regularization provides consistent gains and disproportionately benefits weaker baseline models. The results suggest that lightweight discourse-flow priors complement pretrained encoders, especially in fine-grained, data-sparse dialogue tasks.

</details>


### [204] [ICLAD: In-Context Learning with Comparison-Guidance for Audio Deepfake Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16749)
*Benjamin Chou,Yi Zhu,Surya Koppisetti*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: ICLAD：一种基于上下文学习的音频深度伪造检测框架，通过比较引导策略利用音频语言模型实现无需训练的泛化能力，并提供检测结果的文本解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前最先进的音频深度伪造检测系统在现实场景中泛化能力不足，无法有效应对"野外"深度伪造音频。需要一种能够泛化到未见过的深度伪造类型、同时提供可解释检测结果的解决方案。

Method: 提出ICLAD框架：1）采用上下文学习范式，无需训练即可利用音频语言模型；2）设计成对比较推理策略，引导模型发现并过滤幻觉和与深度伪造无关的声学属性；3）结合专用深度伪造检测器，通过路由机制将分布外样本交给音频语言模型处理。

Result: 在野外数据集上，ICLAD相比专用检测器在宏观F1分数上有显著提升，相对改进最高达2倍。分析表明ICLAD具有灵活性，可在近期开源音频语言模型上部署。

Conclusion: ICLAD通过上下文学习和比较推理策略，有效提升了音频深度伪造检测在现实场景中的泛化能力，同时提供了可解释的检测结果，为音频安全领域提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: Audio deepfakes pose a significant security threat, yet current state-of-the-art (SOTA) detection systems do not generalize well to realistic in-the-wild deepfakes. We introduce a novel \textbf{I}n-\textbf{C}ontext \textbf{L}earning paradigm with comparison-guidance for \textbf{A}udio \textbf{D}eepfake detection (\textbf{ICLAD}). The framework enables the use of audio language models (ALMs) for training-free generalization to unseen deepfakes and provides textual rationales on the detection outcome. At the core of ICLAD is a pairwise comparative reasoning strategy that guides the ALM to discover and filter hallucinations and deepfake-irrelevant acoustic attributes. The ALM works alongside a specialized deepfake detector, whereby a routing mechanism feeds out-of-distribution samples to the ALM. On in-the-wild datasets, ICLAD improves macro F1 over the specialized detector, with up to $2\times$ relative improvement. Further analysis demonstrates the flexibility of ICLAD and its potential for deployment on recent open-source ALMs.

</details>


### [205] [Mapping Election Toxicity on Social Media across Issue, Ideology, and Psychosocial Dimensions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16765)
*Lei Cao,Wen Zeng,Xinyue Wu,Eun Cheol Choi,Emilio Ferrara*

Main category: cs.SI

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该研究分析了2024年美国总统选举期间X平台的政治毒性内容，发现毒性在不同议题和意识形态间存在异质性，身份议题毒性最强，党派内容比中性内容更有害，毒性话语主要由高唤醒负面情绪驱动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线政治敌对现象普遍存在，但尚不清楚毒性如何随竞选议题和政治意识形态变化，以及哪些心理社会信号和框架伴随在线毒性表达。研究旨在通过大规模分析选举期间的社交媒体话语，理解有害内容在不同议题和意识形态中的分布模式及其心理驱动因素。

Method: 1) 收集2024年美国总统选举前后五周X平台数据；2) 将帖子分类为10个主要竞选议题；3) 使用人机协同LLM辅助标注流程估计帖子意识形态；4) 使用基于LLM的毒性检测模型识别有害内容；5) 分析毒性内容的心理驱动因素，包括情感基调和道德框架。

Result: 1) 议题异质性：身份相关议题毒性强度最高；2) 有害类别：骚扰最普遍且强烈，仇恨集中在身份议题；3) 党派内容比中性内容更有害，毒性意识形态不对称性因议题而异；4) 心理语言维度：毒性话语由高唤醒负面情绪主导；5) 左右翼帖子在相同议题领域表现出相似情感模式（情感镜像）；6) 党派群体常依赖重叠的道德基础，议题背景强烈影响哪些道德基础最突出。

Conclusion: 在线政治毒性高度依赖情境，需要议题敏感的方法来测量和缓解。研究提供了社交媒体上政治毒性话语的细粒度分析，强调了理解议题特异性模式的重要性。

Abstract: Online political hostility is pervasive, yet it remains unclear how toxicity varies across campaign issues and political ideology, and what psychosocial signals and framing accompany toxic expression online. In this work, we present a large-scale analysis of discourse on X (Twitter) during the five weeks surrounding the 2024 U.S. presidential election. We categorize posts into 10 major campaign issues, estimate the ideology of posts using a human-in-the-loop LLM-assisted annotation process, detect harmful content with an LLM-based toxicity detection model, and then examine the psychological drivers of toxic content. We use these annotated data to examine how harmful content varies across campaign issues and ideologies, as well as how emotional tone and moral framing shape toxicity in election discussions. Our results show issue heterogeneity in both the prevalence and intensity of toxicity. Identity-related issues displayed the highest toxicity intensity. As for specific harm categories, harassment was most prevalent and intense across most of the issues, while hate concentrated in identity-centered debates. Partisan posts contained more harmful content than neutral posts, and ideological asymmetries in toxicity varied by issue. In terms of psycholinguistic dimensions, we found that toxic discourse is dominated by high-arousal negative emotions. Left- and right-leaning posts often exhibit similar emotional profiles within the same issue domain, suggesting emotional mirroring. Partisan groups frequently rely on overlapping moral foundations, while issue context strongly shapes which moral foundations become most salient. These findings provide a fine-grained account of toxic political discourse on social media and highlight that online political toxicity is highly context-dependent, underscoring the need for issue-sensitive approaches to measuring and mitigating it.

</details>


### [206] [Enabling AI ASICs for Zero Knowledge Proof](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17808)
*Jianming Tong,Jingtian Dang,Simon Langowski,Tianhao Huang,Asra Ali,Jeremy Kun,Jevin Jiang,Srinivas Devadas,Tushar Krishna*

Main category: cs.AR

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: MORPH框架将零知识证明(ZKP)核心计算重构为适合AI加速器(如TPU)执行的形式，通过硬件感知的复杂度分析和优化，在TPU上实现比现有方案高达10倍的吞吐量提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ZKP证明器成本高昂，因为多标量乘法(MSM)和数论变换(NTT)占据主要计算开销。AI专用芯片(如TPU)具有强大的矩阵计算能力和能效，但现有ZKP算法无法充分利用这些硬件优势。

Method: 1) 提出Big-T复杂度模型，考虑硬件异构瓶颈和布局转换成本；2) 算术层面：开发MXU中心的扩展RNS懒归约，将高精度模运算转换为低精度GEMM；3) 数据流层面：构建统一分片的布局固定TPU Pippenger MSM和优化的3/5步NTT，避免TPU上的数据重排。

Result: 在TPUv6e8上实现：NTT吞吐量比GZKP提升高达10倍，MSM吞吐量相当。代码基于JAX实现，开源可用。

Conclusion: MORPH成功将ZKP核心计算重构为适合AI加速器的形式，显著提升了计算效率，为ZKP在AI硬件上的高效执行提供了新框架。

Abstract: Zero-knowledge proof (ZKP) provers remain costly because multi-scalar multiplication (MSM) and number-theoretic transforms (NTTs) dominate runtime as they need significant computation. AI ASICs such as TPUs provide massive matrix throughput and SotA energy efficiency. We present MORPH, the first framework that reformulates ZKP kernels to match AI-ASIC execution. We introduce Big-T complexity, a hardware-aware complexity model that exposes heterogeneous bottlenecks and layout-transformation costs ignored by Big-O. Guided by this analysis, (1) at arithmetic level, MORPH develops an MXU-centric extended-RNS lazy reduction that converts high-precision modular arithmetic into dense low-precision GEMMs, eliminating all carry chains, and (2) at dataflow level, MORPH constructs a unified-sharding layout-stationary TPU Pippenger MSM and optimized 3/5-step NTT that avoid on-TPU shuffles to minimize costly memory reorganization. Implemented in JAX, MORPH enables TPUv6e8 to achieve up-to 10x higher throughput on NTT and comparable throughput on MSM than GZKP. Our code: https://github.com/EfficientPPML/MORPH.

</details>


### [207] [Migrant Voices, Local News: Insights on Bridging Community Needs with Media Content](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16651)
*David Alonso del Barrio,Paula Dolores Rescala,Victor Bros,Daniel Gatica-Perez*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 研究分析了法语移民群体对本地新闻的参与度，发现虽然本地新闻频繁报道本地事件，但在移民关注的重要话题上存在空白，新闻的可读性水平对移民群体可能构成障碍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是填补关于非主流受众（特别是移民群体）与本地媒体关系的知识空白。虽然研究表明新闻消费存在人口统计学差异，但对法语移民在中等规模欧洲城市中如何参与本地新闻以及他们的需求是否在报道中得到反映了解甚少。

Method: 研究方法采用混合方法：首先通过8名社区成员参与的焦点小组收集定性见解，然后基于这些见解选择自然语言处理方法（主题建模、信息检索、情感分析和可读性分析），应用于超过2000篇超本地新闻文章。

Result: 结果显示：1）文章频繁报道本地事件，但在参与者关注的重要话题上存在空白；2）情感分析显示整体基调积极；3）可读性测量表明文章为中级-高级法语水平，对移民的融合可及性构成问题。

Conclusion: 研究有助于弥合本地新闻平台内容与多样化读者需求之间的差距，可为本地媒体组织提供信息，帮助他们扩展当前新闻报道以吸引更多样化的受众。

Abstract: Research shows news consumption differs across demographics, yet little is known about non-mainstream audiences, especially in relation to local media. Our study addresses this gap by examining how French-speaking migrants in a mid-size European city engage with local news, and whether their needs are reflected in coverage. Eight community members participated in focus groups, whose insights guided the selection of natural language processing methods (topic modeling, information retrieval, sentiment analysis, and readability) applied to over 2000 hyper-local news articles. Results showed that while articles frequently covered local events, gaps remained in topics important to participants. Sentiment analysis revealed a generally positive tone, and readability measures indicated an intermediate-advanced French level, raising questions about accessibility for integration. Our work contributes to bridging the gap between local news platforms' content and diverse readers' needs, and could inform local media organizations about opportunities to expand their current news story coverage to appeal to more diverse audiences.

</details>


### [208] [Logical Computational Linguistics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17346)
*Glyn V. Morrill,Oriol Valentín*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该书提倡逻辑计算语言学而非统计计算语言学，提供逻辑语义接口，汇集20多年类型逻辑语法研究并加入新思想，旨在实现生命关键NLP应用中的完美句法和语义处理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者认为统计计算语言学存在置信度衰减问题（统计依赖链的置信度会单调递减至零），而逻辑依赖链能保持100%端到端置信度。因此需要逻辑方法来支持生命关键NLP应用（如医疗、法律、安全等领域）的完美处理。

Method: 采用类型逻辑语法（Type Logical Grammar）作为理论基础，提供逻辑语义接口。该方法基于20多年的研究成果，结合新的思想和方法论，强调形式逻辑和类型理论在自然语言处理中的应用。

Result: 建立了逻辑计算语言学的理论框架，展示了逻辑方法在保持100%置信度方面的优势。虽然未提及具体实验数据，但理论上论证了逻辑依赖链相比统计依赖链在置信度保持上的优越性。

Conclusion: 逻辑计算语言学比统计方法更适合生命关键NLP应用，因为逻辑依赖能保持100%置信度，而统计依赖会衰减。类型逻辑语法为实现完美句法和语义处理提供了可行的理论框架。

Abstract: In this book we promote logical computational linguistics as opposed to statistical computational linguistics. In particular, we provide a logical semantic interface. This book assembles more than twenty years of research work on type logical grammar, and adds new ideas and material.
  Chains of statistical dependencies of less than one hundred per cent confidence tend monotonically to zero. Chains of logical dependencies of any length maintain one hundred per cent confidence end to end.
  We aspire to enable perfect syntactic and semantic processing in life-critical NLP applications.

</details>


### [209] [ltzGLUE: Luxembourgish General Language Understanding Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17976)
*Alistair Plum,Felicia Körner,Anne-Marie Lutgen,Laura Bernardy,Fred Philippy,Emilia Milano,Nils Rehlinger,Cédric Lothritz,Tharindu Ranasinghe,Barbara Plank,Christoph Purschke*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 首个卢森堡语自然语言理解基准测试，基于GLUE框架，包含命名实体识别、主题分类、意图分类等任务，评估了多种预训练语言模型在卢森堡语上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然许多欧洲语言已有NLU基准测试，但卢森堡语作为官方国家语言之一常被忽视。该研究旨在填补这一空白，为卢森堡语建立首个NLU基准测试，评估现有预训练语言模型在该语言上的能力。

Method: 基于流行的GLUE基准框架，构建新的任务并重用现有任务，创建了包含二进制和多类别分类设置的NLU基准测试。任务涵盖命名实体识别、主题分类、意图分类等常见NLP任务。

Result: 评估了多种卢森堡语预训练语言模型，提供了这些模型在卢森堡语上当前能力的全面概述，为后续研究建立了基线。

Conclusion: 成功创建了首个卢森堡语NLU基准测试ltzGLUE，填补了该语言的评估空白，为卢森堡语NLP研究提供了重要工具和基准。

Abstract: This paper presents ltzGLUE, the first Natural Language Understanding (NLU) benchmark for Luxembourgish (LTZ) based on the popular GLUE benchmark for English. Although NLU tasks are available for many European languages nowadays, LTZ is one of the official national languages that is often overlooked. We construct new tasks and reuse existing ones to introduce the first official NLU benchmark and accompanying evaluation of encoder models for the language. Our tasks include common natural language processing tasks in binary and multi-class classification settings, including named entity recognition, topic classification, and intent classification. We evaluate various pre-trained language models for LTZ to present an overview of the current capabilities of these models on the LTZ language.

</details>


### [210] [Hard to Be Heard: Phoneme-Level ASR Analysis of Phonologically Complex, Low-Resource Endangered Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18204)
*V. S. D. S. Mahesh Akavarapu,Michael Daniel,Gerhard Jäger*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文对两种低资源东高加索语言（Archi和Rutul）进行音素级ASR分析，发现数据稀缺比语音复杂性更能解释识别错误，并提出特定音素词汇表改进方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究低资源、语音复杂语言的ASR性能，理解数据稀缺与语音复杂性对识别准确性的相对影响，为低资源语言ASR开发提供洞见。

Method: 收集并处理Archi（约50分钟）和Rutul（约80分钟）的语音-文本数据；评估wav2vec2、Whisper、Qwen2-Audio等模型；为wav2vec2设计语言特定音素词汇表并采用启发式输出层初始化；进行音素级错误分析。

Result: wav2vec2+特定音素词汇表在极低资源环境下表现与Whisper相当或更好；音素识别准确率与训练频率呈S型学习曲线关系；Whisper在Archi上显示出超出训练频率预测的泛化能力；许多归因于语音复杂性的错误实际由数据稀缺导致。

Conclusion: 音素级评估对理解低资源复杂语言ASR行为有价值；数据稀缺是主要瓶颈而非语音复杂性；特定音素词汇表改进在低资源场景有效。

Abstract: We present a phoneme-level analysis of automatic speech recognition (ASR) for two low-resourced and phonologically complex East Caucasian languages, Archi and Rutul, based on curated and standardized speech-transcript resources totaling approximately 50 minutes and 1 hour 20 minutes of audio, respectively. Existing recordings and transcriptions are consolidated and processed into a form suitable for ASR training and evaluation. We evaluate several state-of-the-art audio and audio-language models, including wav2vec2, Whisper, and Qwen2-Audio. For wav2vec2, we introduce a language-specific phoneme vocabulary with heuristic output-layer initialization, which yields consistent improvements and achieves performance comparable to or exceeding Whisper in these extremely low-resource settings. Beyond standard word and character error rates, we conduct a detailed phoneme-level error analysis. We find that phoneme recognition accuracy strongly correlates with training frequency, exhibiting a characteristic sigmoid-shaped learning curve. For Archi, this relationship partially breaks for Whisper, pointing to model-specific generalization effects beyond what is predicted by training frequency. Overall, our results indicate that many errors attributed to phonological complexity are better explained by data scarcity. These findings demonstrate the value of phoneme-level evaluation for understanding ASR behavior in low-resource, typologically complex languages.

</details>


### [211] [How Non-Linguistic Is the Indus Sign System? A Synthetic-Baseline Scorecard](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17828)
*Ashish Nair*

Main category: cs.CL

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个多指标判别框架，用于测试印度河谷符号系统是否编码口语，通过将观察到的语料库与两种计算机生成的非语言基线进行比较，发现印度河谷语料库既不匹配纹章系统也不匹配行政编码系统，处于中间位置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 印度河谷符号系统（约公元前2600-1900年）是否编码口语已经争论了几十年。为了解决这一长期争议，研究者需要开发一个系统性的框架来客观评估该符号系统的语言性质。

Method: 提出了一个多指标判别框架，将观察到的印度河谷语料库与两种计算机生成的非语言基线进行比较：一种模拟纹章系统，另一种模拟行政编码系统。基线使用Zipf频率分布、位置约束和二元依赖进行校准，这些参数来自六个已证实的非语言语料库。评估了四个关键属性：文本简短性、重复公式化短语、单次出现词率、位置刚性。

Result: 对1,916个去重铭文（584个独特符号，11,110个标记）的分析显示，印度河谷语料库既不干净地匹配任一基线。在四个指标上，该语料库相对于两个基线家族处于中间位置。与七个真实世界非语言语料库（包括Sproat的2014年数据集）比较，也没有任何已证实的非语言系统能完全复制印度河谷的统计特征。复制了关键先前结果：Zipf斜率为-1.49，条件熵为3.23比特。

Conclusion: 印度河谷符号系统在统计特征上既不匹配纹章系统也不匹配行政编码系统，处于中间位置。这表明该符号系统可能具有独特的性质，既不完全符合已知的语言系统，也不完全符合已知的非语言系统。

Abstract: Whether the Indus Valley sign system (c. 2600-1900 BCE) encodes spoken language has been debated for decades. This paper introduces a multi-metric discrimination framework that tests the observed Indus corpus against two kinds of computer-generated non-linguistic baseline -- one mimicking a heraldic emblem system, the other an administrative coding system -- each calibrated with Zipfian frequency distributions, positional constraints, and bigram dependencies derived from six attested non-linguistic corpora. The scorecard evaluates four properties central to the Farmer-Sproat-Witzel (2004) critique: text brevity, repeated formulaic phrases, hapax legomenon rate, and positional rigidity. Applying this framework to 1,916 deduplicated inscriptions (584 unique signs, 11,110 tokens) from the ICIT/Yajnadevam digitization, we find that the Indus corpus does not match either baseline cleanly. Across the four metrics examined, the Indus corpus occupies an intermediate position relative to the two baseline families, matching neither cleanly. Neither a heraldic nor an administrative generator can reproduce all four properties at once. We also compare against seven real-world non-linguistic corpora including Sproat's (2014) datasets, finding that no attested non-linguistic system reproduces the full Indus statistical profile either. We replicate key prior results including a Zipf slope of -1.49 and conditional entropy of 3.23 bits. All code and data are publicly available.

</details>


### [212] [Measuring the Gap Between Media Coverage and Public Information Demand: Evidence from the 2026 Lebanon Conflict](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16417)
*Mohamed Soufan*

Main category: cs.CY

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 研究分析了2026年3月黎巴嫩冲突期间媒体报道与公众信息需求之间的差异，发现媒体94.9%报道冲突事件，而公众搜索中仅36.9%关注冲突，更多关注经济、生活条件和移民等实际问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 本研究旨在量化分析冲突期间媒体报道议程与公众实际信息需求之间的差异，检验议程设置理论在现实冲突情境下的适用性，探索媒体是否真正反映了公众关注点。

Method: 从GDELT数据库收集11,623篇英文新闻文章，使用Google Trends获取黎巴嫩境内搜索数据。将新闻标题分类为冲突、经济、生活条件和移民四类，与对应的Google Trends主题数据进行对比分析，并进行时间序列分析。

Result: 研究发现显著差异：冲突占媒体报道的94.9%，但仅占搜索兴趣的36.9%；经济、生活条件和移民合计占搜索需求的63.1%，但仅占媒体报道的5.1%。时间序列分析显示经济和生活条件搜索需求在整个月保持稳定，而非仅对冲突事件反应。

Conclusion: 冲突期间媒体报道过度集中于军事事件，而公众更关注经济条件、日常生活和移民等实际问题。这为议程设置研究提供了冲突时期的定量比较证据，揭示了媒体议程与公众信息需求之间的显著差距。

Abstract: This study examines the relationship between media coverage and public information demand during the Lebanon conflict in March 2026. Using a dataset of 11,623 English-language news articles collected from the GDELT database and Google Trends data for searches conducted within Lebanon, the study compares the distribution of news coverage across topics with the distribution of public search interest. News headlines were filtered for relevance and classified into four categories: Conflict, Economy, Living Conditions, and Emigration. Public information demand was measured using Google Trends topic data for the same categories. The results show a substantial divergence between news coverage and search interest. Conflict accounted for 94.9% of classified news coverage but only 36.9% of total search interest. In contrast, Economy, Living Conditions, and Emigration together accounted for 63.1% of search demand but only 5.1% of news coverage. Time series analysis indicates that search demand for economic and living conditions remained consistently elevated throughout the month rather than reacting to specific conflict events. These findings were robust to the exclusion of the peak conflict period (March 1-5), with Conflict coverage remaining at 94.9% and the information gap persisting across all three under-covered categories. The findings suggest that during the study period, media coverage of Lebanon was heavily concentrated on military events, while public information demand was distributed across economic conditions, daily life, and emigration. This study contributes to agenda-setting research by providing a quantitative comparison between media agenda and public information demand during an active conflict period.

</details>


<div id='cs.CV'></div>

# cs.CV [[Back]](#toc)

### [213] [From Inheritance to Saturation: Disentangling the Evolution of Visual Redundancy for Architecture-Aware MLLM Inference Acceleration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16462)
*Jiaqi Shi,Yuechan Li,Xulong Zhang,Xiaoyang Qu,Jianzong Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: HalfV框架通过解耦视觉冗余，提出通用视觉冗余和架构依赖的二次饱和冗余概念，实现跨架构的高效多模态大语言模型推理加速


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高分辨率多模态大语言模型面临视觉token爆炸导致的计算成本过高问题。现有加速策略存在严重的"骨干网络依赖"问题，在不同架构间迁移时性能下降明显。

Method: 利用截断矩阵熵揭示通用的三阶段推理生命周期，将视觉冗余解耦为通用内在视觉冗余和架构依赖的二次饱和冗余。HalfV框架先通过统一剪枝策略缓解IVR，然后根据具体表现自适应处理SSR。

Result: HalfV在不同骨干网络上实现了优越的效率-性能权衡。在Qwen25-VL上，保持96.8%性能的同时获得4.1倍FLOPs加速，显著优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: 通过解耦视觉冗余，HalfV解决了现有加速方法的架构依赖问题，为跨架构的高效MLLM推理提供了通用解决方案。

Abstract: High-resolution Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) face prohibitive computational costs during inference due to the explosion of visual tokens. Existing acceleration strategies, such as token pruning or layer sparsity, suffer from severe "backbone dependency", performing well on Vicuna or Mistral architectures (e.g., LLaVA) but causing significant performance degradation when transferred to architectures like Qwen. To address this, we leverage truncated matrix entropy to uncover a universal three-stage inference lifecycle, decoupling visual redundancy into universal Intrinsic Visual Redundancy (IVR) and architecture-dependent Secondary Saturation Redundancy (SSR). Guided by this insight, we propose HalfV, a framework that first mitigates IVR via a unified pruning strategy and then adaptively handles SSR based on its specific manifestation. Experiments demonstrate that HalfV achieves superior efficiency-performance trade-offs across diverse backbones. Notably, on Qwen25-VL, it retains 96.8\% performance at a 4.1$\times$ FLOPs speedup, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. Our code is available at https://github.com/civilizwa/HalfV.

</details>


### [214] [Saccade Attention Networks: Using Transfer Learning of Attention to Reduce Network Sizes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16485)
*Marc Estafanous*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出Saccade Attention Network，通过模拟人类眼动机制学习图像关键特征，将Transformer输入序列长度减少80%，计算量大幅降低，同时保持相似性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer网络因注意力矩阵的二次复杂度而受限于序列长度。传统自注意力使用完整序列，但实际注意力是稀疏的。人类观察图像时使用眼动（saccades）机制聚焦关键特征，大幅减少计算。受此启发，研究如何通过学习关键特征位置来预处理图像，减少输入序列长度。

Method: 提出Saccade Attention Network，使用大型预训练模型学习图像中需要关注的位置。该网络作为预处理模块，仅提取关键特征区域，大幅减少输入Transformer的序列长度。模拟人类眼动机制，实现稀疏注意力。

Result: 计算量减少接近80%，同时产生相似的结果。表明通过聚焦关键特征可以显著降低计算复杂度，而不牺牲模型性能。

Conclusion: 通过模拟人类视觉系统的稀疏注意力机制，可以有效减少Transformer的计算负担，为长序列处理提供了一种高效的解决方案。

Abstract: One of the limitations of transformer networks is the sequence length due to the quadratic nature of the attention matrix. Classical self attention uses the entire sequence length, however, the actual attention being used is sparse. Humans use a form of sparse attention when analyzing an image or scene called saccades. Focusing on key features greatly reduces computation time. By using a network (Saccade Attention Network) to learn where to attend from a large pre-trained model, we can use it to pre-process images and greatly reduce network size by reducing the input sequence length to just the key features being attended to. Our results indicate that you can reduce calculations by close to 80% and produce similar results.

</details>


### [215] [LayerCache: Exploiting Layer-wise Velocity Heterogeneity for Efficient Flow Matching Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16492)
*Guandong Li*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出LayerCache：一种层感知缓存框架，针对Flow Matching模型中的Transformer网络进行分层缓存优化，显著提升推理速度同时保持生成质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Flow Matching模型虽然生成质量优秀，但需要大量迭代去噪计算，推理成本高昂。研究发现Transformer不同层组的速度动态存在显著异质性：浅层稳定适合缓存，深层变化大需要完整计算。现有缓存方法将整个Transformer视为单一单元，无法利用这种异质性。

Method: 提出LayerCache框架：1) 将Transformer划分为层组；2) 在每个去噪步骤为每个层组独立做出缓存决策；3) 引入自适应JVP跨度K选择机制，利用每层组稳定性测量来平衡估计精度和计算节省；4) 在时间步、层组和JVP跨度三个维度上制定调度问题，并用贪心预算分配算法求解。

Result: 在Qwen-Image (1024x1024, 50步)上，LayerCache达到PSNR 37.46 dB（比MeanCache提升5.38 dB），SSIM 0.9834，LPIPS 0.0178（比MeanCache减少70%），加速1.37倍，在所有现有缓存方法的质量-速度帕累托前沿上表现最优。

Conclusion: LayerCache通过层感知缓存策略有效利用了Transformer内部的异质性，在保持Flow Matching模型生成质量的同时显著提升了推理效率，为大规模图像生成模型的部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Flow Matching models achieve state-of-the-art image generation quality but incur substantial inference cost due to iterative denoising through large Transformer networks. We observe that different layer groups within a Transformer exhibit markedly heterogeneous velocity dynamics: shallow layers are highly stable and amenable to aggressive caching, while deep layers undergo large velocity changes that demand full computation. Existing caching methods, however, treat the entire Transformer as a monolithic unit, applying a single caching decision per timestep and thus failing to exploit this heterogeneity. Based on this finding, we propose LayerCache, a layer-aware caching framework that partitions the Transformer into layer groups and makes independent, per-group caching decisions at each denoising step. LayerCache introduces an adaptive JVP span K selection mechanism that leverages per-group stability measurements to balance estimation accuracy and computational savings. We formulate a three-dimensional scheduling problem over timesteps, layer groups, and JVP span, and solve it with a greedy budget allocation algorithm. On Qwen-Image (1024x1024, 50 steps), LayerCache achieves PSNR 37.46 dB (+5.38 dB over MeanCache), SSIM 0.9834, and LPIPS 0.0178 (a 70% reduction over MeanCache) at 1.37x speedup, dominating all prior caching methods on the quality-speed Pareto frontier.

</details>


### [216] [Topology-Aware Layer Pruning for Large Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16502)
*Pengcheng Zheng,Chaoning Zhang,Ya Wen,Wang Liu,Qigan Sun,Jiarong Mo,Jiaquan Zhang,Jewon Lee,Tae-Ho Kim,Kuien Liu,Tianyu Li,Caiyan Qin,Yang Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出基于拓扑感知的层剪枝框架TopoVLM，通过将隐藏状态表示为点云并使用单纯复形建模其演化，利用zigzag持久同调量化层间拓扑一致性，实现自适应剪枝以保留关键表示转换。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型视觉语言模型(LVLMs)计算和内存成本高，难以在资源受限场景部署。现有层剪枝方法依赖局部相似性度量或静态代理信号，无法捕捉表示在模型深度上的全局动态演化，常导致移除关键转换层。

Method: 将层间隐藏状态表示为点云，使用单纯复形建模其演化过程，通过zigzag持久同调量化层间拓扑一致性，实现自适应层剪枝以保留关键表示转换。

Result: 在多种多模态基准测试上的广泛实验表明，该框架在不同稀疏度下始终优于现有剪枝方法。

Conclusion: 提出的拓扑感知层剪枝框架能有效捕捉表示演化的全局动态特性，在保持性能的同时显著降低LVLMs的计算和内存成本。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in natural language understanding and reasoning, while recent extensions that incorporate visual inputs enable them to process multimodal information. Despite these advances, Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) incur substantial computational and memory costs, hindering deployment in resource-constrained scenarios. Existing layer pruning methods typically rely on local similarity metrics or static proxy signals, failing to capture the global and dynamic evolution of representations across model depth, which often leads to the removal of transition-critical layers. To address this limitation, we propose a topology-aware layer pruning framework for LVLMs. Specifically, we represent layer wise hidden states as point clouds and models their evolution using \textit{simplicial complexes}. By leveraging \textit{zigzag persistent homology}, we quantify inter-layer topological consistency and enable adaptive pruning that preserves critical representational transitions. Extensive experiments on diverse multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms existing pruning methods across a wide range of sparsity ratios. Our code is available at https://github.com/zpc456/TopoVLM.

</details>


### [217] [Motif-Video 2B: Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16503)
*Junghwan Lim,Wai Ting Cheung,Minsu Ha,Beomgyu Kim,Taewhan Kim,Haesol Lee,Dongpin Oh,Jeesoo Lee,Taehyun Kim,Minjae Kim,Sungmin Lee,Hyeyeon Cho,Dahye Choi,Jaeheui Her,Jaeyeon Huh,Hanbin Jung,Changjin Kang,Dongseok Kim,Jangwoong Kim,Youngrok Kim,Hyukjin Kweon,Hongjoo Lee,Jeongdoo Lee,Junhyeok Lee,Eunhwan Park,Yeongjae Park,Bokki Ryu,Dongjoo Weon*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: Motif-Video 2B：通过架构分离角色而非单纯扩大规模，在有限计算预算下实现高质量文本到视频生成，仅用2B参数和10M视频片段即超越14B模型性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统视频生成模型需要海量数据、巨大参数量和大量计算资源，本文探索是否能在更小预算下（少于10M视频片段和100,000 H200 GPU小时）实现高质量的文本到视频生成，核心假设在于模型容量的组织方式比容量大小更重要

Method: 1) 共享交叉注意力机制增强长视频序列的文本控制；2) 三部分主干架构分离早期融合、联合表示学习和细节精炼；3) 高效训练配方包括动态令牌路由和与冻结预训练视频编码器的早期特征对齐

Result: 在VBench上达到83.76%的分数，超越Wan2.1 14B模型，同时使用7倍更少的参数和显著更少的训练数据；分析显示后期块比标准单流基线具有更清晰的跨帧注意力结构

Conclusion: 精心设计的架构专业化结合效率导向的训练配方，可以缩小甚至超越通常与更大视频模型相关的质量差距，表明模型组织方式与规模同等重要

Abstract: Training strong video generation models usually requires massive datasets, large parameter counts, and substantial compute. In this work, we ask whether strong text-to-video quality is possible at a much smaller budget: fewer than 10M clips and less than 100,000 H200 GPU hours. Our core claim is that part of the answer lies in how model capacity is organized, not only in how much of it is used. In video generation, prompt alignment, temporal consistency, and fine-detail recovery can interfere with one another when they are handled through the same pathway. Motif-Video 2B addresses this by separating these roles architecturally, rather than relying on scale alone. The model combines two key ideas. First, Shared Cross-Attention strengthens text control when video token sequences become long. Second, a three-part backbone separates early fusion, joint representation learning, and detail refinement. To make this design effective under a limited compute budget, we pair it with an efficient training recipe based on dynamic token routing and early-phase feature alignment to a frozen pretrained video encoder. Our analysis shows that later blocks develop clearer cross-frame attention structure than standard single-stream baselines. On VBench, Motif-Video~2B reaches 83.76\%, surpassing Wan2.1 14B while using 7$\times$ fewer parameters and substantially less training data. These results suggest that careful architectural specialization, combined with an efficiency-oriented training recipe, can narrow or exceed the quality gap typically associated with much larger video models.

</details>


### [218] [BARD: Bridging AutoRegressive and Diffusion Vision-Language Models Via Highly Efficient Progressive Block Merging and Stage-Wise Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16514)
*Baoyou Chen,Hanchen Xia,Peng Tu,Haojun Shi,Shan Mu,Weihao Yuan,Siyu Zhu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: BARD是一个将预训练自回归视觉语言模型转换为相同架构、解码高效的扩散视觉语言模型的框架，通过渐进式监督块合并和阶段内蒸馏，在保持性能的同时实现3倍解码加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归视觉语言模型存在token-by-token解码的推理瓶颈，而直接转换预训练自回归模型为扩散模型会导致质量显著下降。需要一种有效方法将自回归VLM转换为解码高效的扩散VLM，同时保持多模态能力。

Method: 1) 渐进式监督块合并：逐步增大解码块大小；2) 阶段内扩散蒸馏：从固定小块的扩散锚点蒸馏到更大块模型；3) 混合噪声调度器：提高鲁棒性和token修正；4) 内存友好训练：支持长多模态序列高效训练。

Result: 使用≤4.4M数据，BARD-VL成功将Qwen3-VL的多模态能力转移到大块扩散VLM，在4B和8B规模上达到可比规模开源扩散VLM的SOTA性能，同时实现高达3倍解码吞吐量加速。

Conclusion: BARD框架有效解决了自回归到扩散模型转换的性能损失问题，证明了扩散蒸馏比直接自回归蒸馏更有效，为高效多模态推理提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Autoregressive vision-language models (VLMs) deliver strong multimodal capability, but their token-by-token decoding imposes a fundamental inference bottleneck. Diffusion VLMs offer a more parallel decoding paradigm, yet directly converting a pretrained autoregressive VLM into a large-block diffusion VLM (dVLM) often leads to substantial quality degradation. In this work, we present BARD, a simple and effective bridging framework that converts a pretrained autoregressive VLM into a same-architecture, decoding-efficient dVLM. Our approach combines progressive supervised block merging, which gradually enlarges the decoding block size, with stage-wise intra-dVLM distillation from a fixed small-block diffusion anchor to recover performance lost at larger blocks. We further incorporate a mixed noise scheduler to improve robustness and token revision during denoising, and memory-friendly training to enable efficient training on long multimodal sequences. A key empirical finding is that direct autoregressive-to-diffusion distillation is poorly aligned and can even hurt performance, whereas distillation within the diffusion regime is consistently effective. Experimental results show that, with $\leq 4.4M$ data, BARD-VL transfers strong multimodal capability from Qwen3-VL to a large-block dVLM. Remarkably, BARD-VL establishes a new SOTA among comparable-scale open dVLMs on our evaluation suite at both 4B and 8B scales. At the same time, BARD-VL achieves up to \textbf{3$\times$} decoding throughput speedup compared to the source model.

</details>


### [219] [Penny Wise, Pixel Foolish: Bypassing Price Constraints in Multimodal Agents via Visual Adversarial Perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16515)
*Jiachen Qian,Zhaolu Kang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 论文提出PriceBlind攻击框架，利用MLLMs中的视觉主导幻觉漏洞，通过不可察觉的视觉线索覆盖文本价格证据，导致智能体做出非理性金融决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着多模态大语言模型在金融交易等高风险场景的应用增多，其对抗鲁棒性研究不足。作者发现视觉主导幻觉现象，即微小的视觉线索可以覆盖文本价格证据，导致模型做出错误决策。

Method: 提出PriceBlind白盒对抗攻击框架，利用CLIP编码器的模态间隙，通过语义解耦损失将图像嵌入与低成本价值锚点对齐，同时保持像素级保真度。

Result: 在E-ShopBench上，PriceBlind在白盒评估中达到约80%攻击成功率；在简化单轮坐标选择协议下，Ensemble-DI-FGSM在GPT-4o、Gemini-1.5-Pro和Claude-3.5-Sonnet上实现35-41%的迁移攻击成功率。

Conclusion: MLLMs在金融场景存在严重安全漏洞，需要加强对抗鲁棒性研究。鲁棒编码器和Verify-then-Act防御策略能显著降低攻击成功率，但存在准确率权衡。

Abstract: The rapid proliferation of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has enabled mobile agents to execute high-stakes financial transactions, but their adversarial robustness remains underexplored. We identify Visual Dominance Hallucination (VDH), where imperceptible visual cues can override textual price evidence in screenshot-based, price-constrained settings and lead agents to irrational decisions. We propose PriceBlind, a stealthy white-box adversarial attack framework for controlled screenshot-based evaluation. PriceBlind exploits the modality gap in CLIP-based encoders via a Semantic-Decoupling Loss that aligns the image embedding with low-cost, value-associated anchors while preserving pixel-level fidelity. On E-ShopBench, PriceBlind achieves around 80% ASR in white-box evaluation; under a simplified single-turn coordinate-selection protocol, Ensemble-DI-FGSM transfers with roughly 35-41% ASR across GPT-4o, Gemini-1.5-Pro, and Claude-3.5-Sonnet. We also show that robust encoders and Verify-then-Act defenses reduce ASR substantially, though with some clean-accuracy trade-off.

</details>


### [220] [Real-Time Visual Attribution Streaming in Thinking Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16587)
*Seil Kang,Woojung Han,Junhyeok Kim,Jinyeong Kim,Youngeun Kim,Seong Jae Hwang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出一种摊销框架，用于多模态思维模型中的实时视觉归因流式处理，通过学习从注意力特征中直接估计语义区域的因果效应，实现与详尽因果方法相当的忠实度，同时支持实时流式归因。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态思维模型（如从截图生成代码或从图像解决数学问题）的长推理轨迹应基于视觉证据，但验证这种依赖关系具有挑战性：忠实的因果方法需要昂贵的重复反向传播或扰动，而原始注意力图虽然即时可用但缺乏因果有效性。

Method: 引入摊销方法，学习从注意力特征中编码的丰富信号直接估计语义区域的因果效应。该方法避免了昂贵的重复计算，实现了实时视觉归因流式处理。

Result: 在五个不同基准测试和四个思维模型上，该方法实现了与详尽因果方法相当的忠实度，同时支持视觉归因流式处理，用户可以在模型推理过程中实时观察归因证据。

Conclusion: 通过轻量级学习而非暴力计算，可以在多模态思维模型中实现实时、忠实的归因，为模型可解释性提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: We present an amortized framework for real-time visual attribution streaming in multimodal thinking models. When these models generate code from a screenshot or solve math problems from images, their long reasoning traces should be grounded in visual evidence. However, verifying this reliance is challenging: faithful causal methods require costly repeated backward passes or perturbations, while raw attention maps offer instant access, they lack causal validity. To resolve this, we introduce an amortized approach that learns to estimate the causal effects of semantic regions directly from the rich signals encoded in attention features. Across five diverse benchmarks and four thinking models, our approach achieves faithfulness comparable to exhaustive causal methods while enabling visual attribution streaming, where users observe grounding evidence as the model reasons, not after. Our results demonstrate that real-time, faithful attribution in multimodal thinking models is achievable through lightweight learning, not brute-force computation.

</details>


### [221] [Agentic Large Language Models for Training-Free Neuro-Radiological Image Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16729)
*Ayhan Can Erdur,Daniel Scholz,Jiazhen Pan,Benedikt Wiestler,Daniel Rueckert,Jan C. Peeken*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出无需训练的智能体框架，利用LLMs协调外部工具完成脑MRI分析，包括预处理、分割和体积分析，并发布评估数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLMs在通用视觉问答中表现优异，但缺乏原生3D空间推理能力，无法直接处理CT/MRI等体数据医学影像。智能体AI提供新解决方案，让LLMs协调外部专业工具，但复杂多步骤放射工作流程的可行性尚未充分探索。

Method: 提出无需训练的智能体流水线，使用现成领域专用工具，让LLMs（GPT-5.1、Gemini 3 Pro、Claude Sonnet 4.5）自主执行端到端工作流程，包括预处理（去颅骨、配准）、病理分割（胶质瘤、脑膜瘤、转移瘤）和体积分析。比较单智能体与多智能体"领域专家"协作架构。

Result: 系统能自主执行复杂放射任务，从单扫描分割和体积报告到需要多时间点比较的纵向反应评估。智能体AI能通过工具使用解决高度神经放射图像分析任务，无需训练或微调。

Conclusion: 智能体AI可以通过工具使用解决复杂神经放射图像分析任务，无需训练或微调。为支持未来智能体系统严格评估，发布了基于公开BraTS数据的图像-提示-答案三元组基准数据集。

Abstract: State-of-the-art large language models (LLMs) show high performance in general visual question answering. However, a fundamental limitation remains: current architectures lack the native 3D spatial reasoning required for direct analysis of volumetric medical imaging, such as CT or MRI. Emerging agentic AI offers a new solution, eliminating the need for intrinsic 3D processing by enabling LLMs to orchestrate and leverage specialized external tools. Yet, the feasibility of such agentic frameworks in complex, multi-step radiological workflows remains underexplored. In this work, we present a training-free agentic pipeline for automated brain MRI analysis. Validating our methodology on several LLMs (GPT-5.1, Gemini 3 Pro, Claude Sonnet 4.5) with off-the-shelf domain-specific tools, our system autonomously executes complex end-to-end workflows, including preprocessing (skull stripping, registration), pathology segmentation (glioma, meningioma, metastases), and volumetric analysis. We evaluate our framework across increasingly complex radiological tasks, from single-scan segmentation and volumetric reporting to longitudinal response assessment requiring multi-timepoint comparisons. We analyze the impact of architectural design by comparing single-agent models against multi-agent "domain-expert" collaborations. Finally, to support rigorous evaluation of future agentic systems, we introduce and release a benchmark dataset of image-prompt-answer tuples derived from public BraTS data. Our results demonstrate that agentic AI can solve highly neuro-radiological image analysis tasks through tool use without the need for training or fine-tuning.

</details>


### [222] [EasyVideoR1: Easier RL for Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16893)
*Chuanyu Qin,Chenxu Yang,Qingyi Si,Naibin Gu,Dingyu Yao,Zheng Lin,Peng Fu,Nan Duan,Jiaqi Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: EasyVideoR1是一个专门为视频理解任务训练大型视觉语言模型的高效强化学习框架，通过优化视频处理流程、统一奖励系统和混合训练范式，显著提升训练效率和性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大型语言模型向多模态架构演进，将可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）扩展到视频理解变得日益重要。然而，由于视频任务类型多样、高维视觉输入重复解码的计算开销大，以及众多敏感超参数难以复现评估，这一领域仍未被充分探索。现有开源RL训练框架缺乏针对视频模态的系统优化。

Method: 1) 完整的视频RL训练流水线，采用离线预处理和张量缓存，消除冗余视频解码；2) 全面的任务感知奖励系统，覆盖11种视频和图像问题类型；3) 混合离线-在线数据训练范式；4) 独立可配置像素预算的联合图像-视频训练；5) 异步多基准评估框架，覆盖22个主流视频理解基准。

Result: 框架实现了1.47倍的吞吐量提升，奖励系统支持多种任务类型，混合训练范式有助于学习更具挑战性的任务，联合训练使两种模态相互增强，评估框架能够复现与官方报告分数接近的准确率。

Conclusion: EasyVideoR1为视频理解任务的强化学习训练提供了一个完整且高效的解决方案，解决了现有框架在视频模态上的局限性，为多模态大模型的训练提供了系统化的工具支持。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) has demonstrated remarkable effectiveness in improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models. As models evolve into natively multimodal architectures, extending RLVR to video understanding becomes increasingly important yet remains largely unexplored, due to the diversity of video task types, the computational overhead of repeatedly decoding and preprocessing high-dimensional visual inputs, and the difficulty of reproducible evaluation across numerous sensitive hyperparameters. Existing open-source RL training frameworks provide solid infrastructure for text and image scenarios but lack systematic optimizations tailored for video modality. In this work, we present \textbf{EasyVideoR1}, a complete and efficient reinforcement learning framework specifically designed for training large vision-language models on video understanding tasks. EasyVideoR1 makes the following contributions: (1) a full video RL training pipeline with offline preprocessing and tensor caching that eliminates redundant video decoding and yields a 1.47 $\times$ throughput improvement; (2) a comprehensive, task-aware reward system covering 11 distinct video and image problem types with unified routing and modular extension; (3) a mixed offline-online data training paradigm that combines curated high-quality trajectories with on-policy exploration, benefiting the learning of more challenging tasks; (4) joint image-video training with independently configurable pixel budgets, allowing the two modalities to mutually reinforce each other; and (5) an asynchronous multi-benchmark evaluation framework covering 22 mainstream video understanding benchmarks, with reproduced accuracy closely aligned with officially reported scores.

</details>


### [223] [RemoteShield: Enable Robust Multimodal Large Language Models for Earth Observation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17243)
*Rui Min,Liang Yao,Shiyu Miao,Shengxiang Xu,Yuxuan Liu,Chuanyi Zhang,Shimin Di,Fan Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 论文提出RemoteShield，一种针对地球观测任务的鲁棒多模态大语言模型，通过偏好学习在干净和扰动输入之间进行跨条件对齐，提升模型在现实噪声条件下的稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前遥感多模态大语言模型在精心清洗的数据集上训练，学习到脆弱的映射关系，无法泛化到实际地球观测中的噪声条件。当面对部署中的不完美输入时，性能会显著下降。

Method: 构建现实的多模态扰动集（包括云、雾等视觉退化以及口语化、模糊指令等文本变化）。提出RemoteShield，通过偏好学习优化：将每个干净样本与其图像-文本扰动变体配对形成语义等价簇，比较模型对干净和扰动输入的响应，鼓励模型选择稳定响应而非扰动诱导的失败。

Result: 在三个地球观测任务上的实验表明，RemoteShield在现实多模态扰动下比代表性基线模型具有更强的鲁棒性和跨条件一致性。

Conclusion: 通过跨条件对齐的偏好学习，RemoteShield能够在地球观测任务中保持一致的视觉语义推理能力，即使面对现实中的视觉退化和文本噪声。

Abstract: A robust Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) for Earth Observation should maintain consistent interpretation and reasoning under realistic input variations. However, current Remote Sensing MLLMs fail to meet this requirement. Trained on carefully curated clean datasets, they learn brittle mappings that do not generalize to noisy conditions in operational Earth Observation. Consequently, their performance degrades when confronted with imperfect inputs in deployment. To quantify this vulnerability, we construct a realistic set of multimodal perturbations, including visual degradations such as cloud and fog cover, together with diverse human-centric textual variations ranging from colloquialisms to vague or omitted instructions. Empirical evaluations show that these perturbations significantly impair the visual-semantic reasoning capabilities of leading RS foundation models. To address this limitation, we introduce RemoteShield, a robust Remote Sensing MLLM trained to maintain consistent outputs across realistic input variations. During training, each clean sample is paired with its image-text perturbed variants to form a semantic equivalence cluster. Rather than directly fitting noisy samples, RemoteShield is optimized through preference learning over clean and perturbed conditions within the same cluster. By comparing model responses to clean and corrupted inputs, the model is encouraged to favor stable responses over perturbation-induced failures. This cross-condition alignment helps the model focus on underlying task semantics despite visual degradations and textual noise. Experiments on three Earth Observation tasks show that RemoteShield consistently delivers stronger robustness and cross-condition consistency than representative baselines under realistic multimodal perturbations.

</details>


### [224] [When Background Matters: Breaking Medical Vision Language Models by Transferable Attack](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17318)
*Akash Ghosh,Subhadip Baidya,Sriparna Saha,Xiuying Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出MedFocusLeak攻击方法，针对临床视觉语言模型进行黑盒多模态攻击，通过注入协调扰动到非诊断背景区域并采用注意力分散机制，诱导错误但临床合理的诊断，同时保持扰动不可察觉。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在临床诊断中应用日益广泛，但其对抗攻击鲁棒性研究不足，存在严重风险。现有医学攻击主要关注次要目标（如模型窃取或对抗微调），而自然图像的可迁移攻击会产生明显失真，容易被临床医生检测。

Method: 提出MedFocusLeak方法：1）在非诊断背景区域注入协调扰动；2）采用注意力分散机制，将模型注意力从病理区域转移；3）黑盒多模态攻击框架，保持扰动不可察觉；4）引入统一评估框架和新颖指标，联合捕捉攻击成功率和图像保真度。

Result: 在六种医学成像模态上的广泛评估显示，MedFocusLeak达到最先进性能，能在不同视觉语言模型中生成误导性但真实的诊断输出。揭示了现代临床视觉语言模型推理能力的关键弱点。

Conclusion: MedFocusLeak是一种高度可迁移的黑盒多模态攻击方法，能诱导错误但临床合理的诊断，同时保持扰动不可察觉。研究揭示了临床视觉语言模型在对抗攻击下的脆弱性，对医疗AI系统的安全性具有重要意义。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly used in clinical diagnostics, yet their robustness to adversarial attacks remains largely unexplored, posing serious risks. Existing medical attacks focus on secondary objectives such as model stealing or adversarial fine-tuning, while transferable attacks from natural images introduce visible distortions that clinicians can easily detect. To address this, we propose MedFocusLeak, a highly transferable black-box multimodal attack that induces incorrect yet clinically plausible diagnoses while keeping perturbations imperceptible. The method injects coordinated perturbations into non-diagnostic background regions and employs an attention distraction mechanism to shift the model's focus away from pathological areas. Extensive evaluations across six medical imaging modalities show that MedFocusLeak achieves state-of-the-art performance, generating misleading yet realistic diagnostic outputs across diverse VLMs. We further introduce a unified evaluation framework with novel metrics that jointly capture attack success and image fidelity, revealing a critical weakness in the reasoning capabilities of modern clinical VLMs.

</details>


### [225] [Towards Joint Quantization and Token Pruning of Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17320)
*Xinqing Li,Xin He,Xindong Zhang,Ming-Ming Cheng,Lei Zhang,Yun Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出QUOTA框架，将低比特量化与视觉令牌剪枝统一，在W4A4量化下实现30%令牌保留率下95.65%性能保持


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型在低比特推理中面临视觉令牌前缀长和KV缓存增长的成本问题，现有量化与剪枝的级联组合方法存在不匹配问题

Method: 提出协作量化-剪枝框架，通过QUOTA将低比特校准信号转换为层间令牌分配计划，结合激活幅度、注意力线索和低比特风险信号评估令牌重要性

Result: 在标准VLM基准测试中，在相同低比特条件下比级联基线更鲁棒，仅保留30%视觉令牌时达到95.65%平均保留率，而基线约为94.3%

Conclusion: QUOTA框架统一了低比特推理和确定性视觉令牌剪枝，在保持性能的同时显著降低推理成本

Abstract: Deploying Vision-Language Models (VLMs) under aggressive low-bit inference remains challenging because inference cost is dominated by the long visual-token prefix during prefill and the growing KV cache during autoregressive decoding. Token pruning and low-bit quantization are complementary for reducing these costs, yet naive stage-wise combinations are often brittle due to a mismatch between quantization calibration and pruning execution. We present a collaborative quantization-and-pruning framework that unifies low-bit inference and deterministic visual-token pruning in a single deployable pipeline. The framework introduces the \textbf{Q}uantization \textbf{U}nified \textbf{O}ffline \textbf{T}oken \textbf{A}llocator (\textbf{QUOTA}), which converts low-bit calibration signals into a layer-wise token allocation schedule and materializes it as a pruning recipe. Token importance is evaluated under deployed W4A4 operators with a quantized KV cache by combining activation magnitude, attention cues, and an explicit low-bit risk signal, enabling consistent budgeted top-$k$ selection. Experiments on standard VLM benchmarks show improved robustness over stage-wise baselines under the same low-bit regime, achieving 95.65\% average retention while retaining only 30\% of visual tokens, compared with about 94.3\% retention for representative stage-wise combinations. The code will be released.

</details>


### [226] [Where to Focus: Query-Modulated Multimodal Keyframe Selection for Long Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17422)
*Shaoguang Wang,Weiyu Guo,Ziyang Chen,Xuming Hu,Hui Xiong*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: Q-Gate：一种无需训练的即插即用框架，通过动态模态路由解决长视频理解中的关键帧选择问题，利用LLM的上下文推理能力评估查询意图，智能激活相关模态并抑制噪声。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长视频理解对多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）具有挑战性，因为处理密集帧序列的计算成本过高。现有解决方案通常依赖单一视觉中心指标或静态融合启发式分数，这种"一刀切"范式经常失败：仅视觉指标对情节驱动的叙事查询无效，而无差别地结合文本分数会为纯视觉任务引入严重的"模态噪声"。

Method: 提出Q-Gate框架，将关键帧选择视为动态模态路由问题。将检索过程解耦为三个轻量级专家流：用于局部细节的视觉定位、用于场景语义的全局匹配、以及用于字幕驱动叙事的上下文对齐。关键创新是查询调制门控机制，利用LLM的上下文推理能力评估查询意图，动态分配专家间的注意力权重，智能激活必要模态并"静音"无关模态。

Result: 在LongVideoBench和Video-MME数据集上，跨多个MLLM骨干网络的广泛实验表明，Q-Gate显著优于最先进的基线方法。通过有效抑制模态特定噪声，为可扩展视频推理提供了鲁棒且高度可解释的解决方案。

Conclusion: Q-Gate通过动态模态路由和查询调制门控机制，解决了长视频理解中的关键帧选择瓶颈，提供了一种无需训练、即插即用的高效解决方案，显著提升了MLLMs在长视频理解任务上的性能。

Abstract: Long video understanding remains a formidable challenge for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) due to the prohibitive computational cost of processing dense frame sequences. Prevailing solutions, which select a keyframe subset, typically rely on either a single visual-centric metric (e.g., CLIP similarity) or a static fusion of heuristic scores. This ``one-size-fits-all'' paradigm frequently fails: visual-only metrics are ineffective for plot-driven narrative queries, while indiscriminately incorporating textual scores introduces severe ``modal noise'' for purely visual tasks. To break this bottleneck, we propose Q-Gate, a plug-and-play and training-free framework that treats keyframe selection as a dynamic modality routing problem. We decouple the retrieval process into three lightweight expert streams: Visual Grounding for local details, Global Matching for scene semantics, and Contextual Alignment for subtitle-driven narratives. Crucially, Q-Gate introduces a Query-Modulated Gating Mechanism that leverages the in-context reasoning of an LLM to assess the query's intent and dynamically allocate attention weights across the experts. This mechanism intelligently activates necessary modalities while ``muting'' irrelevant ones, thereby maximizing the signal-to-noise ratio. Extensive experiments on LongVideoBench and Video-MME across multiple MLLM backbones demonstrate that Q-Gate substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. By effectively suppressing modality-specific noise, it provides a robust, highly interpretable solution for scalable video reasoning.

</details>


### [227] [Coevolving Representations in Joint Image-Feature Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17492)
*Theodoros Kouzelis,Spyros Gidaris,Nikos Komodakis*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: CoReDi提出了一种联合图像特征生成建模框架，通过让语义表示空间在训练过程中与扩散模型共同演化，自适应地优化生成任务，相比固定表示空间方法获得更快收敛和更高质量样本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联合图像特征生成方法依赖固定的表示空间，这些空间独立于生成目标构建且在训练中保持不变。作者认为指导扩散的表示空间本身应该适应生成任务，从而提高生成质量。

Method: 提出Coevolving Representation Diffusion (CoReDi)框架，在训练过程中通过联合学习轻量级线性投影和扩散模型，使语义表示空间演化。采用停止梯度目标、归一化和针对性正则化防止特征崩溃，实现稳定共同演化。

Result: 实验表明CoReDi在VAE潜在扩散和像素空间扩散中均优于固定表示空间的联合扩散模型，实现更快收敛和更高样本质量。

Conclusion: 自适应语义表示能够改善图像合成，使表示空间逐步专门化以适应生成需求，提高与图像潜在特征的互补性。

Abstract: Joint image-feature generative modeling has recently emerged as an effective strategy for improving diffusion training by coupling low-level VAE latents with high-level semantic features extracted from pre-trained visual encoders. However, existing approaches rely on a fixed representation space, constructed independently of the generative objective and kept unchanged during training. We argue that the representation space guiding diffusion should itself adapt to the generative task. To this end, we propose Coevolving Representation Diffusion (CoReDi), a framework in which the semantic representation space evolves during training by learning a lightweight linear projection jointly with the diffusion model. While naively optimizing this projection leads to degenerate solutions, we show that stable coevolution can be achieved through a combination of stop-gradient targets, normalization, and targeted regularization that prevents feature collapse. This formulation enables the semantic space to progressively specialize to the needs of image synthesis, improving its complementarity with image latents. We apply CoReDi to both VAE latent diffusion and pixel-space diffusion, demonstrating that adaptive semantic representations improve generative modeling across both settings. Experiments show that CoReDi achieves faster convergence and higher sample quality compared to joint diffusion models operating in fixed representation spaces.

</details>


### [228] [RS-HyRe-R1: A Hybrid Reward Mechanism to Overcome Perceptual Inertia for Remote Sensing Images Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17504)
*Gaozhi Zhou,Hu He,Peng Shen,Jipeng Zhang,Liujue Zhang,Linrui Xu,Zeyuan Wang,Ziyu Li,Xuezhi Cui,Wang Guo,Haifeng Li*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 85.0

TL;DR: 提出RS-HyRe-R1混合奖励框架解决遥感视觉语言模型中的"感知惯性"问题，通过三种奖励机制促进全面视觉证据挖掘，在多个任务上实现SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习后训练虽然能提升遥感视觉语言模型性能，但会导致"感知惯性"问题——模型倾向于依赖局部显著特征进行快速推理，而非进行全面视觉扫描和证据构建，限制了模型在复杂遥感图像理解中的表现。

Method: 提出RS-HyRe-R1混合奖励框架，包含三个关键组件：1) 空间推理激活奖励，强制结构化视觉推理；2) 感知正确性奖励，提供跨任务的适应性质量锚点；3) 视觉语义路径演化奖励，惩罚重复推理并促进探索互补线索。

Result: 仅用3B参数就在REC、OVD和VQA任务上达到SOTA性能，超越7B参数模型。在零样本泛化中，在VQA、OVD和REC上分别超过次优模型3.16%、3.97%和2.72%。

Conclusion: RS-HyRe-R1有效缓解了强化学习诱导的"感知惯性"问题，促进了更深入、更多样化的推理，为遥感视觉语言模型提供了有效的后训练框架。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training substantially improves remote sensing vision-language models (RS-VLMs). However, when handling complex remote sensing imagery (RSI) requiring exhaustive visual scanning, models tend to rely on localized salient cues for rapid inference. We term this RL-induced bias "perceptual inertia". Driven by reward maximization, models favor quick outcome fitting, leading to two limitations: cognitively, overreliance on specific features impedes complete evidence construction; operationally, models struggle to flexibly shift visual focus across tasks. To address this bias and encourage comprehensive visual evidence mining, we propose RS-HyRe-R1, a hybrid reward framework for RSI understanding. It introduces: (1) a spatial reasoning activation reward that enforces structured visual reasoning; (2) a perception correctness reward that provides adaptive quality anchors across RS tasks, ensuring accurate geometric and semantic alignment; and (3) a visual-semantic path evolution reward that penalizes repetitive reasoning and promotes exploration of complementary cues to build richer evidence chains.
