In our evaluation, aligning the training and inference input distributions produced large gains (delta-SSIM +0.082, SSIM +0.086, both p < 0.001), while the choice among aligned frameworks did not significantly affect any primary metric. Task-entropy and posterior-concentration analyses, replicated on two fundus autofluorescence (FAF) platforms, provided a mechanistic account: the predictable component of inter-visit change is small relative to time-invariant acquisition variability, leaving stochastic sampling with little width to exploit. Guided by these findings, we developed TRU (Temporal Retinal U-Net), a deterministic direct-regression model with continuous time-delta conditioning and multi-scale history aggregation. We evaluated TRU on 28,902 eyes across three imaging platforms: a mixed-disease Optos FAF cohort (9,942 eyes), zero-shot transfer to Stargardt macular dystrophy on Optos (288 eyes) and Heidelberg Spectralis (125 eyes), and a boundary evaluation on Cirrus en-face fundus images from a glaucoma cohort (18,547 eyes). TRU matched or exceeded delta-SSIM, SSIM, and PSNR in every FAF cohort against three state-of-the-art benchmarks, and its advantage grew monotonically with available history length.

</details>


### [374] [TeMuDance: Contrastive Alignment-Based Textual Control for Music-Driven Dance Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17005)
*Xinran Liu,Diptesh Kanojia,Wenwu Wang,Zhenhua Feng*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: TeMuDance是一个无需人工标注音乐-文本-舞蹈三元组数据的框架，通过运动作为语义锚点对齐不同模态，实现音乐驱动舞蹈生成中的文本控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音乐驱动舞蹈生成方法缺乏语义可控性，难以通过自然语言描述指导特定动作，主要原因是缺乏大规模对齐的音乐-文本-舞蹈数据集。

Method: 提出运动中心桥接范式，利用运动作为共享语义锚点，在统一嵌入空间中对齐不相关的音乐-舞蹈和文本-运动数据集；在冻结的音乐到舞蹈扩散主干上训练轻量级文本控制分支；设计双流微调策略和置信度过滤抑制噪声。

Result: TeMuDance在保持竞争性舞蹈质量的同时，显著提高了文本条件控制能力，优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 该框架实现了无需人工标注三元组数据的文本可控音乐驱动舞蹈生成，通过跨模态检索和噪声抑制策略解决了数据稀缺问题。

Abstract: Existing music-driven dance generation approaches have achieved strong realism and effective audio-motion alignment. However, they generally lack semantic controllability, making it difficult to guide specific movements through natural language descriptions. This limitation primarily stems from the absence of large-scale datasets that jointly align music, text, and motion for supervised learning of text-conditioned control. To address this challenge, we propose TeMuDance, a framework that enables text-based control for music-conditioned dance generation without requiring any manually annotated music-text-motion triplet dataset. TeMuDance introduces a motion-centred bridging paradigm that leverages motion as a shared semantic anchor to align disjoint music-dance and text-motion datasets within a unified embedding space, enabling cross-modal retrieval of missing modalities for end-to-end training. A lightweight text control branch is then trained on top of a frozen music-to-dance diffusion backbone, preserving rhythmic fidelity while enabling fine-grained semantic guidance. To further suppress noise inherent in the retrieved supervision, we design a dual-stream fine-tuning strategy with confidence-based filtering. We also propose a novel task-aligned metric that quantifies whether textual prompts induce the intended kinematic attributes under music conditioning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TeMuDance achieves competitive dance quality while substantially improving text-conditioned control over existing methods.

</details>


### [375] [Towards Universal Skeleton-Based Action Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17013)
*Jidong Kuang,Hongsong Wang,Jie Gui*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于Transformer的通用骨架动作识别方法，用于处理异构骨架数据和开放词汇动作识别，构建了大规模异构开放词汇骨架数据集并设计了多粒度运动-文本对齐策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器人技术的发展，基于骨架的动作识别变得日益重要，但现有方法忽视了骨架数据的异构性（不同来源的人类骨架和机器人结构差异），且缺乏开放词汇动作识别能力，限制了实际应用。

Method: 提出基于Transformer的模型，包含三个关键组件：1) 统一骨架表示；2) 运动编码器（使用双流Transformer编码器学习时空动作表示）；3) 多粒度运动-文本对齐（全局实例对齐、流特定对齐和细粒度对齐三个层次的对比学习）。

Result: 在包含异构骨架数据的流行基准测试上进行广泛实验，证明了所提方法的有效性和泛化能力。

Conclusion: 该研究解决了异构骨架动作识别和开放词汇识别的挑战，通过构建大规模数据集和设计多粒度对齐策略，为通用骨架动作识别提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: With the development of robotics, skeleton-based action recognition has become increasingly important, as human-robot interaction requires understanding the actions of humans and humanoid robots. Due to different sources of human skeletons and structures of humanoid robots, skeleton data naturally exhibit heterogeneity. However, previous works overlook the data heterogeneity of skeletons and solely construct models using homogeneous skeletons. Moreover, open-vocabulary action recognition is also essential for real-world applications. To this end, this work studies the challenging problem of heterogeneous skeleton-based action recognition with open vocabularies. We construct a large-scale Heterogeneous Open-Vocabulary (HOV) Skeleton dataset by integrating and refining multiple representative large-scale skeleton-based action datasets. To address universal skeleton-based action recognition, we propose a Transformer-based model that comprises three key components: unified skeleton representation, motion encoder for skeletons, and multi-grained motion-text alignment. The motion encoder feeds multi-modal skeleton embeddings into a two-stream Transformer-based encoder to learn spatio-temporal action representations, which are then mapped to a semantic space to align with text embeddings. Multi-grained motion-text alignment incorporates contrastive learning at three levels: global instance alignment, stream-specific alignment, and fine-grained alignment. Extensive experiments on popular benchmarks with heterogeneous skeleton data demonstrate both the effectiveness and the generalization ability of the proposed method. Code is available at https://github.com/jidongkuang/Universal-Skeleton.

</details>


### [376] [LIVE: Leveraging Image Manipulation Priors for Instruction-based Video Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17021)
*Weicheng Wang,Zhicheng Zhang,Zhongqi Zhang,Juncheng Zhou,Yongjie Zhu,Wenyu Qin,Meng Wang,Pengfei Wan,Jufeng Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: LIVE提出了一种联合训练框架，利用大规模高质量图像编辑数据和视频数据集来增强视频编辑能力，通过帧级token噪声策略和两阶段训练解决图像-视频领域差异问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视频编辑需要根据用户意图修改输入视频，但相比图像编辑，视频数据的高标注成本严重限制了视频编辑数据集的规模、质量和任务多样性。现有方法依赖视频生成模型或人工标注，难以构建大规模高质量的视频编辑数据集。

Method: 1. 提出LIVE联合训练框架，利用大规模图像编辑数据和视频数据集；2. 引入帧级token噪声策略，将特定帧的潜在表示作为推理token，利用预训练视频生成模型创建合理的时间变换；3. 通过清理公共数据集和构建自动化数据管道，采用两阶段训练策略来增强视频编辑能力。

Result: 构建了包含60多个挑战性任务的全面评估基准，这些任务在图像编辑中常见但在现有视频数据集中稀缺。广泛的比较和消融实验表明，该方法达到了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: LIVE框架通过有效利用图像编辑数据和创新的领域适应策略，成功解决了视频编辑数据稀缺的问题，在视频编辑任务上取得了优异性能。

Abstract: Video editing aims to modify input videos according to user intent. Recently, end-to-end training methods have garnered widespread attention, constructing paired video editing data through video generation or editing models. However, compared to image editing, the high annotation costs of video data severely constrain the scale, quality, and task diversity of video editing datasets when relying on video generative models or manual annotation. To bridge this gap, we propose LIVE, a joint training framework that leverages large-scale, high-quality image editing data alongside video datasets to bolster editing capabilities. To mitigate the domain discrepancy between static images and dynamic videos, we introduce a frame-wise token noise strategy, which treats the latents of specific frames as reasoning tokens, leveraging large pretrained video generative models to create plausible temporal transformations. Moreover, through cleaning public datasets and constructing an automated data pipeline, we adopt a two-stage training strategy to anneal video editing capabilities. Furthermore, we curate a comprehensive evaluation benchmark encompassing over 60 challenging tasks that are prevalent in image editing but scarce in existing video datasets. Extensive comparative and ablation experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. The source code will be publicly available.

</details>


### [377] [IMA-MoE: An Interpretable Modality-Aware Mixture-of-Experts Framework for Characterizing the Neurobiological Signatures of Binge Eating Disorder](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17028)
*Lin Zhao,Qiaohui Gao,Elizabeth Martin,Kurt P. Schulz,Tom Hildebrandt,Robyn Sysko,Tianming Liu,Xiaobo Li*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种可解释的多模态混合专家模型（IMA-MoE），用于整合神经影像、行为、激素和人口统计学数据，以发现暴食症（BED）的生物标志物，并在ABCD数据集上验证了其优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 暴食症（BED）是最常见的进食障碍，但当前诊断框架主要基于症状而非生物学机制，限制了早期检测和生物信息干预的发展。现有研究多依赖假设驱动的参数模型、单模态分析和有限数据多样性，难以推广。因此需要先进的数据驱动框架来建模多模态数据，发现可推广且具有生物学意义的BED特征。

Method: 提出可解释的多模态感知混合专家模型（IMA-MoE），将异质神经影像、行为、激素和人口统计学测量编码为不同token，在统一预测框架中灵活建模跨模态依赖关系，同时保留模态特定特征。引入token重要性机制增强可解释性，量化每个测量对模型预测的贡献。

Result: 在大型青少年大脑认知发展（ABCD）数据集上评估，IMA-MoE在区分BED与健康对照方面优于基线方法，并揭示了性别特异性预测模式：激素测量在女性预测中贡献更显著。

Conclusion: 研究结果表明，可解释的数据驱动多模态建模在推进BED的生物信息表征方面具有潜力，有助于神经精神障碍的更精确和个性化干预。

Abstract: Binge eating disorder (BED) is the most prevalent eating disorder. However, current diagnostic frameworks remain largely grounded in symptom-based criteria rather than underlying biological mechanisms, thereby limiting early detection and the development of biologically-informed interventions. Emerging studies have begun to investigate the neurobiological signatures of BED, yet their findings are often difficult to generalize due to the reliance on hypothesis-driven parametric models, single-modality analyses, and limited data diversity. Therefore, there is a critical need for advanced data-driven frameworks capable of modeling multimodal data to uncover generalizable and biologically meaningful signatures of BED. In this study, we propose the Interpretable Modality-Aware Mixture-of-Experts (IMA-MoE), a novel architecture designed to integrate heterogeneous neuroimaging, behavioral, hormonal, and demographic measures within a unified predictive framework. By encoding each measure as a distinct token, IMA-MoE enables flexible modeling of cross-modal dependencies while preserving modality-specific characteristics. We further introduce a token-importance mechanism to enhance interpretability by quantifying the contribution of each measure to model predictions. Evaluated on the large-scale Adolescent Brain Cognitive Development (ABCD) dataset, IMA-MoE demonstrates superior performance in differentiating BED from healthy controls compared with baseline methods, while revealing sex-specific predictive patterns, with hormonal measures contributing more prominently to prediction in females. Collectively, these findings highlight the promise of interpretable, data-driven multimodal modeling in advancing biologically-informed characterization of BED and facilitating more precise and personalized interventions in neuropsychiatric disorders.

</details>


### [378] [Conditional Evidence Reconstruction and Decomposition for Interpretable Multimodal Diagnosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17030)
*Shaowen Wan,Yanjun Lv,Lu Zhang,Dajiang Zhu,Bharat Biswal,Tianming Liu,Xiaobo Li,Lin Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: CERD框架用于可解释的多模态疾病诊断，通过条件证据重建处理缺失模态，并通过logit级归因分解诊断证据为跨模态验证和模态特定线索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经退行性疾病是多因素疾病，需要多模态建模，但在实际临床中常存在模态不完整问题。现有方法依赖群体或静态先验，难以捕捉个体特异性跨模态依赖，且可解释性有限。

Method: CERD框架：1) 基于个体观察输入条件重建缺失模态表示；2) 通过logit级归因将诊断证据分解为共享的跨模态验证和模态特定线索。

Result: 在ADNI数据集上，CERD在不完整模态设置下优于竞争基线，同时产生结构化且临床对齐的证据归因，提供可信决策支持。

Conclusion: CERD解决了不完整多模态诊断的挑战，提供可解释且临床相关的证据分解，增强了诊断系统的可信度。

Abstract: Neurobiological and neurodegenerative diseases are inherently multifactorial, arising from coupled influences spanning genetic susceptibility, brain alterations, and environmental and behavioral factors. Multimodal modeling has therefore been increasingly adopted for disease diagnosis by integrating complementary evidence across data sources. However, in both large-scale cohorts and real-world clinical workflows, modality coverage is often incomplete, making many multimodal models brittle when one or more modalities are unavailable. Existing approaches to incomplete multimodal diagnosis typically rely on group-wise or static priors, which may fail to capture subject-specific cross-modal dependencies; moreover, many models provide limited interpretability into which evidence sources drive the final decision. To address these limitations, we propose Conditional Evidence Reconstruction and Decomposition (CERD), a framework for interpretable multimodal diagnosis with incomplete modalities. CERD first reconstructs missing modality representations conditioned on each subject's observed inputs, then decomposes diagnostic evidence into shared cross-modal corroboration and modality-specific cues via logit-level attribution. Experiments on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) demonstrate that CERD outperforms competitive baselines under incomplete-modality settings while producing structured and clinically aligned evidence attributions for trustworthy decision support.

</details>


### [379] [Inference-Time Temporal Probability Smoothing for Stable Video Segmentation with SAM2 under Weak Prompts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17115)
*Dawar Jyoti Deka*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种推理时的时间概率平滑方法，通过光流运动扭曲和分割熵不确定性估计，改善SAM2视频分割的时间稳定性，无需重新训练或修改架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SAM2等交互式视频分割模型在弱监督下（如单帧稀疏点提示）存在时间不稳定问题，包括边界闪烁、物体丢失和跨帧不一致，限制了其在视频理解和控制应用中的可靠性。

Method: 基于光流运动扭曲和分割熵不确定性估计的推理时时间概率平滑方法，结合前向-后向流一致性，自适应地融合当前帧预测与运动对齐的历史估计。

Result: 在四个不同视频序列上评估，使用运动补偿IoU、边界一致性、物体持续性和面积波动等指标，实验结果显示在保持空间精度的同时，时间稳定性相比原始SAM2推理有显著提升。

Conclusion: 提出的框架轻量级、模型无关，适用于实时交互式视频分割，有效解决了弱提示下的时间不稳定问题。

Abstract: Interactive video segmentation models such as SAM2 have demonstrated strong generalization across diverse visual domains. However, under weak user supervision, for example, when sparse point prompts are provided on a single frame, their predictions often suffer from temporal instability, including flickering boundaries, object dropout, and inconsistent object extents across frames. These issues limit their reliability in downstream video understanding and control applications.
  In this paper, we propose an inference-time temporal probability smoothing method that improves the temporal stability of SAM2-based video segmentation without retraining or architectural modification. Our approach operates directly on per-frame segmentation probability maps and leverages optical-flow-based motion warping together with pixel-wise uncertainty estimates derived from segmentation entropy, and forward-backwards flow consistency. These signals are used to adaptively blend current-frame predictions with motion-aligned historical estimates, yielding temporally coherent segmentation outputs under weak prompts.
  We evaluate the proposed method on four diverse video sequences using a comprehensive set of frame-wise and temporal stability metrics, including motion-compensated IoU, boundary consistency, object persistence, and area volatility. Experimental results demonstrate consistent improvements in temporal stability over vanilla SAM2 inference while preserving spatial accuracy. The proposed framework is lightweight, model-agnostic, and well-suited for real-time, interactive video segmentation.

</details>


### [380] [OptiMVMap: Offline Vectorized Map Construction via Optimal Multi-vehicle Perspectives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17135)
*Zedong Dan,Zijie Wang,Wei Zhang,Xiangru Lin,Weiming Zhang,Xiao Tan,Jingdong Wang,Liang Lin,Guanbin Li*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: OptiMVMap提出了一种多车辆向量化地图构建方法，通过最优车辆选择模块选择互补视角，解决单车辆视角不足问题，显著提升地图精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶地图构建方法主要依赖单车辆轨迹，存在视角不足问题：记忆方法虽然能聚合时间帧，但缺乏空间多样性来揭示遮挡区域。多车辆融合面临计算成本高、视角冗余和噪声三大挑战。

Method: 将多车辆地图构建重新定义为"选择-融合"问题：1) 最优车辆选择模块识别能最大减少遮挡区域不确定性的紧凑辅助车辆子集；2) 跨车辆注意力模块进行姿态容忍对齐；3) 语义感知噪声滤波器抑制伪影；4) BEV级融合。

Result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse2数据集上，OptiMVMap相比MapTRv2分别提升+10.5 mAP和+9.3 mAP，相比记忆增强基线MVMap和HRMapNet在nuScenes上分别提升+6.2 mAP和+3.8 mAP。

Conclusion: 不确定性引导的辅助车辆选择对于高效准确的多车辆向量化地图构建至关重要，该方法能以更少视角获得更完整、拓扑忠实的地图。

Abstract: Offline vectorized maps constitute critical infrastructure for high-precision autonomous driving and mapping services. Existing approaches rely predominantly on single ego-vehicle trajectories, which fundamentally suffer from viewpoint insufficiency: while memory-based methods extend observation time by aggregating ego-trajectory frames, they lack the spatial diversity needed to reveal occluded regions. Incorporating views from surrounding vehicles offers complementary perspectives, yet naive fusion introduces three key challenges: computational cost from large candidate pools, redundancy from near-collinear viewpoints, and noise from pose errors and occlusion artifacts.
  We present OptiMVMap, which reformulates multi-vehicle mapping as a select-then-fuse problem to address these challenges systematically. An Optimal Vehicle Selection (OVS) module strategically identifies a compact subset of helpers that maximally reduce ego-centric uncertainty in occluded regions, addressing computation and redundancy challenges. Cross-Vehicle Attention (CVA) and Semantic-aware Noise Filter (SNF) then perform pose-tolerant alignment and artifact suppression before BEV-level fusion, addressing the noise challenge. This targeted pipeline yields more complete and topologically faithful maps with substantially fewer views than indiscriminate aggregation. On nuScenes and Argoverse2, OptiMVMap improves MapTRv2 by +10.5 mAP and +9.3 mAP, respectively, and surpasses memory-augmented baselines MVMap and HRMapNet by +6.2 mAP and +3.8 mAP on nuScenes. These results demonstrate that uncertainty-guided selection of helper vehicles is essential for efficient and accurate multi-vehicle vectorized mapping. The code is released at https://github.com/DanZeDong/OptiMVMap.

</details>


### [381] [ScenarioControl: Vision-Language Controllable Vectorized Latent Scenario Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17147)
*Lili Gao,Yanbo Xu,William Koch,Samuele Ruffino,Luke Rowe,Behdad Chalaki,Dmitriy Rivkin,Julian Ost,Roger Girgis,Mario Bijelic,Felix Heide*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: ScenarioControl是首个用于学习型驾驶场景生成的视觉语言控制机制，能够根据文本提示或输入图像合成多样、真实的3D场景推演，包括地图、动态演员的3D边界框、行人、驾驶基础设施和自车摄像头观测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前驾驶场景生成方法缺乏对场景布局和交通条件的细粒度控制能力，无法根据文本或视觉提示生成多样化且真实的驾驶场景。需要一种能够连接多模态控制与稀疏向量化场景元素的方法。

Method: 提出跨全局控制机制，将交叉注意力与轻量级全局上下文分支相结合，在向量化潜在空间中联合表示道路结构和动态演员。该方法支持从不同演员视角生成时间一致的场景推演，并支持长时域场景延续。

Result: 实验验证显示，ScenarioControl在控制依从性和保真度方面优于所有测试方法。发布了包含与向量化地图结构对齐的文本注释的数据集，用于训练和评估。

Conclusion: ScenarioControl首次实现了对学习型驾驶场景生成的视觉语言控制，能够根据多模态输入生成多样化、真实的3D驾驶场景，为自动驾驶仿真和测试提供了强大工具。

Abstract: We introduce ScenarioControl, the first vision-language control mechanism for learned driving scenario generation. Given a text prompt or an input image, Scenario-Control synthesizes diverse, realistic 3D scenario rollouts - including map, 3D boxes of reactive actors over time, pedestrians, driving infrastructure, and ego camera observations. The method generates scenes in a vectorized latent space that represents road structure and dynamic agents jointly. To connect multimodal control with sparse vectorized scene elements, we propose a cross-global control mechanism that integrates crossattention with a lightweight global-context branch, enabling fine-grained control over road layout and traffic conditions while preserving realism. The method produces temporally consistent scenario rollouts from the perspectives different actors in the scene, supporting long-horizon continuation of driving scenarios. To facilitate training and evaluation, we release a dataset with text annotations aligned to vectorized map structures. Extensive experiments validate that the control adherence and fidelity of ScenarioControl compare favorable to all tested methods across all experiments. Project webpage: https://light.princeton.edu/ScenarioControl

</details>


### [382] [DreamShot: Personalized Storyboard Synthesis with Video Diffusion Prior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17195)
*Junjia Huang,Binbin Yang,Pengxiang Yan,Jiyang Liu,Bin Xia,Zhao Wang,Yitong Wang,Liang Lin,Guanbin Li*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: DreamShot是一个基于视频扩散模型的故事情节板合成框架，通过利用视频生成先验实现可控的多镜头合成，解决了现有文本到图像模型在长时序一致性、角色身份保持和叙事连贯性方面的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有故事情节板合成方法主要基于文本到图像扩散模型，这些模型难以保持长时序一致性、角色身份一致性和跨多个镜头的叙事连贯性。需要一种能够生成视觉和语义一致序列的方法。

Method: 基于视频扩散模型构建框架，支持文本到镜头和参考到镜头生成，以及基于先前帧的故事延续。引入多参考角色条件模块，接受多个角色参考图像，并通过角色注意力一致性损失强制身份对齐。

Result: 实验表明，DreamShot在场景连贯性、角色一致性和生成效率方面优于最先进的文本到图像故事情节板模型，建立了可控视频模型驱动视觉叙事的新方向。

Conclusion: DreamShot通过利用视频生成模型固有的时空一致性，实现了视觉和语义一致的序列生成，提高了叙事保真度和角色连续性，为可控的视觉叙事提供了新方法。

Abstract: Storyboard synthesis plays a crucial role in visual storytelling, aiming to generate coherent shot sequences that visually narrate cinematic events with consistent characters, scenes, and transitions. However, existing approaches are mostly adapted from text-to-image diffusion models, which struggle to maintain long-range temporal coherence, consistent character identities, and narrative flow across multiple shots. In this paper, we introduce DreamShot, a video generative model based storyboard framework that fully exploits powerful video diffusion priors for controllable multi-shot synthesis. DreamShot supports both Text-to-Shot and Reference-to-Shot generation, as well as story continuation conditioned on previous frames, enabling flexible and context-aware storyboard generation. By leveraging the spatial-temporal consistency inherent in video generative models, DreamShot produces visually and semantically coherent sequences with improved narrative fidelity and character continuity. Furthermore, DreamShot incorporates a multi-reference role conditioning module that accepts multiple character reference images and enforces identity alignment via a Role-Attention Consistency Loss, explicitly constraining attention between reference and generated roles. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DreamShot achieves superior scene coherence, role consistency, and generation efficiency compared to state-of-the-art text-to-image storyboard models, establishing a new direction toward controllable video model-driven visual storytelling.

</details>


### [383] [SciDraw-6K: A Multilingual Scientific Illustration Dataset Generated by Google Gemini](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17206)
*Davie Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: SciDraw-6K是一个包含6,291张科学插图的合成数据集，由Google Gemini图像生成模型创建，支持11种语言提示，涵盖8个科学类别，专门用于科学插图研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前文本到图像研究主要关注通用领域，缺乏专门针对科学插图的数据集。科学插图（如示意图、机制图等）在学术交流中至关重要，需要专门的数据集来支持多语言文本到图像研究、领域适应的扩散模型微调以及科学可视化的提示工程研究。

Method: 使用Google Gemini图像生成模型（主要是gemini-2.5-flash-image和gemini-3-pro-image-preview模型系列）合成科学插图。构建了包含6,291张图像的标注数据集，每张图像配有11种语言的提示文本。图像涵盖8个科学类别：生物医学、化学、材料、电子、环境、AI系统、物理和其他。数据集专门针对科学插图类型，包括示意图、机制图、目录图和概念海报。

Result: 创建了SciDraw-6K数据集，包含6,291张科学插图，支持11种语言提示。该数据集已用于支持sci-draw.com公共科学绘图服务，并在Hugging Face和GitHub上公开发布，以促进多语言文本到图像研究、领域适应的扩散模型微调和科学可视化提示工程研究。

Conclusion: SciDraw-6K填补了科学插图领域专门数据集的空白，为多语言文本到图像研究、领域适应的模型微调和科学可视化提示工程提供了有价值的资源。该数据集支持科学插图的生成和应用研究，有助于推动科学可视化技术的发展。

Abstract: We present SciDraw-6K, a curated dataset of 6,291 scientific illustrations synthesized by Google Gemini image-generation models, each paired with prompts in eleven languages (English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, German, French, Spanish, Brazilian Portuguese, Italian, and Russian). Images span eight broad scientific categories -- biomedical, chemistry, materials, electronics, environment, AI systems, physics, and a long "other" tail -- and are produced primarily by the gemini-2.5-flash-image and gemini-3-pro-image-preview model families. In contrast to general-purpose text-to-image corpora that dominate the literature, SciDraw-6K is purpose-built for the scientific illustration genre: schematic diagrams, mechanism figures, table-of-contents graphics, and conceptual posters. We describe the construction pipeline, report dataset statistics, and document its use as the substrate of sci-draw.com, a public scientific drawing service. The dataset is released to support multilingual text-to-image research, domain-adapted diffusion fine-tuning, and prompt-engineering studies for scientific visualization. Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/SciDrawAI/SciDraw-6K Code: https://github.com/SciDrawAI/scidraw-6k

</details>


### [384] [Region-Affinity Attention for Whole-Slide Breast Cancer Classification in Deep Ultraviolet Imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17222)
*Nagur Shareef Shaik,Teja Krishna Cherukuri,Dong Hye Ye*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对DUV-WSI乳腺癌分类的区域亲和力注意力机制，无需切片处理完整玻片，通过建模局部邻居距离和构建完整亲和矩阵来动态突出诊断相关区域，在136个样本上达到92.67%准确率和95.97% AUC。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 乳腺癌诊断需要快速精确的工具，但传统组织病理学方法在术中应用不足。DUV荧光成像提供高对比度、无标记的全玻片图像，但现有深度学习分类方法多为基于patch的，会破坏空间上下文且预处理开销大。标准注意力机制未能充分利用DUV-WSI数据中丰富的多尺度区域关系。

Method: 提出区域亲和力注意力机制，处理完整玻片无需切片，通过建模局部邻居距离和构建完整亲和矩阵来动态突出诊断相关区域，并采用对比损失增强特征可区分性。

Result: 在136个DUV-WSI样本数据集上，该方法达到92.67±0.73%的准确率和95.97%的AUC，优于现有注意力方法。

Conclusion: 区域亲和力注意力机制能够有效处理DUV-WSI乳腺癌分类，保持空间完整性并充分利用多尺度区域关系，为术中快速诊断提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: Breast cancer diagnosis demands rapid and precise tools, yet traditional histopathological methods often fall short in intra-operative settings. Deep Ultraviolet (DUV) fluorescence imaging emerges as a transformative approach, offering high-contrast, label-free visualization of whole-slide images (WSIs) with unprecedented detail, surpassing conventional hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) staining in speed and resolution. However, existing deep learning methods for breast cancer classification, predominantly patch-based, fragment spatial context and incur significant preprocessing overhead, limiting their clinical utility. Moreover, standard attention mechanisms, such as Spatial, Squeeze-and-Excitation, Global Context and Guided Context Gating, fail to fully exploit the rich, multi-scale regional relationships inherent in DUV-WSI data, often prioritizing generic feature recalibration over diagnostic specificity. This study introduces a novel Region-Affinity Attention mechanism tailored for DUV-WSI breast cancer classification, processing entire slides without patching to preserve spatial integrity. By modeling local neighbor distances and constructing a full affinity matrix, our method dynamically highlights diagnostically relevant regions, augmented by a contrastive loss to enhance feature discriminability. Evaluated on a dataset of 136 DUV-WSI samples, our approach achieves an accuracy of 92.67 +/- 0.73% and an AUC of 95.97%, outperforming existing attention methods.

</details>


### [385] [Spectral Forensics of Diffusion Attention Graphs for Copy-Move Forgery Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17287)
*H. M. Shadman Tabib,Tasriad Ahmed Tias,Nafis Tahmid*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: GraphSpecForge：一种无需训练的复制-移动伪造检测框架，通过分析预训练Stable Diffusion U-Net中注意力图的谱结构来检测图像中的复制-移动伪造。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复制-移动伪造（图像内部区域复制）对视觉媒体完整性构成持续威胁。现有方法通常需要特定训练，而本文旨在开发一种无需训练的检测框架，利用预训练扩散模型的注意力图结构特征。

Method: 通过分析预训练Stable Diffusion U-Net的自注意力图，发现复制-移动操作会在图中诱导近似子图复制，导致归一化图拉普拉斯矩阵的谱重新分布。使用基于扰动理论的论证形式化这一联系，并构建基于Wasserstein距离的图像级异常检测器，比较每张图像的拉普拉斯谱与真实参考分布。

Result: 在四个复制-移动基准测试中无需特定训练：RecodAI-LUC上AUROC=0.606，归一化拉普拉斯谱比原始注意力谱提升+0.057 AUROC；MICC-F220、CoMoFoD和COVERAGE上分别达到0.752、0.774和0.673 AUROC；CoMoFoD上AUPRC=0.833，平衡准确率=0.712，MCC=0.499，TPR@1%FPR=32.5%。消融实验确认信号对操作强度的特异性。

Conclusion: GraphSpecForge证明了预训练扩散模型的注意力图包含可用于检测复制-移动伪造的谱结构特征，提供了一种无需训练的检测方法，在多个基准测试中表现良好。

Abstract: Copy-move forgery, where a region within an image is duplicated to hide or fabricate content, remains a persistent threat to visual media integrity. We introduce GraphSpecForge, a training-free framework that detects copy-move forgery by analysing the spectral structure of attention graphs from a pretrained Stable Diffusion U-Net. Our central insight is that copy-move manipulation induces approximate subgraph duplication in the self-attention graph, leading to measurable spectral redistribution in the normalized graph Laplacian. We formalise this link with perturbation-based arguments and build an image-level anomaly detector using Wasserstein distances between per-image Laplacian spectra and an authentic reference distribution. We evaluate GraphSpecForge on four copy-move benchmarks without forgery-specific retraining. On RecodAI-LUC (5,128 images), our best configuration achieves AUROC = 0.606 (95% CI: 0.580-0.638; permutation p = 0.005), and the normalized Laplacian outperforms raw attention spectra by +0.057 AUROC. On MICC-F220, CoMoFoD, and COVERAGE, the same pipeline attains AUROCs of 0.752, 0.774, and 0.673, respectively; on CoMoFoD it also reaches AUPRC = 0.833, balanced accuracy = 0.712, MCC = 0.499, and TPR@1%FPR = 32.5%. Additional ablation and falsification experiments confirm the signal's specificity and sensitivity to manipulation strength, while null-graph controls rule out trivial-statistic explanations.

</details>


### [386] [Frequency-guided Multi-level Reasoning for Scene Graph Generation in Video](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17298)
*Chenxing Li,Yiping Duan,Xiaoming Tao*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: FReMuRe模型通过频率引导的关系多级推理，解决视频场景图生成中的长尾分布问题，使用关系特定分支、频率感知双分支谓词嵌入网络和可互换关系分类头来提升长尾关系召回率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频场景图生成方法在处理长尾分布关系时存在局限，难以平衡常见关系和罕见关系的建模能力，导致长尾类别召回率低。

Method: 1) 关系特定分支处理梯度冲突；2) 频率感知双分支谓词嵌入网络分别建模高频和低频关系，通过门控融合提升长尾类别召回；3) 两种可互换关系分类头：贝叶斯头用于不确定性估计，高斯混合模型头增强类内多样性。

Result: 在Action Genome数据集上，FReMuRe显著提升了长尾关系的召回率和整体推理鲁棒性。

Conclusion: FReMuRe通过机制层面的创新，有效解决了视频场景图生成中的长尾分布问题，为结构化视频语义理解提供了更平衡和鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: Video Scene Graph Generation aims to obtain structured semantic representations of objects and their relationships in videos for high-level understanding. However, existing methods still have limitations in handling long-tail distributions. This paper proposes the Frequency-guided Relational Multi-level Reasoning (FReMuRe) model, which enhances the modeling ability of long-tail relationships from a mechanism perspective. We introduce relation-specific branches to deal gradient conflicts, yielding more balanced and tail-aware learning. And we design a frequency-aware dual-branch predicate embedding network to model high-frequency and low-frequency relationships separately and improve the recall rate of tail classes through gated fusion. Meanwhile, we propose two types of interchangeable relation classification heads: Bayesian Head for uncertainty estimation and new Gaussian Mixture Model Head to enhance intra-class diversity. Experimental results show that FReMuRe significantly improves the recall rate of long-tail relationships and overall reasoning robustness on the Action Genome dataset.

</details>


### [387] [R-FLoRA: Residual-Statistic-Gated Low-Rank Adaptation for Single-Image Face Morphing Attack Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17321)
*Raghavendra Ramachandra*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种新的单图像人脸变形攻击检测框架，结合高频拉普拉斯残差统计与冻结的基础视觉Transformer表示，通过R-FLoRA和Res-FiLM等技术增强对局部变形伪影的敏感性，在多个数据集上超越了现有S-MAD方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人脸变形攻击对护照签发、边境控制和数字身份验证中的人脸识别系统构成重大威胁。由于缺乏可信参考和攻击生成方法的多样性，从单张人脸图像检测变形攻击仍然具有挑战性。

Method: 提出S-MAD框架，集成高频拉普拉斯残差统计与冻结的基础视觉Transformer表示。使用残差统计门控低秩适配器(R-FLoRA)和特征级残差融合(Res-FiLM)增强对局部变形伪影的敏感性，同时保留骨干网络的语义上下文。引入残差对比对齐损失来正则化融合标记空间。

Result: 在四个ICAO兼容数据集上，涵盖七种变形生成技术，该方法在检测精度和跨域/跨数据集泛化能力方面一致超越了九种最先进的S-MAD算法。冻结骨干网络和最小可训练参数实现了实时效率和可解释性。

Conclusion: 该方法通过结合高频残差统计与基础视觉Transformer表示，有效解决了单图像人脸变形攻击检测的挑战，具有实际部署的潜力，适用于生物特征验证系统的现实场景。

Abstract: Face morphing attacks pose a substantial risk to the reliability of face recognition systems used in passport issuance, border control, and digital identity verification. Detecting morphing attacks from a single facial image remains challenging owing to the lack of a trusted reference and the diversity of attack generation methods. This paper presents a new Single-Image Face Morphing Attack Detection (S-MAD) framework that integrates high-frequency Laplacian residual statistics with representations from a frozen, foundation-scale vision transformer. The approach employs residual-statistic-gated low-rank adapters (R-FLoRA) and feature-wise residual fusion (Res-FiLM) to enhance sensitivity to local morphing artefacts while preserving the semantic context of the backbone. A novel residual-contrastive alignment loss further regularises the fused token space, improving discrimination under unseen morphing conditions. Comprehensive experiments on four ICAO-compliant datasets, encompassing seven morph generation techniques, demonstrate that the proposed method consistently surpasses nine recent state-of-the-art S-MAD algorithms in detection accuracy and cross-domain (or dataset) generalisation. With a frozen backbone and minimal trainable parameters, the model achieves real-time efficiency and interpretability, making it suitable for real-life scenarios in biometric verification systems.

</details>


### [388] [MESA: A Training-Free Multi-Exemplar Deep Framework for Restoring Ancient Inscription Textures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17390)
*Vasileios Toulatzis,Ioannis Fudos*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: MESA是一种用于古代铭文图像修复的方法，利用保存完好的示例铭文来指导受损文本的重建，通过VGG19特征、Gram矩阵和OCR估计的字符宽度来实现风格感知的修复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 古代铭文常因破损、腐蚀等原因出现缺失或损坏区域，影响阅读和分析。现有图像修复方法在铭文恢复方面存在局限性，需要一种能够利用保存完好的示例铭文来指导修复的方法。

Method: MESA使用VGG19卷积特征编码为Gram矩阵来捕获示例纹理、风格和笔画结构；通过最小化均方位移选择最佳示例；利用OCR估计的字符宽度确定层间贡献权重；使用训练掩码保护完好区域，仅修复受损区域。

Result: 对比实验显示MESA在铭文图像修复方面具有优势，能够有效利用示例铭文指导受损文本的重建。

Conclusion: MESA提供了一种有效的铭文图像修复方法，并给出了根据可用示例和元数据选择修复策略的实用路线图。

Abstract: Ancient inscriptions frequently suffer missing or corrupted regions from fragmentation, erosion, or other damage, hindering reading, and analysis. We review prior image restoration methods and their applicability to inscription image recovery, then introduce MESA (Multi-Exemplar, Style-Aware) -an image-level restoration method that uses well-preserved exemplar inscriptions (from the same epigraphic monument, material, or similar letterforms) to guide reconstruction of damaged text. MESA encodes VGG19 convolutional features as Gram matrices to capture exemplar texture, style, and stroke structure; for each neural network layer it selects the exemplar minimizing Mean-Squared Displacement (MSD) to the damaged input. Layer-wise contribution weights are derived from Optical Character Recognition-estimated character widths in the exemplar set to bias filters toward scales matching letter geometry, and a training mask preserves intact regions so synthesis is restricted to damaged areas. We also summarize prior network architectures and exemplar and single-image synthesis, inpainting, and Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) approaches, highlighting limitations that MESA addresses. Comparative experiments demonstrate the advantages of MESA. Finally, we provide a practical roadmap for choosing restoration strategies given available exemplars and metadata.

</details>


### [389] [SegTTA: Training-Free Test-Time Augmentation for Zero-Shot Medical Imaging Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17451)
*Yihong Yao,Chunlei Li,Canxuan Gang,Wenzhi Hu,Zeyu Zhang,Hao Zhang,Xiaoyan Li*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: SegTTA：无需重新训练的医学图像分割增强框架，通过四种数据增强与多检查点加权投票提升分割性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学图像质量因设备和操作者差异而参差不齐，现有基础模型虽具泛化能力，但在实际临床应用中仍面临挑战。需要一种无需重新训练的方法来提升医学图像分割的鲁棒性和准确性。

Method: 结合四种数据增强（Gamma校正、对比度增强、高斯模糊、高斯噪声）与多个MedSAM2检查点的加权投票机制，通过投票阈值控制覆盖范围与精度的权衡。

Result: 在三个不同数据集上均取得一致改进：健康子宫分割、子宫肌瘤检测、多类别肝脏结构分割。在肝脏血管数据集上，相比MedSAM2基线，mIoU提升1.6，aIoU提升1.9，HD95降低约2.0。

Conclusion: SegTTA框架有效提升了医学图像分割性能，无需模型重新训练。大型器官受益于强度增强，小病灶需要噪声增强，投票阈值可实现针对不同临床需求的优化。

Abstract: Increasingly advanced data augmentation techniques have greatly aided clinical medical research, increasing data diversity and improving model generalization capabilities. Although most current basic models exhibit strong generalization abilities, image quality varies due to differences in equipment and operators. To address these challenges, we present SegTTA, a framework that improves medical image segmentation without model retraining by combining four augmentations (Gamma correction, Contrast enhancement, Gaussian blur, Gaussian noise) with weighted voting across multiple MedSAM2 checkpoints. Experiments demonstrate consistent improvements across three diverse datasets: healthy uterus segmentation, uterine myoma detection, and multi class hepatic structure segmentation. Ablation studies reveal that large organs benefit from intensity augmentations while small lesions require noise augmentations. The voting threshold controls the coverage precision trade off, enabling task specific optimization for different clinical requirements. Ultimately, on a multiclass hepatic vessel dataset, compared to MedSAM2 baselines, our method achieves an increase of 1.6 in mIoU and 1.9 in aIoU, along with a reduction of approximately 2.0 in HD95. Code will be available at https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/SegTTA.

</details>


### [390] [Edit Fidelity Field: Semantics-Aware Region Isolation for Training-Free Scene Text Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17500)
*Guandong Li,Mengxia Ye*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Edit Fidelity Field (EFF)来解决场景文本编辑中的编辑溢出问题，通过语义感知的连续场控制像素级编辑保真度，将溢出率从94%降低到25%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于扩散的场景文本编辑方法存在严重的编辑溢出问题——编辑目标文本区域时会无意中修改非目标区域（特别是相邻文本）。通过对50个真实场景的系统评估发现，现有方法的溢出率高达94%。

Method: 提出Edit Fidelity Field (EFF)，这是一个语义感知的连续场，利用OCR检测的文本区域构建四区域场：编辑核心区（完全可编辑）、过渡区（平滑衰减）、保护区域（非目标文本，显式锁定）和背景（严格保留）。EFF作为无需训练、模型无关的后处理模块，适用于任何基于扩散的STE方法。

Result: EFF将溢出率从94%降低到25%，同时将非目标区域保护性能提升+91.4 dB PSNR。还提出了按区域溢出量化评估协议，可单独测量每个非目标文本区域的编辑泄漏。

Conclusion: EFF有效解决了场景文本编辑中的编辑溢出问题，通过语义感知的连续场实现了精确的区域控制，显著提升了编辑的保真度和非目标区域的保护能力。

Abstract: Scene text editing (STE) has achieved remarkable progress in accurately rendering target text through diffusion-based methods. However, we identify a critical yet overlooked problem: edit spillover -- when editing a target text region, existing methods inadvertently modify non-target regions, particularly neighboring text. Through systematic evaluation on 50 real-world scenes across four categories, we reveal that state-of-the-art diffusion editing models exhibit a spillover rate of 94%, meaning nearly all non-target text regions are altered during editing. To address this, we propose the Edit Fidelity Field (EFF), a semantics-aware continuous field that controls per-pixel editing fidelity. Unlike binary masks, EFF leverages OCR-detected text regions to construct a four-zone field: Edit Core (fully editable), Transition Zone (smooth decay), Protected Zone (non-target text, explicitly locked), and Background (strictly preserved). EFF operates as a training-free, model-agnostic post-processing module applicable to any diffusion-based STE method. We further propose per-region spillover quantification, a novel evaluation protocol that measures edit leakage at each non-target text region individually. Experiments demonstrate that EFF reduces spillover rate from 94% to 25% while improving non-target region preservation by +91.4 dB PSNR.

</details>


### [391] [UniGeo: Unifying Geometric Guidance for Camera-Controllable Image Editing via Video Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17565)
*Hong Jiang,Wensong Song,Zongxing Yang,Ruijie Quan,Yi Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: UniGeo提出了一种用于相机可控图像编辑的统一几何引导框架，通过表示层、架构层和损失函数层的三层次几何注入，解决了现有方法在连续相机运动下的几何漂移和结构退化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有相机可控图像编辑方法存在两个主要问题：1）仅依赖碎片化的几何引导（如仅在表示层注入点云），而模型包含多个层次；2）主要基于图像扩散模型，在离散视角映射上操作。这两个限制共同导致在连续相机运动下出现几何漂移和结构退化。

Method: UniGeo框架在三个层次统一注入几何引导：1）表示层：采用帧解耦的几何参考注入机制，提供鲁棒的跨视角几何上下文；2）架构层：引入几何锚点注意力来对齐多视角特征；3）损失函数层：提出轨迹端点几何监督策略，显式增强目标视图的结构保真度。

Result: 在多个公共基准测试（包括广泛和有限的相机运动设置）上的综合实验表明，UniGeo在视觉质量和几何一致性方面显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 通过系统地在三个关键层次（表示、架构、损失函数）统一注入几何引导，UniGeo有效解决了相机可控图像编辑中的几何漂移和结构退化问题，实现了更好的跨视角几何一致性。

Abstract: Camera-controllable image editing aims to synthesize novel views of a given scene under varying camera poses while strictly preserving cross-view geometric consistency. However, existing methods typically rely on fragmented geometric guidance, such as only injecting point clouds at the representation level despite models containing multiple levels, and are mainly based on image diffusion models that operate on discrete view mappings. These two limitations jointly lead to geometric drift and structural degradation under continuous camera motion.
  We observe that while leveraging video models provides continuous viewpoint priors for camera-controllable image editing, they still struggle to form stable geometric understanding if geometric guidance remains fragmented. To systematically address this, we inject unified geometric guidance across three levels that jointly determine the generative output: representation, architecture, and loss function.
  To this end, we propose UniGeo, a novel camera-controllable editing framework. Specifically, at the representation level, UniGeo incorporates a frame-decoupled geometric reference injection mechanism to provide robust cross-view geometry context. At the architecture level, it introduces geometric anchor attention to align multi-view features. At the loss function level, it proposes a trajectory-endpoint geometric supervision strategy to explicitly reinforce the structural fidelity of target views.
  Comprehensive experiments across multiple public benchmarks, encompassing both extensive and limited camera motion settings, demonstrate that UniGeo significantly outperforms existing methods in both visual quality and geometric consistency.

</details>


### [392] [Self-Supervised Super-Resolution for Sentinel-5P Hyperspectral Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17652)
*Hyam Omar Ali,Antoine Crosnier,Romain Abraham,Baptiste Combelles,Fabrice Jégou,Bruno Galerne*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于Sentinel-5P卫星数据的自监督高光谱超分辨率框架，无需高分辨率地面真值，结合SURE估计器和等变成像约束，使用深度可分离卷积U-Net架构，在合成数据和真实观测中均取得良好效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Sentinel-5P卫星在大气监测中至关重要，但其空间分辨率限制了精细尺度分析。现有超分辨率方法依赖于监督学习，需要合成低分辨率数据，而真实高分辨率数据不存在，这限制了方法在真实观测中的应用。

Method: 提出自监督高光谱超分辨率框架：1) 结合Stein无偏风险估计器(SURE)和等变成像约束；2) 整合S5P退化算子和从信噪比元数据推导的噪声统计；3) 设计用于效率和光谱保真度的深度可分离卷积U-Net架构。

Result: 在两个设置中评估：1) LR-HR设置中，自监督模型达到与监督方法相当的性能；2) GT-SHR设置中，超分辨率图像超越原生空间分辨率而无高分辨率参考。多个波段结果显示自监督方法保持强一致性，定性分析显示比双三次插值改进空间细节，EMIT数据验证重建结构具有物理意义。

Conclusion: 提出的自监督框架能够在没有高分辨率地面真值的情况下训练Sentinel-5P超分辨率模型，性能与监督方法相当，为真实卫星观测的超分辨率分析提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Sentinel-5P (S5P) plays a critical role in atmospheric monitoring; however, its spatial resolution limits fine-scale analysis. Existing super-resolution (SR) approaches rely on supervised learning with synthetic low-resolution (LR) data, since true high-resolution (HR) data do not exist, limiting their applicability to real observations. We propose a self-supervised hyperspectral SR framework for S5P that enables training without HR ground truth. The method combines Stein's Unbiased Risk Estimator (SURE) with an equivariant imaging constraint, incorporating the S5P degradation operator and noise statistics derived from signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) metadata. We also introduce depthwise separable convolution U-Net architectures designed for efficiency and spectral fidelity. The framework is evaluated in two settings: (i) LR-HR, where synthetic LR data are used for direct comparison with supervised learning, and (ii) GT-SHR, where super-resolved images surpass the native spatial resolution without HR reference. Results across multiple bands show that self-supervised models achieve performance comparable to supervised methods while maintaining strong consistency. Qualitative analysis shows improved spatial detail over bicubic interpolation, and validation with EMIT data confirms that reconstructed structures are physically meaningful. Code is available at https://github.com/hyamomar/Sentinel-5P-Super-Resolution/tree/main/self_supervised

</details>


### [393] [Dual-stream Spatio-Temporal GCN-Transformer Network for 3D Human Pose Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17688)
*Jiawen Duan,Jian Xiang,Zhiqiang Li,Linlin Xue,Wan Xiang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出MixTGFormer网络，通过双流时空GCN-Transformer架构，在2D到3D人体姿态估计任务中实现全局与局部特征的融合，在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Transformer方法主要关注全局时空关系建模，忽视了局部骨骼关系和不同通道间的信息交互，需要一种能同时建模全局和局部特征的方法。

Method: 提出双流时空GCN-Transformer网络(MixTGFormer)，通过并行通道同时建模时空关系。核心是堆叠的Mixformer模块，包含Mixformer Block和SE层。Mixformer Block将GCN集成到Transformer中，增强局部和全局信息利用，并实现时空形式提取时空关系。

Result: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上达到SOTA，P1误差分别为37.6mm和15.7mm，优于其他方法。

Conclusion: MixTGFormer通过融合GCN和Transformer，有效结合了全局和局部特征，在3D人体姿态估计任务中表现出色，为相关研究提供了新思路。

Abstract: 3D human pose estimation is a classic and important research direction in the field of computer vision. In recent years, Transformer-based methods have made significant progress in lifting 2D to 3D human pose estimation. However, these methods primarily focus on modeling global temporal and spatial relationships, neglecting local skeletal relationships and the information interaction between different channels. Therefore, we have proposed a novel method,the Dual-stream Spatio-temporal GCN-Transformer Network (MixTGFormer). This method models the spatial and temporal relationships of human skeletons simultaneously through two parallel channels, achieving effective fusion of global and local features. The core of MixTGFormer is composed of stacked Mixformers. Specifically, the Mixformer includes the Mixformer Block and the Squeeze-and-Excitation Layer ( SE Layer). It first extracts and fuses various information of human skeletons through two parallel Mixformer Blocks with different modes. Then, it further supplements the fused information through the SE Layer. The Mixformer Block integrates Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN) into the Transformer, enhancing both local and global information utilization. Additionally, we further implement its temporal and spatial forms to extract both spatial and temporal relationships. We extensively evaluated our model on two benchmark datasets (Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP). The experimental results showed that, compared to other methods, our MixTGFormer achieved state-of-the-art results, with P1 errors of 37.6mm and 15.7mm on these datasets, respectively.

</details>


### [394] [Dynamic Visual-semantic Alignment for Zero-shot Learning with Ambiguous Labels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17710)
*Jiangnan Li,Linqing Huang,Xiaowen Yan,Min Gan,Wenpeng Lu,Jinfu Fan*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出DVSA框架解决零样本学习中的标签噪声和模糊问题，通过双向视觉-语义对齐、互信息对比优化和动态标签消歧机制提升鲁棒性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本学习方法通常假设干净标签，忽略了现实世界中的标签噪声和模糊性，这会导致性能下降。需要开发能够处理模糊标签的鲁棒零样本学习框架。

Method: 1) 双向视觉-语义对齐模块：使用注意力机制相互校准视觉特征和属性原型；2) 基于互信息的对比优化：在属性层面增强判别性和语义一致性；3) 动态标签消歧机制：迭代修正噪声监督同时保持语义一致性

Result: 在标准基准测试上的广泛实验验证了DVSA在模糊监督下实现了更强的性能

Conclusion: DVSA框架有效解决了零样本学习中的标签噪声和模糊问题，通过视觉-语义对齐、互信息优化和动态标签消歧提高了模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力

Abstract: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to recognize unseen classes without visual instances. However, existing methods usually assume clean labels, overlooking real-world label noise and ambiguity, which degrades performance. To bridge this gap, we propose the Dynamic Visual-semantic Alignment (DVSA), a robust ZSL framework for learning from ambiguous labels. DVSA uses a bidirectional visual-semantic alignment module with attention to mutually calibrate visual features and attribute prototypes, and a contrastive optimization grounded in Mutual Information (MI) at the attribute level to strengthen discriminative, semantically consistent attributes. In addition, a dynamic label disambiguation mechanism iteratively corrects noisy supervision while preserving semantic consistency, narrowing the instance-label gap, and improving generalization. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks verify that DVSA achieves stronger performance under ambiguous supervision.

</details>


### [395] [Score-Based Matching with Target Guidance for Cryo-EM Denoising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17734)
*Xiaoqi Wu,Xueying Zhan,Wen Li,Junhao Wu,Xin Huang,Min Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出基于分数的冷冻电镜图像去噪框架，通过学习干净数据分数来恢复粒子信号并保持结构一致性，引入目标引导变体增强弱信号条件下的学习稳定性，改善下游粒子挑选和3D重建质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 冷冻电镜图像信噪比极低，现有去噪方法主要关注视觉质量提升，但未明确考虑下游分析所需的结构一致性需求。

Method: 提出基于分数的去噪框架，学习干净数据分数来恢复粒子信号；进一步引入目标引导变体，结合参考密度指导来稳定弱信号条件下的分数学习；重点抑制结构化低频背景而非简单放大粒子响应。

Result: 在多个冷冻电镜数据集上，该方法一致改善了下游粒子挑选性能，并产生了更结构一致的3D重建结果。

Conclusion: 基于分数的去噪框架能更好地保持结构信息，提高粒子-背景分离性，对冷冻电镜下游分析具有重要价值。

Abstract: Cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) enables single-particle analysis of biological macromolecules under strict low-dose imaging conditions, but the resulting micrographs often exhibit extremely low signal-to-noise ratios and weak particle visibility. Image denoising is therefore an important preprocessing step for downstream cryo-EM analysis, including particle picking, 2D classification, and 3D reconstruction. Existing cryo-EM denoising methods are commonly trained with pixel-wise or Noise2Noise-style objectives, which can improve visual quality but do not explicitly account for structural consistency required by downstream analysis. In this work, we propose a score-based denoising framework for cryo-EM that learns the clean-data score to recover particle signals while better preserving structural information. Building on this formulation, we further introduce a target-guided variant that incorporates reference-density guidance to stabilize score learning under weak and ambiguous signal conditions. Rather than simply amplifying particle-like responses, our framework better suppresses structured low-frequency background, which improves particle--background separability for downstream analysis. Experiments on multiple cryo-EM datasets show that our score-based methods consistently improve downstream particle picking and produce more structure-consistent 3D reconstructions. Experiments on multiple cryo-EM datasets show that our methods improve downstream particle picking and produce more structure-consistent reconstructions.

</details>


### [396] [Source-Free Domain Adaptation with Vision-Language Prior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17748)
*Song Tang,Yunxiang Bai,Wenxin Su,Mao Ye,Jianwei Zhang,Xiatian Zhu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: DIFO++提出了一种新的无源域自适应方法，利用视觉-语言多模态模型（如CLIP）的知识，通过交替进行提示学习和知识蒸馏来适应目标域，特别关注特征纠缠的"间隙区域"。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的无源域自适应方法依赖伪标签和辅助监督，容易产生错误。作者探索利用现成的视觉-语言多模态模型（如CLIP）的丰富知识，但这些模型对特定任务不够专门化，需要进一步定制。

Method: DIFO++采用交替优化策略：1) 通过提示学习最大化目标模型与ViL模型的互信息来定制ViL模型；2) 将定制后的ViL模型知识蒸馏到目标模型，重点关注"间隙区域"（特征纠缠、类别模糊的区域）。使用记忆机制融合目标模型和ViL模型的预测生成可靠伪标签，通过类别注意力和预测一致性进行语义对齐，并采用参考熵最小化抑制不确定性。

Result: 大量实验表明，DIFO++在无源域自适应任务上显著优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: DIFO++成功利用视觉-语言多模态模型的异构知识，通过交替的提示学习和知识蒸馏策略，实现了更有效的无源域自适应，特别在处理特征纠缠的"间隙区域"方面表现出色。

Abstract: Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA) seeks to adapt a source model, which is pre-trained on a supervised source domain, for a target domain, with only access to unlabeled target training data. Relying on pseudo labeling and/or auxiliary supervision, conventional methods are inevitably error-prone. To mitigate this limitation, in this work we for the first time explore the potentials of off-the-shelf vision-language (ViL) multimodal models (e.g., CLIP) with rich whilst heterogeneous knowledge. We find that directly applying the ViL model to the target domain in a zero-shot fashion is unsatisfactory, as it is not specialized for this particular task but largely generic. To make it task-specific, we propose a novel DIFO++ approach. Specifically, DIFO++ alternates between two steps during adaptation: (i) Customizing the ViL model by maximizing the mutual information with the target model in a prompt learning manner, (ii) Distilling the knowledge of this customized ViL model to the target model, centering on gap region reduction. During progressive knowledge adaptation, we first identify and focus on the gap region, where enclosed features are entangled and class-ambiguous, as it often captures richer task-specific semantics. Reliable pseudo-labels are then generated by fusing predictions from the target and ViL models, supported by a memory mechanism. Finally, gap region reduction is guided by category attention and predictive consistency for semantic alignment, complemented by referenced entropy minimization to suppress uncertainty. Extensive experiments show that DIFO++ significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art alternatives. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/tntek/DIFO-Plus.

</details>


### [397] [Weakly-Supervised Referring Video Object Segmentation through Text Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17797)
*Miaojing Shi,Jun Huang,Zijie Yue,Hanli Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出WSRVOS方法，仅使用文本表达进行弱监督视频目标分割训练，无需像素级标注或边界框标注


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统视频目标分割需要昂贵的像素级标注，现有弱监督方法仍需边界框或点标注，成本仍然较高。本文旨在仅使用文本表达进行训练，降低标注成本

Method: 1) 对比性文本表达增强：利用多模态大语言模型生成正负文本表达；2) 双向视觉-语言特征选择与交互；3) 实例感知表达分类；4) 正预测融合生成伪掩码；5) 时序片段排序约束

Result: 在A2D Sentences、J-HMDB Sentences、Ref-YouTube-VOS、Ref-DAVIS17四个数据集上表现出优越性能

Conclusion: WSRVOS方法仅需文本表达即可有效训练视频目标分割模型，显著降低标注成本，在多个数据集上验证了有效性

Abstract: Referring video object segmentation (RVOS) aims to segment the target instance in a video, referred by a text expression. Conventional approaches are mostly supervised learning, requiring expensive pixel-level mask annotations. To tackle it, weakly-supervised RVOS has recently been proposed to replace mask annotations with bounding boxes or points, which are however still costly and labor-intensive. In this paper, we design a novel weakly-supervised RVOS method, namely WSRVOS, to train the model with only text expressions. Given an input video and the referring expression, we first design a contrastive referring expression augmentation scheme that leverages the captioning capabilities of a multimodal large language model to generate both positive and negative expressions. We extract visual and linguistic features from the input video and generated expressions, then perform bi-directional vision-language feature selection and interaction to enable fine-grained multimodal alignment. Next, we propose an instance-aware expression classification scheme to optimize the model in distinguishing positive from negative expressions. Also, we introduce a positive-prediction fusion strategy to generate high-quality pseudo-masks, which serve as additional supervision to the model. Last, we design a temporal segment ranking constraint such that the overlaps between mask predictions of temporally neighboring frames are required to conform to specific orders. Extensive experiments on four publicly available RVOS datasets, including A2D Sentences, J-HMDB Sentences, Ref-YouTube-VOS, and Ref-DAVIS17, demonstrate the superiority of our method. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/viscom-tongji/WSRVOS}{https://github.com/viscom-tongji/WSRVOS}.

</details>


### [398] [GR4CIL: Gap-compensated Routing for CLIP-based Class Incremental Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17822)
*Tianqi Wang,Jingcai Guo*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: GR4CIL是一个用于CLIP基础类增量学习的框架，通过任务区分和知识路由解决旧知识漂移和跨任务响应校准问题，在多个基准测试中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CLIP基础类增量学习方法面临两个关键挑战：共享参数适应导致旧知识漂移，任务特定知识组织导致跨任务响应校准不佳，使得可靠路由困难。

Method: 提出GR4CIL框架，结合任务区分和知识路由，保持任务特定视觉知识的同时维持增量稳定的共享文本语义空间，减少任务间干扰。引入正交补偿机制缓解模态间隙引起的偏差，增强任务内区分度，扩大真实任务与竞争任务间的分数差距。

Result: 在多个基准测试中，GR4CIL始终优于强基线方法，实现了更可靠的任务感知知识路由，同时保持了零样本泛化能力。

Conclusion: GR4CIL通过任务区分和知识路由有效解决了CLIP基础类增量学习中的知识漂移和跨任务响应校准问题，为持续学习提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Class-Incremental Learning (CIL) aims to continuously acquire new categories while preserving previously learned knowledge. Recently, Contrastive Language-Image Pre-trained (CLIP) models have shown strong potential for CIL due to their powerful generalization ability. However, existing methods still face two key challenges: shared-parameter adaptation tends to cause old-knowledge drift, and task-specific knowledge organization often leads to poorly calibrated cross-task responses, making reliable routing difficult. To address these issues, we propose GR4CIL, a framework combining task discrimination and knowledge routing for CLIP-based CIL. GR4CIL preserves task-specific visual knowledge while maintaining an incrementally stable shared textual semantic space, thereby reducing interference across tasks. Moreover, we introduce an orthogonal compensation mechanism to mitigate modality-gap-induced bias, enhance within-task discrimination, and enlarge the score margin between the ground-truth task and competing tasks. As a result, GR4CIL enables more reliable task-aware routing over learned knowledge while retaining the zero-shot generalization capability. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that GR4CIL consistently outperforms strong baselines.

</details>


### [399] [PlankFormer: Robust Plankton Instance Segmentation via MAE-Pretrained Vision Transformers and Pseudo Community Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17856)
*Masaharu Miyazaki,Yurie Otake,Koichi Ito,Wataru Makino,Jotaro Urabe,Takafumi Aoki*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: PlankFormer：基于Vision Transformer和自监督学习的浮游生物实例分割框架，通过合成伪社区图像解决标注数据稀缺问题，在含高密度碎屑的真实场景中优于传统方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 浮游生物监测对评估水生生态系统至关重要，但传统手动显微镜分析劳动密集。自动化分割面临两大挑战：1) 像素级标注数据集稀缺；2) 传统CNN方法难以区分浮游生物与碎屑及重叠个体

Method: 提出PlankFormer框架：1) 通过合成单个浮游生物图像到多样化背景（包括生成模型创建）生成标注的伪社区图像(PCI)解决数据稀缺；2) 使用Vision Transformer骨干网络和Mask2Former解码器；3) 采用Masked Autoencoder在未标注个体图像上进行自监督预训练，以鲁棒捕捉浮游生物的全局结构特征

Result: 在真实数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法显著优于传统方法如Mask R-CNN，特别是在高碎屑密度的挑战性环境中。合成训练策略和MAE架构能够在需要较少手动标注的情况下实现高精度分割

Conclusion: PlankFormer通过合成数据生成和自监督预训练的ViT架构，有效解决了浮游生物分割中的数据稀缺和复杂环境挑战，为自动化浮游生物监测提供了实用解决方案

Abstract: Plankton monitoring is essential for assessing aquatic ecosystems but is limited by the labor-intensive nature of manual microscopic analysis. Automating the segmentation of plankton from crowded images is crucial, however, it faces two major challenges: (i) the scarcity of pixel-level annotated datasets and (ii) the difficulty of distinguishing plankton from debris and overlapping individuals using conventional CNN-based methods. To address these issues, we propose PlankFormer, a novel framework for plankton instance segmentation. First, to overcome the data shortage, we introduce a method to generate labeled Pseudo Community Images (PCI) by synthesizing individual plankton images onto diverse backgrounds, including those created by generative models. Second, we propose a segmentation model utilizing a Vision Transformer (ViT) backbone with a Mask2Former decoder. To robustly capture the global structural features of plankton against occlusion and debris, we employ a Masked Autoencoder (MAE) for self-supervised pre-training on unlabeled individual images. Experimental results on real-world datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms conventional methods, such as Mask R-CNN, particularly in challenging environments with high debris density. We demonstrate that our synthetic training strategy and MAE-based architecture enable high-precision segmentation with requiring less manual annotations for individual plankton images.

</details>


### [400] [Sharpening Lightweight Models for Generalized Polyp Segmentation: A Boundary Guided Distillation from Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17865)
*Shivanshu Agnihotri,Snehashis Majhi,Deepak Ranjan Nayak*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: LiteBounD是一个轻量级边界引导蒸馏框架，将多个视觉基础模型的语义和结构先验转移到紧凑分割骨干网络中，用于息肉分割任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轻量分割模型（如U-Net、U-Net++、PraNet）在临床部署中效率高，但难以捕捉复杂息肉区域所需的丰富语义和结构线索；而大型视觉基础模型（如SAM、OneFormer、Mask2Former、DINOv2）泛化能力强，但由于领域不匹配、边界敏感性不足和高计算成本，在息肉分割上表现不佳。

Method: 提出LiteBounD框架：1）双路径蒸馏机制，解耦语义和边界感知表示；2）频率感知对齐策略，分别监督低频全局语义和高频边界细节；3）边界感知解码器，融合多尺度编码器特征与蒸馏的语义丰富边界信息。

Result: 在已见（Kvasir-SEG、CVC-ClinicDB）和未见（ColonDB、CVC-300、ETIS）数据集上的实验表明，LiteBounD显著优于轻量基线，性能与最先进方法相当，同时保持实时临床使用所需的效率。

Conclusion: LiteBounD成功地将视觉基础模型的互补语义和结构先验转移到轻量分割模型中，在保持效率的同时实现了准确的息肉分割，为临床实时应用提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Automated polyp segmentation is critical for early colorectal cancer detection and its prevention, yet remains challenging due to weak boundaries, large appearance variations, and limited annotated data. Lightweight segmentation models such as U-Net, U-Net++, and PraNet offer practical efficiency for clinical deployment but struggle to capture the rich semantic and structural cues required for accurate delineation of complex polyp regions. In contrast, large Vision Foundation Models (VFMs), including SAM, OneFormer, Mask2Former, and DINOv2, exhibit strong generalization but transfer poorly to polyp segmentation due to domain mismatch, insufficient boundary sensitivity, and high computational cost. To bridge this gap, we propose \textit{\textbf{LiteBounD}, a \underline{Li}gh\underline{t}w\underline{e}ight \underline{Boun}dary-guided \underline{D}istillation} framework that transfers complementary semantic and structural priors from multiple VFMs into compact segmentation backbones. LiteBounD introduces (i) a dual-path distillation mechanism that disentangles semantic and boundary-aware representations, (ii) a frequency-aware alignment strategy that supervises low-frequency global semantics and high-frequency boundary details separately, and (iii) a boundary-aware decoder that fuses multi-scale encoder features with distilled semantically rich boundary information for precise segmentation. Extensive experiments on both seen (Kvasir-SEG, CVC-ClinicDB) and unseen (ColonDB, CVC-300, ETIS) datasets demonstrate that LiteBounD consistently outperforms its lightweight baselines by a significant margin and achieves performance competitive with state-of-the-art methods, while maintaining the efficiency required for real-time clinical use. Our code is available at https://github.com/lostinrepo/LiteBounD.

</details>


### [401] [ReTrack: Evidence-Driven Dual-Stream Directional Anchor Calibration Network for Composed Video Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17898)
*Zixu Li,Yupeng Hu,Zhiwei Chen,Qinlei Huang,Guozhi Qiu,Zhiheng Fu,Meng Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: ReTrack是一个用于组合视频检索（CVR）的新框架，通过校准组合特征中的方向性偏差来改进多模态查询理解，在CVR和CIR任务中都实现了SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 组合视频检索（CVR）中视频和文本模态之间存在信息密度差异，传统组合方法倾向于偏向参考视频，导致检索性能不佳。存在三个核心挑战：模态贡献纠缠、组合特征的显式优化和检索不确定性。

Method: 提出ReTrack框架，包含三个关键模块：语义贡献解缠、组合几何校准和可靠证据驱动对齐。通过估计每个模态的语义贡献来校准组合特征的方向性偏差，使用校准的方向锚点计算双向证据来驱动可靠的组合-目标相似度估计。

Result: 在三个基准数据集上，ReTrack在CVR和CIR场景中都实现了SOTA性能，并展现出对CIR任务的强泛化能力。

Conclusion: ReTrack是第一个通过校准组合特征中的方向性偏差来改进多模态查询理解的CVR框架，有效解决了模态贡献纠缠等问题，在组合检索任务中表现出色。

Abstract: With the rapid growth of video data, Composed Video Retrieval (CVR) has emerged as a novel paradigm in video retrieval and is receiving increasing attention from researchers. Unlike unimodal video retrieval methods, the CVR task takes a multi-modal query consisting of a reference video and a piece of modification text as input. The modification text conveys the user's intended alterations to the reference video. Based on this input, the model aims to retrieve the most relevant target video. In the CVR task, there exists a substantial discrepancy in information density between video and text modalities. Traditional composition methods tend to bias the composed feature toward the reference video, which leads to suboptimal retrieval performance. This limitation is significant due to the presence of three core challenges: (1) modal contribution entanglement, (2) explicit optimization of composed features, and (3) retrieval uncertainty. To address these challenges, we propose the evidence-dRivRn dual-sTream diRectionAl anChor calibration networK (ReTrack). ReTrack is the first CVR framework that improves multi-modal query understanding by calibrating directional bias in composed features. It consists of three key modules: Semantic Contribution Disentanglement, Composition Geometry Calibration, and Reliable Evidence-driven Alignment. Specifically, ReTrack estimates the semantic contribution of each modality to calibrate the directional bias of the composed feature. It then uses the calibrated directional anchors to compute bidirectional evidence that drives reliable composed-to-target similarity estimation. Moreover, ReTrack exhibits strong generalization to the Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) task, achieving SOTA performance across three benchmark datasets in both CVR and CIR scenarios. Codes are available at https://github.com/Lee-zixu/ReTrack

</details>


### [402] [Beyond Binary Contrast: Modeling Continuous Skeleton Action Spaces with Transitional Anchors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17914)
*Yingjie Feng,Yi Wang,Jiaze Wang,Anfeng Liu,Zhuotao Tian*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: TranCLR提出了一种基于过渡锚点的对比学习框架，用于骨架动作识别，通过建模动作空间的连续几何结构来改善特征表示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于对比学习的骨架动作识别方法使用二元对比目标，忽略了人体运动的连续性，导致特征簇碎片化和类别边界僵化。需要一种能捕捉动作空间连续几何结构的方法。

Method: 提出TranCLR框架：1) Action Transitional Anchor Construction (ATAC) 显式建模过渡状态的几何结构；2) Multi-Level Geometric Manifold Calibration (MGMC) 在多层次连续性上自适应校准动作流形。

Result: 在NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120和PKU-MMD数据集上的实验表明，TranCLR在准确性和校准性能上表现优异，能有效学习连续且具有不确定性感知的骨架表示。

Conclusion: TranCLR通过建模动作空间的连续几何结构，解决了现有对比学习方法在骨架动作识别中的局限性，实现了更平滑、更具判别性的表示空间。

Abstract: Self-supervised contrastive learning has emerged as a powerful paradigm for skeleton-based action recognition by enforcing consistency in the embedding space. However, existing methods rely on binary contrastive objectives that overlook the intrinsic continuity of human motion, resulting in fragmented feature clusters and rigid class boundaries. To address these limitations, we propose TranCLR, a Transitional anchor-based Contrastive Learning framework that captures the continuous geometry of the action space. Specifically, the proposed Action Transitional Anchor Construction (ATAC) explicitly models the geometric structure of transitional states to enhance the model's perception of motion continuity. Building upon these anchors, a Multi-Level Geometric Manifold Calibration (MGMC) mechanism is introduced to adaptively calibrate the action manifold across multiple levels of continuity, yielding a smoother and more discriminative representation space. Extensive experiments on the NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120 and PKU-MMD datasets demonstrate that TranCLR achieves superior accuracy and calibration performance, effectively learning continuous and uncertainty-aware skeleton representations. The code is available at https://github.com/Philchieh/TranCLR.

</details>


### [403] [DifFoundMAD: Foundation Models meet Differential Morphing Attack Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17961)
*Lazaro J. Gonzalez-Soler,André Dörsch,Christian Rathgeb,Christoph Busch*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: DifFoundMAD：一种参数高效的差分形态攻击检测框架，利用视觉基础模型的泛化能力来检测活体图像与可疑变形图像之间的差异，显著降低高安全级别下的错误率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统D-MAD系统依赖人脸识别嵌入或手工特征差异，缺乏泛化能力。需要利用视觉基础模型的强大表示能力来改进差分形态攻击检测，特别是在边境控制等高安全级别应用场景中。

Method: 采用标准差分范式，但将底层表示空间替换为基础模型提取的嵌入。结合轻量级微调和类别平衡优化，仅更新少量参数，同时保留基础模型的丰富表示先验。

Result: 在标准D-MAD基准测试的跨数据库评估中，DifFoundMAD相比现有最优系统取得一致改进。在高安全级别下，错误率从6.16%降至2.17%，性能显著提升。

Conclusion: DifFoundMAD通过利用视觉基础模型的泛化能力，在保持参数效率的同时显著提升了差分形态攻击检测性能，特别适用于边境控制等需要高安全级别的实际部署场景。

Abstract: In this work, we introduce DifFoundMAD, a parameter-efficient D-MAD framework that exploits the generalisation capabilities of vision foundation models (FM) to capture discrepancies between suspected morphs and live capture images. In contrast to conventional D-MAD systems that rely on face recognition embeddings or handcrafted feature differences, DifFoundMAD follows the standard differential paradigm while replacing the underlying representation space with embeddings extracted from FMs. By combining lightweight finetuning with class-balanced optimisation, the proposed method updates only a small subset of parameters while preserving the rich representational priors of the underlying FMs. Extensive cross-database evaluations on standard D-MAD benchmarks demonstrate that DifFoundMAD achieves consistent improvements over state-of-the-art systems, particularly at the strict security levels required in operational deployments such as border control: The error rates reported in the current state-of-the-art were reduced from 6.16% to 2.17% for high-security levels using DifFoundMAD.

</details>


### [404] [Identifying Ethical Biases in Action Recognition Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17971)
*Ana Baltaretu,Pascal Benschop,Jan van Gemert*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个使用合成视频数据审计人类动作识别模型偏见的框架，通过控制肤色等视觉身份属性来检测模型是否对特定外观特征存在偏见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类动作识别模型越来越多地部署在高风险环境中，但目前缺乏对其在不同人类外观特征（如肤色）上公平性的分析。现有研究主要关注静态图像或姿态估计，缺乏对时间一致性的考虑。

Method: 使用BEDLAM仿真平台生成合成视频数据，完全控制视觉身份属性（如肤色），保持时间一致性。通过控制变量干预，测试单个属性变化对模型预测的影响，从而隔离和检测偏见。

Result: 研究发现一些流行的人类动作识别模型即使在动作完全相同的情况下，对肤色也存在统计显著的偏见。模型可能编码了不需要的视觉关联，在不同群体间存在系统性错误。

Conclusion: 该研究为审计人类动作识别模型偏见提供了一个框架，支持开发更透明、可问责的系统，以应对即将到来的监管标准要求。

Abstract: Human Action Recognition (HAR) models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes environments, yet their fairness across different human appearances has not been analyzed. We introduce a framework for auditing bias in HAR models using synthetic video data, generated with full control over visual identity attributes such as skin color. Unlike prior work that focuses on static images or pose estimation, our approach preserves temporal consistency, allowing us to isolate and test how changes to a single attribute affect model predictions. Through controlled interventions using the BEDLAM simulation platform, we show whether some popular HAR models exhibit statistically significant biases on the skin color even when the motion remains identical. Our results highlight how models may encode unwanted visual associations, and we provide evidence of systematic errors across groups. This work contributes a framework for auditing HAR models and supports the development of more transparent, accountable systems in light of upcoming regulatory standards.

</details>


### [405] [Trustworthy Endoscopic Super-Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18001)
*Julio Silva-Rodríguez,Ender Konukoglu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种轻量级误差预测网络，结合保形风险控制理论，为超分辨率系统提供像素级重建误差估计和不可信区域定位，提高医疗影像SR的可信度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超分辨率模型在医疗影像增强中面临幻觉结构和噪声放大的问题，限制了其在安全关键场景中的可靠性。需要一种方法来识别重建可能失败的区域，提高SR系统的可信度。

Method: 1) 集成轻量级误差预测网络，在中间表示上估计像素级重建误差；2) 构建保形失败掩码(CFM)，基于保形风险控制原理定位不可信区域；3) 提供理论保证控制误差容忍限和检测失败率。

Result: 在图像和视频超分辨率任务中验证了方法的有效性，特别是在内窥镜和机器人手术场景中能有效检测不可靠重建。这是首个提供模型无关、理论基础的实时内窥镜图像SR安全改进方法。

Conclusion: 提出的框架通过误差预测和保形失败检测，为医疗影像超分辨率系统提供了可信度保障，适合实时部署，有助于提高安全关键应用中的可靠性。

Abstract: Super-resolution (SR) models are attracting growing interest for enhancing minimally invasive surgery and diagnostic videos under hardware constraints. However, valid concerns remain regarding the introduction of hallucinated structures and amplified noise, limiting their reliability in safety-critical settings. We propose a direct and practical framework to make SR systems more trustworthy by identifying where reconstructions are likely to fail. Our approach integrates a lightweight error-prediction network that operates on intermediate representations to estimate pixel-wise reconstruction error. The module is computationally efficient and low-latency, making it suitable for real-time deployment. We convert these predictions into operational failure decisions by constructing Conformal Failure Masks (CFM), which localize regions where the SR output should not be trusted. Built on conformal risk control principles, our method provides theoretical guarantees for controlling both the tolerated error limit and the miscoverage in detected failures. We evaluate our approach on image and video SR, demonstrating its effectiveness in detecting unreliable reconstructions in endoscopic and robotic surgery settings. To our knowledge, this is the first study to provide a model-agnostic, theoretically grounded approach to improving the safety of real-time endoscopic image SR.

</details>


### [406] [Multi-View Hierarchical Graph Neural Network for Sketch-Based 3D Shape Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18019)
*Hang Cheng,Muyan He,Mingyu Fan,Chengfeng Xie,Xi Cheng,Long Zeng*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: MV-HGNN：基于多视图层次图神经网络的草图3D形状检索框架，通过视图级图建模几何关系，引入视图选择器进行层次图粗化，并利用CLIP文本嵌入实现跨模态语义对齐，在类别级和零样本检索中均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有草图3D形状检索方法存在两个核心问题：1）对3D多视图特征采用简化的聚合策略，忽略了视图间的几何关系和多层次细节，导致3D表示能力弱；2）受限于可见类别，在零样本场景下性能较差。

Method: 提出多视图层次图神经网络（MV-HGNN）：1）构建视图级图，通过局部图卷积和全局注意力捕获相邻几何依赖和跨视图信息传递；2）引入视图选择器进行层次图粗化，扩大感受野并减少冗余视图干扰；3）利用CLIP文本嵌入作为语义原型，将草图和3D特征投影到共享语义空间；4）采用两阶段训练策略（类别级检索）和一阶段策略（零样本检索）。

Result: 在两个公开基准测试中，MV-HGNN在类别级和零样本设置下均优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: MV-HGNN通过层次图建模和多视图几何关系学习，结合CLIP的跨模态语义对齐，有效提升了草图3D形状检索的性能，特别是在零样本场景下表现出色。

Abstract: Sketch-based 3D shape retrieval (SBSR) aims to retrieve 3D shapes that are consistent with the category of the input hand-drawn sketch. The core challenge of this task lies in two aspects: existing methods typically employ simplified aggregation strategies for independently encoded 3D multi-view features, which ignore the geometric relationships between views and multi-level details, resulting in weak 3D representation. Simultaneously, traditional SBSR methods are constrained by visible category limitations, leading to poor performance in zero-shot scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose Multi-View Hierarchical Graph Neural Network (MV-HGNN), a novel framework for SBSR. Specifically, we construct a view-level graph and capture adjacent geometric dependencies and cross-view message passing via local graph convolution and global attention. A view selector is further introduced to perform hierarchical graph coarsening, enabling a progressively larger receptive field for graph convolution and mitigating the interference of redundant views, which leads to more discriminate discriminative hierarchical 3D representation. To enable category agnostic alignment and mitigate overfitting to seen classes, we leverage CLIP text embeddings as semantic prototypes and project both sketch and 3D features into a shared semantic space. We use a two-stage training strategy for category-level retrieval and a one-stage strategy for zero-shot retrieval under the same model architecture. Under both category-level and zero-shot settings, extensive experiments on two public benchmarks demonstrate that MV-HGNN outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [407] [CFSR: Geometry-Conditioned Shadow Removal via Physical Disentanglement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18032)
*Pan Wang,Yihao Hu,Xiujin Liu,Hang Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: CFSR是一个多模态先验驱动的阴影去除框架，通过整合3D几何线索和大规模基础模型语义，将阴影去除重构为物理约束的恢复过程，在多个基准测试中达到最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统阴影去除网络将图像恢复视为无约束映射，缺乏物理可解释性，难以平衡局部纹理恢复与全局光照一致性。需要一种能够桥接2D-3D领域差距的物理约束方法。

Method: 1) 将观测映射到自定义HVI颜色空间抑制阴影噪声；2) 几何与语义双显式引导注意力机制，利用DINO特征和3D表面法线调制注意力亲和矩阵；3) 通过冻结CLIP编码器注入整体先验；4) 频率协作重建模块(FCRM)解耦解码过程，协调高频遮挡边界和低频全局光照恢复。

Result: 在多个具有挑战性的基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，有效平衡了局部纹理恢复和全局光照一致性。

Conclusion: CFSR通过整合3D几何线索和基础模型语义，成功将阴影去除重构为物理约束的恢复过程，为图像恢复任务提供了新的多模态先验驱动框架。

Abstract: Traditional shadow removal networks often treat image restoration as an unconstrained mapping, lacking the physical interpretability required to balance localized texture recovery with global illumination consistency. To address this, we propose CFSR, a multi-modal prior-driven framework that reframes shadow removal as a physics-constrained restoration process. By seamlessly integrating 3D geometric cues with large-scale foundation model semantics, CFSR effectively bridges the 2D-3D domain gap. Specifically, we first map observations into a custom HVI color space to suppress shadow-induced noise and robustly fuse RGB data with estimated depth priors. At its core, our Geometric & Semantic Dual Explicit Guided Attention mechanism utilizes DINO features and 3D surface normals to directly modulate the attention affinity matrix, structurally enforcing physical lighting constraints. To recover severely degraded regions, we inject holistic priors via a frozen CLIP encoder. Finally, our Frequency Collaborative Reconstruction Module (FCRM) achieves an optimal synthesis by decoupling the decoding process. Conditioned on geometric priors, FCRM seamlessly harmonizes the reconstruction of sharp high-frequency occlusion boundaries with the restoration of low-frequency global illumination. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CFSR achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple challenging benchmarks.

</details>


### [408] [GS-STVSR: Ultra-Efficient Continuous Spatio-Temporal Video Super-Resolution via 2D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18047)
*Mingyu Shi,Xin Di,Long Peng,Boxiang Cao,Anran Wu,Zhanfeng Feng,Jiaming Guo,Renjing Pei,Xueyang Fu,Yang Cao,Zhengjun Zha*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: GS-STVSR：基于2D高斯泼溅的超高效连续时空视频超分辨率框架，通过高斯核的时空演化绕过密集网格查询，实现恒定推理时间和3倍以上加速


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于隐式神经表示的连续时空视频超分辨率方法依赖密集像素级网格查询，计算成本随插值帧数线性增长，严重限制了推理效率。需要一种更高效的框架来解决这一问题。

Method: 提出基于2D高斯泼溅的GS-STVSR框架：1) 利用协方差参数的时间稳定性进行轻量级中间拟合；2) 设计光流引导的运动模块推导任意时间步的高斯位置和颜色；3) 引入协方差重采样对齐模块防止协方差漂移；4) 提出自适应偏移窗口处理大尺度运动。

Result: 在Vid4、GoPro和Adobe240基准测试中达到最先进的性能。推理时间在常规时间尺度(X2-X8)下保持近乎恒定，在极端尺度X32下实现3倍以上加速。

Conclusion: GS-STVSR通过2D高斯泼溅框架有效解决了连续时空视频超分辨率的效率瓶颈，在保持高质量的同时显著提升推理速度，具有强实用价值。

Abstract: Continuous Spatio-Temporal Video Super-Resolution (C-STVSR) aims to simultaneously enhance the spatial resolution and frame rate of videos by arbitrary scale factors, offering greater flexibility than fixed-scale methods that are constrained by predefined upsampling ratios. In recent years, methods based on Implicit Neural Representations (INR) have made significant progress in C-STVSR by learning continuous mappings from spatio-temporal coordinates to pixel values. However, these methods fundamentally rely on dense pixel-wise grid queries, causing computational cost to scale linearly with the number of interpolated frames and severely limiting inference efficiency. We propose GS-STVSR, an ultra-efficient C-STVSR framework based on 2D Gaussian Splatting (2D-GS) that drives the spatiotemporal evolution of Gaussian kernels through continuous motion modeling, bypassing dense grid queries entirely. We exploit the strong temporal stability of covariance parameters for lightweight intermediate fitting, design an optical flow-guided motion module to derive Gaussian position and color at arbitrary time steps, introduce a Covariance resampling alignment module to prevent covariance drift, and propose an adaptive offset window for large-scale motion. Extensive experiments on Vid4, GoPro, and Adobe240 show that GS-STVSR achieves state-of-the-art quality across all benchmarks. Moreover, its inference time remains nearly constant at conventional temporal scales (X2--X8) and delivers over X3 speedup at extreme scales X32, demonstrating strong practical applicability.

</details>
