### [409] [INTENT: Invariance and Discrimination-aware Noise Mitigation for Robust Composed Image Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18051)
*Zhiwei Chen,Yupeng Hu,Zhiheng Fu,Zixu Li,Jiale Huang,Qinlei Huang,Yinwei Wei*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: INTENT模型解决组合图像检索中的噪声三元组对应问题，通过视觉不变性组合和双目标判别学习处理跨模态对应噪声和模态固有噪声


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界CIR数据集由于标注成本高，不可避免地包含标注错误，导致错误匹配的三元组。现有方法假设所有样本都正确匹配，忽略了噪声问题。噪声可分为跨模态对应噪声和模态固有噪声，后者常被忽视。

Method: 提出INTENT模型：1) 视觉不变性组合：通过快速傅里叶变换对视觉侧进行因果干预，生成干预后的组合特征，强制视觉不变性，使模型在组合时忽略模态固有噪声；2) 双目标判别学习：采用正负样本协同优化，构建可扩展决策边界，根据忠诚度动态调整决策，实现鲁棒的对应判别。

Result: 在两个广泛使用的基准数据集上进行大量实验，证明了INTENT的优越性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: INTENT有效解决了CIR中的噪声三元组对应问题，通过处理两种噪声类型提升了模型的鲁棒性和性能。

Abstract: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) is a challenging image retrieval paradigm that enables to retrieve target images based on multimodal queries consisting of reference images and modification texts. Although substantial progress has been made in recent years, existing methods assume that all samples are correctly matched. However, in real-world scenarios, due to high triplet annotation costs, CIR datasets inevitably contain annotation errors, resulting in incorrectly matched triplets. To address this issue, the problem of Noisy Triplet Correspondence (NTC) has attracted growing attention. We argue that noise in CIR can be categorized into two types: cross-modal correspondence noise and modality-inherent noise. The former arises from mismatches across modalities, whereas the latter originates from intra-modal background interference or visual factors irrelevant to the coarse-grained modification annotations. However, modality-inherent noise is often overlooked, and research on cross-modal correspondence noise remains nascent. To tackle above issues, we propose the Invariance and discrimiNaTion-awarE Noise neTwork (INTENT), comprising two components: Visual Invariant Composition and Bi-Objective Discriminative Learning, specifically designed to handle the two-aspect noise. The former applies causal intervention on the visual side via Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) to generate intervened composed features, enforcing visual invariance and enabling the model to ignore modality-inherent noise during composition. The latter adopts collaborative optimization with both positive and negative samples, and constructs a scalable decision boundary that dynamically adjusts decisions based on the loyalty degree, enabling robust correspondence discrimination. Extensive experiments on two widely used benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority and robustness of INTENT.

</details>


### [410] [Enhancing Continual Learning of Vision-Language Models via Dynamic Prefix Weighting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18075)
*Hyeonseo Jang,Hyuk Kwon,Kibok Lee*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了动态前缀加权（DPW）框架，用于解决视觉语言模型在领域-类别增量学习中的挑战，通过动态调整前缀权重和适配器权重来提升模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有参数高效方法（如前缀调优或适配器）在视觉语言模型的领域-类别增量学习中，通常对前缀向量进行归一化处理，忽视了不同输入token需要不同程度的调整。这限制了模型适应下游任务的能力。

Method: 提出DPW框架：1）门控模块根据输入token的重要性动态调整每个前缀的权重；2）加权机制将适配器输出权重作为前缀调优权重的残差，确保仅在必要时使用适配器。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法在视觉语言模型的领域-类别增量学习场景中达到了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: DPW通过动态权重分配机制有效解决了传统参数高效方法在增量学习中的局限性，为视觉语言模型的持续学习提供了更灵活的解决方案。

Abstract: We investigate recently introduced domain-class incremental learning scenarios for vision-language models (VLMs). Recent works address this challenge using parameter-efficient methods, such as prefix-tuning or adapters, which facilitate model adaptation to downstream tasks by incorporating task-specific information into input tokens through additive vectors. However, previous approaches often normalize the weights of these vectors, disregarding the fact that different input tokens require different degrees of adjustment. To overcome this issue, we propose Dynamic Prefix Weighting (DPW), a framework that dynamically assigns weights to prefixes, complemented by adapters. DPW consists of 1) a gating module that adjusts the weights of each prefix based on the importance of the corresponding input token, and 2) a weighting mechanism that derives adapter output weights as a residual of prefix-tuning weights, ensuring that adapters are utilized only when necessary. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in domain-class incremental learning scenarios for VLMs. The code is available at: https://github.com/YonseiML/dpw.

</details>


### [411] [Class-specific diffusion models improve military object detection in a low-data domain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18076)
*Ella P. Fokkinga,Jan Erik van Woerden,Thijs A. Eker,Sebastiaan P. Snel,Elfi I. S. Hofmeijer,Klamer Schutte,Friso G. Heslinga*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 使用扩散模型生成合成图像来提升军事车辆检测性能，特别是在低数据条件下，结合ControlNet结构引导进一步提升效果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究扩散模型生成的合成图像能否在低数据条件下改善军事车辆检测性能，探索生成式数据作为传统仿真管道的替代方案

Method: 使用LoRA微调FLUX.1扩散模型，仅用每类8或24张真实图像生成15类车辆合成数据；训练RF-DETR检测器；引入ControlNet进行结构引导生成

Result: FLUX生成图像显著提升检测性能（8张真实样本时mAP50提升+8.0%）；结构引导在数据稀缺时进一步改善（+4.1%），但数据充足时无额外收益

Conclusion: 特定对象的扩散模型能有效提升低数据条件下的军事目标检测，结构引导在真实数据极度有限时最有益，生成式图像数据可作为军事AI系统的训练替代方案

Abstract: Diffusion-based image synthesis has emerged as a promising source of synthetic training data for AI-based object detection and classification. In this work, we investigate whether images generated with diffusion can improve military vehicle detection under low-data conditions. We fine-tuned the text-to-image diffusion model FLUX.1 [dev] using LoRA with only 8 or 24 real images per class across 15 vehicle categories, resulting in class-specific diffusion models, which were used to generate new samples from automatically generated text prompts. The same real images were used to fine-tune the RF-DETR detector for a 15-class object detection task. Synthetic datasets generated by the diffusion models were then used to further improve detector performance. Importantly, no additional real data was required, as the generative models leveraged the same limited training samples. FLUX-generated images improved detection performance, particularly in the low-data regime (up to +8.0% mAP$_{50}$ with 8 real samples). To address the limited geometric control of text prompt-based diffusion, we additionally generated structurally guided synthetic data using ControlNet with Canny edge-map conditioning, yielding a FLUX-ControlNet (FLUX-CN) dataset with explicit control over viewpoint and pose. Structural guidance further enhanced performance when data is scarce (+4.1% mAP$_{50}$ with 8 real samples), but no additional benefit was observed when more real data is available. This study demonstrates that object-specific diffusion models are effective for improving military object detection in a low-data domain, and that structural guidance is most beneficial when real data is highly limited. These results highlight generative image data as an alternative to traditional simulation pipelines for the training of military AI systems.

</details>


### [412] [Soft Label Pruning and Quantization for Large-Scale Dataset Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18135)
*Xiao Lingao,Yang He*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: LPQLD通过标签剪枝和量化技术，大幅减少大规模数据集蒸馏中的软标签存储开销（ImageNet-1K减少78倍，ImageNet-21K减少500倍），同时提升准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模数据集蒸馏需要存储大量软标签（比压缩图像大30-200倍），这违背了数据集压缩的初衷。主要问题包括：1）图像多样性不足，合成图像类内相似度高需要大量增强；2）监督多样性不足，训练中监督信号有限导致高压缩率下性能下降。

Method: 提出LPQLD方法：1）通过类分批和批归一化监督增强图像多样性；2）引入标签剪枝与动态知识重用提升标签-增强多样性；3）使用标签量化与校准师生对齐提升增强-图像多样性。

Result: 在ImageNet-1K上减少78倍软标签存储，准确率提升7.2%；在ImageNet-21K上减少500倍存储，准确率提升2.8%。在不同网络架构和数据集蒸馏方法上均表现优越。

Conclusion: LPQLD有效解决了大规模数据集蒸馏中的存储瓶颈问题，通过提升图像和监督多样性，在显著减少存储需求的同时提高了模型性能。

Abstract: Large-scale dataset distillation requires storing auxiliary soft labels that can be 30-40x larger on ImageNet-1K and 200x larger on ImageNet-21K than the condensed images, undermining the goal of dataset compression. We identify two fundamental issues necessitating such extensive labels: (1) insufficient image diversity, where high within-class similarity in synthetic images requires extensive augmentation, and (2) insufficient supervision diversity, where limited variety in supervisory signals during training leads to performance degradation at high compression rates. To address these challenges, we propose Label Pruning and Quantization for Large-scale Distillation (LPQLD). We enhance image diversity via class-wise batching and batch-normalization supervision during synthesis. For supervision diversity, we introduce Label Pruning with Dynamic Knowledge Reuse to improve label-per-augmentation diversity, and Label Quantization with Calibrated Student-Teacher Alignment to improve augmentation-per-image diversity. Our approach reduces soft label storage by 78x on ImageNet-1K and 500x on ImageNet-21K while improving accuracy by up to 7.2% and 2.8%, respectively. Extensive experiments validate the superiority of LPQLD across different network architectures and dataset distillation methods. Code is available at https://github.com/he-y/soft-label-pruning-quantization-for-dataset-distillation.

</details>


### [413] [CanonSLR: Canonical-View Guided Multi-View Continuous Sign Language Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18184)
*Xu Wang,Shengeng Tang,Wan Jiang,Yaxiong Wang,Lechao Cheng,Richang Hong*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: CanonSLR是一个用于多视角连续手语识别的规范视角引导框架，通过教师-学生学习和序列级软目标蒸馏来提升视角鲁棒性，并构建了新的多视角数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有连续手语识别方法主要在单视角设置下开发，对真实场景中的视角变化鲁棒性不足。多视角数据稀缺且现有方法难以处理视角变化带来的语义差异和遮挡问题。

Method: 1) 提出正面视角锚定的教师-学生学习策略，用正面视角训练的教师网络为多视角学生网络提供规范时序监督；2) 序列级软目标蒸馏，从正面视角向非正面样本传递结构化时序知识；3) 时序运动关系增强，显式建模高层视觉特征中的运动感知时序关系；4) 开发通用多视角手语数据构建流程，创建PT14-MV和CSL-MV两个七视角基准数据集。

Result: 在PT14-MV和CSL-MV数据集上的实验表明，CanonSLR在多视角设置下持续优于现有方法，尤其在具有挑战性的非正面视角上表现出更强的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: CanonSLR通过规范视角引导的框架有效解决了多视角连续手语识别中的视角变化问题，提出的方法和技术为多视角手语识别研究提供了新的基础和方向。

Abstract: Continuous Sign Language Recognition (CSLR) has achieved remarkable progress in recent years; however, most existing methods are developed under single-view settings and thus remain insufficiently robust to viewpoint variations in real-world scenarios. To address this limitation, we propose CanonSLR, a canonical-view guided framework for multi-view CSLR. Specifically, we introduce a frontal-view-anchored teacher-student learning strategy, in which a teacher network trained on frontal-view data provides canonical temporal supervision for a student network trained on all viewpoints. To further reduce cross-view semantic discrepancy, we propose Sequence-Level Soft-Target Distillation, which transfers structured temporal knowledge from the frontal view to non-frontal samples, thereby alleviating gloss boundary ambiguity and category confusion caused by occlusion and projection variation. In addition, we introduce Temporal Motion Relational Enhancement to explicitly model motion-aware temporal relations in high-level visual features, strengthening stable dynamic representations while suppressing viewpoint-sensitive appearance disturbances. To support multi-view CSLR research, we further develop a universal multi-view sign language data construction pipeline that transforms original single-view RGB videos into semantically consistent, temporally coherent, and viewpoint-controllable multi-view sign language videos. Based on this pipeline, we extend PHOENIX-2014T and CSL-Daily into two seven-view benchmarks, namely PT14-MV and CSL-MV, providing a new experimental foundation for multi-view CSLR. Extensive experiments on PT14-MV and CSL-MV demonstrate that CanonSLR consistently outperforms existing approaches under multi-view settings and exhibits stronger robustness, especially on challenging non-frontal views.

</details>


### [414] [Medical Image Understanding Improves Survival Prediction via Visual Instruction Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18250)
*Xixi Liu,Jorge Lazo,Andreas Hallqvist,Mikael Johansson,Åse Johnsson,Jonas S Andersson,Ella Äng Eklund,Patrik Sund,Nasser Hosseini,Jennifer Alvén,Ida Häggström*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出基于视觉-语言框架的3D CT图像理解方法，通过视觉指令调优学习临床意义的视觉-文本表示，并用于下游生存预测任务，在CT图像和临床数据上优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确的预后和风险估计对临床决策至关重要。虽然CT扫描的放射科医生评估特征提供了有价值的疾病严重程度指标，但解读这些图像需要专业知识，且将丰富的视觉信息转化为文本摘要会导致信息丢失。

Method: 提出视觉-语言框架，利用大规模开源CT图像与放射学报告配对进行视觉指令调优预训练，学习临床意义的视觉-文本表示，然后在预训练模型上加入生存预测头，适应下游生存预测任务。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法在生存预测方面优于基线方法，特别是在临床数据单独预测能力较弱的情况下表现更好，同时能生成对预定义问题的临床意义语言响应。

Conclusion: 通过视觉指令调优预训练的视觉-语言框架能够有效提升CT图像生存预测性能，特别是在临床数据信息有限时，同时保持生成临床相关语言响应的能力。

Abstract: Accurate prognostication and risk estimation are essential for guiding clinical decision-making and optimizing patient management. While radiologist-assessed features from CT scans provide valuable indicators of disease severity and outcomes, interpreting such images requires expert knowledge, and translating rich visual information into textual summaries inevitably leads to information loss. In this work, we propose a vision-language framework for 3D CT image understanding that leverages large-scale open-sourced CT images paired with radiology reports through visual instruction tuning. This pre-training enables the model to learn clinically meaningful visual-textual representations, which can then be adapted to downstream survival prediction tasks. By incorporating a survival prediction head on top of the pre-trained model, our approach improves survival prediction from CT images and clinical data while generating clinically meaningful language responses to predefined questions. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms baseline methods in survival prediction, particularly, when clinical data alone is less predictive. The code will be released upon acceptance.

</details>


### [415] [Long-Text-to-Image Generation via Compositional Prompt Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18258)
*Jen-Yuan Huang,Tong Lin,Yilun Du*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: PRISM提出一种组合式方法，使预训练文本到图像模型能够处理长序列输入，通过轻量级模块提取长提示的组成表示，使用基于能量的结合进行融合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代文本到图像模型在处理描述性段落时难以捕捉关键细节，因为训练数据主要基于简洁标题。现有方法要么微调模型但泛化能力差，要么将过长输入投影到正常提示空间但损失保真度。

Method: PRISM使用轻量级模块从长提示中提取组成表示，T2I模型为每个组件独立进行噪声预测，然后使用基于能量的结合将输出合并到单个去噪步骤中。

Result: PRISM在多种模型架构上表现优异，与在相同训练数据上微调的模型性能相当，在超过500个token的挑战性公共基准测试中，比基线模型高出7.4%。

Conclusion: PRISM为预训练T2I模型处理长序列输入提供了一种有效的组合式方法，具有良好的泛化能力和保真度。

Abstract: While modern text-to-image (T2I) models excel at generating images from intricate prompts, they struggle to capture the key details when the inputs are descriptive paragraphs. This limitation stems from the prevalence of concise captions that shape their training distributions. Existing methods attempt to bridge this gap by either fine-tuning T2I models on long prompts, which generalizes poorly to longer lengths; or by projecting the oversize inputs into normal-prompt space and compromising fidelity. We propose Prompt Refraction for Intricate Scene Modeling (PRISM), a compositional approach that enables pre-trained T2I models to process long sequence inputs. PRISM uses a lightweight module to extract constituent representations from the long prompts. The T2I model makes independent noise predictions for each component, and their outputs are merged into a single denoising step using energy-based conjunction. We evaluate PRISM across a wide range of model architectures, showing comparable performances to models fine-tuned on the same training data. Furthermore, PRISM demonstrates superior generalization, outperforming baseline models by 7.4% on prompts over 500 tokens in a challenging public benchmark.

</details>


### [416] [MARCO: Navigating the Unseen Space of Semantic Correspondence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18267)
*Claudia Cuttano,Gabriele Trivigno,Carlo Masone,Stefan Roth*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: MARCO是一个用于通用语义对应的统一模型，通过新颖的训练框架提升细粒度定位和语义泛化能力，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA，同时比基于扩散的方法更小更快。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于双编码器架构（DINOv2+扩散）的语义对应模型虽然准确，但参数庞大（数十亿），且泛化能力有限——训练时使用的关键点与真实场景中查询的点很少匹配，导致基准测试性能与实际可用性之间存在差距。

Method: 基于DINOv2构建MARCO统一模型，采用新颖训练框架：1）粗到细的目标函数，提升空间精度；2）自蒸馏框架，将稀疏标注扩展到未标注区域，将少量关键点转化为密集、语义一致的对应关系。

Result: 在SPair-71k、AP-10K和PF-PASCAL上达到新SOTA，细粒度定位阈值（PCK@0.01）提升+8.9，对未见关键点（SPair-U）泛化能力最强（+5.1），对未见类别（MP-100）泛化能力最强（+4.7），同时比基于扩散的方法小3倍、快10倍。

Conclusion: MARCO通过统一的训练框架有效解决了语义对应中细粒度定位和泛化能力的挑战，在保持高性能的同时显著提升了效率和实用性。

Abstract: Recent advances in semantic correspondence rely on dual-encoder architectures, combining DINOv2 with diffusion backbones. While accurate, these billion-parameter models generalize poorly beyond training keypoints, revealing a gap between benchmark performance and real-world usability, where queried points rarely match those seen during training. Building upon DINOv2, we introduce MARCO, a unified model for generalizable correspondence driven by a novel training framework that enhances both fine-grained localization and semantic generalization. By coupling a coarse-to-fine objective that refines spatial precision with a self-distillation framework, which expands sparse supervision beyond annotated regions, our approach transforms a handful of keypoints into dense, semantically coherent correspondences. MARCO sets a new state of the art on SPair-71k, AP-10K, and PF-PASCAL, with gains that amplify at fine-grained localization thresholds (+8.9 PCK@0.01), strongest generalization to unseen keypoints (+5.1, SPair-U) and categories (+4.7, MP-100), while remaining 3x smaller and 10x faster than diffusion-based approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/visinf/MARCO .

</details>


### [417] [LiquidTAD: An Efficient Method for Temporal Action Detection via Liquid Neural Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18274)
*Zepeng Sun,Naichuan Zheng,Hailun Xia,Junjie Wu,Liwei Bao,Xiaotai Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: LiquidTAD：首个将并行化液态神经网络引入时序动作检测领域的高效框架，用并行化ActionLiquid块替代自注意力层，实现线性复杂度并大幅减少参数


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前时序动作检测主要依赖Transformer架构，但其二次计算复杂度和大量参数冗余限制了在资源受限环境中的部署。需要开发更高效的架构来替代自注意力机制。

Method: 提出LiquidTAD框架，用并行化ActionLiquid块替代自注意力层。采用闭式连续时间公式，将模型重构为可并行化算子，同时保持连续时间动态的物理先验。通过学习时间常数τ自适应调节时间敏感性，以线性复杂度捕捉复杂时序依赖。

Result: 在THUMOS-14数据集上达到69.46%的平均mAP，仅需10.82M参数（比ActionFormer基线减少63%）。在ActivityNet-1.3和Ego4D基准测试中表现出最优的精度-效率权衡，对时序采样变化具有更强鲁棒性。

Conclusion: LiquidTAD首次将并行化LNN架构引入TAD领域，显著提升了现代TAD框架的帕累托前沿，为资源受限环境提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: Temporal Action Detection (TAD) in untrimmed videos is currently dominated by Transformer-based architectures. While high-performing, their quadratic computational complexity and substantial parameter redundancy limit deployment in resource-constrained environments. In this paper, we propose LiquidTAD, a novel parameter-efficient framework that replaces cumbersome self-attention layers with parallelized ActionLiquid blocks. Unlike traditional Liquid Neural Networks (LNNs) that suffer from sequential execution bottlenecks, LiquidTAD leverages a closed-form continuous-time (CfC) formulation, allowing the model to be reformulated as a parallelizable operator while preserving the intrinsic physical prior of continuous-time dynamics. This architecture captures complex temporal dependencies with $O(N)$ linear complexity and adaptively modulates temporal sensitivity through learned time-constants ($τ$), providing a robust mechanism for handling varying action durations. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to introduce a parallelized LNN-based architecture to the TAD domain. Experimental results on the THUMOS-14 dataset demonstrate that LiquidTAD achieves a highly competitive Average mAP of 69.46\% with only 10.82M parameters -- a 63\% reduction compared to the ActionFormer baseline. Further evaluations on ActivityNet-1.3 and Ego4D benchmarks confirm that LiquidTAD achieves an optimal accuracy-efficiency trade-off and exhibits superior robustness to temporal sampling variations, advancing the Pareto frontier of modern TAD frameworks.

</details>


### [418] [Denoise and Align: Diffusion-Driven Foreground Knowledge Prompting for Open-Vocabulary Temporal Action Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18313)
*Sa Zhu,Wanqian Zhang,Lin Wang,Jinchao Zhang,Cong Wang,Bo Li*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: DFAlign：首个利用扩散去噪生成前景知识来指导动作-视频对齐的开放词汇时序动作检测框架，通过语义统一条件化、背景抑制去噪和前景提示对齐三个模块，有效缓解动作标签与视频内容之间的语义不平衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开放词汇时序动作检测方法难以解决简洁抽象的动作标签与丰富复杂视频内容之间的语义不平衡问题，导致语义噪声和误导性的跨模态对齐。

Method: 提出DFAlign框架，包含三个模块：1) 语义统一条件化模块统一动作共享和动作特定语义作为扩散去噪条件；2) 背景抑制去噪模块通过去噪过程逐步去除视频背景冗余，生成前景知识；3) 前景提示对齐模块将提取的前景知识作为提示令牌注入文本表示，引导模型关注动作相关片段。

Result: 在两个OV-TAD基准测试上实现了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: DFAlign通过扩散去噪生成的前景知识作为有效的中间语义锚点，缓解了语义鸿沟，增强了动作相关片段的区分性，实现了精确的跨模态对齐。

Abstract: Open-Vocabulary Temporal Action Detection (OV-TAD) aims to localize and classify action segments of unseen categories in untrimmed videos, where effective alignment between action semantics and video representations is critical for accurate detection. However, existing methods struggle to mitigate the semantic imbalance between concise, abstract action labels and rich, complex video contents, inevitably introducing semantic noise and misleading cross-modal alignment. To address this challenge, we propose DFAlign, the first framework that leverages diffusion-based denoising to generate foreground knowledge for the guidance of action-video alignment. Following the 'conditioning, denoising and aligning' manner, we first introduce the Semantic-Unify Conditioning (SUC) module, which unifies action-shared and action-specific semantics as conditions for diffusion denoising. Then, the Background-Suppress Denoising (BSD) module generates foreground knowledge by progressively removing background redundancy from videos through denoising process. This foreground knowledge serves as effective intermediate semantic anchor between video and text representations, mitigating the semantic gap and enhancing the discriminability of action-relevant segments. Furthermore, we introduce the Foreground-Prompt Alignment (FPA) module to inject extracted foreground knowledge as prompt tokens into text representations, guiding model's attention towards action-relevant segments and enabling precise cross-modal alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on two OV-TAD benchmarks. The code repository is provided as follows: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Code-2114/.

</details>


### [419] [LBFTI: Layer-Based Facial Template Inversion for Identity-Preserving Fine-Grained Face Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18358)
*Zixuan Shen,Zhihua Xia,Kaikai Gan,Peipeng Yu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出分层式面部模板反演方法LBFTI，通过将人脸分解为前景、中景、背景三层，采用三阶段训练策略重建身份保持的细粒度人脸图像，在机器认证和人类感知相似度上均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人脸识别系统中广泛采用面部模板进行身份认证，符合数据最小化原则。然而，面部模板反演技术能够从模板重建人脸，带来了严重的隐私泄露风险。现有方法在重建身份保持的细粒度人脸图像方面存在不足，需要更有效的解决方案。

Method: 提出分层式面部模板反演方法LBFTI：1）将人脸图像分解为三层：前景层（眉毛、眼睛、鼻子、嘴巴）、中景层（皮肤）、背景层（其他部分）；2）使用专用生成器生成各层；3）采用三阶段训练策略：独立精炼生成前景和中景层，融合前景和中景层并注入模板信息生成完整全景人脸图像，联合微调所有模块优化层间协调和身份一致性。

Result: 实验表明LBFTI在机器认证性能上优于现有方法，TAR提升25.3%；在人类感知相似度上也表现更好，通过定量指标和问卷调查验证。

Conclusion: LBFTI方法通过分层重建和三阶段训练策略，能够有效从面部模板重建身份保持的细粒度人脸图像，在隐私风险评估和身份认证系统安全分析方面具有重要应用价值。

Abstract: In face recognition systems, facial templates are widely adopted for identity authentication due to their compliance with the data minimization principle. However, facial template inversion technologies have posed a severe privacy leakage risk by enabling face reconstruction from templates. This paper proposes a Layer-Based Facial Template Inversion (LBFTI) method to reconstruct identity-preserving fine-grained face images. Our scheme decomposes face images into three layers: foreground layers (including eyebrows, eyes, nose, and mouth), midground layers (skin), and background layers (other parts). LBFTI leverages dedicated generators to produce these layers, adopting a rigorous three-stage training strategy: (1) independent refined generation of foreground and midground layers, (2) fusion of foreground and midground layers with template secondary injection to produce complete panoramic face images with background layers, and (3) joint fine-tuning of all modules to optimize inter-layer coordination and identity consistency. Experiments demonstrate that our LBFTI not only outperforms state-of-the-art methods in machine authentication performance, with a 25.3% improvement in TAR, but also achieves better similarity in human perception, as validated by both quantitative metrics and a questionnaire survey.

</details>


### [420] [EAST: Early Action Prediction Sampling Strategy with Token Masking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18367)
*Iva Sović,Ivan Martinović,Marin Oršić*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: EAST是一个用于早期动作预测的简单高效框架，通过随机化训练策略使单个模型能够适应不同观测比例，结合观测和未来表示联合学习提升性能，使用token掩码减少内存和加速训练，在多个数据集上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 早期动作预测需要在动作完全展开前进行预测，但有限的视觉证据使任务极具挑战性。现有方法在处理不同观测比例时存在泛化问题，且训练效率有待提升。

Method: 1) 随机化训练策略：采样时间步分隔观测和未观测视频帧，使单个模型能适应所有测试观测比例；2) 观测和未来表示的联合学习；3) token掩码过程：减少一半内存使用，加速2倍训练；4) 结合预测解码器。

Result: 在NTU60、SSv2和UCF101数据集上达到新的SOTA，分别超越之前最佳工作10.1、7.7和3.9个百分点。

Conclusion: EAST框架通过创新的训练策略和效率优化，显著提升了早期动作预测的性能和效率，为视频理解任务提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Early action prediction seeks to anticipate an action before it fully unfolds, but limited visual evidence makes this task especially challenging. We introduce EAST, a simple and efficient framework that enables a model to reason about incomplete observations. In our empirical study, we identify key components when training early action prediction models. Our key contribution is a randomized training strategy that samples a time step separating observed and unobserved video frames, enabling a single model to generalize seamlessly across all test-time observation ratios. We further show that joint learning on both observed and future (oracle) representations significantly boosts performance, even allowing an encoder-only model to excel. To improve scalability, we propose a token masking procedure that cuts memory usage in half and accelerates training by 2x with negligible accuracy loss. Combined with a forecasting decoder, EAST sets a new state of the art on NTU60, SSv2, and UCF101, surpassing previous best work by 10.1, 7.7, and 3.9 percentage points, respectively.

</details>


### [421] [Revisiting Change VQA in Remote Sensing with Structured and Native Multimodal Qwen Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18429)
*Yakoub Bazi,Mohamad M. Al Rahhal,Mansour Zuair,Faroun Mohamed*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文使用Qwen系列模型在CDVQA基准上重新评估视觉变化问答任务，发现原生多模态模型比结构化视觉语言管道更有效，且性能不随模型规模单调增长。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在时序遥感图像理解中已有研究，但变化视觉问答任务在现代多模态模型背景下仍未充分探索。作者旨在重新评估CDVQA基准，比较不同架构的Qwen模型在该任务上的表现。

Method: 采用统一的低秩适应设置，在CDVQA基准上比较两种Qwen模型：Qwen3-VL（结构化视觉语言管道，具有多深度视觉条件化和全注意力解码器）和Qwen3.5（原生多模态模型，具有单阶段对齐和混合解码器骨干）。

Result: 实验结果显示：1) 最近的视觉语言模型优于早期专门基线；2) 性能不随模型规模单调增长；3) 原生多模态模型比结构化视觉语言管道更有效。

Conclusion: 对于遥感图像中的语言驱动语义变化推理，紧密集成的多模态骨干比模型规模或显式的多深度视觉条件化对性能贡献更大。

Abstract: Change visual question answering (Change VQA) addresses the problem of answering natural-language questions about semantic changes between bi-temporal remote sensing (RS) images. Although vision-language models (VLMs) have recently been studied for temporal RS image understanding, Change VQA remains underexplored in the context of modern multimodal models. In this letter, we revisit the CDVQA benchmark using recent Qwen models under a unified low-rank adaptation (LoRA) setting. We compare Qwen3-VL, which follows a structured vision-language pipeline with multi-depth visual conditioning and a full-attention decoder, with Qwen3.5, a native multimodal model that combines a single-stage alignment with a hybrid decoder backbone. Experimental results on the official CDVQA test splits show that recent VLMs improve over earlier specialized baselines. They further show that performance does not scale monotonically with model size, and that native multimodal models are more effective than structured vision-language pipelines for this task. These findings indicate that tightly integrated multimodal backbones contribute more to performance than scale or explicit multi-depth visual conditioning for language-driven semantic change reasoning in RS imagery.

</details>


### [422] [SemLT3D: Semantic-Guided Expert Distillation for Camera-only Long-Tailed 3D Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18476)
*Hao Vo,Khoa Vo,Thinh Phan,Ngo Xuan Cuong,Gianfranco Doretto,Hien Nguyen,Anh Nguyen,Ngan Le*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: SemLT3D：针对相机3D目标检测中长尾分布问题的语义引导专家蒸馏框架，通过语言引导的专家混合模块和语义投影蒸馏提升稀有类别的检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有相机3D目标检测方法主要关注整体性能，忽视了真实数据集中严重的长尾不平衡问题。许多安全关键但稀有的类别（如儿童、婴儿车、应急车辆）代表性不足，导致学习偏差和性能下降。此外，类间模糊性（视觉相似的子类）和类内多样性（外观、尺度、姿态、上下文变化）进一步阻碍了可靠的长尾识别。

Method: 提出SemLT3D框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 语言引导的专家混合模块，根据语义亲和性将3D查询路由到专门专家，以更好地区分混淆类别并专注于尾部分布；2) 语义投影蒸馏管道，将3D查询与CLIP引导的2D语义对齐，生成更一致和可区分的特征。

Result: 虽然主要针对长尾不平衡问题，但SemLT3D的语义结构化学习也提高了在更广泛外观变化和挑战性极端情况下的鲁棒性，为更可靠的相机3D感知提供了原则性步骤。

Conclusion: SemLT3D通过语义引导的专家蒸馏框架，有效解决了相机3D目标检测中的长尾不平衡问题，不仅提升了稀有类别的检测性能，还增强了模型在多样化视觉表现下的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Camera-only 3D object detection has emerged as a cost-effective and scalable alternative to LiDAR for autonomous driving, yet existing methods primarily prioritize overall performance while overlooking the severe long-tail imbalance inherent in real-world datasets. In practice, many rare but safety-critical categories such as children, strollers, or emergency vehicles are heavily underrepresented, leading to biased learning and degraded performance. This challenge is further exacerbated by pronounced inter-class ambiguity (e.g., visually similar subclasses) and substantial intra-class diversity (e.g., objects varying widely in appearance, scale, pose, or context), which together hinder reliable long-tail recognition. In this work, we introduce SemLT3D, a Semantic-Guided Expert Distillation framework designed to enrich the representation space for underrepresented classes through semantic priors. SemLT3D consists of: (1) a language-guided mixture-of-experts module that routes 3D queries to specialized experts according to their semantic affinity, enabling the model to better disentangle confusing classes and specialize on tail distributions; and (2) a semantic projection distillation pipeline that aligns 3D queries with CLIP-informed 2D semantics, producing more coherent and discriminative features across diverse visual manifestations. Although motivated by long-tail imbalance, the semantically structured learning in SemLT3D also improves robustness under broader appearance variations and challenging corner cases, offering a principled step toward more reliable camera-only 3D perception.

</details>


### [423] [MUA: Mobile Ultra-detailed Animatable Avatars](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18583)
*Heming Zhu,Guoxing Sun,Marc Habermann*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出Wavelet-guided Multi-level Spatial Factorized Blendshapes表示方法和蒸馏管道，将高质量数字人模型的动态细节压缩到轻量级表示中，实现2000倍计算成本降低和10倍模型大小减小，同时保持高质量视觉效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前可动画数字人建模存在高保真度与低计算复杂度之间的权衡：高保真模型需要服务器级GPU，轻量级模型则牺牲动态细节和外观质量。需要同时实现高保真度和低计算复杂度的解决方案。

Method: 提出Wavelet-guided Multi-level Spatial Factorized Blendshapes表示方法，结合多级小波谱分解和纹理空间低秩结构分解。通过蒸馏管道将预训练高质量教师模型的运动感知服装动态和细粒度外观细节转移到紧凑高效表示中。

Result: 相比原始高质量教师模型，计算成本降低2000倍，模型大小减小10倍，同时保持视觉上合理的动态和外观细节。在桌面PC上达到180+ FPS，在Meta Quest 3上实现24 FPS实时本地设备性能。

Conclusion: 该方法显著优于现有移动端数字人方法，渲染质量与多数仅能在服务器运行的方法相当或更优，大幅提高了高保真数字人在沉浸式应用中的实用性。

Abstract: Building photorealistic, animatable full-body digital humans remains a longstanding challenge in computer graphics and vision. Recent advances in animatable avatar modeling have largely progressed along two directions: improving the fidelity of dynamic geometry and appearance, or reducing computational complexity to enable deployment on resource-constrained platforms, e.g., VR headsets. However, existing approaches fail to achieve both goals simultaneously: Ultra-high-fidelity avatars typically require substantial computation on server-class GPUs, whereas lightweight avatars often suffer from limited surface dynamics, reduced appearance details, and noticeable artifacts. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel animatable avatar representation, termed Wavelet-guided Multi-level Spatial Factorized Blendshapes, and a corresponding distillation pipeline that transfers motion-aware clothing dynamics and fine-grained appearance details from a pre-trained ultra-high-quality avatar model into a compact, efficient representation. By coupling multi-level wavelet spectral decomposition with low-rank structural factorization in texture space, our method achieves up to 2000X lower computational cost and a 10X smaller model size than the original high-quality teacher avatar model, while preserving visually plausible dynamics and appearance details closely resemble those of the teacher model. Extensive comparisons with state-of-the-art methods show that our approach significantly outperforms existing avatar approaches designed for mobile settings and achieves comparable or superior rendering quality to most approaches that can only run on servers. Importantly, our representation substantially improves the practicality of high-fidelity avatars for immersive applications, achieving over 180 FPS on a desktop PC and real-time native on-device performance at 24 FPS on a standalone Meta Quest 3.

</details>


### [424] [Deep Learning for Virtual Reality User Identification: A Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16341)
*Davide Frizzo,Fabrizio Genilotti,David Petrovic,Arianna Stropeni,Francesco Borsatti,Davide Dalle Pezze,Riccardo De Monte,Manuel Barusco,Gian Antonio Susto*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文在VR用户识别任务上，首次全面评估了包括状态空间模型（SSM）在内的多种深度学习架构在大型VR数据集上的性能表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VR应用需要可靠的用户识别系统来确保设备安全访问和保护用户身份。虽然VR运动跟踪数据已成为有效的行为生物特征，但现代深度学习架构（特别是状态空间模型）在VR场景中的应用尚未充分探索。

Method: 使用Who is Alyx VR数据集（71名用户玩Half-Life:Alyx游戏的数据），评估了多种架构：传统模型（LSTM、GRU、CNN、TCN、Transformer）和新兴的状态空间模型（SSM）在时间序列运动数据上的表现。

Result: 提供了VR用户识别任务上最先进和新型架构的首个全面基准测试，为未来制造环境中隐私保护认证系统建立了基线性能指标。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了状态空间模型在VR用户识别应用中的空白，为工业环境中的安全认证系统提供了重要的架构性能参考。

Abstract: Virtual Reality (VR) applications require robust user identification systems to ensure secure access to equipment and protect worker identities. Motion tracking data from VR headsets and controllers has emerged as a powerful behavioral biometric, with recent studies demonstrating identification accuracies exceeding 94% across a large user base. However, the application of modern deep learning architectures, particularly State Space Models (SSM), to VR scenarios remains largely unexplored. In this work, we benchmark user identification performance across the large-scale Who is Alyx VR dataset, gathering data from 71 users playing the popular Half-Life:Alyx game. We evaluate both established architectures (Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU), Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN), Transformer) and the emerging SSMs on time series motion data. Our results provide the first comprehensive benchmark of state-of-the-art and novel architectures for VR user identification, establishing baseline performance metrics for future privacy preserving authentication systems in manufacturing environments.

</details>


### [425] [AstroSURE: Learning to Remove Noise from Astronomical Images Without Ground Truth Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16793)
*Omid Vaheb,Sebastien Fabbro,Stark Draper*

Main category: astro-ph.IM

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文评估了无需干净地面实况图像即可训练的深度学习去噪方法在天文数据检测导向分析中的应用，比较了Noise2Noise、Stein无偏风险估计和盲点方法在哈勃望远镜和CFHT数据上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 天文成像中光子计数低，需要进行大量后处理（包括污染去除和去噪）。传统方法需要干净的地面实况图像，这在实践中难以获得。论文旨在评估无需干净地面实况的深度学习去噪方法对天文数据检测导向分析的实用性。

Method: 采用并比较了三种无需干净地面实况的深度学习去噪方法：Noise2Noise、Stein无偏风险估计和盲点方法。使用合成数据以及哈勃太空望远镜和加拿大-法国-夏威夷望远镜的真实观测数据进行评估。性能评估结合了基于对象的检测指标（正确检测率和误报率）、基于图像的指标和像素分布诊断。

Result: 这些方法相对于原始噪声图像能够提高微弱源的检测能力。在哈勃望远镜数据上，经过领域一致初始化后获得了令人鼓舞的增益，但向CFHT数据的迁移效果有限，突出了仪器/领域相似性对于无监督适应的重要性。

Conclusion: 无需干净地面实况的深度学习去噪方法可以改善天文数据中微弱源的检测能力，但跨仪器/领域的迁移效果受领域相似性影响较大。领域一致初始化对性能提升有重要作用。

Abstract: In astronomical imaging, the low photon count of exposures necessitates extensive post-processing steps, including contamination removal and denoising. This paper evaluates deep-learning denoising methods that can be trained without clean ground-truth images and assesses their utility for detection11 oriented analysis of astronomical data. We adapt and compare Noise2Noise, Stein's Unbiased Risk Estimator, and blind-spot-based methods using synthetic data and real observations from the Hubble Space Telescope (HST) and the Canada-France-Hawaii Telescope (CFHT). Performance is evaluated using object-detection metrics, including correct detection rate and false alarm rate, together with image-based metrics and pixel-distribution diagnostics. The results show that these methods can improve faint-source detectability relative to the original noisy images, with encouraging gains on HST data after domain-consistent initialization, while transfer to CFHT data is more limited, highlighting the importance of instrument/domain similarity for unsupervised adaptation.

</details>


### [426] [Learned Nonlocal Feature Matching and Filtering for RAW Image Denoising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17453)
*Marco Sánchez-Beeckman,Antoni Buades*

Main category: eess.IV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于RAW图像去噪的神经网络架构，将经典自相似性去噪器的可解释结构融入全可学习网络，使用新颖的非局部块实现邻域匹配、协同滤波和聚合，参数少且泛化能力强。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代去噪架构很少利用经典去噪器的技术知识，主要依赖深度和大量参数，这导致网络难以理解且难以在资源受限设备上部署。需要一种既高效又可解释的RAW图像去噪方案。

Method: 提出专用于RAW-to-RAW去噪的架构，核心是新颖的非局部块，模拟经典非局部块方法的邻域匹配、协同滤波和聚合流程。在学习的多尺度特征表示上操作，使用单块每尺度配合适度邻域数。在真实RAW数据和合成噪声数据集上训练，通过噪声水平图实现传感器无关的去噪。

Result: 在基准测试和实际照片上取得高质量结果，与最先进的卷积和基于Transformer的去噪器竞争，同时使用显著更少的参数。方法具有实用性和可解释性。

Conclusion: 成功将经典自相似性去噪器的可解释结构融入神经网络，为真实世界RAW去噪提供了实用且可解释的解决方案，平衡了性能、效率和泛化能力。

Abstract: Being one of the oldest and most basic problems in image processing, image denoising has seen a resurgence spurred by rapid advances in deep learning. Yet, most modern denoising architectures make limited use of the technical knowledge acquired researching the classical denoisers that came before the mainstream use of neural networks, instead relying on depth and large parameter counts. This poses a challenge not only for understanding the properties of such networks, but also for deploying them on real devices which may present resource constraints and diverse noise profiles. Tackling both issues, we propose an architecture dedicated to RAW-to-RAW denoising that incorporates the interpretable structure of classical self-similarity-based denoisers into a fully learnable neural network. Our design centers on a novel nonlocal block that parallels the established pipeline of neighbor matching, collaborative filtering and aggregation popularized by nonlocal patch-based methods, operating on learned multiscale feature representations. This built-in nonlocality efficiently expands the receptive field, sufficing a single block per scale with a moderate number of neighbors to obtain high-quality results. Training the network on a curated dataset with clean real RAW data and modeled synthetic noise while conditioning it on a noise level map yields a sensor-agnostic denoiser that generalizes effectively to unseen devices. Both quantitative and visual results on benchmarks and in-the-wild photographs position our method as a practical and interpretable solution for real-world RAW denoising, achieving results competitive with state-of-the-art convolutional and transformer-based denoisers while using significantly fewer parameters. The code is available at https://github.com/MIA-UIB/nonlocal-matchfilter .

</details>


### [427] [VIDS: A Verified Imaging Dataset Standard for Medical AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17525)
*Joan S. Muthu,John Shalen*

Main category: eess.IV

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: VIDS是一个用于医学影像AI数据集的开放标准，提供机器可执行的验证规则，涵盖数据结构、标注来源、质量文档和ML就绪性，填补了现有标准在数据管理层的空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学影像AI开发依赖标注数据集，但现有标准如DICOM和BIDS无法提供机器可执行的验证，缺乏对标注来源、质量文档和数据管理层的标准化框架。

Method: 提出VIDS开放规范，定义文件夹结构、文件命名、标注来源模式、质量文档和21条机器可执行验证规则，支持NIfTI作为工作格式同时保留DICOM元数据，可导出到多种ML框架。

Result: 评估四个主要公共数据集（LIDC-IDRI、BraTS、CheXpert、Medical Segmentation Decathlon），发现它们仅满足20-39%的合规维度；发布了LIDC-Hybrid-100作为100个病例的VIDS合规参考CT数据集，在Full合规配置中验证了21/21项。

Conclusion: VIDS填补了医学影像数据集管理层的标准化空白，提供了机器可执行的验证框架，有助于提高数据质量和可重复性，促进医学影像AI的可靠发展。

Abstract: Medical imaging AI development is fundamentally dependent on annotated datasets, yet no existing standard provides machine-enforceable validation across dataset structure, annotation provenance, quality documentation, and ML readiness within a single framework. DICOM standardizes image acquisition, storage, and communication at the individual study level. BIDS organizes neuroimaging research datasets with consistent naming conventions. Neither addresses the curation layer, viz., who annotated what, when, with what tool, and to what quality standard.
  This paper presents VIDS (Verified Imaging Dataset Standard), an open specification that defines folder layout, file naming, annotation provenance schemas, quality documentation, and 21 machine-enforceable validation rules across two compliance profiles. VIDS uses NIfTI as a canonical working format while preserving full DICOM metadata in sidecars for traceability, and supports export to any downstream ML framework (nnU-Net, MONAI, COCO, flat NIfTI) without loss of provenance.
  Twenty-two compliance dimensions are defined and four major public datasets -- LIDC-IDRI, BraTS, CheXpert, and the Medical Segmentation Decathlon -- are benchmarked against these dimensions. Even widely used datasets satisfy only 20--39% of these dimensions, with provenance and quality documentation as the largest systematic gaps. LIDC-Hybrid-100 is released as a 100-subject VIDS-compliant reference CT dataset with consensus segmentation masks from four radiologist annotations (mean pairwise Dice 0.7765), validating 21/21 on the Full compliance profile.
  VIDS is fully open source: the specification is CC BY 4.0, all tools are Apache 2.0, the reference validator is available on PyPI (pip install vids-validator), and LIDC-Hybrid-100 is published on Zenodo (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19582717).

</details>


### [428] [Chatting about Conditional Trajectory Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18126)
*Yuxiang Zhao,Wei Huang,Haipeng Zeng,Huan Zhao,Yujie Song*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: CiT：一种跨时间域意图交互的条件轨迹预测方法，通过联合分析行为意图并整合不同时间域信息，为机器人运动规划提供可选轨迹预测结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类行为具有相互依赖性，需要人机交互系统通过建模复杂社交互动来预测周围智能体轨迹。现有轨迹预测方法大多未纳入自运动信息，仅基于静态信息建模交互，需要更符合人类心智理论的预测方法。

Method: 提出跨时间域意图交互的条件轨迹预测方法(CiT)，联合分析随时间变化的行为意图，实现不同时间域的信息互补与整合。通过社交互动信息修正自身时间域的意图表示，并与机器人运动规划和控制模块紧密集成。

Result: 在广泛实验中，CiT显著优于现有方法，在基准测试中达到最先进性能，能够基于自智能体潜在运动为所有周围智能体生成可选轨迹预测结果。

Conclusion: CiT通过跨时间域意图交互有效建模复杂社交互动，为机器人轨迹预测和运动规划提供了更精确的解决方案，在人机交互场景中表现出优越性能。

Abstract: Human behavior has the nature of mutual dependencies, which requires human-robot interactive systems to predict surrounding agents trajectories by modeling complex social interactions, avoiding collisions and executing safe path planning. While there exist many trajectory prediction methods, most of them do not incorporate the own motion of the ego agent and only model interactions based on static information. We are inspired by the humans theory of mind during trajectory selection and propose a Cross time domain intention-interactive method for conditional Trajectory prediction(CiT). Our proposed CiT conducts joint analysis of behavior intentions over time, and achieves information complementarity and integration across different time domains. The intention in its own time domain can be corrected by the social interaction information from the other time domain to obtain a more precise intention representation. In addition, CiT is designed to closely integrate with robotic motion planning and control modules, capable of generating a set of optional trajectory prediction results for all surrounding agents based on potential motions of the ego agent. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed CiT significantly outperforms the existing methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance in the benchmarks.

</details>


### [429] [Enhancing Glass Surface Reconstruction via Depth Prior for Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18336)
*Jiamin Zheng,Jingwen Yu,Guangcheng Chen,Hong Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种无需训练的框架，利用深度基础模型作为结构先验，通过RANSAC对齐融合原始传感器深度，解决室内机器人导航中玻璃表面导致的深度测量失真问题，并发布GlassRecon数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 室内机器人导航中玻璃表面会严重破坏深度传感器测量，现有深度基础模型（如Depth Anything）虽提供几何先验但缺乏绝对度量尺度，需要解决玻璃导致的深度测量污染问题。

Method: 采用无需训练的方法，利用深度基础模型作为结构先验，通过鲁棒的局部RANSAC对齐将其与原始传感器深度融合，避免玻璃测量误差污染，恢复准确的度量尺度。

Result: 实验表明该方法在严重传感器深度损坏情况下持续优于现有基线方法，特别是在玻璃表面处理方面表现优异。

Conclusion: 提出的训练免费框架能有效解决玻璃表面导致的深度测量问题，同时发布的GlassRecon数据集为相关研究提供了几何真值基准。

Abstract: Indoor robot navigation is often compromised by glass surfaces, which severely corrupt depth sensor measurements. While foundation models like Depth Anything 3 provide excellent geometric priors, they lack an absolute metric scale. We propose a training-free framework that leverages depth foundation models as a structural prior, employing a robust local RANSAC-based alignment to fuse it with raw sensor depth. This naturally avoids contamination from erroneous glass measurements and recovers an accurate metric scale. Furthermore, we introduce \ti{GlassRecon}, a novel RGB-D dataset with geometrically derived ground truth for glass regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, especially under severe sensor depth corruption. The dataset and related code will be released at https://github.com/jarvisyjw/GlassRecon.

</details>


### [430] [Instant Colorization of Gaussian Splats](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17155)
*Daniel Lieber,Alexander Mock,Nils Wandel*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种高效将2D图像信息（颜色、神经特征、分割掩码）反向映射到3D高斯泼溅场景的方法，解决了视图依赖着色和遮挡处理等挑战，相比基于梯度下降的基线方法实现了高达一个数量级的加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高斯泼溅已成为3D场景重建和渲染的热门框架，当前光栅化器能高效地将3D高斯泼溅映射到2D相机视图，但缺乏将2D图像信息高效反向映射到现有高斯泼溅场景的方法。这种"反向"映射对于场景重照明、风格化和3D语义分割等应用至关重要。

Method: 使用正规方程求解每个高斯的可见性加权最小二乘问题，该方法可以利用现有的可微分光栅化器高效实现。解决了视图依赖着色和遮挡处理等关键挑战。

Result: 在场景重照明、特征丰富化和3D语义分割任务上验证了方法的有效性，相比基于梯度下降的基线方法实现了高达一个数量级的加速。

Conclusion: 提出了一种高效、可扩展的方法，能够将2D图像信息反向映射到3D高斯泼溅场景，为各种3D场景处理应用提供了强大的工具。

Abstract: Gaussian Splatting has recently become one of the most popular frameworks for photorealistic 3D scene reconstruction and rendering. While current rasterizers allow for efficient mappings of 3D Gaussian splats onto 2D camera views, this work focuses on mapping 2D image information (e.g. color, neural features or segmentation masks) efficiently back onto an existing scene of Gaussian splats. This 'opposite' direction enables applications ranging from scene relighting and stylization to 3D semantic segmentation, but also introduces challenges, such as view-dependent colorization and occlusion handling.
  Our approach tackles these challenges using the normal equation to solve a visibility-weighted least squares problem for every Gaussian and can be implemented efficiently with existing differentiable rasterizers. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on scene relighting, feature enrichment and 3D semantic segmentation tasks, achieving up to an order of magnitude speedup compared to gradient descent-based baselines.

</details>


### [431] [Deep learning based Non-Rigid Volume-to-Surface Registration for Brain Shift compensation Using Point Cloud](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17389)
*Eashrat Jahan Muniya,Gernot Kronreif,Ander Biguri,Wolfgang Birkfellner,Sepideh Hatamikia*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出基于深度学习的非刚性体表配准框架，从稀疏术中表面观测估计密集位移场，无需显式点对应关系或术中体积成像，用于神经外科中的脑移位补偿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经外科图像引导手术中，软组织变形（脑移位）导致术中解剖结构与术前影像偏差，影响导航精度和手术安全。现有补偿方法依赖术中MRI、CT或超声，会中断手术流程。部分3D皮层表面可从立体显微镜或激光测距仪重建为点云，但仅捕获暴露皮层有限部分，使得变形估计极具挑战。

Method: 提出深度学习框架进行非刚性体表配准：1）多尺度点基特征提取；2）分层变形解码器捕获全局和局部变形；3）将部分术中表面信息整合到完整术前点云域，实现隐式对应学习和有限可见性下的密集变形恢复。

Result: 在挑战性部分表面条件下，准确恢复精细尺度变形：端点误差(EPE)为1.13±0.75mm，均方根误差(RMSE)为1.33±0.81mm。

Conclusion: 该方法支持从稀疏表面观测自动、工作流兼容的脑移位补偿，无需显式点对应关系或术中体积成像。

Abstract: Soft-tissue deformation remains a major limitation in image-guided neurosurgery, where intra-operative anatomy can deviate substantially from pre-operative imaging due to brain shift, compromising navigation accuracy and surgical safety. Existing compensation methods often rely on intra-operative MRI, CT, or ultrasound, which are disruptive and difficult to integrate repeatedly into the surgical workflow. In contrast, partial 3D cortical surfaces can be reconstructed as point clouds from stereoscopic microscopes or laser range scanners (LRS), capturing only a limited portion of the exposed cortex. This makes point cloud registration a practical alternative without interrupting surgery; however, such partial and noisy observations make deformation estimation highly challenging. In this study, we propose a deep learning-based framework for non-rigid volume-to-surface registration, enabling dense displacement field estimation from sparse intra-operative surface observations without explicit point correspondences or volumetric intra-operative imaging. The network leverages multi-scale point-based feature extraction and a hierarchical deformation decoder to capture both global and local deformations. The key contribution lies in integrating partial intra-operative surface information into the full pre-operative point cloud domain, enabling implicit correspondence learning and dense deformation recovery under limited visibility. Quantitative results demonstrate accurate recovery of fine-scale deformations, achieving an Endpoint Error (EPE) of 1.13 +/- 0.75 mm and RMSE of 1.33 +/- 0.81 mm under challenging partial-surface conditions. The proposed approach supports automatic, workflow-compatible brain-shift compensation from sparse surface observations.

</details>


### [432] [Chatting about Upper-Body Expressive Human Pose and Shape Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17959)
*Yuxiang Zhao,Wei Huang,Yujie Song,Liu Wang,Huan Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: CoEvoer是一个针对上半身姿态和形状估计的新型单阶段协同跨依赖Transformer框架，通过显式的特征级交互实现不同身体部位间的相互增强，在面部和手部区域估计上表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前最先进的表达性人体姿态和形状估计方法在面部和手部区域参数估计上仍不准确，且在野生图像上的泛化能力有限。需要一种能够捕捉上半身各部位强耦合和语义依赖关系的框架。

Method: 提出CoEvoer单阶段协同跨依赖Transformer框架，通过显式特征级交互实现不同身体部位的相互增强：躯干等大区域提供全局语义和位置先验来指导面部和手部估计，而面部和手部的局部细节则帮助精炼相邻身体部位。

Result: 在多个上半身基准测试中达到最先进性能，在未见过的野生图像上表现出强大的泛化能力。

Conclusion: CoEvoer是首个专门为上半身表达性姿态和形状估计设计的框架，通过联合参数回归成功捕捉了面部、手部和躯干之间的强耦合和语义依赖关系。

Abstract: Expressive Human Pose and Shape Estimation (EHPS) plays a crucial role in various AR/VR applications and has witnessed significant progress in recent years. However, current state-of-the-art methods still struggle with accurate parameter estimation for facial and hand regions and exhibit limited generalization to wild images. To address these challenges, we present CoEvoer, a novel one-stage synergistic cross-dependency transformer framework tailored for upper-body EHPS. CoEvoer enables explicit feature-level interaction across different body parts, allowing for mutual enhancement through contextual information exchange. Specifically, larger and more easily estimated regions such as the torso provide global semantics and positional priors to guide the estimation of finer, more complex regions like the face and hands. Conversely, the localized details captured in facial and hand regions help refine and calibrate adjacent body parts. To the best of our knowledge, CoEvoer is the first framework designed specifically for upper-body EHPS, with the goal of capturing the strong coupling and semantic dependencies among the face, hands, and torso through joint parameter regression. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CoEvoer achieves state-of-the-art performance on upper-body benchmarks and exhibits strong generalization capability even on unseen wild images.

</details>


### [433] [Predicting Blastocyst Formation in IVF: Integrating DINOv2 and Attention-Based LSTM on Time-Lapse Embryo Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16505)
*Zahra Asghari Varzaneh,Niclas Wölner-Hanssen,Reza Khoshkangini,Thomas Ebner,Magnus Johnsson*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一种结合DINOv2视觉Transformer和增强LSTM的混合模型，用于从有限的每日胚胎图像中预测囊胚形成，在704个胚胎视频数据集上达到96.4%的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 体外受精(IVF)中胚胎选择依赖人工检查大量延时成像数据，但许多诊所缺乏完整延时系统，且只能获得有限的每日图像，需要从有限图像中预测囊胚形成的自动化方法。

Method: 提出混合模型：DINOv2提取胚胎图像特征，增强LSTM（带多头注意力层）分析时间序列特征，预测囊胚形成。模型能处理缺失帧，适用于图像系统有限的实验室。

Result: 在704个胚胎视频的真实数据集上达到96.4%的准确率，优于现有方法，且在缺失帧情况下表现良好。

Conclusion: 该模型能帮助胚胎学家更高效、更自信地选择优质胚胎，对缺乏完整延时系统的IVF实验室具有实用价值。

Abstract: The selection of the optimal embryo for transfer is a critical yet challenging step in in vitro fertilization (IVF), primarily due to its reliance on the manual inspection of extensive time-lapse imaging data. A key obstacle in this process is predicting blastocyst formation from the limited number of daily images available. Many clinics also lack complete time-lapse systems, so full videos are often unavailable. In this study, we aimed to predict which embryos will develop into blastocysts using limited daily images from time-lapse recordings. We propose a novel hybrid model that combines DINOv2, a transformer-based vision model, with an enhanced long short-term memory (LSTM) network featuring a multi-head attention layer. DINOv2 extracts meaningful features from embryo images, and the LSTM model then uses these features to analyze embryo development over time and generate final predictions. We tested our model on a real dataset of 704 embryo videos. The model achieved 96.4% accuracy, surpassing existing methods. It also performs well with missing frames, making it valuable for many IVF laboratories with limited imaging systems. Our approach can assist embryologists in selecting better embryos more efficiently and with greater confidence.

</details>


### [434] [SynthPID: P&ID digitization from Topology-Preserving Synthetic Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16513)
*Suraj Prasad,Pinak Mahapatra*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出SynthPID合成数据集，通过从真实图纸中提取管道拓扑结构来生成逼真的P&ID图，配合改进的Relationformer模型，仅用合成数据就能达到接近真实数据训练的效果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: P&ID图纸数字化自动化具有重要价值，但面临数据瓶颈：工程图纸是专有的，公开基准仅有12张标注图像。现有合成增强方法因模板生成器随机散布符号，生成的图与真实工厂差异大，导致性能有限

Method: 1) 提出SynthPID合成数据集（665张合成P&ID），直接从真实图纸中提取管道拓扑结构作为种子；2) 采用基于patch的Relationformer模型，适配高分辨率图纸处理

Result: 仅使用SynthPID合成数据训练的模型在PID2Graph OPEN100上达到63.8±3.1%的边检测mAP，与真实数据训练的oracle模型差距缩小到8个百分点。相比模板方法（约33%准确率）有显著提升

Conclusion: 生成质量而非模型选择是性能提升的关键因素；当合成图像数量超过约400张时，性能提升趋于平缓，表明种子多样性是主要限制因素

Abstract: Automating the digitization of Piping and Instrumentation Diagrams (P&IDs) into structured process graphs would unlock significant value in plant operations, yet progress is bottlenecked by a fundamental data problem: engineering drawings are proprietary, and the entire community shares a single public benchmark of just 12 annotated images. Prior attempts at synthetic augmentation have fallen short because template-based generators scatter symbols at random, producing graphs that bear little resemblance to real process plants and, accordingly, yield only approximately 33% edge detection accuracy under synth-only training. We argue the failure is structural rather than visual and address it by introducing SynthPID, a corpus of 665 synthetic P&IDs whose pipe topology is seeded directly from real drawings. Paired with a patch-based Relationformer adapted for high-resolution diagrams, a model trained on SynthPID alone achieves 63.8 +/- 3.1% edge mAP on PID2Graph OPEN100 without seeing a single real P&ID during training, closing within 8 pp of the real-data oracle. These gains hold up under a controlled comparison against the template-based regime, confirming that generation quality drives performance rather than model choice. A scaling study reveals that gains flatten beyond roughly 400 synthetic images, pointing to seed diversity as the binding constraint.

</details>


### [435] [Privacy-Preserving Semantic Segmentation without Key Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16523)
*Mare Hirose,Shoko Imaizumi,Hitoshi Kiya*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种新颖的隐私保护语义分割方法，可为每个客户端和图像使用独立密钥，在加密图像上进行模型训练和推理


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决语义分割任务中的隐私保护问题，特别是在分布式或客户端场景下，保护图像数据的隐私性，同时允许在加密数据上进行模型训练和推理

Method: 模型创建者和每个客户端使用本地生成的密钥加密图像，在加密图像上进行模型训练和推理；为缓解性能下降，在模型训练中也应用图像加密方法；使用基于视觉Transformer的SETR模型

Result: 在Cityscapes数据集上验证了方法的有效性，表明可以在保护隐私的同时进行语义分割任务

Conclusion: 提出的隐私保护语义分割方法能够为每个客户端和图像使用独立密钥，在加密数据上实现有效的训练和推理，平衡了隐私保护和模型性能

Abstract: This paper proposes a novel privacy-preserving semantic segmentation method that can use independent keys for each client and image. In the proposed method, the model creator and each client encrypt images using locally generated keys, and model training and inference are conducted on the encrypted images. To mitigate performance degradation, an image encryption method is applied to model training in addition to the generation of test images. In experiments, the effectiveness of the proposed method is confirmed on the Cityscapes dataset under the use of a vision transformer-based model, called SETR.

</details>


### [436] [See Through the Noise: Improving Domain Generalization in Gaze Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16562)
*Yanming Peng,Shijing Wang,Yaping Huang,Yi Tian*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 论文提出SeeTN框架，首次全面研究标签噪声对视线估计泛化性能的负面影响，通过语义嵌入空间和亲和力一致性机制缓解标签噪声问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有泛化视线估计方法忽视了标签噪声对模型泛化性能的影响，而精确的视线标注获取困难，标签噪声问题普遍存在，需要专门解决方案

Method: 提出SeeTN框架：1) 通过原型变换构建语义嵌入空间，保持视线特征与连续标签的一致拓扑结构；2) 测量特征-标签亲和力一致性区分噪声与干净样本；3) 在语义流形中引入亲和力正则化，将干净样本的视线相关信息迁移到噪声样本

Result: 大量实验表明，SeeTN能有效缓解源域噪声的负面影响，在不损害源域准确性的前提下实现优越的跨域泛化性能，凸显了在泛化视线估计中显式处理噪声的重要性

Conclusion: 首次全面研究标签噪声对视线估计泛化的影响，提出的SeeTN框架通过语义结构对齐和域不变视线关系增强，显著提升了模型对标签噪声的鲁棒性

Abstract: Generalizable gaze estimation methods have garnered increasing attention due to their critical importance in real-world applications and have achieved significant progress. However, they often overlook the effect of label noise, arising from the inherent difficulty of acquiring precise gaze annotations, on model generalization performance. In this paper, we are the first to comprehensively investigate the negative effects of label noise on generalization in gaze estimation. Further, we propose a novel solution, called See-Through-Noise (SeeTN) framework, which improves generalization from a novel perspective of mitigating label noise. Specifically, we propose to construct a semantic embedding space via a prototype-based transformation to preserve a consistent topological structure between gaze features and continuous labels. We then measure feature-label affinity consistency to distinguish noisy from clean samples, and introduce a novel affinity regularization in the semantic manifold to transfer gaze-related information from clean to noisy samples. Our proposed SeeTN promotes semantic structure alignment and enforces domain-invariant gaze relationships, thereby enhancing robustness against label noise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our SeeTN effectively mitigates the adverse impact of source-domain noise, leading to superior cross-domain generalization without compromising the source-domain accuracy, and highlight the importance of explicitly handling noise in generalized gaze estimation.

</details>


### [437] [Classification of systolic murmurs in heart sounds using multiresolution complex Gabor dictionary and vision transformer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16563)
*Mahmoud Fakhry,Abeer FathAllah Brery*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种基于复杂正交匹配追踪和视觉Transformer的收缩期心脏杂音自动分类系统，在CirCor DigiScope数据集上达到95.96%的分类准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 收缩期心脏杂音是心脏异常的重要指标，但其强度、音调和质量变化很大，需要精确识别以实现准确的心脏疾病诊断。传统方法难以有效处理杂音的可变性，需要更鲁棒的自动分类系统。

Method: 1. 特征提取模块：使用复杂正交匹配追踪将杂音段投影到由多分辨率复杂Gabor基函数组成的冗余字典上，生成变分辨率时频特征矩阵。2. 分类模型：基于视觉Transformer构建，通过CNN进行补丁标记化，然后使用多头注意力、残差连接和卷积网络处理多分辨率特征矩阵。

Result: 在CirCor DigiScope数据集的四种收缩期杂音分类任务中，系统达到了95.96%的分类准确率，证明了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该研究成功将多分辨率特征提取与基于Transformer的特征分类相结合，提高了心脏杂音识别的准确性和可靠性，为心脏疾病的自动诊断提供了有效工具。

Abstract: Systolic murmurs are extra heart sounds that occur during the contraction phase of the cardiac cycle, often indicating heart abnormalities caused by turbulent blood flow. Their intensity, pitch, and quality vary, requiring precise identification for the accurate diagnosis of cardiac disorders. This study presents an automatic classification system for systolic murmurs using a feature extraction module, followed by a classification model. The feature extraction module employs complex orthogonal matching pursuit to project single or multiple murmur segments onto a redundant dictionary composed of multiresolution complex Gabor basis functions (GBFs). The resulting projection weights are split and reshaped into variable-resolution time--frequency feature matrices. Processing multiple segments of a single recording using a shared dictionary mitigates murmur variability. This is achieved by learning the weights for each segment while enforcing that they correspond to the same set of basis functions in the dictionary, promoting consistent time--frequency feature matrices. The classification model is built based on a vision transformer to process multiple input matrices of different resolutions by passing each through a convolutional neural network for patch tokenization. All embedding tokens are then concatenated to form a matrix and forwarded to an encoder layer that includes multihead attention, residual connections, and a convolutional network with a kernel size of one. This integration of multiresolution feature extraction with transformer-based feature classification enhances the accuracy and reliability of heart murmur identification. An experimental analysis of four types of systolic murmurs from the CirCor DigiScope dataset demonstrates the effectiveness of the system, achieving a classification accuracy of $95.96\%$.

</details>


### [438] [IncepDeHazeGAN: Novel Satellite Image Dehazing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16609)
*Tejeswar Pokuri,Shivarth Rai*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出IncepDeHazeGAN，一种结合Inception模块和多层特征融合的GAN网络，用于单图像去雾任务，在多个数据集上达到SOTA效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 去雾技术在计算机视觉中用于提升云雾条件下拍摄图像的质量，对于遥感数据恢复清晰图像尤为重要。现有方法需要改进以更好地处理不同雾霾条件。

Method: 提出IncepDeHazeGAN：1) 使用Inception模块进行多尺度特征提取；2) 采用多层特征融合设计实现特征高效重用；3) 应用Grad-CAM XAI技术分析网络关注区域。

Result: 在多个数据集上实现了state-of-the-art的去雾效果，Grad-CAM可视化显示网络能够适应不同雾霾条件并关注关键区域。

Conclusion: IncepDeHazeGAN通过Inception模块和多层特征融合有效提升了单图像去雾性能，XAI技术增强了模型的可解释性。

Abstract: Dehazing is a technique in computer vision for enhancing the visual quality of images captured in cloudy or foggy conditions. Dehazing helps to recover clear, high-quality images from haze-affected remote sensing data. In this study, we introduce IncepDeHazeGAN, a novel Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) involving Inception block and multi-layer feature fusion for the task of single-image dehazing. Utilizing the Inception block allows for multi-scale feature extraction. On the other hand, the multi-layer feature fusion design achieves efficient reuse of features as the features extracted at different convolution layers are fused several times. Grad-CAM XAI technique has been applied to our network, highlighting the regions focused on by the network for dehazing and its adaptation to different haze conditions. Experiments demonstrate that our network achieves state-of-the-art results in several datasets.

</details>


### [439] [LOD-Net: Locality-Aware 3D Object Detection Using Multi-Scale Transformer Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16696)
*Mustaqeem Khan,Aidana Nurakhmetova,Wail Gueaieb,Abdulmotaleb El Saddik*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种集成到3DETR架构中的多尺度注意力机制，通过上采样操作生成高分辨率特征图，提升3D点云物体检测性能，在ScanNetv2数据集上取得显著改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 点云数据的稀疏性和缺乏全局结构使得3D物体检测具有挑战性。现有方法在捕捉局部几何和全局上下文方面存在不足，特别是对于较小和语义相关物体的检测。

Method: 将多尺度注意力机制集成到3DETR架构中，引入上采样操作生成高分辨率特征图，结合分层特征提取和注意力机制，增强局部几何和全局上下文的捕捉能力。

Result: 在ScanNetv2数据集上，3DETR+MSA模型相比基线在mAP@25提升近1%，在mAP@50提升4.78%。但对于轻量级模型3DETR-m变体改进有限。

Conclusion: 分层特征提取与注意力机制的结合能有效增强3D场景理解，但需要针对轻量级模型调整上采样策略。多尺度注意力机制对提升3D物体检测性能具有重要价值。

Abstract: 3D object detection in point cloud data remains a challenging task due to the sparsity and lack of global structure inherent in the input. In this work, we propose a novel Multi-Scale Attention (MSA) mechanism integrated into the 3DETR architecture to better capture both local geometry and global context. Our method introduces an upsampling operation that generates high-resolution feature maps, enabling the network to better detect smaller and semantically related objects. Experiments conducted on the ScanNetv2 dataset demonstrate that our 3DETR + MSA model improves detection performance, achieving a gain of almost 1% in mAP@25 and 4.78% in mAP@50 over the baseline. While applying MSA to the 3DETR-m variant shows limited improvement, our analysis reveals the importance of adapting the upsampling strategy for lightweight models. These results highlight the effectiveness of combining hierarchical feature extraction with attention mechanisms in enhancing 3D scene understanding.

</details>


### [440] [iDocV2: Leveraging Self-Supervision and Open-Set Detection for Improving Pattern Spotting in Historical Documents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16726)
*Jose M. Saavedra,Crhistopher Stears,Marcelo Pizarro,Cristóbal Loyola,Luis Aros*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出iDoc模型，通过自监督训练的编码器和开放集检测器，加速文档检索和模式识别，在非方形小查询上达到SOTA精度0.612，速度提升10倍


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着数字书籍的大规模普及，需要通过图形模式搜索文档集合变得至关重要。当前历史文档检索和模式识别方法存在精度不足（SOTA精度0.494，小非方形查询仅0.427）和处理时间过长（DocExplore数据集需7秒）的问题

Method: 提出iDoc模型，包含：1）更好的编码器（iDoc），采用自监督训练策略；2）开放集检测器加速搜索；3）使用非极大值抑制减少误报

Result: 1）在模式识别和文档检索上达到竞争性结果；2）速度比SOTA提升10倍；3）在小非方形查询上达到新的SOTA精度0.612

Conclusion: iDoc模型在历史文档检索和模式识别任务中，在保持竞争性精度的同时显著提升了处理速度，特别是在小非方形查询上表现突出

Abstract: Considering the imminent massification of digital books, it has become critical to facilitate searching collections through graphical patterns. Current strategies for document retrieval and pattern spotting in historical documents still need to be improved. State-of-the-art strategies achieve an overall precision of $0.494$ for pattern spotting, where the precision for small non-square queries reaches 0.427. In addition, the processing time is excessive, requiring up to 7 seconds for searching in the DocExplore dataset due to a dense-based strategy used by SOTA models. Therefore, we propose a new model based on a better encoder (iDoc), trained under a self-supervised strategy, and an open-set detector to accelerate searching. Our model achieves competitive results with state-of-the-art pattern spotting and document retrieval, improving speed by 10x. Furthermore, our model reaches a new SOTA performance on the small non-square queries, achieving a new precision of 0.612.Different from the previous version, this leverages non-maximum suppression to reduce false positives.

</details>


### [441] [Automated Palynological Analysis System: Integrating Deep Metric Learning and $U^{2}$-Net Detection in $H\infty$ bright field microscopy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16743)
*J. Staforelli-Vivanco,R. Jofré,B. Muñoz,V. Salamanca,P. Coelho,I. Sanhueza,L. Viafora,C. Toro,J. Troncoso,M. Rondanelli-Reyes,I. Lamas*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种自动化高通量显微镜系统，用于花粉粒的精确计数、分类和形态分析，结合了鲁棒机械控制和深度学习技术，相比传统人工方法实现了6倍处理速度提升和95.8%的分类召回率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统蜜源花粉学分析过程耗时且主观，每个样本需要4-6小时。需要开发自动化系统来提高分析效率和准确性，减少人工干预的主观性。

Method: 系统整合了H∞鲁棒机械控制与深度学习流水线：使用U²-Net进行显著物体检测，基于DINOv2 Vision Transformer骨干网络通过深度度量学习进行分类，并集成梯度加权注意力机制提供可解释的特征标注。

Result: 系统实现了95.8%的分类召回率，相比专家人工分析实现了6倍的处理速度提升，能够提供人类可解释的纹理和诊断特征标注。

Conclusion: 该自动化系统显著提高了花粉分析的效率和准确性，为传统蜜源花粉学提供了现代化的解决方案，结合了先进的计算机视觉技术和机械控制。

Abstract: Traditional melissopalynology is a time-consuming and subjective process, often taking 4-6 hours per sample. We present an automated, high-throughput microscopy system that integrates $H\infty$ robust mechanical control with advanced deep learning pipelines for the precise counting, classification, and morphological analysis of pollen grains from Bio Bio region in south central territory in Chile. Our system employs $U^{2}$-Net for salient object detection and a DINOv2 Vision Transformer backbone trained via Deep Metric Learning for classification. By integrating Gradient-Weighted Attention, the model provides human-interpretable texture and diagnostic feature annotations. The system achieves a 95.8$\%$ classification recall and a 6x processing speedup compared to manual expert analysis.

</details>


### [442] [Frequency-Decomposed INR for NIR-Assisted Low-Light RGB Image Denoising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16800)
*Ligen Shi,Zengyu Pang,Chang Liu,Shuchen Sun,Jun Qiu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出基于频率解耦隐式神经表示（FD-INR）的近红外辅助低光照图像恢复方法，通过多尺度小波变换分解频率分量，利用RGB-NIR跨模态频率相关性，实现低频色彩与高频纹理的互补恢复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决低光照条件下可见光图像存在的严重噪声和高频结构退化问题。传统方法在空间域进行刚性融合容易导致色彩失真和伪影，需要更有效的跨模态频率域恢复方法。

Method: 基于RGB-NIR跨模态频率相关性统计先验，通过多尺度小波变换将图像分解为不同频率分量，构建双分支隐式神经表示框架。设计跨模态差异化频率监督机制：利用低光照RGB指导低频亮度和色彩重建，利用高信噪比NIR信号约束高频纹理细节生成。引入基于不确定性的自适应加权损失函数，自动平衡不同频率任务的贡献。

Result: FD-INR不仅能有效恢复图像亮度一致性和结构细节，而且得益于其隐式连续表示特性，在任意分辨率重建任务中优于现有方法，显著提升了低光照感知的可靠性。

Conclusion: 提出的频率解耦隐式神经表示方法通过跨模态频率域互补优势，解决了传统空间域融合方法的色彩失真和伪影问题，为低光照图像恢复提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Addressing the issues of severe noise and high frequency structural degradation in visible images under low-light conditions, this paper proposes a Near Infrared (NIR) aided low light image restoration method based on Frequency Decoupled Implicit Neural Representation (FDINR). Based on the statistical prior of RGB-NIR cross-modal frequency correlations, specifically that low-frequency RGB signals are more reliable, whereas high frequency NIR signals exhibit higher correlation, we explicitly decompose images into distinct frequency components via multi-scale wavelet transforms and construct a dual-branch implicit neural representation framework. Within this framework, we design a cross modal differentiated frequency supervision mechanism, leveraging low light RGB to guide the reconstruction of low frequency luminance and color, and utilizing high-SNR NIR signals to constrain the generation of high frequency texture details, thereby achieving complementary advantages in the frequency domain. Furthermore, an uncertainty-based adaptive weighting loss function is introduced to automatically balance the contributions of different frequency tasks, solving the problems of color distortion and artifacts caused by rigid fusion in the spatial domain common in traditional methods. Experimental results demonstrate that FD-INR not only effectively restores image luminance consistency and structural details but also, benefitting from its implicit continuous representation, outperforms existing methods in arbitrary-resolution reconstruction tasks, significantly enhancing the reliability of low light perception.

</details>


### [443] [TowerDataset: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Transmission Corridor Segmentation with a Global-Local Fusion Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16848)
*Xu Cui,Xinyan Liu,Chen Yang,Zhaobo Qi,Beichen Zang,Weigang Zhang,Antoni B. Chan*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了TowerDataset用于输电走廊点云细粒度语义分割，包含661个真实场景和约24.66亿个点，定义了22个细粒度类别，并提出了全局-局部融合框架来同时建模长距离拓扑关系和局部几何细节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前输电走廊点云分割面临数据稀缺、难以同时建模全局走廊结构和局部几何细节的挑战。现有公开数据集通常只提供少量粗粒度类别或短裁剪场景，忽略了长距离结构依赖、严重的长尾分布和安全关键组件的细微区别。

Method: 提出了全局-局部融合框架：1) 全局分支采用NoCrop训练和原型对比学习捕获长距离拓扑和上下文依赖；2) 局部分支保留精细几何结构；3) 通过几何验证融合和精化两个分支的预测结果。

Result: 在TowerDataset和两个公开基准测试上的实验表明，所提基准具有挑战性，且提出的框架在真实、复杂、异构的输电走廊场景中表现出鲁棒性。

Conclusion: TowerDataset填补了输电走廊点云细粒度分割的数据空白，提出的全局-局部融合框架能够有效利用全局关系和局部形状细节来识别罕见和易混淆的组件。

Abstract: Fine-grained semantic segmentation of transmission-corridor point clouds is fundamental for intelligent power-line inspection. However, current progress is limited by realistic data scarcity and the difficulty of modeling global corridor structure and local geometric details in long, heterogeneous scenes. Existing public datasets usually provide only a few coarse categories or short cropped scenes which overlook long-range structural dependencies, severe long-tail distributions, and subtle distinctions among safety-critical components. As a result, current methods are difficult to evaluate under realistic inspection settings, and their ability to preserve and integrate complementary global and local cues remains unclear.
  To address the above challenges, we introduce TowerDataset, a heterogeneous benchmark for transmission-corridor segmentation. TowerDataset contains 661 real-world scenes and about 2.466 billion points. It preserves long corridor extents, defines a fine-grained 22-class taxonomy, and provides standardized splits and evaluation protocols.
  In addition, we present a global-local fusion framework which preserves and fuses whole-scene and local-detail information. A whole-scene branch with NoCrop training and prototypical contrastive learning captures long-range topology and contextual dependencies. A block-wise local branch retains fine geometric structures. Both predictions are then fused and refined by geometric validation. This design allows the model to exploit both global relationships and local shape details when recognizing rare and confusing components. Experiments on TowerDataset and two public benchmarks demonstrate the challenge of the proposed benchmark and the robustness of our framework in real, complex, and heterogeneous transmission-corridor scenes. The dataset will be released soon at https://huggingface.co/datasets/tccx18/Towerdataset/tree/main.

</details>


### [444] [Physics-Informed Tracking (PIT)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16895)
*Emil Hovad,Allan Peter Engsig-Karup*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了PIT框架，通过神经网络自动编码器定位粒子热图峰值，结合可微物理模块约束轨迹满足已知动力学，实现无标签物理一致性跟踪。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统粒子跟踪方法通常依赖大量标注数据或缺乏物理约束，难以在复杂场景中保持准确性和物理一致性。需要一种既能利用物理先验知识，又能减少标注依赖的跟踪方法。

Method: 1) 使用自动编码器将粒子定位为热图峰值（地标）；2) 在自动编码器中嵌入可微物理模块，约束多个时间步的地标满足已知动力学；3) 提出物理信息地标损失（PILL）比较预测轨迹与地标；4) 监督变体PILLS使用模拟数据中的真实位置、速度和反弹信息；5) 采用分割瓶颈结构分离跟踪相关结构和背景噪声。

Result: 通过26因子设计的复制实验（n=4，64种配置），PILLS在清洁和噪声条件下，对于双线性和物理精炼解码器输出，都能持续实现亚像素级跟踪精度。

Conclusion: PIT框架成功地将物理先验知识融入深度学习跟踪系统，通过可微物理模块和专门的损失函数，实现了高精度且物理一致的粒子跟踪，减少了标注需求。

Abstract: We propose Physics-Informed Tracking (PIT), a video-based framework for tracking a single particle from video, where a neural network autoencoder localizes a particle as a heatmap peak (landmark) and a differentiable physics module embedded in the autoencoder constrains several landmarks over time (a trajectory) to satisfy known dynamics. The novel Physics-Informed Landmark Loss (PILL) compares this predicted trajectory back against the landmarks, enforcing physical consistency without labels. Its supervised variant (PILLS) instead compares the prediction against ground-truth position, velocity, and bounce from simulation, enabling end-to-end backpropagation. To support supervised and unsupervised learning, we use an autoencoder with a split bottleneck that separates A) tracking-related structure via landmark heatmaps from B) background noise and subsequent image reconstruction. We evaluate a replicated 26 factorial design (n = 4 replicates, 64 configurations), showing that PILLS consistently achieves sub-pixel tracking accuracy for the bilinear and physics-refined decoder outputs under both clean and noisy conditions.

</details>


### [445] [Inductive Convolution Nuclear Norm Minimization for Tensor Completion with Arbitrary Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17001)
*Wei Li,Yuyang Li,Kaile Du,Yi Yu,Guangcan Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出ICNNM方法，通过预学习卷积特征向量避免SVD计算，显著提升张量补全的计算效率并改善恢复性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决CNNM方法在张量补全中需要多次SVD计算的问题，SVD计算昂贵且难以并行化，限制了方法的实际应用

Method: 从卷积特征向量角度重新表述CNNM优化目标，引入预学习的卷积特征向量（在不同张量间共享），提出ICNNM方法绕过SVD步骤

Result: ICNNM显著减少计算时间，同时由于预学习卷积特征向量编码了额外先验知识，恢复性能也优于CNNM和其他竞争方法

Conclusion: ICNNM在视频补全、预测和帧插值等任务中表现出优越性，为张量补全问题提供了高效且性能更好的解决方案

Abstract: The recently established Convolution Nuclear Norm Minimization (CNNM) addresses the problem of \textit{tensor completion with arbitrary sampling} (TCAS), which involves restoring a tensor from a subset of its entries sampled in an arbitrary manner. Despite its promising performance, the optimization procedure of CNNM needs performing Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) multiple times, which is computationally expensive and hard to parallelize. To address the issue, we reformulate the optimization objective of CNNM from the perspective of convolution eigenvectors. By introducing pre-learned convolution eigenvectors which are shared among different tensors, we propose a novel method called Inductive Convolution Nuclear Norm Minimization (ICNNM), which bypasses the SVD step so as to decrease significantly the computational time. In addition, due to the extra prior knowledge encoded in the pre-learned convolution eigenvectors, ICNNM also outperforms CNNM in terms of recovery performance. Extensive experiments on video completion, prediction and frame interpolation verify the superiority of ICNNM over CNNM and several other competing methods.

</details>


### [446] [MobileAgeNet: Lightweight Facial Age Estimation for Mobile Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17007)
*Arun Kumar,Aswathy Baiju,Radu Timofte,Dmitry Ignatov*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: MobileAgeNet：轻量级面部年龄估计框架，在UTKFace测试集上MAE为4.65年，参数量3.23M，移动设备推理延迟14.4ms，提供从PyTorch训练到TensorFlow Lite部署的完整流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动设备上的面部年龄估计需要在预测精度、低延迟和小模型尺寸之间取得平衡，现有模型往往难以同时满足这些要求。

Method: 基于预训练MobileNetV3-Large骨干网络，结合紧凑回归头，采用有界年龄回归和两阶段微调策略，通过NN LEMUR Dataset框架进行可重复实验和超参数优化。

Result: 在UTKFace测试集上MAE达到4.65年，参数量3.23M，移动设备平均推理延迟14.4ms，部署流程保持预测性能无显著下降。

Conclusion: MobileAgeNet为移动设备上的面部年龄估计提供了一个实用、可部署的基线解决方案，平衡了精度和效率。

Abstract: Mobile deployment of facial age estimation requires models that balance predictive accuracy with low latency and compact size. In this work, we present MobileAgeNet, a lightweight age-regression framework that achieves an MAE of 4.65 years on the UTKFace held-out test set while maintaining efficient on-device inference with an average latency of 14.4 ms measured using the AI Benchmark application. The model is built on a pretrained MobileNetV3-Large backbone combined with a compact regression head, enabling real-time prediction on mobile devices.
