The training and evaluation pipeline is integrated into the NN LEMUR Dataset framework, supporting reproducible experimentation, structured hyperparameter optimization, and consistent evaluation. We employ bounded age regression together with a two-stage fine-tuning strategy to improve training stability and generalization. Experimental results show that MobileAgeNet achieves competitive accuracy with 3.23M parameters, and that the deployment pipeline from PyTorch training through ONNX export to TensorFlow Lite conversion - preserves predictive behavior without measurable degradation under practical on-device conditions. Overall, this work provides a practical, deployment-ready baseline for mobile-oriented facial age estimation.

</details>


### [447] [BasketHAR: A Multimodal Dataset for Human Activity Recognition and Sport Analysis in Basketball Training Scenarios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17065)
*Xian Gao,Haoyue Zhang,Zongyun Zhang,Jiacheng Ruan,Ting Liu,Yuzhuo Fu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了BasketHAR，一个专门针对篮球训练的多模态人类活动识别数据集，包含专业级动作、多种传感器数据和同步视频，并提供了基准对齐方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有HAR数据集主要关注基本日常活动（如行走、站立），缺乏针对专业领域如体育训练的数据集，限制了在篮球等专业场景中的应用。

Method: 收集了包含惯性测量单元（加速度计、陀螺仪）、角速度、磁场、心率、皮肤温度等多模态传感器数据，以及同步视频记录，构建了篮球专业动作数据集，并提供了多模态对齐基准方法。

Result: 实验结果表明数据集具有足够的复杂性，适合高级HAR任务，可用于篮球训练分析和专业性能报告生成。

Conclusion: BasketHAR填补了专业体育HAR数据集的空白，为HAR和体育分析研究提供了有价值的资源，数据集已公开在Hugging Face上。

Abstract: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) involves the automatic identification of user activities and has gained significant research interest due to its broad applicability. Most HAR systems rely on supervised learning, which necessitates large, diverse, and well-annotated datasets. However, existing datasets predominantly focus on basic activities such as walking, standing, and stair navigation, limiting their utility in specialized contexts like sports performance analysis. To address this gap, we present BasketHAR, a novel multimodal HAR dataset tailored for basketball training, encompassing a diverse set of professional-level actions. BasketHAR includes comprehensive motion data from inertial measurement units (accelerometers and gyroscopes), angular velocity, magnetic field, heart rate, skin temperature, and synchronized video recordings. We also provide a baseline multimodal alignment method to benchmark performance. Experimental results underscore the dataset's complexity and suitability for advanced HAR tasks. Furthermore, we highlight its potential applications in the analysis of basketball training sessions and in the generation of specialized performance reports, representing a valuable resource for future research in HAR and sports analytics. The dataset are publicly accessible at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xian-Gao/BasketHAR licensed under Apache License 2.0.

</details>


### [448] [D-Prism: Differentiable Primitives for Structured Dynamic Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17082)
*Xingyuan Yu,Yijin Li,Chong Zeng,Yuhang Ming,Hujun Bao,Guofeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: D-Prism：首个将可微分基元扩展到动态领域的框架，通过将3DGS绑定到基元表面，结合两者的优势，实现结构化动态建模，能同时捕捉几何结构和刚体运动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动态方法（如可变形网格或3DGS）使用非结构化表示，无法同时建模合适的几何结构和关节运动。基于基元的方法擅长结构化静态场景，但其动态潜力尚未探索。需要一种能同时捕捉几何和刚体运动的结构化动态建模方法。

Method: 1) 将3DGS绑定到基元表面，利用3DGS在表观渲染和基元在几何建模方面的优势；2) 引入变形网络控制基元运动，确保准确匹配物体运动；3) 设计自适应控制策略动态调整基元数量，更好匹配物体的真实空间占用。

Result: 实验证实该方法在结构化动态建模方面表现出色，能同时提供结构化几何和精确运动跟踪。

Conclusion: D-Prism是首个实现高保真结构化动态建模的框架，通过将可微分基元扩展到动态领域，成功解决了同时捕捉几何结构和刚体运动的挑战。

Abstract: Capturing both geometry and rigid motion for structured dynamic objects, like multi-part assemblies or jointed mechanisms, remains a key challenge. Existing dynamic methods, such as deformable meshes or 3DGS, rely on unstructured representations and fail to jointly model suitable geometry and articulated motion. Primitive-based methods excel at structured static scenes, but their dynamic potential is still unexplored. We propose D-Prism, the first framework to achieve high-fidelity structured dynamic modeling by extending differentiable primitives to the dynamic domain. Specifically, we bind 3DGS to primitive surfaces, leveraging their respective strengths in appearance and geometry. We introduce a deformation network to control primitive motion, ensuring it accurately matches the object's movement. Furthermore, we design a novel adaptive control strategy to dynamically adjust primitive counts, better matching objects' true spatial footprint. Experiments confirm that our method excels at structured dynamic modeling, providing both structured geometry and precise motion tracking.

</details>


### [449] [PPEDCRF: Dynamic-CRF-Guided Selective Perturbation for Background-Based Location Privacy in Video Sequences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17163)
*Bo Ma,Weiqi Yan,Jinsong Wu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: PPEDCRF是一个校准选择性扰动框架，用于保护视频帧中的背景位置隐私，通过动态条件随机场估计位置敏感区域，使用归一化控制惩罚调整扰动强度，并在推断区域内注入高斯噪声，相比全局高斯噪声在相同隐私保护水平下提供更好的视觉质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 即使GPS元数据被移除，攻击者仍可通过匹配背景视觉线索与地理标记参考图像来定位视频帧。现有方法如全局高斯噪声会严重降低视觉质量，因此需要一种能保护位置隐私同时保持视觉质量的选择性扰动方法。

Method: 1) 使用动态条件随机场(DCRF)估计位置敏感的背景区域；2) 通过归一化控制惩罚(NCP)重新调整扰动强度；3) 使用差分隐私风格的校准规则，仅在推断区域内注入高斯噪声。

Result: 在8个攻击骨干网络和3个噪声种子的基准测试中，PPEDCRF将ResNet18的Top-1检索准确率从0.667降至0.361±0.127(σ₀=8)，同时保持36.14dB PSNR，比全局高斯噪声质量高约6dB。在23/24的骨干-图库单元中显示负Δ(隐私改善)。

Conclusion: PPEDCRF通过空间集中的扰动，在相同隐私保护水平下提供比全局高斯噪声更好的视觉质量，但并未提供更强的匹配效用隐私。主要优势在于视觉质量的提升而非隐私保护的增强。

Abstract: We propose PPEDCRF, a calibrated selective perturbation framework that protects \emph{background-based location privacy} in released video frames against gallery-based retrieval attackers. Even after GPS metadata are stripped, an adversary can geolocate a frame by matching its background visual cues to geo-tagged reference imagery; PPEDCRF mitigates this threat by estimating location-sensitive background regions with a dynamic conditional random field (DCRF), rescaling perturbation strength with a normalized control penalty (NCP), and injecting Gaussian noise only inside the inferred regions via a DP-style calibration rule.
  On a controlled paired-scene retrieval benchmark with eight attacker backbones and three noise seeds, PPEDCRF reduces ResNet18 Top-1 retrieval accuracy from 0.667 to $0.361\pm0.127$ at $σ_0=8$ while preserving $36.14\,$dB PSNR -- an ${\approx}6\,$dB quality advantage over global Gaussian noise. Transfer across the eight-backbone seed-averaged benchmark is broadly supportive (23 of 24 backbone-gallery cells show negative $Δ$), while appendix-scale confirmation identifies MixVPR as a remaining adverse-transfer exception. Matched-operating-point analysis shows that PPEDCRF and global Gaussian noise converge in Top-1 privacy at equal utility, so the practical benefit is spatially concentrated perturbation that preserves higher visual quality at any given noise scale rather than stronger matched-utility privacy. Code: https://github.com/mabo1215/PPEDCRF

</details>


### [450] [The First Challenge on Mobile Real-World Image Super-Resolution at NTIRE 2026: Benchmark Results and Method Overview](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17306)
*Jiatong Li,Zheng Chen,Kai Liu,Jingkai Wang,Zihan Zhou,Xiaoyang Liu,Libo Zhu,Jue Gong,Radu Timofte,Yulun Zhang,Congyu Wang,Zihao Wang,Ke Wu,Xinzhe Zhu,Fengkai Zhang,Zhongbao Yang,Long Sun,Jiangxin Dong,Jinshan Pan,Jiachen Tu,Yaokun Shi,Guoyi Xu,Yaoxin Jiang,Jiajia Liu,Renyuan Situ,Yixin Yang,Zhaorun Zhou,Junyang Chen,Yuqi Li,Chuanguang Yang,Weilun Feng,Chuanyue Yan,Yuedong Tan,Yingli Tian,Zhenzhong Chen,Tongqi Guo,Ruhan Liu,Sangzi Shi,Huazhang Deng,Jie Yang,Wenzhuo Ma,Yuantong Zhang,Daiqin Yang,Tianrun Chen,Deyi Ji,Yuxiao Jiang,Qi Zhu,Lanyun Zhu,Yuwen Pan,Runze Tian,Mingyu Shi,Zhanfeng Feng,Yuanfei Bao,Jiaming Guo,Renjing Pei,Xin Di,Long Peng,Linfeng Jiang,Xueyang Fu,Yang Cao,Zhengjun Zha,Choulhyouc Lee,Shyang-En Weng,Yi-Cheng Liao,Jorge Tyrakowski,Yu-Syuan Xu,Wei-Chen Chiu,Ching-Chun Huang,Yoonjin Im,Jihye Park,Hyungju Chun,Hyunhee Park,MinKyu Park,Xiaoxuan Yu,Jianxing Zhang,Yuxuan Jiang,Chengxi Zeng,Tianhao Peng,Fan Zhang,David Bull,Watchara Ruangsang,Supavadee Aramvith,JiaHao Deng,Wei Zhou,Hongyu Huang,Shaohui Lin,Zihan Wang,Yilin Chen,Yunchen Li,Junbo Qiao,Wei Li,Jiao Xie,Gaoqi He,Wenxi Li*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: NTIRE 2026移动端真实世界图像超分辨率挑战赛综述，关注在移动设备上实现高效4倍超分辨率，评估结合图像质量与速度指标


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推动移动设备上的真实世界图像超分辨率技术发展，解决未知退化条件下的高效超分辨率问题，平衡模型性能与移动端部署效率

Method: 挑战赛形式，要求参赛者设计能在移动设备上执行的网络架构，使用加权图像质量评估(IQA)分数和加速比作为评估指标

Result: 108个注册团队，16个团队获得有效分数，推动了移动端真实世界超分辨率性能提升，总结了该领域最新趋势

Conclusion: 该挑战赛促进了移动端真实世界图像超分辨率技术的发展，为高效网络设计提供了基准和方向

Abstract: This paper provides a review of the NTIRE 2026 challenge on mobile real-world image super-resolution, highlighting the proposed solutions and the resulting outcomes. The challenge aims to recover high-resolution (HR) images from low-resolution (LR) counterparts generated through unknown degradations with a x4 scaling factor while ensuring the models remain executable on mobile devices. The objective is to develop effective and efficient network designs or solutions that achieve state-of-the-art real-world image super-resolution performance. The track of the challenge evaluates performance using a weighted combination of image quality assessment (IQA) score and speedup ratios. The competition attracted 108 registrants, with 16 teams achieving a valid score in the final ranking. This collaborative effort advances the performance of mobile real-world image super-resolution while offering an in-depth overview of the latest trends in the field.

</details>


### [451] [Generalizable Face Forgery Detection via Separable Prompt Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17307)
*Enrui Yang,Yuezun Li*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出SePL方法，利用CLIP的文本模态指导深度伪造检测，通过可分离提示学习分离伪造相关与无关信息，在跨数据集评估中表现优异


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于CLIP的深度伪造检测方法主要依赖视觉编码器，忽视了文本模态的指导作用。文本模态具有指导性，可以通过精心设计来指导深度伪造检测

Method: 提出可分离提示学习策略(SePL)，通过两种类型的提示学习分离图像中的伪造相关信息和伪造无关信息。采用跨模态对齐策略和专门设计的损失函数来实现这种分离

Result: 在跨数据集和跨方法评估中，该方法取得了竞争性甚至优于其他方法的性能，显示出强大的泛化能力

Conclusion: 通过简单的适配，CLIP可以作为有效的面部伪造检测器，文本模态在深度伪造检测中具有重要指导价值

Abstract: Detecting face forgeries using CLIP has recently emerged as a promising and increasingly popular research direction. Owing to its rich visual knowledge acquired through large-scale pretraining, most existing methods typically rely on the visual encoder of CLIP, while paying limited attention to the text modality. Given the instructive nature of the text modality, we posit that it can be leveraged to instruct Deepfake detection with meticulous design. Accordingly, we shift the focus from the visual modality to the text modality and propose a new Separable Prompt Learning strategy (SePL) that enables CLIP to serve as an effective face forgery detector. The core idea of SePL is to disentangle forgery-specific and forgery-irrelevant information in images via two types of prompt learning, with the former enhancing detection. To achieve this disentangle, we describe a cross-modality alignment strategy and a set of dedicated objectives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that, with this simple adaptation, our method achieves competitive and even superior performance compared to other methods under both cross-dataset and cross-method evaluation, highlighting its strong generalizability. The codes have been released at https://github.com/OUC-YER/SePL-DeepfakeDetection

</details>


### [452] [Robust Diabetic Retinopathy Grading Using Dual-Resolution Attention-Based Deep Learning with Ordinal Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17341)
*Afshan Hashmi*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一个用于糖尿病视网膜病变分级的鲁棒双分辨率深度学习框架，通过注意力特征融合和有序回归提升跨数据集泛化能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变是全球视力损害的主要原因，深度学习模型在不同成像条件下的数据集之间部署时性能会下降，需要提高跨数据集泛化能力

Method: 使用两个并行EfficientNet主干网络在不同空间分辨率下运行，通过可学习注意力机制自适应融合多分辨率特征，采用基于累积链接模型的有序回归，结合预处理策略（圆形裁剪、对比度增强、直方图匹配）来减少域差异

Result: 在APTOS 2019验证集上达到0.88的二次加权kappa，在未见过的Messidor-2数据集上达到0.68，表明跨数据集DR分级应用的鲁棒性得到改善

Conclusion: 提出的双分辨率框架结合注意力融合和有序回归，能够有效提高糖尿病视网膜病变分级在跨数据集场景下的泛化性能和鲁棒性

Abstract: Diabetic retinopathy (DR) is a leading cause of vision impairment worldwide, and automated grading systems play a crucial role in large-scale screening programs. However, deep learning models often exhibit degraded performance when deployed across datasets acquired under different imaging conditions. This study presents a robust dual-resolution deep learning framework for DR grading that integrates attention-based feature fusion with ordinal regression to improve cross-dataset generalization. The proposed method employs two parallel EfficientNet backbones operating at different spatial resolutions to capture complementary retinal features. A learnable attention mechanism adaptively fuses multi-resolution representations, while an ordinal regression formulation based on the cumulative link model (CORAL) explicitly accounts for the ordered nature of DR severity levels. To mitigate domain discrepancies between datasets, a preprocessing strategy combining circular cropping, contrast enhancement, and histogram matching is applied. The model was trained on the APTOS 2019 dataset and evaluated on both an internal validation split and an external Messidor-2 test set. Experimental results demonstrate strong grading performance, achieving a quadratic weighted kappa (QWK) of 0.88 on the APTOS validation set and 0.68 on the unseen Messidor-2 dataset, indicating improved robustness for cross-dataset DR grading applications.

</details>


### [453] [HyKey: Hyperspectral Keypoint Detection and Matching in Minimally Invasive Surgery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17446)
*Alexander Saikia,Chiara Di Vece,Zhehua Mao,Sierra Bonilla,Chloe He,Joao Ramalhinho,Tobias Czempiel,Sophia Bano,Danail Stoyanov*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: HyKey：一种基于高光谱成像（HSI）的关键点检测与描述模型，用于微创手术中的3D重建，相比传统RGB方法在纹理贫乏的手术场景中表现更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微创手术中的3D重建对手术导航至关重要，但传统RGB方法在手术场景中面临纹理贫乏、光照复杂等挑战。本研究探索使用高光谱成像（HSI）是否能提供更好的关键点检测与匹配效果。

Method: 开发了HyKey模型，采用混合3D-2D卷积神经网络从HSI中联合提取空间-光谱特征。使用合成单应性增强和极几何约束进行训练，数据集为机器人采集的双摄像头RGB-HSI腹腔镜数据。

Result: HSI模型在配准的RGB帧上优于RGB基线方法，平均匹配准确率达到96.62%，姿态估计在10度误差下的平均准确率为67.18%，在多个评估指标上均表现一致提升。

Conclusion: 整合HSI的光谱信息为微创手术中的鲁棒单目3D重建提供了有前景的方法，通过增强光谱-空间特征区分能力解决了纹理贫乏手术环境的局限性。

Abstract: Purpose: 3D reconstruction in minimally invasive surgery (MIS) enables enhanced surgical guidance through improved visualisation, tool tracking, and augmented reality. However, traditional RGB-based keypoint detection and matching pipelines struggle with surgical challenges, such as poor texture and complex illumination. We investigate whether using snapshot hyperspectral imaging (HSI) can provide improved results on keypoint detection and matching surgical scenes. Methods: We developed HyKey, a HYperspectral KEYpoint detection and description model made up of a hybrid 3D-2D convolutional neural network that jointly extracts spatial-spectral features from HSI. The model was trained using synthetic homographic augmentation and epipolar geometry constraints on a robotically-acquired dual-camera RGB-HSI laparoscopic dataset of ex-vivo organs with calibrated camera poses. We benchmarked performance against established RGB-based methods, including SuperPoint and ALIKE. Results: Our HSI-based model outperformed RGB baselines on registered RGB frames, achieving 96.62% mean matching accuracy and 67.18% mean average accuracy at 10 degree on pose estimation, demonstrating consistent improvements across multiple evaluation metrics. Conclusion: Integrating spectral information from an HSI cube offers a promising approach for robust monocular 3D reconstruction in MIS, addressing limitations of texture-poor surgical environments through enhanced spectral-spatial feature discrimination. Our model and dataset are available at https://github.com/alexsaikia/HyKey-Hyperspectral-Keypoint-Detection

</details>


### [454] [Unveiling Deepfakes: A Frequency-Aware Triple Branch Network for Deepfake Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17477)
*Qihao Shen,Jiaxing Xuan,Zhenguang Liu,Sifan Wu,Yutong Xie,Zhaoyan Ming,Yingying Jiao,kui Ren*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一种用于深度伪造检测的三分支网络，联合学习空间和频率特征，通过互信息理论推导的特征解耦与融合损失来增强模型对任务相关特征的关注。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法通常只关注一个或少数几个特定频域，容易过拟合特定伪影，在面对多样伪造模式时鲁棒性不足。同时，不同特征往往关注相同的伪造区域，导致特征表示冗余，限制了提取线索的多样性，从而影响模型对多样化操作的泛化能力。

Method: 1) 提出三分支网络，联合捕获空间和频率特征，同时学习原始图像和不同频率通道重建的图像；2) 基于互信息理论数学推导特征解耦和融合损失，增强模型对原始图像和不同频率通道重建图像中任务相关特征的关注。

Result: 在六个大规模基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法始终达到最先进的性能。

Conclusion: 通过联合空间-频率特征学习和基于互信息的特征解耦与融合，有效提升了深度伪造检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Abstract: Advanced deepfake technologies are blurring the lines between real and fake, presenting both revolutionary opportunities and alarming threats. While it unlocks novel applications in fields like entertainment and education, its malicious use has sparked urgent ethical and societal concerns ranging from identity theft to the dissemination of misinformation. To tackle these challenges, feature analysis using frequency features has emergedas a promising direction for deepfake detection. However, oneaspect that has been overlooked so far is that existing methodstend to concentrate on one or a few specific frequency domains,which risks overfitting to particular artifacts and significantlyundermines their robustness when facing diverse forgery patterns. Another underexplored aspect we observe is that different features often attend to the same forged region, resulting in redundant feature representations and limiting the diversity of the extracted clues. This may undermine the ability of a model to capture complementary information across different facets, thereby compromising its generalization capability to diverse manipulations. In this paper, we seek to tackle these challenges from two aspects: (1) we propose a triple-branch network that jointly captures spatial and frequency features by learning from both original image and image reconstructed by different frequency channels, and (2) we mathematically derive feature decoupling and fusion losses grounded in the mutual information theory, which enhances the model to focus on task-relevant features across the original image and the image reconstructed by different frequency channels. Extensive experiments on six large-scale benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code is released at https://github.com/injooker/Unveiling Deepfake.

</details>


### [455] [Voronoi-guided Bilateral 2D Gaussian Splatting for Arbitrary-Scale Hyperspectral Image Super-Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17727)
*Jie Zhang,Jinkun You,Shi Chen,Yicong Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出GaussianHSI框架，基于高斯泼溅实现任意尺度高光谱图像超分辨率，结合Voronoi引导的双边2D高斯泼溅进行空间重建和光谱细节增强模块。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高光谱图像超分辨率方法通常需要针对不同尺度进行修改，缺乏灵活性。2D高斯泼溅提供连续表示，但现有方法依赖光栅化策略，限制了灵活的空间建模。扩展到高光谱图像超分辨率仍具挑战，需要在保持光谱保真度的同时实现自适应空间重建。

Method: 提出GaussianHSI框架：1) Voronoi引导的双边2D高斯泼溅进行空间重建，通过Voronoi引导选择将目标像素与相关高斯函数关联，然后使用参考感知双边权重聚合；2) 光谱细节增强模块改进光谱重建。

Result: 在基准数据集上的大量实验表明，GaussianHSI在任意尺度高光谱图像超分辨率方面优于最先进的方法。

Conclusion: GaussianHSI为高光谱图像超分辨率提供了一种灵活有效的框架，能够实现任意尺度重建，同时保持空间和光谱质量。

Abstract: Most existing hyperspectral image super-resolution methods require modifications for different scales, limiting their flexibility in arbitrary-scale reconstruction. 2D Gaussian splatting provides a continuous representation that is compatible with arbitrary-scale super-resolution. Existing methods often rely on rasterization strategies, which may limit flexible spatial modeling. Extending them to hyperspectral image super-resolution remains challenging, as the task requires adaptive spatial reconstruction while preserving spectral fidelity. This paper proposes GaussianHSI, a Gaussian-Splatting-based framework for arbitrary-scale hyperspectral image super-resolution. We develop a Voronoi-Guided Bilateral 2D Gaussian Splatting for spatial reconstruction. After predicting a set of Gaussian functions to represent the input, it associates each target pixel with relevant Gaussian functions through Voronoi-guided selection. The target pixel is then reconstructed by aggregating the selected Gaussian functions with reference-aware bilateral weighting, which considers both geometric relevance and consistency with low-resolution features. We further introduce a Spectral Detail Enhancement module to improve spectral reconstruction. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of GaussianHSI over state-of-the-art methods for arbitrary-scale hyperspectral image super-resolution.

</details>


### [456] [View-Consistent 3D Scene Editing via Dual-Path Structural Correspondense and Semantic Continuity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17801)
*Pufan Li,Bi'an Du,Shenghe Zheng,Junyi Yao,Wei Hu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出基于分布视角的多视角一致3D场景编辑框架，通过显式建模跨视角依赖关系和双路径一致性机制解决编辑中的视角不一致问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于渲染-编辑-优化的3D场景编辑方法存在严重的跨视角不一致问题，虽然已有方法引入几何线索、跨视角交互或视频先验，但仍主要依赖推理时同步，在鲁棒性和泛化性上受限

Method: 1) 从分布视角重新定义多视角一致3D编辑为跨视角联合分布建模；2) 提出显式引入跨视角依赖关系的编辑框架；3) 设计双路径一致性机制：投影引导的结构指导和补丁级语义传播；4) 构建配对多视角编辑数据集提供监督信号

Result: 实验表明该方法在复杂场景中实现了卓越的编辑性能，能够生成精确且视角一致的编辑结果

Conclusion: 通过分布视角重新定义3D编辑问题并引入跨视角依赖建模，结合双路径一致性机制，能够有效解决多视角编辑中的一致性问题

Abstract: Text-driven 3D scene editing has recently attracted increasing attention. Most existing methods follow a render-edit-optimize pipeline, where multi-view images are rendered from a 3D scene, edited with 2D image editors, and then used to optimize the underlying 3D representation. However, cross-view inconsistency remains a major bottleneck. Although recent methods introduce geometric cues, cross-view interactions, or video priors to mitigate this issue, they still largely rely on inference-time synchronization and thus remain limited in robustness and generalization.In this work, we recast multi-view consistent 3D editing from a distributional perspective: 3D scene editing essentially requires a joint distribution modeling across viewpoints.Based on this insight, we propose a view-consistent 3D editing framework that explicitly introduces cross-view dependencies into the editing process. Furthermore, motivated by the observation that structural correspondence and semantic continuity rely on different cross-view cues, we introduce a dual-path consistency mechanism consisting of projection-guided structural guidance and patch-level semantic propagation for effective cross-view editing. Further, we construct a paired multi-view editing dataset that provides reliable supervision for learning cross-view consistency in edited scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior editing performance with precise and consistent views for complex scenes.

</details>


### [457] [AnyLift: Scaling Motion Reconstruction from Internet Videos via 2D Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17818)
*Hongjie Li,Heng Yu,Jiaman Li,Hong-Xing Yu,Ehsan Adeli,C. Karen Liu,Jiajun Wu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出两阶段框架，利用2D扩散模型从网络视频重建3D人体运动和人物交互，解决动态相机下全局一致性和罕见动作类型重建难题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在动态相机下难以恢复全局一致的3D运动，特别是对于当前运动捕捉数据集中代表性不足的运动类型，同时在3D中恢复连贯的人物交互面临额外困难

Method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段从网络视频提取2D关键点合成多视角2D运动数据；第二阶段训练相机条件多视角2D运动扩散模型，在特定领域合成数据上恢复世界空间中的3D人体运动和3D人物交互

Result: 在体操等挑战性运动网络视频和野外人物交互视频上验证有效性，优于先前工作，能产生更真实的人体运动和人物交互

Conclusion: 提出的两阶段2D扩散框架能有效从网络视频重建3D人体运动和人物交互，特别适用于罕见动作类型和动态相机场景

Abstract: Reconstructing 3D human motion and human-object interactions (HOI) from Internet videos is a fundamental step toward building large-scale datasets of human behavior. Existing methods struggle to recover globally consistent 3D motion under dynamic cameras, especially for motion types underrepresented in current motion-capture datasets, and face additional difficulty recovering coherent human-object interactions in 3D. We introduce a two-stage framework leveraging 2D diffusion that reconstructs 3D human motion and HOI from Internet videos. In the first stage, we synthesize multi-view 2D motion data for each domain, leveraging 2D keypoints extracted from Internet videos to incorporate human motions that rarely appear in existing MoCap datasets. In the second stage, a camera-conditioned multi-view 2D motion diffusion model is trained on the domain-specific synthetic data to recover 3D human motion and 3D HOI in the world space. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on Internet videos featuring challenging motions such as gymnastics, as well as in-the-wild HOI videos, and show that it outperforms prior work in producing realistic human motion and human-object interaction.

</details>


### [458] [PCM-NeRF: Probabilistic Camera Modeling for Neural Radiance Fields under Pose Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17831)
*Shravan Venkatraman,Rakesh Raj Madavan,Pavan Kumar Sathya Venkatesh*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: PCM-NeRF：一种概率框架，通过可学习的相机位姿不确定性增强神经表面重建，解决SfM位姿估计不准确问题，无需修改渲染流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经表面重建方法通常假设相机位姿是准确的SfM结果，但实际应用中位姿估计往往存在误差，导致重建结果扭曲或不完整。需要一种能处理不完美位姿估计的方法。

Method: 基于SG-NeRF构建概率框架，将每个相机位姿表示为具有可学习均值和方差的分布，方差初始化为SfM对应质量。通过不确定性正则化损失将学习方差与视图置信度耦合，不确定性直接调节有效位姿学习率：不确定相机获得阻尼梯度更新，防止初始化差的视图破坏重建。

Result: 在具有严重位姿异常值的挑战性场景实验中，PCM-NeRF在Chamfer Distance和F-Score方面持续优于最先进方法，特别是在几何复杂结构上，且不需要前景掩码。

Conclusion: PCM-NeRF通过轻量级概率框架有效处理相机位姿不确定性，提高了神经表面重建的鲁棒性和准确性，无需修改渲染流程且计算开销可忽略。

Abstract: Neural surface reconstruction methods typically treat camera poses as fixed values, assuming perfect accuracy from Structure-from-Motion (SfM) systems. This assumption breaks down with imperfect pose estimates, leading to distorted or incomplete reconstructions. We present PCM-NeRF, a probabilistic framework that augments neural surface reconstruction with per-camera learnable uncertainty, built on top of SG-NeRF. Rather than treating all cameras equally throughout optimization, we represent each pose as a distribution with a learnable mean and variance, initialized from SfM correspondence quality. An uncertainty regularization loss couples the learned variance to view confidence, and the resulting uncertainty directly modulates the effective pose learning rate: uncertain cameras receive damped gradient updates, preventing poorly initialized views from corrupting the reconstruction. This lightweight mechanism requires no changes to the rendering pipeline and adds negligible overhead. Experiments on challenging scenes with severe pose outliers demonstrate that PCM-NeRF consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both Chamfer Distance and F-Score, particularly for geometrically complex structures, without requiring foreground masks.

</details>


### [459] [AI Approach for MRI-only Full-Spine Vertebral Segmentation and 3D Reconstruction in Paediatric Scoliosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17846)
*Nathasha Naranpanawa,Maree T. Izatt,Robert D. Labrom,Geoffrey N. Askin,J. Paige Little*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出AI框架，从MRI自动生成胸腰椎3D重建，避免儿童脊柱畸形评估中的电离辐射


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MRI在儿科成像中优于CT（无电离辐射），但脊柱畸形评估缺乏自动化高分辨率3D骨重建，仍依赖CT。MRI重建因手动流程和标记数据集稀缺而不实用

Method: 使用GAN将历史低剂量CT扫描转换为MRI样图像，结合现有标记的胸椎MRI数据训练U-Net模型，实现胸腰椎自动分割和3D重建

Result: 算法准确生成连续胸腰椎3D重建，分割准确率达88% Dice分数，处理时间从约1小时缩短至1分钟以内，保留AIS畸形特征

Conclusion: 该方法实现无辐射的MRI 3D畸形评估，支持儿科脊柱护理的临床评估、手术规划和导航

Abstract: MRI is preferred over CT in paediatric imaging because it avoids ionising radiation, but its use in spine deformity assessment is largely limited by the lack of automated, high-resolution 3D bony reconstruction, which continues to rely on CT. MRI-based 3D reconstruction remains impractical due to manual workflows and the scarcity of labelled full-spine datasets. This study introduces an AI framework that enables fully automated thoracolumbar spine (T1-L5) segmentation and 3D reconstruction from MRI alone. Historical low-dose CT scans from adolescent idiopathic scoliosis (AIS) patients were converted into MRI-like images using a GAN and combined with existing labelled thoracic MRI data to train a U-Net-based model. The resulting algorithm accurately generated continuous thoracolumbar 3D reconstructions, improved segmentation accuracy (88% Dice score), and reduced processing time from approximately 1 hour to under one minute, while preserving AIS-specific deformity features. This approach enables radiation-free 3D deformity assessment from MRI, supporting clinical evaluation, surgical planning, and navigation in paediatric spine care.

</details>


### [460] [Exploring Boundary-Aware Spatial-Frequency Fusion for Camouflaged Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17879)
*Song Yu,Yang Hu,Haokang Ding,Zhifang Liao,Yucheng Song*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出BASFNet框架，通过边界感知的频域和空域特征融合来解决伪装目标检测问题，在三个基准数据集上优于现有方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前伪装目标检测方法主要依赖空域边缘提取和局部像素信息，忽视了全局结构特征的重要性，且未能有效利用频域特征中的相位谱信息

Method: 提出BASFNet框架，采用频域和空域特征的双重引导融合，包括基于相位谱的频率增强边缘探索模块(FEEM)、空间核心分割模块(SCSM)和空间频率融合交互模块(SFFIM)，并通过边界感知训练策略进一步优化边界检测

Result: BASFNet在三个基准数据集上优于现有的最先进方法，验证了频域和空域信息融合在伪装目标检测任务中的有效性

Conclusion: 频域和空域特征的融合对于解决伪装目标检测问题具有重要价值，提出的BASFNet框架通过有效的特征融合机制显著提升了检测性能

Abstract: Camouflaged Object Detection is challenging due to the high degree of similarity between camouflaged objects and their surrounding backgrounds. Current COD methods mainly rely on edge extraction in the spatial domain and local pixel-level information, neglecting the importance of global structural features. Additionally, they fail to effectively leverage the importance of phase spectrum information within frequency domain features. To this end, we propose a COD framework BASFNet based on boundary-aware frequency domain and spatial domain fusion.This method uses dual guided integration of frequency domain and spatial domain features. A phase-spectrum-based frequency-enhanced edge exploration module (FEEM) and a spatial core segmentation module (SCSM) are introduced to jointly capture the boundary and object features of camouflaged objects. These features are then effectively integrated through a spatial-frequency fusion interaction module (SFFIM). Furthermore, the boundary detection is further optimized through an boundary-aware training strategy. BASFNet outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods on three benchmark datasets, validating the effectiveness of the fusion of frequency and spatial domain information in COD tasks.

</details>


### [461] [MU-GeNeRF: Multi-view Uncertainty-guided Generalizable Neural Radiance Fields for Distractor-aware Scene](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17965)
*Wenjie Mu,Zhan Li,Chuanzhou Su,Xuanyi Shen,Ziniu Liu,Fan Lu,Yujian Mo,Junqiao Zhao,Tiantian Feng,Chen Ye,Guang Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: MU-GeNeRF：一种多视角不确定性引导的干扰物感知通用神经辐射场框架，通过源视角和目标视角不确定性分解来抑制动态干扰物，提升稀疏视角下的场景重建质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用神经辐射场（GeNeRFs）在稀疏视角下能实现高质量场景重建，但现实场景中的瞬态干扰物会破坏跨视角结构一致性，导致监督信号被污染和重建质量下降。现有方法依赖逐场景优化，从单视角重建误差估计不确定性，这对GeNeRFs不可靠，且常将不一致的静态结构误判为干扰物。

Method: 提出MU-GeNeRF框架，将干扰物感知分解为两个互补的不确定性分量：1）源视角不确定性，捕捉由视角变化或动态因素引起的源视图间结构差异；2）目标视角不确定性，检测目标图像中由瞬态干扰物引起的观测异常。通过异方差重建损失结合这两种不确定性，自适应调节监督信号。

Result: 大量实验表明，该方法不仅超越了现有GeNeRFs，而且达到了与场景特定干扰物去除NeRFs相当的性能。

Conclusion: MU-GeNeRF通过多视角不确定性引导的干扰物感知机制，有效解决了GeNeRF在瞬态干扰物存在下的鲁棒建模挑战，实现了更稳健的干扰物抑制和几何建模。

Abstract: Generalizable Neural Radiance Fields (GeNeRFs) enable high-quality scene reconstruction from sparse views and can generalize to unseen scenes. However, in real-world settings, transient distractors break cross-view structural consistency, corrupting supervision and degrading reconstruction quality. Existing distractor-free NeRF methods rely on per-scene optimization and estimate uncertainty from per-view reconstruction errors, which are not reliable for GeNeRFs and often misjudge inconsistent static structures as distractors. To this end, we propose MU-GeNeRF, a Multi-view Uncertainty-guided distractor-aware GeNeRF framework designed to alleviate GeNeRF's robust modeling challenges in the presence of transient distractions. We decompose distractor awareness into two complementary uncertainty components: Source-view Uncertainty, which captures structural discrepancies across source views caused by viewpoint changes or dynamic factors; and Target-view Uncertainty, which detects observation anomalies in the target image induced by transient distractors.These two uncertainties address distinct error sources and are combined through a heteroscedastic reconstruction loss, which guides the model to adaptively modulate supervision, enabling more robust distractor suppression and geometric modeling.Extensive experiments show that our method not only surpasses existing GeNeRFs but also achieves performance comparable to scene-specific distractor-free NeRFs.

</details>


### [462] [Towards Symmetry-sensitive Pose Estimation: A Rotation Representation for Symmetric Object Classes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18208)
*Andreas Kriegler,Csaba Beleznai,Margrit Gelautz*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出SARR表示法，通过修改三角函数恒等式来编码对称物体的旋转，解决姿态估计中的对称性歧义问题，在T-LESS和ITODD数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 日常和工业中对称物体普遍存在，但其固有的方向歧义性阻碍了姿态估计深度学习网络的训练。现有方法需要设计特定损失函数、网络架构或使用对称不变评估指标，而本文关注旋转本身的数值表示。

Method: 提出SARR（对称感知旋转表示）方法，基于物体形状的对称度修改三角函数恒等式，获得对称物体的规范（对称解析）姿态。使用标准CNN进行3D方向估计，无需3D模型，仅需深度或纹理缺失的RGB/灰度图像作为输入。

Result: 在T-LESS和ITODD数据集上，使用对称敏感的余弦距离AR_C评估时优于现有方法，使用传统对称不变度量时也达到满意性能。SARR训练的网络优于使用旋转矩阵、欧拉角、四元数、标准三角函数或6d表示训练的网络。

Conclusion: SARR表示法能有效处理对称物体的姿态估计问题，提供连续且唯一的旋转表示，即使在没有先验对称性知识的情况下也能保持良好性能。

Abstract: Symmetric objects are common in daily life and industry, yet their inherent orientation ambiguities that impede the training of deep learning networks for pose estimation are rarely discussed in the literature. To cope with these ambiguities, existing solutions typically require the design of specific loss functions and network architectures or resort to symmetry-invariant evaluation metrics. In contrast, we focus on the numeric representation of the rotation itself, modifying trigonometric identities with the degrees of symmetry derived from the objects' shapes. We use our representation, SARR, to obtain canonic (symmetry-resolved) poses for the symmetric objects in two popular 6D pose estimation datasets, T-LESS and ITODD, where SARR is unique and continuous w.r.t. the visual appearance. This allows us to use a standard CNN for 3D orientation estimation whose performance is evaluated with the symmetry-sensitive cosine distance $\text{AR}_{\text{C}}$. Our networks outperform the state of the art using $\text{AR}_{\text{C}}$ and achieve satisfactory performance when using conventional symmetry-invariant measures. Our method does not require any 3D models but only depth, or, as part of an additional experiment, texture-less RGB/grayscale images as input. We also show that networks trained on SARR outperform the same networks trained on rotation matrices, Euler angles, quaternions, standard trigonometrics or the recently popular 6d representation -- even in inference scenarios where no prior knowledge of the objects' symmetry properties is available. Code and a visualization toolkit are available at https://github.com/akriegler/SARR .

</details>


### [463] [Style-Based Neural Architectures for Real-Time Weather Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18251)
*Hamed Ouattara,Pascal Houssam Salmane,Pierre Duthon,Frédéric Bernardin,Omar Ait Aider*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了三种用于天气条件实时分类的神经网络架构，基于风格迁移思想，包括多尺度PatchGAN、截断ResNet50和带Gram矩阵与注意力的截断ResNet50变体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从图像中实时分类天气条件（晴天、雨、雪、雾），利用风格迁移技术捕捉图像中的风格元素，解决传统方法难以捕捉细微风格特征的问题。

Method: 1. Multi-PatchGAN：基于PatchGAN的多尺度版本，适应检测任务；2. Truncated ResNet50：通过进化算法确定保留前9层的简化版本，提取高频特征；3. Truncated ResNet50 with Gram Matrix and Attention：计算各层Gram矩阵并通过注意力机制加权，优化风格特征提取。

Result: 后两种模型在多个公共数据库上超越了现有技术水平，表现出卓越的泛化能力，适用于天气检测及其他外观分类任务。

Conclusion: 提出的架构不仅适用于天气检测，还可扩展到动物识别、纹理分类、医学影像疾病检测和工业缺陷识别等外观分类任务。

Abstract: In this paper, we present three neural network architectures designed for real-time classification of weather conditions (sunny, rain, snow, fog) from images. These models, inspired by recent advances in style transfer, aim to capture the stylistic elements present in images. One model, called "Multi-PatchGAN", is based on PatchGANs used in well-known architectures such as Pix2Pix and CycleGAN, but here adapted with multiple patch sizes for detection tasks. The second model, "Truncated ResNet50", is a simplified version of ResNet50 retaining only its first nine layers. This truncation, determined by an evolutionary algorithm, facilitates the extraction of high-frequency features essential for capturing subtle stylistic details. Finally, we propose "Truncated ResNet50 with Gram Matrix and Attention", which computes Gram matrices for each layer during training and automatically weights them via an attention mechanism, thus optimizing the extraction of the most relevant stylistic expressions for classification. These last two models outperform the state of the art and demonstrate remarkable generalization capability on several public databases. Although developed for weather detection, these architectures are also suitable for other appearance-based classification tasks, such as animal species recognition, texture classification, disease detection in medical imaging, or industrial defect identification.

</details>


### [464] [OmniHuman: A Large-scale Dataset and Benchmark for Human-Centric Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18326)
*Lei Zhu,Xing Cai,Yingjie Chen,Yiheng Li,Binxin Yang,Hao Liu,Jie Chen,Chen Li,Jing LYu*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: OmniHuman是一个大规模多场景数据集，专注于细粒度人类建模，包含分层标注（视频级场景、帧级交互、个体级属性），并建立了OHBench评估系统，用于人类中心音频视频合成的科学诊断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音频视频联合生成模型在复杂真实物理场景中生成高保真人类中心视频仍面临挑战，主要原因是现有数据集在三个维度存在结构缺陷：全局场景和相机多样性有限、交互建模稀疏、个体属性对齐不足。

Method: 1. 开发全自动流水线进行高质量数据收集和多模态标注；2. 构建OmniHuman数据集，提供分层标注（视频级场景、帧级交互、个体级属性）；3. 建立OHBench评估系统，包含三级评估指标，引入与人类感知高度一致的度量标准。

Result: 提出了OmniHuman数据集和OHBench评估系统，填补了现有基准在全局场景、关系交互和个体属性方面的诊断空白，为人类中心音频视频合成提供了更全面的评估框架。

Conclusion: OmniHuman数据集和OHBench评估系统解决了现有音频视频生成模型在复杂真实场景中的人类建模缺陷，通过分层标注和感知一致的度量标准，为人类中心内容生成提供了更好的数据基础和评估工具。

Abstract: Recent advancements in audio-video joint generation models have demonstrated impressive capabilities in content creation. However, generating high-fidelity human-centric videos in complex, real-world physical scenes remains a significant challenge. We identify that the root cause lies in the structural deficiencies of existing datasets across three dimensions: limited global scene and camera diversity, sparse interaction modeling (both person-person and person-object), and insufficient individual attribute alignment. To bridge these gaps, we present OmniHuman, a large-scale, multi-scene dataset designed for fine-grained human modeling. OmniHuman provides a hierarchical annotation covering video-level scenes, frame-level interactions, and individual-level attributes. To facilitate this, we develop a fully automated pipeline for high-quality data collection and multi-modal annotation. Complementary to the dataset, we establish the OmniHuman Benchmark (OHBench), a three-level evaluation system that provides a scientific diagnosis for human-centric audio-video synthesis. Crucially, OHBench introduces metrics that are highly consistent with human perception, filling the gaps in existing benchmarks by providing a comprehensive diagnosis across global scenes, relational interactions, and individual attributes.

</details>


### [465] [One-Step Diffusion with Inverse Residual Fields for Unsupervised Industrial Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18393)
*Boan Zhang,Wen Li,Guanhua Yu,Xiyang Liu,Wenchao Chen,Long Tian*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出OSD-IRF方法，通过单步扩散和逆残差场实现工业异常检测，在保持SOTA性能的同时实现2倍推理加速


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型在无监督工业异常检测中表现优异，但其迭代去噪特性导致推理速度慢。需要一种既能保持高性能又能加速推理的方法。

Method: 1) 在正常数据上训练无条件的DDPM；2) 基于训练好的噪声函数估计测试样本的噪声；3) 预测逆残差场(IRF)；4) 在IRF空间评估高斯概率密度进行异常检测。关键发现是异常在IRF空间变得可区分。

Result: 在三个广泛使用的uIAD基准测试中，在六个指标上达到SOTA或竞争性性能，同时实现约2倍的推理加速（无需蒸馏）。

Conclusion: OSD-IRF通过单步扩散和逆残差场，在保持扩散模型优异性能的同时显著提升推理速度，为工业异常检测提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: Diffusion models have achieved outstanding performance in unsupervised industrial anomaly detection (uIAD) by learning a manifold of normal data under the common assumption that off-manifold anomalies are harder to generate, resulting in larger reconstruction errors in data space or lower probability densities in the tractable latent space. However, their iterative denoising and noising nature leads to slow inference. In this paper, we propose OSD-IRF, a novel one-step diffusion with inverse residual fields, to address this limitation for uIAD task. We first train a deep diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) on normal data without any conditioning. Then, for a test sample, we predict its inverse residual fields (IRF) based on the noise estimated by the well-trained parametric noise function of the DDPM. Finally, uIAD is performed by evaluating the probability density of the IRF under a Gaussian distribution and comparing it with a threshold. Our key observation is that anomalies become distinguishable in this IRF space, a finding that has seldom been reported in prior works. Moreover, OSD-IRF requires only single step diffusion for uIAD, thanks to the property that IRF holds for any neighboring time step in the denoising process. Extensive experiments on three widely used uIAD benchmarks show that our model achieves SOTA or competitive performance across six metrics, along with roughly a 2X inference speedup without distillation.

</details>


### [466] [Structured 3D-SVD: A Practical Framework for the Compression and Reconstruction of Biological Volumetric Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16947)
*Mario Aragonés Lozano,Oscar Romero,Antonio León*

Main category: eess.IV

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出Structured 3D-SVD框架，用于生物体积数据的重建、压缩和分析，基于矩阵SVD逻辑扩展到三维，在计算效率和重建质量上优于传统方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物体积数据（如鱼和大脑的完整扫描）处理需要高效的重建和压缩方法。传统方法如Tucker分解计算成本高，而CPD在精度上有限。需要一种既能保持重建质量又计算高效的方法。

Method: 受矩阵奇异值分解（SVD）启发，将三维体积数据在空间域表示，支持通过有序准奇异系数进行渐进式重建。该方法扩展了SVD逻辑到三维数据。

Result: 在两个生物体积数据集上测试：鱼的全体积扫描和大脑扫描。Structured 3D-SVD重建质量接近Tucker分解但计算时间更短，在准确性和运行时间上都优于CPD。渐进重建分析显示较低截断水平即可保留主要体积结构，更高截断水平可获得更详细重建。

Conclusion: Structured 3D-SVD是处理生物体积数据的实用框架，在重建质量和计算效率之间取得了良好平衡，为生物医学成像分析提供了有效工具。

Abstract: This work introduces Structured 3D-SVD as a practical framework for the reconstruction, compression, and analysis of biological volumetric data. Inspired by the logic of matrix singular value decomposition (SVD), the proposed approach represents third-order volumetric data in the spatial domain and supports progressive reconstruction through ordered quasi-singular coeffients. The experimental evaluation was carried out on two biological volumetric datasets: one full-volume scan of a fish and another of a brain. The results show that Structured 3D-SVD achieves reconstruction quality close to that of Tucker decomposition while requiring shorter computation times and outperforms canonical polyadic decomposition (CPD) in both accuracy and runtime. In addition, a progressive reconstruction analysis shows that relatively low truncation levels are sufficient to preserve the main volumetric structures, while higher truncation levels lead to more detailed reconstructions.

</details>


### [467] [Relative State Estimation using Event-Based Propeller Sensing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18289)
*Ravi Kumar Thakur,Luis Granados Segura,Jan Klivan,Radim Špetlík,Tobiáš Vinklárek,Matouš Vrba,Martin Saska*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出基于事件相机的四旋翼无人机相对状态估计框架，通过检测和跟踪螺旋桨事件流来估计频率和姿态，实现多机器人系统的去中心化相对定位。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多无人机自主集群需要准确快速的相对状态估计。传统单目相机方法在理想条件下表现良好，但速度慢、存在尺度模糊问题，且在视觉挑战条件下表现不佳。事件相机具有低延迟、高动态范围和微秒级时间分辨率，为解决这些问题提供了可能。

Method: 1) 通过检测和跟踪事件流中的螺旋桨提取感兴趣区域；2) 将区域事件流按时间块处理，估计每个螺旋桨的频率；3) 频率测量作为推力输入驱动运动学状态估计模块；4) 相机位置测量提供更新步骤；5) 利用事件流几何原语（椭圆拟合）估计四旋翼姿态。

Result: 在五个真实世界户外飞行序列的测试数据集上，螺旋桨频率估计误差低于3%，为多机器人系统提供了基于事件相机的去中心化相对定位方法。

Conclusion: 该框架利用事件相机特性实现了准确的四旋翼相对状态估计，克服了传统视觉方法的局限性，为多无人机系统提供了有效的去中心化定位解决方案。

Abstract: Autonomous swarms of multi-Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) system requires an accurate and fast relative state estimation. Although monocular frame-based camera methods perform well in ideal conditions, they are slow, suffer scale ambiguity, and often struggle in visually challenging conditions. The advent of event cameras addresses these challenging tasks by providing low latency, high dynamic range, and microsecond-level temporal resolution. This paper proposes a framework for relative state estimation for quadrotors using event-based propeller sensing. The propellers in the event stream are tracked by detection to extract the region-of-interests. The event streams in these regions are processed in temporal chunks to estimate per-propeller frequencies. These frequency measurements drive a kinematic state estimation module as a thrust input, while camera-derived position measurements provide the update step. Additionally, we use geometric primitives derived from event streams to estimate the orientation of the quadrotor by fitting an ellipse over a propeller and backprojecting it to recover body-frame tilt-axis. The existing event-based approaches for quadrotor state estimation use the propeller frequency in simulated flight sequences. Our approach estimates the propeller frequency under 3% error on a test dataset of five real-world outdoor flight sequences, providing a method for decentralized relative localization for multi-robot systems using event camera.

</details>


### [468] [Multilevel neural networks with dual-stage feature fusion for human activity recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16577)
*Abeer FathAllah Brery,Ascensión Gallardo-Antolín,Israel Gonzalez-Carrasco,Mahmoud Fakhry*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于人类活动识别（HAR）的两级网络架构，采用双阶段特征融合（晚期融合和中间融合），通过评估15种不同网络配置，证明双融合策略优于仅用晚期融合的基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类活动识别（HAR）中，神经网络（如CNN、LSTM及其混合模型）已展现出优异性能。开发多级混合模型需要战略性地整合多个网络以发挥其互补优势，而组件的结构安排是影响整体性能的关键因素。

Method: 提出一种新颖的两级网络架构框架，包含双阶段特征融合：1）晚期融合（结合第一级网络输出），2）中间融合（整合第一级和第二级的特征）。评估了15种不同的CNN、LSTM和卷积LSTM网络架构，比较了包含晚期融合与同时包含晚期和中间融合的配置。

Result: 在两个公共基准数据集上的实验评估表明，同时包含晚期和中间融合的架构比仅依赖晚期融合的架构获得更高准确率。最优配置超越了基线模型，验证了其在HAR中的有效性。

Conclusion: 双阶段特征融合（晚期融合+中间融合）的两级网络架构在人类活动识别任务中表现优异，通过有效整合不同网络层的特征信息，提升了识别准确率。

Abstract: Human activity recognition (HAR) refers to the process of identifying human actions and activities using data collected from sensors. Neural networks, such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs), long short-term memory (LSTM) networks, convolutional LSTM, and their hybrid combinations, have demonstrated exceptional performance in various research domains. Developing a multilevel individual or hybrid model for HAR involves strategically integrating multiple networks to capitalize on their complementary strengths. The structural arrangement of these components is a critical factor influencing the overall performance. This study explores a novel framework of a two-level network architecture with dual-stage feature fusion: late fusion, which combines the outputs from the first network level, and intermediate fusion, which integrates the features from both the first and second levels. We evaluated $15$ different network architectures of CNNs, LSTMs, and convolutional LSTMs, incorporating late fusion with and without intermediate fusion, to identify the optimal configuration. Experimental evaluation on two public benchmark datasets demonstrates that architectures incorporating both late and intermediate fusion achieve higher accuracy than those relying on late fusion alone. Moreover, the optimal configuration outperforms baseline models, thereby validating its effectiveness for HAR.

</details>


### [469] [LAGS: Low-Altitude Gaussian Splatting with Groupwise Heterogeneous Graph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16910)
*Yikun Wang,Yujie Wan,Wei Zuo,Shuai Wang,Yik-Chung Wu,Chengzhong Xu,Huseyin Arslan*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 提出GW-HGNN图神经网络方法，用于低空高斯泼溅技术中的资源分配，通过建模图像组对重建过程的非均匀贡献，平衡数据保真度和传输成本，显著提升渲染质量并降低计算延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有低空资源分配方案在低空高斯泼溅（LAGS）场景中效率低下，因为它们没有考虑不同视角引入的图像多样性，而LAGS优先考虑最大化重建质量而非通信吞吐量。

Method: 提出分组异构图神经网络（GW-HGNN），将LAGS损失和通信约束转化为图学习成本，进行双层次消息传递，显式建模不同图像组对重建过程的非均匀贡献。

Result: 在真实LAGS数据集上，GW-HGNN在PSNR、SSIM和LPIPS等关键渲染指标上显著优于现有基准方法，同时计算延迟比广泛使用的MOSEK求解器降低约100倍，达到毫秒级推理速度。

Conclusion: GW-HGNN有效解决了LAGS资源分配问题，通过图学习方法平衡重建质量和传输效率，实现了实时部署的可行性。

Abstract: Low-altitude Gaussian splatting (LAGS) facilitates 3D scene reconstruction by aggregating aerial images from distributed drones. However, as LAGS prioritizes maximizing reconstruction quality over communication throughput, existing low-altitude resource allocation schemes become inefficient. This inefficiency stems from their failure to account for image diversity introduced by varying viewpoints. To fill this gap, we propose a groupwise heterogeneous graph neural network (GW-HGNN) for LAGS resource allocation. GW-HGNN explicitly models the non-uniform contribution of different image groups to the reconstruction process, thus automatically balancing data fidelity and transmission cost. The key insight of GW-HGNN is to transform LAGS losses and communication constraints into graph learning costs for dual-level message passing. Experiments on real-world LAGS datasets demonstrate that GW-HGNN significantly outperforms state-of-the-art benchmarks across key rendering metrics, including PSNR, SSIM, and LPIPS. Furthermore, GW-HGNN reduces computational latency by approximately 100x compared to the widely-used MOSEK solver, achieving millisecond-level inference suitable for real-time deployment.

</details>


### [470] [A Comparative Evaluation of Geometric Accuracy in NeRF and Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18205)
*Mikolaj Zielinski,Eryk Vykysaly,Bartlomiej Biesiada,Jan Baturo,Mateusz Capala,Dominik Belter*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个专注于几何精度的神经渲染方法评估流程和基准，包含19个多样化场景，用于系统评估重建方法的表面和形状保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前神经渲染方法虽然发展迅速，但标准计算机视觉指标主要评估生成图像的视觉质量，往往忽略了表面几何的保真度。这一局限在机器人学中尤为关键，因为准确的几何对于抓取和物体操作等任务至关重要。

Method: 提出了一个专注于几何精度的神经渲染方法评估流程，并构建了一个包含19个多样化场景的基准数据集。该方法能够系统评估重建方法在表面和形状保真度方面的表现。

Result: 开发了一个完整的评估框架，能够补充传统的视觉指标，为神经渲染方法的几何重建质量提供系统化的评估标准。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了神经渲染评估中几何精度评估的空白，为机器人应用等需要精确几何信息的领域提供了重要的评估工具。

Abstract: Recent advances in neural rendering have introduced numerous 3D scene representations. Although standard computer vision metrics evaluate the visual quality of generated images, they often overlook the fidelity of surface geometry. This limitation is particularly critical in robotics, where accurate geometry is essential for tasks such as grasping and object manipulation. In this paper, we present an evaluation pipeline for neural rendering methods that focuses on geometric accuracy, along with a benchmark comprising 19 diverse scenes. Our approach enables a systematic assessment of reconstruction methods in terms of surface and shape fidelity, complementing traditional visual metrics.

</details>


### [471] [Positioning radiata pine branches requiring pruning by drone stereo vision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16480)
*Yida Lin,Bing Xue,Mengjie Zhang,Sam Schofield,Richard Green*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于立体视觉的无人机系统，用于检测和定位辐射松树枝以支持自主修剪。系统包含两个阶段：分支分割和深度估计，比较了多种分割和深度估计算法，证明了低成本立体视觉在林业自动化中的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 林业自动化修剪需要精确的树枝检测和定位。传统方法成本高且效率低，需要开发基于低成本立体视觉的自动化系统来支持林业管理。

Method: 1. 分支分割：比较YOLOv8、YOLOv9和Mask R-CNN变体在71对立体图像上的性能
2. 深度估计：评估传统方法（SGBM+WLS滤波）和深度学习方法（PSMNet、ACVNet、GWCNet等）
3. 定位算法：提出基于质心的三角测量算法，采用MAD异常值剔除来计算分支距离

Result: 在1-2米距离的定性评估中，基于深度学习的视差图比传统SGBM方法产生更一致的深度估计，证明了低成本立体视觉在林业自动化分支定位中的可行性。

Conclusion: 该研究展示了基于立体视觉的无人机系统在林业自动化修剪中的潜力，深度学习方法的深度估计效果优于传统方法，为低成本林业自动化提供了可行方案。

Abstract: This paper presents a stereo-vision-based system mounted on a drone for detecting and localising radiata pine branches to support autonomous pruning. The proposed pipeline comprises two stages: branch segmentation and depth estimation. For segmentation, YOLOv8, YOLOv9, and Mask R-CNN variants are compared on a custom dataset of 71 stereo image pairs captured with a ZED Mini camera. For depth estimation, both a traditional method (SGBM with WLS filtering) and deep-learning-based methods (PSMNet, ACVNet, GWCNet, MobileStereoNet, RAFT-Stereo, and NeRF-Supervised Deep Stereo) are evaluated. A centroid-based triangulation algorithm with MAD outlier rejection is proposed to compute branch distance from the segmentation mask and disparity map. Qualitative evaluation at distances of 1-2 m indicates that the deep learning-based disparity maps produce more coherent depth estimates than SGBM, demonstrating the feasibility of low-cost stereo vision for automated branch positioning in forestry.

</details>


### [472] [An Uncertainty-Aware Loss Function Incorporating Fuzzy Logic: Application to MRI Brain Image Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16490)
*Hanuman Verma,Akshansh Gupta,Pranabesh Maji,Saurav Mandal,Vijay Kumar Pandey*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出一种结合模糊逻辑的新型损失函数，用于处理脑部MRI图像分割中的不确定性，在IBSR和OASIS数据集上使用U-Net和U-Net++架构验证了其优于传统分类交叉熵损失的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑部图像分割在神经疾病诊断和医学图像计算中至关重要，但现有深度学习方法在处理分割不确定性方面存在不足。传统损失函数无法有效处理像素分类中的固有不确定性，需要一种能够整合模糊逻辑来处理这些不确定性的新损失函数。

Method: 提出一种新型损失函数，将传统的分类交叉熵损失与基于模糊逻辑的模糊熵相结合。该损失函数通过模糊逻辑处理像素分类中的不确定性，在U-Net和U-Net++架构上进行评估，使用IBSR和OASIS两个公开基准数据集进行验证。

Result: 实验结果表明，使用提出的损失函数训练的模型在多种性能指标上优于使用分类交叉熵优化的模型。该损失函数不仅提高了分割性能，还能有效处理训练过程中的不确定性，增强了模型预测的可靠性。

Conclusion: 提出的结合模糊逻辑的损失函数能够有效处理脑部图像分割中的不确定性，提高分割精度和模型可靠性，为医学图像分割领域提供了新的优化方法。

Abstract: Accurate brain image segmentation, particularly for distinguishing various tissues from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) images, plays a pivotal role in finding the neurological dis ease and medical image computing. In deep learning approaches, loss functions are very crucial for optimizing the model. In this study, we introduce a novel loss function integrating fuzzy logic to deals uncertainty issues in brain image segmentation into various tissues. It integrates the well-known categorical cross-entropy (CCE) loss function and fuzzy entropy based on fuzzy logic. By employing fuzzy logic, this loss function accounts for the inherent uncertainties in pixel classifications. The proposed loss function has been evaluated on two publicly available benchmark datasets, IBSR and OASIS, using two widely recognised architectures, U-Net and U-Net++. Experimental results demonstrate that the trained model with proposed loss function provided better results in comparison to the CCE optimisation function in terms of various performance metrics. Additionally, it effectively enhances segmentation performance while handling meaningful uncer tainty during training. The findings suggest that this approach not only improves segmentation outcomes but also contributes to the reliability of model predictions.

</details>


### [473] [Semantically Stable Image Composition Analysis via Saliency and Gradient Vector Flow Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16500)
*Armin Dadras,Robert Sablatnig,Franziska Proksa,Markus Seidl*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: VFCNet提出了一种基于视觉注意力流和几何结构的低层表示方法，通过融合显著性和边缘信息到梯度向量流场中，实现了照片构图计算评估的SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可靠评估照片构图需要既对空间布局有判别性又对语义内容鲁棒的特征。传统方法往往受语义内容干扰，本文假设构图可以理解为视觉注意力在几何结构上的流动。

Method: 提出VFCNet模型：1) 将显著性和边缘信息融合到梯度向量流(GVF)场中；2) 计算双流GVF表示；3) 通过注意力机制整合；4) 使用DINOv3骨干网络提取多尺度流特征。

Result: 在PICD基准测试上达到SOTA：CDA-1: 0.683，CDA-2: 0.629，分别比之前最佳方法提升33.1%和36.1%。同时发现，简单的分类器在自监督DINOv3特征上显著优于专门的构图模型。

Conclusion: 基于视觉注意力流和几何结构的低层表示能有效评估照片构图，且自监督视觉特征在构图任务上表现出色，表明通用视觉表示对构图评估有重要价值。

Abstract: The reliable computational assessment of photographic composition requires features that are discriminative of spatial layout yet robust to semantic content. This paper proposes a low-level representation grounded in the assumption that composition can be understood as the flow of visual attention across geometric structure. We introduce VFCNet, which fuses saliency and edge information into a gradient vector flow (GVF) field. The model computes dual-stream GVF representations, integrates them via attention, and extracts multi-scale flow features with a DINOv3 backbone. VFCNet achieves state-of-the-art performance on the PICD benchmark (CDA-1: 0.683, CDA-2: 0.629), improving by 33.1\% and 36.1\% over the previous best method. We also show that a simple classifier on self-supervised DINOv3 features substantially outperforms more sophisticated, composition-specialized models. Code is available at https://github.com/ADadras/VFCNet

</details>


### [474] [Medial Axis Aware Learning of Signed Distance Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16512)
*Samuel Weidemaier,Christoph Norden-Smoch,Martin Rumpf*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出一种变分方法，通过显式考虑SDF梯度的跳跃集（即表面的中轴），使用高阶变分公式计算点云的全局符号距离函数，采用相场近似实现计算可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在计算点云的全局符号距离函数时，往往难以准确处理梯度的不连续性（即中轴），导致全局精度不足。本文旨在开发一种能显式考虑中轴结构的高精度SDF计算方法。

Method: 1) 提出高阶变分公式，显式考虑SDF梯度的跳跃集（中轴），沿梯度方向施加线性增长约束；2) 将Eikonal方程和SDF零水平集作为约束条件；3) 采用Ambrosio-Tortorelli型相场近似使变分问题可计算；4) 使用神经网络近似SDF和相场函数；5) 针对无定向点云表面实现。

Result: 实验表明该方法在近场和全局都能达到高精度。与其他方法的定量和定性比较显示，所提方法在SDF计算准确性方面具有优势，特别是在处理中轴相关的不连续性时表现更好。

Conclusion: 通过显式考虑中轴结构并使用相场近似的高阶变分方法，能够有效计算点云的高精度全局符号距离函数，为几何处理和计算机视觉应用提供了更准确的SDF表示。

Abstract: We propose a novel variational method to compute a highly accurate global signed distance function (SDF) to a given point cloud. To this end, the jump set of the gradient of the SDF, which coincides with the medial axis of the surface, is explicitly taken into account through a higher-order variational formulation that enforces linear growth along the gradient direction away from this discontinuity set. The eikonal equation and the zero-level set of the SDF are enforced as constraints. To make this variational problem computationally tractable, a phase field approximation of Ambrosio-Tortorelli type is employed. The associated phase field function implicitly describes the medial axis. The method is implemented for surfaces represented by unoriented point clouds using neural network approximations of both the SDF and the phase field. Experiments demonstrate the method's accuracy both in the near field and globally. Quantitative and qualitative comparisons with other approaches show the advantages of the proposed method.

</details>


### [475] [Fast Online 3D Multi-Camera Multi-Object Tracking and Pose Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16522)
*Linh Van Ma,Tran Thien Dat Nguyen,Moongu Jeon*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出一种使用多个单目相机进行3D多目标跟踪和姿态估计的快速在线方法，仅需2D边界框和姿态检测，无需3D训练数据或计算昂贵的深度学习模型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决3D多目标跟踪和姿态估计中需要昂贵3D训练数据和计算密集型深度学习模型的问题，开发一种更高效、更实用的解决方案

Method: 基于贝叶斯最优多目标跟踪滤波器的高效实现，仅使用公开可用的预训练2D检测模型，支持多相机系统在间歇性断开/重连情况下的鲁棒运行

Result: 算法在保持准确性的同时显著快于现有最先进方法，在多个相机间歇性断开/重连的场景下表现出鲁棒性能

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一种高效、实用的3D多目标跟踪和姿态估计解决方案，无需3D训练数据，计算效率高，适用于实际应用场景

Abstract: This paper proposes a fast and online method for jointly performing 3D multi-object tracking and pose estimation using multiple monocular cameras. Our algorithm requires only 2D bounding box and pose detections, eliminating the need for costly 3D training data or computationally expensive deep learning models. Our solution is an efficient implementation of a Bayes-optimal multi-object tracking filter, enhancing computational efficiency while maintaining accuracy. We demonstrate that our algorithm is significantly faster than state-of-the-art methods without compromising accuracy, using only publicly available pre-trained 2D detection models. We also illustrate the robust performance of our algorithm in scenarios where multiple cameras are intermittently disconnected or reconnected during operation.

</details>


### [476] [A B-Spline Function Based 3D Point Cloud Unwrapping Scheme for 3D Fingerprint Recognition and Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16546)
*Mohammad Mogharen Askarin,Jiankun Hu,Min Wang,Xuefei Yin,Xiuping Jia*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种将3D指纹点云展开为灰度图像的方法，通过B样条曲线拟合减少高度变化和配准限制，然后使用传统2D指纹识别方法进行识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D指纹识别相比传统2D系统具有接触式、卫生安全、防欺骗等优势，并能捕捉深度、曲率和形状信息。然而，指纹像素的高度变化使得脊谷模式提取困难，配准问题限制了采集过程的一致性。

Method: 使用B样条曲线拟合展开3D指纹点云，减少高度变化和配准限制；将展开后的点云通过相对高度映射转换为灰度图像；最后使用传统2D指纹识别方法进行识别。

Result: 在三个实验中分别达到0.2072%、0.26%和0.22%的等错误率，优于现有方法；在跨会话实验中，包含不同配准的指纹时达到1.50%的EER，优于3D指纹展平技术。

Conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了3D指纹识别中的高度变化和配准问题，实现了优越的识别性能，为3D指纹识别系统提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) fingerprint recognition and identification offer several advantages over traditional two-dimensional (2D) recognition systems. The contactless nature of 3D fingerprints enhances hygiene and security, reducing the risk of contamination and spoofing. In addition to surface ridge and valley patterns, 3D fingerprints capture depth, curvature, and shape information, enabling the development of more precise and robust authentication systems. Despite recent advancements, significant challenges remain. The topological height of fingerprint pixels complicates the extraction of ridge and valley patterns. Furthermore, registration issues limit the acquisition process, requiring consistent direction and orientation across all samples. To address these challenges, this paper introduces a method that unwraps 3D fingerprints, represented as 3D point clouds, using B-spline curve fitting to mitigate height variation and reduce registration limitations. The unwrapped point cloud is then converted into a grayscale image by mapping the relative heights of the points. This grayscale image is subsequently used for recognition through conventional 2D fingerprint identification methods. The proposed approach demonstrated superior performance in 3D fingerprint recognition, achieving Equal Error Rates (EERs) of 0.2072%, 0.26%, and 0.22% across three experiments, outperforming existing methods. Additionally, the method surpassed 3D fingerprint flattening technique in both recognition and identification during cross-session experiments, achieving an EER of 1.50% when fingerprints with varying registrations were included.

</details>


### [477] [Incoherent Deformation, Not Capacity: Diagnosing and Mitigating Overfitting in Dynamic Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16747)
*Ahmad Droby*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 动态3D高斯泼溅方法在单目视频上训练视角PSNR表现良好但泛化能力差，研究发现主要原因是变形场不连贯而非参数数量过多


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态3D高斯泼溅方法在单目视频上表现出明显的训练-测试性能差距，需要深入理解这种过拟合现象的根本原因，以改进方法的泛化能力

Method: 通过系统消融实验分析自适应密度控制流程，发现分裂操作是性能差距的主要原因；引入弹性能量正则化（EER）对每个高斯的变形场施加局部平滑约束；还评估了GAD（损失率感知的密度阈值）和PTDrop（抖动加权高斯丢弃）等正则化方法

Result: 1）分裂操作导致80%以上的性能差距；2）EER将性能差距减少40.8%，同时使高斯云增长85%；3）EER将平均应变减少99.72%；4）GAD+EER组合将差距减少48%，加上PTDrop和软增长上限达到57%；5）方法在不同变形架构和真实单目视频场景中均有效

Conclusion: 动态3D高斯泼溅中的过拟合主要由不连贯的变形引起，而非参数数量。通过变形场正则化可以显著改善泛化性能，这为动态3D重建方法提供了重要的设计指导

Abstract: Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting methods achieve strong training-view PSNR on monocular video but generalize poorly: on the D-NeRF benchmark we measure an average train-test PSNR gap of 6.18 dB, rising to 11 dB on individual scenes. We report two findings that together account for most of that gap.
  Finding 1 (the role of splitting). A systematic ablation of the Adaptive Density Control pipeline (split, clone, prune, frequency, threshold, schedule) shows that splitting is responsible for over 80% of the gap: disabling split collapses the cloud from 44K to 3K Gaussians and the gap from 6.18 dB to 1.15 dB. Across all threshold-varying ablations, gap is log-linear in count (r = 0.995, bootstrap 95% CI [0.99, 1.00]), which suggests a capacity-based explanation.
  Finding 2 (the role of deformation coherence). We show that the capacity explanation is incomplete. A local-smoothness penalty on the per-Gaussian deformation field -- Elastic Energy Regularization (EER) -- reduces the gap by 40.8% while growing the cloud by 85%. Measuring per-Gaussian strain directly on trained checkpoints, EER reduces mean strain by 99.72% (median 99.80%) across all 8 scenes; on 8/8 scenes the median Gaussian under EER is less strained than the 1st-percentile (best-behaved) Gaussian under baseline. Alongside EER, we evaluate two further regularizers: GAD, a loss-rate-aware densification threshold, and PTDrop, a jitter-weighted Gaussian dropout. GAD+EER reduces the gap by 48%; adding PTDrop and a soft growth cap reaches 57%. We confirm that coherence generalizes to (a) a different deformation architecture (Deformable-3DGS, +40.6% gap reduction at re-tuned lambda), and (b) real monocular video (4 HyperNeRF scenes, reducing the mean PSNR gap by 14.9% at the same lambda as D-NeRF, with near-zero quality cost). The overfitting in dynamic 3DGS is driven by incoherent deformation, not parameter count.

</details>


### [478] [Rethinking Cross-Dose PET Denoising: Mitigating Averaging Effects via Residual Noise Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16925)
*Yichao Liu,Zongru Shao,Yueyang Teng,Junwen Guo*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种统一的残差噪声学习框架，用于低剂量正电子发射断层扫描（LDPET）的跨剂量去噪，通过直接估计噪声而非预测全剂量图像来改善泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在低剂量PET去噪中，针对特定剂量水平训练的神经网络往往无法泛化到其他剂量条件，因为噪声幅度和统计特性存在差异。传统的"一刀切"模型试图处理这种变异性，但倾向于学习跨噪声水平的平均表示，导致性能下降。

Method: 提出了一个统一的残差噪声学习框架，该框架直接从低剂量PET图像中估计噪声，而不是预测全剂量图像。该方法分析了标准训练公式隐式优化异质噪声分布的期望的局限性，并提出了相应的解决方案。

Result: 在两个医疗中心的大规模多剂量PET数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法优于"一刀切"模型、个体剂量特定的U-Net模型和剂量条件方法，实现了改进的去噪性能。

Conclusion: 残差噪声学习有效地减轻了平均效应，并增强了跨剂量PET去噪的泛化能力。这些结果表明，直接估计噪声的方法比预测完整图像的方法更有效。

Abstract: Cross-dose denoising for low-dose positron emission tomography (LDPET) has been proposed to address the limited generalization of models trained at a single noise level. In practice, neural networks trained on a specific dose level often fail to generalize to other dose conditions due to variations in noise magnitude and statistical properties. Conventional "one-size-for-all" models attempt to handle this variability but tend to learn averaged representations across noise levels, resulting in degraded performance. In this work, we analyze this limitation and show that standard training formulations implicitly optimize an expectation over heterogeneous noise distributions. To this end, we propose a unified residual noise learning framework that estimates noise directly from low-dose PET images rather than predicting full-dose images. Experiments on large-scale multi-dose PET datasets from two medical centers demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the "one-size-for-all" model, individual dose-specific U-Net models, and dose-conditioned approaches, achieving improved denoising performance. These results indicate that residual noise learning effectively mitigates the averaging effect and enhances generalization for cross-dose PET denoising.

</details>


### [479] [Adaptive receptive field-based spatial-frequency feature reconstruction network for few-shot fine-grained image classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16936)
*Linyue Zhang,Wenyi Zeng,Zicheng Pan,Yongsheng Gao,Changming Sun,Jun Hu,Lixian Liu,Weichuan Zhang,Tuo Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出ARF-SFR-Net网络，通过自适应感受野选择机制，融合空间和频率特征进行小样本细粒度图像分类


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于特征的小样本细粒度图像分类方法面临的主要挑战是如何为不同类别输入图像选择合适的感受野大小来提取特征描述符（包括空间和频率特征），以更好地执行分类任务

Method: 提出自适应感受野的空间-频率特征重建网络（ARF-SFR-Net），能够自适应确定获取空间和频率特征的感受野大小，并有效融合它们进行重建和分类任务。该网络可嵌入到给定的episodic训练机制中进行端到端训练

Result: 在多个小样本细粒度图像分类基准测试上的广泛实验证明了ARF-SFR-Net的有效性和优越性，优于最先进的方法

Conclusion: ARF-SFR-Net通过自适应感受野选择和空间-频率特征融合，有效解决了小样本细粒度图像分类中的特征提取挑战

Abstract: Feature reconstruction techniques are widely applied for few-shot fine-grained image classification (FSFGIC). Our research indicates that one of the main challenges facing existing feature-based FSFGIC methods is how to choose the size of the receptive field to extract feature descriptors (including spatial and frequency feature descriptors) from different category input images, thereby better performing the FSFGIC tasks. To address this, an adaptive receptive field-based spatial-frequency feature reconstruction network (ARF-SFR-Net) is proposed. The designed ARF-SFR-Net has the capability to adaptively determine receptive field sizes for obtaining spatial and frequency features, and effectively fuse them for reconstruction and FSFGIC tasks. The designed ARF-SFR-Net can be easily embedded into a given episodic training mechanism for end-to-end training from scratch. Extensive experiments on multiple FSFGIC benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed ARF-SFR-Net over state-of-the-art approaches. The code is available at: https://github.com/ICL-SUST/ARF-SFR-Net.git.

</details>


### [480] [Hyperspectral Unmixing Hierarchies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16969)
*Joseph L. Garrett,P. S. Vishnu,Pauliina Salmi,Daniela Lupu,Nitesh Kumar Singh,Ion Necoara,Tor Arne Johansen*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于高光谱图像解混的层次化方法BLUTHs，通过深度非负矩阵分解和层次丰度约束来解决光谱变异性、端元数量确定和端元清晰度问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高光谱图像解混面临三个主要挑战：1）光谱变异性影响解混性能；2）端元数量确定方法不明确；3）端元数量增加时端元清晰度下降。层次结构被提出作为解决这三个问题的可能方案。

Method: 提出BLUTHs（二元线性解混触觉层次）方法，通过在深度非负矩阵分解上施加层次丰度和约束，使用简单网络架构解决层次解混问题。通过稀疏调制解混增长为每个场景定制BLUTH的拓扑结构。

Result: BLUTHs在实验室场景中超越了最先进的解混算法，特别是在丰度估计方面，在遥感场景中性能保持竞争力。还在HYPSO和PACE卫星的高光谱场景中展示了海洋颜色解混能力。

Conclusion: 层次解混通过BLUTHs方法有效解决了高光谱解混的三个关键挑战，特别是缓解了光谱变异性问题，并在实验室和遥感场景中都表现出优越性能。

Abstract: Unmixing reveals the spatial distribution and spectral details of different constituents, called endmembers, in a hyperspectral image. Because unmixing has limited ground truth requirements, can accommodate mixed pixels, and is closely tied to light propagation, it is a uniquely powerful tool for analyzing hyperspectral images. However, spectral variability inhibits unmixing performance, the proper way to determine the number of endmembers is ambiguous, and the clarity of the endmembers degrades as more are included. Hierarchical structure is a possible solution to all three problems.
  Here, hierarchical unmixing is defined by imposing a hierarchical abundance sum constraint on Deep Nonnegative Matrix Factorization. Binary Linear Unmixing Tactile Hierarchies (BLUTHs) solve the hierarchical unmixing problem with a simple network architecture. Sparsity modulation unmixing growth tailors the topology of a BLUTH to each scene. The structure imposed by BLUTHs allows endmembers with varying levels of spectral contrast to be revealed, mitigating the challenge of spectral variability.
  The performance of BLUTHs exceeds state-of-the-art unmixing algorithms on laboratory scenes, particularly with regard to abundance estimation, while their performance remains competitive on remote sensing scenes. In addition, ocean color unmixing by BLUTHs is demonstrated on hyperspectral scenes from the HYPSO and PACE satellites.

</details>


### [481] [UGD: An Unsupervised Geometric Distance for Evaluating Real-world Noisy Point Cloud Denoising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16976)
*Zhiyong Su,Jincan Wu,Yonghui Liu,Zheng Li,Weiqing Li*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于点云去噪的无监督几何距离评估指标UGD，仅需噪声点云即可量化评估去噪效果，无需干净点云作为参考。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有点云去噪评估方法需要干净点云作为参考，这在真实场景中往往不可得。需要一种仅基于噪声点云的无监督评估方法。

Method: 1) 从干净点云学习补丁级先验模型（高斯混合模型）；2) 设计补丁级特征提取网络；3) 通过多任务自监督训练框架（质量排序、失真分类、失真分布预测）训练网络；4) 将去噪点云与先验模型的距离定义为UGD。

Result: 在合成噪声实验中，UGD与有监督全参考指标性能相当；在真实数据实验中，UGD能够仅基于噪声点云实现无监督评估。

Conclusion: UGD为点云去噪提供了一种有效的无监督评估方法，解决了真实场景中缺乏干净参考点云的问题。

Abstract: Point cloud denoising is a fundamental and crucial challenge in real-world point cloud applications. Existing quantitative evaluation metrics for point cloud denoising methods are implemented in a supervised manner, which requires both the denoised point cloud and the corresponding ground-truth clean point cloud to compute a representative geometric distance. This requirement is highly problematic in real-world scenarios, where ground-truth clean point clouds are often unavailable. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective unsupervised geometric distance (UGD) for real-world noisy point cloud denoising, calculated solely from noisy point clouds. The core idea of UGD is to learn a patch-wise prior model from a set of clean point clouds and then employ this prior model as the ground-truth to quantify the degradation by measuring the geometric variations of the denoised point cloud. To this end, we first learn a pristine Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) with extracted patch-wise quality-aware features from a set of pristine clean point clouds by a patch-wise feature extraction network, which serves as the ground-truth for the quantitative evaluation. Then, the UGD is defined as the weighted sum of distances between each patch of the denoised point cloud and the learned pristine GMM model in the patch space. To train the employed patch-wise feature extraction network, we propose a self-supervised training framework through multi-task learning, which includes pair-wise quality ranking, distortion classification, and distortion distribution prediction. Quantitative experiments with synthetic noise confirm that the proposed UGD achieves comparable performance to supervised full-reference metrics. Moreover, experimental results on real-world data demonstrate that the proposed UGD enables unsupervised evaluation of point cloud denoising methods based exclusively on noisy point clouds.

</details>


### [482] [Adverse-to-the-eXtreme Panoptic Segmentation: URVIS 2026 Study and Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16984)
*Yiting Wang,Nolwenn Peyratout,Tim Brodermann,Jiahui Wang,Yusi Cao,Michele Cazzola,Elie Tarassov,Takuya Kobayashi,Abderrahim Kasmi,Guillaume Allibert,Cédric Demonceaux,Valentina Donzella,Kurt Debattista,Radu Timofte,Zongwei Wu,Christos Sakaridis*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: URVIS 2026挑战赛报告：首个恶劣至极端天气下的全景分割竞赛，基于MUSES多传感器数据集，采用加权全景质量(wPQ)作为评估指标，吸引了17个团队参与。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决自动驾驶等实际应用中，在恶劣天气条件下（如雨、雪、雾）进行鲁棒的全景分割的挑战。现有方法在极端天气下性能显著下降，需要开发更稳健的多模态感知系统。

Method: 基于MUSES多传感器数据集（RGB相机、LiDAR、雷达、事件相机），设计加权全景质量(wPQ)作为公平评估指标，组织挑战赛让参与者提交解决方案。

Result: 挑战赛吸引了17个注册团队和47个提交，4个团队进入最终阶段。报告总结了基准测试结果，分析了提交方法的性能，揭示了多模态融合在恶劣天气下的优势。

Conclusion: 该挑战赛推动了恶劣天气下全景分割的研究，展示了多模态方法的潜力，但仍存在传感器融合、极端天气适应等挑战需要进一步解决。

Abstract: This paper presents the report of the URVIS 2026 challenge on adverse-to-extreme panoptic segmentation. As the first challenge of its kind, it attracted 17 registered participants and 47 submissions, with 4 teams reaching the final phase. The challenge is based on the MUSES dataset, a multi-sensor benchmark for panoptic segmentation in adverse-to-extreme weather, including RGB frame camera, LiDAR, radar, and event camera data. Weighted Panoptic Quality (wPQ) is designed and adopted as the official ranking metric for fair evaluation across weather conditions. In this report, we summarise the challenge setting and benchmark results, analyse the performance of the submitted methods, and discuss current progress and remaining challenges for robust multimodal panoptic segmentation. Link: https://urvis-workshop.github.io/challenge-Muses.html

</details>


### [483] [CAM3DNet: Comprehensively mining the multi-scale features for 3D Object Detection with Multi-View Cameras](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17024)
*Mingxi Pang,Dingheng Wang,Zekun Li,Zhenping Sun,Bo Wang,Zhihang Wang,Zhao-Xu Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: CAM3DNet是一个基于稀疏查询的3D目标检测框架，通过复合查询、自适应自注意力和多尺度混合采样三个新模块，有效利用多尺度时空信息进行3D目标检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于查询的多视角图像3D目标检测方法难以有效利用动态多尺度信息，对象特征与查询几何关系学习不足，直接探索多尺度时空特征成本过高。

Method: 提出CAM3DNet框架，包含三个核心模块：1) 复合查询模块通过多尺度投影将2D查询转换为3D空间；2) 自适应自注意力模块学习多尺度查询间的时空交互；3) 多尺度混合采样模块利用可变形注意力机制，结合多尺度查询、金字塔特征图和2D相机先验知识采样对象信息。

Result: 在nuScenes、Waymo和Argoverse基准数据集上的实验表明，CAM3DNet优于大多数现有的基于相机的3D目标检测方法，并通过消融研究验证了各模块的有效性。

Conclusion: CAM3DNet通过创新的稀疏查询框架有效解决了多尺度信息利用问题，在3D目标检测任务上取得了优越性能。

Abstract: Query-based 3D object detection methods using multi-view images often struggle to efficiently leverage dynamic multi-scale information, e.g., the relationship between the object features and the geometric of the queries are not sufficiently learned, directly exploring the multi-scale spatiotemporal features will pay too many costs. To address these challenges, we propose CAM3DNet, a novel sparse query-based framework which combines three new modules, composite query (CQ), adaptive self-attention (ASA), and multi-scale hybrid sampling (MSHS). First, the core idea in the CQ module is a multi-scale projection strategy to transform 2D queries into 3D space. Second, the ASA module learns the interactions between the spatiotemporal multi-scale queries. Third, the MSHS module uses the deformable attention mechanism to sample multi-scale object information by considering multi-scales queries, pyramid feature maps, and 2D-camera prior knowledge. The entire model employs a backbone network and a feature pyramid network (FPN) as the encoder, then introduces a YOLOX and a DepthNet as a ROI\_Head to produce CQ, and repeatedly utilizes ASA and MSHS as the decoder to gain detection features. Extensive experiments on the nuScenes, Waymo, and Argoverse benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our CAM3DNet, and most existing camera-based 3D object detection methods are outperformed. Besides, we make comprehensive ablation studies to check the individual effect of CQ, ASA, and MSHS, as well as their cost of space and computation complexity.

</details>


### [484] [A Real-Time Bike-Pedestrian Safety System with Wide-Angle Perception and Evaluation Testbed for Urban Intersections](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17046)
*Mehmet Kerem Turkcan*

Main category: cs.CV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 开发了一个基于边缘设备的实时自行车-行人碰撞预警系统，使用鱼眼摄像头在30fps下运行，通过鱼眼校准、目标检测、运动预测和决策层设计，在符合性测试中达到93.3%敏感度和92.3%特异性，平均预警时间3.3秒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 城市交叉口自行车与行人碰撞事故持续发生，但现有系统很少尝试使用商用硬件为未装备设备的道路使用者提供实时预警。需要开发一个能在单一边缘设备上运行的实时碰撞预警系统。

Method: 1) 开发超宽鱼眼镜头校准流程，通过透视重映射和直接束调整解决角点检测失败和优化器发散问题；2) 结合鱼眼感知目标检测和通过预计算查找表的闭式地面投影；3) 设计时符合性仿真，包含24个脚本危险场景、随机尺寸感知检测失败和延迟扫描；4) 将决策层形式化为可分离、可审计的测试台，具有明确的部署门控、可争议机制和剩余风险登记。

Result: 在鱼眼定位误差的符合性测试中，选定管道配置达到93.3%的敏感度和92.3%的特异性，平均预警预算为3.3秒。系统设计通过社区辅助设计研讨会获得反馈。

Conclusion: 成功开发了一个基于边缘设备的实时自行车-行人碰撞预警系统原型，能够在商用硬件上以30fps运行，提供有效的碰撞预警。系统具有可审计的决策层和社区参与的设计过程。

Abstract: Collisions between cyclists and pedestrians at urban intersections remain a persistent source of injuries, yet few systems attempt real-time warnings to unequipped road users using commodity hardware. We present a prototype collision warning system that runs on a single edge device with a wide-angle fisheye camera, producing audible and visual alerts at 30\,fps. The system makes four contributions. First, we develop a calibration pipeline for ultra-wide fisheye lenses that overcomes corner-detection failure and optimizer divergence through perspective remapping and direct bundle adjustment. Second, we combine fisheye-aware object detection with a closed-form ground-plane projection via a precomputed lookup table.
