We evaluate LLM-AUG on two representative tasks: modulation classification and interference classification using the RadioML 2016.10A dataset, and the Interference Classification (IC) dataset respectively. Results show that LLM-AUG consistently outperforms traditional augmentation and deep generative baselines across low-shot settings and reaches near oracle performance using only 15% labeled data. LLM-AUG further demonstrates improved robustness under distribution shifts, yielding a 29.4% relative gain over diffusion-based augmentation at a lower SNR value. On the RadioML and IC datasets, LLM-AUG yields a relative gain of 67.6% and 35.7% over the diffusion-based baseline. The t-SNE visualizations further validate that synthetic samples generated by better preserve class structure in the embedding space, leading to more consistent and informative augmentations. These results demonstrate that LLMs can serve as effective and practical data augmenters for wireless machine learning, enabling robust and data-efficient learning in evolving wireless environments.

</details>


### [883] [Does "Do Differentiable Simulators Give Better Policy Gradients?'' Give Better Policy Gradients?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18161)
*Ku Onoda,Paavo Parmas,Manato Yaguchi,Yutaka Matsuo*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了策略梯度强化学习中不连续动态导致的梯度估计偏差问题，提出了两种轻量级解决方案：DDCG（用于检测不连续区域并切换估计器）和IVW-H（用于稳定方差的每步逆方差加权方法）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在策略梯度强化学习中，可微分模型能够提供一阶梯度估计，加速学习过程。然而，不连续动态会导致偏差，削弱一阶估计器的效果。先前工作通过构建REINFORCE零阶估计器的置信区间来检测不连续性，但REINFORCE估计器噪声大，需要任务特定的超参数调优，样本效率低。本文旨在探究这种偏差是否是主要障碍，以及需要哪些最小化修复措施。

Method: 1. 重新审视先前工作中的标准不连续设置，提出DDCG（Discontinuity Detection and Gradient Correction）——一种轻量级测试方法，在不平滑区域切换估计器，仅需单个超参数。
2. 在可微分机器人控制任务中，提出IVW-H（Inverse-Variance Weighting per-Horizon）——一种每步逆方差实现方法，无需显式不连续检测即可稳定方差。

Result: DDCG在受控研究中表现出鲁棒性能，在小样本情况下仍保持可靠。IVW-H在可微分机器人控制任务中产生强大结果。研究发现，虽然估计器切换在受控研究中提高了鲁棒性，但在实际部署中，仔细的方差控制往往更为关键。

Conclusion: 不连续动态导致的偏差确实是策略梯度强化学习中的一个重要问题，但通过轻量级的估计器切换（DDCG）和方差稳定技术（IVW-H）可以有效解决。在实际应用中，方差控制比不连续检测更为关键，这为改进强化学习算法的鲁棒性和效率提供了新方向。

Abstract: In policy gradient reinforcement learning, access to a differentiable model enables 1st-order gradient estimation that accelerates learning compared to relying solely on derivative-free 0th-order estimators. However, discontinuous dynamics cause bias and undermine the effectiveness of 1st-order estimators. Prior work addressed this bias by constructing a confidence interval around the REINFORCE 0th-order gradient estimator and using these bounds to detect discontinuities. However, the REINFORCE estimator is notoriously noisy, and we find that this method requires task-specific hyperparameter tuning and has low sample efficiency. This paper asks whether such bias is the primary obstacle and what minimal fixes suffice. First, we re-examine standard discontinuous settings from prior work and introduce DDCG, a lightweight test that switches estimators in nonsmooth regions; with a single hyperparameter, DDCG achieves robust performance and remains reliable with small samples. Second, on differentiable robotics control tasks, we present IVW-H, a per-step inverse-variance implementation that stabilizes variance without explicit discontinuity detection and yields strong results. Together, these findings indicate that while estimator switching improves robustness in controlled studies, careful variance control often dominates in practical deployments.

</details>


### [884] [Attraction, Repulsion, and Friction: Introducing DMF, a Friction-Augmented Drifting Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18194)
*Arkadii Kazanskii,Tatiana Petrova,Konstantin Bagrianskii,Aleksandr Puzikov,Radu State*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 论文提出DMF（带摩擦的漂移模型），通过引入线性调度的摩擦系数改进漂移场训练，解决了原始方法中存在的局部排斥问题和均衡可识别性问题，在计算效率上显著优于最优流匹配方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原始漂移模型训练存在两个未解决的问题：1）漂移场迭代在双粒子代理模型中存在局部排斥区域；2）漂移场消失（V_{p,q}≡0）不能保证学习分布q与目标分布p匹配。需要解决这些理论缺陷并提升模型性能。

Method: 提出DMF（Drifting Model with Friction），在漂移场训练中引入线性调度的摩擦系数，推导了代理模型的收缩阈值，证明了有限时间范围内的误差轨迹边界。在高斯核下证明了漂移场均衡的可识别性：在任何开集上漂移场消失都会强制q=p。

Result: DMF在FFHQ成人到儿童域转换任务上匹配或超越了最优流匹配的性能，同时训练计算量降低了16倍。理论分析解决了原始方法的两个开放性问题。

Conclusion: DMF通过引入摩擦机制改进了漂移模型训练，既解决了理论缺陷又提升了计算效率，为生成模型训练提供了更高效的方法。

Abstract: Drifting Models [Deng et al., 2026] train a one-step generator by evolving samples under a kernel-based drift field, avoiding ODE integration at inference. The original analysis leaves two questions open. The drift-field iteration admits a locally repulsive regime in a two-particle surrogate, and vanishing of the drift ($V_{p,q}\equiv 0$) is not known to force the learned distribution $q$ to match the target $p$. We derive a contraction threshold for the surrogate and show that a linearly-scheduled friction coefficient gives a finite-horizon bound on the error trajectory. Under a Gaussian kernel we prove that the drift-field equilibrium is identifiable: vanishing of $V_{p,q}$ on any open set forces $q=p$, closing the converse of Proposition 3.1 of Deng et al. Our friction-augmented model, DMF (Drifting Model with Friction), matches or exceeds Optimal Flow Matching on FFHQ adult-to-child domain translation at 16x lower training compute.

</details>


### [885] [CAARL: In-Context Learning for Interpretable Co-Evolving Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18305)
*Etienne Tajeuna,Patrick Asante Owusu,Armelle Brun,Shengrui Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出CAARL框架，使用LLM预测共演化时间序列，通过分解序列、构建依赖图和序列化叙事实现可解释的预测


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决共演化时间序列预测中的复杂依赖和非平稳动态问题，同时提高预测的可解释性，使预测过程透明化

Method: CAARL将时间序列分解为自回归段，构建时间依赖图，将图序列化为叙事供LLM处理，形成类似思维链的推理路径

Result: 在真实数据集上验证了有效性，CAARL成为具有竞争力的可解释预测方法，在保持准确性的同时增强可解释性

Conclusion: CAARL为共演化时间序列预测提供了新颖的可解释框架，将预测与显式推理轨迹连接，平衡了准确性和可解释性

Abstract: In this paper we investigate forecasting coevolving time series that feature intricate dependencies and nonstationary dynamics by using an LLM Large Language Models approach We propose a novel modeling approach named ContextAware ARLLM CAARL that provides an interpretable framework to decode the contextual dynamics influencing changes in coevolving series CAARL decomposes time series into autoregressive segments constructs a temporal dependency graph and serializes this graph into a narrative to allow processing by LLM This design yields a chainofthoughtlike reasoning path where intermediate steps capture contextual dynamics and guide forecasts in a transparent manner By linking prediction to explicit reasoning traces CAARL enhances interpretability while maintaining accuracy Experiments on realworld datasets validate its effectiveness positioning CAARL as a competitive and interpretable alternative to stateoftheart forecasting methods

</details>


### [886] [Method for Aggregating Unstructured Data Using Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16425)
*Vsevolod Lazebnyi,Natalia Tereshkina,Maria Shabarina,Dmitriy Fedorov*

Main category: cs.DB

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于LLM的自动化网络数据采集方法，结合静态/动态网页抓取、MongoDB存储和LLM智能提取，通过两阶段验证减少幻觉，实现高精度、结构鲁棒的数据聚合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有网页数据采集技术存在结构变化时不稳定、动态内容支持有限、预处理流程需要人工设计等问题，需要更鲁棒、自动化的解决方案。

Method: 混合网页抓取（Goose3处理静态页面，Selenium+WebDriver处理动态页面），数据存储在MongoDB中，使用LLM将非结构化数据提取并规范化为预定JSON格式，采用两阶段验证（不同温度参数下LLM输出的嵌入向量对比+形式化规则监控）来减少幻觉。

Result: 实验结果表明，关键字段填充准确率高，方法对网页结构变化具有鲁棒性，适合新闻聚合、监控和日志分析等近实时任务，并能快速扩展数据源数量。

Conclusion: 该方法通过结合传统网页抓取技术和LLM智能处理，实现了高效、鲁棒的自动化数据采集，两阶段验证机制有效减少了LLM幻觉问题，为大规模网络数据聚合提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: This paper presents a method for the automated collection and aggregation of unstructured data from diverse web sources, utilizing Large Language Models (LLMs). The primary challenge with existing techniques is their instability when the structure of webpages changes, their limited support for dynamically loaded content during information collection, and the requirement for labor-intensive manual design of data pre-processing processes. The proposed algorithm integrates hybrid web scraping (Goose3 for static pages and Selenium+WebDriver for dynamic ones), data storage in a non-relational MongoDB database management system (DBMS), and intelligent extraction and normalization of information using LLMs into a predetermined JSON schema. A key scientific contribution of this study is a two-stage verification process for the generated data, designed to eliminate potential hallucinations byy comparing the embeddings of multiple LLM outputs obtained with different temperature parameter values, combined with formalized rules for monitoring data consistency and integrity. The experimental findings indicate a high level of accuracy in the completion of key fields, as well as the robustness of the proposed methodology to changes in web page structures. This makes it suitable for use in tasks such as news content aggregation, monitoring, and log analysis in near real-time mode, with the capacity to scale rapidly in terms of the number of sources.

</details>


### [887] [Fairness Constraints in High-Dimensional Generalized Linear Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16610)
*Yixiao Lin,James Booth*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出一个通过辅助特征推断敏感属性并整合公平性约束的框架，在隐私限制下实现公平机器学习


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习模型常从历史数据中继承偏见，但传统公平性干预需要敏感属性（如性别、种族），而隐私和法律限制常禁止使用这些属性

Method: 从辅助特征推断敏感属性，并将公平性约束整合到模型训练中，在保护隐私的同时减少偏见

Result: 实证评估验证了该方法的有效性，能够在减少偏见的同时保持预测准确性

Conclusion: 该框架为公平感知学习提供了实用解决方案，有助于推进更公平的算法决策

Abstract: Machine learning models often inherit biases from historical data, raising critical concerns about fairness and accountability. Conventional fairness interventions typically require access to sensitive attributes like gender or race, but privacy and legal restrictions frequently limit their use. To address this challenge, we propose a framework that infers sensitive attributes from auxiliary features and integrates fairness constraints into model training. Our approach mitigates bias while preserving predictive accuracy, offering a practical solution for fairness-aware learning. Empirical evaluations validate its effectiveness, contributing to the advancement of more equitable algorithmic decision-making.

</details>


### [888] [PAC-Bayes Bounds for Gibbs Posteriors via Singular Learning Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17219)
*Chenyang Wang,Yun Yang*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 该论文推导了Gibbs后验的显式非渐近PAC-Bayes泛化界，适用于过参数化模型，通过奇异学习理论工具获得可解析处理的边界，比经典复杂度边界更紧。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于一致大数定律的最坏情况复杂度边界需要模型空间的度量熵控制，不适用于过参数化模型。本文旨在为现代过参数化和奇异模型提供精确的有限样本泛化保证。

Method: 使用PAC-Bayes分析推导Gibbs后验的显式非渐近泛化界，通过奇异学习理论工具分析参数空间的边际型积分，获得后验平均风险边界。

Result: 得到的边界可解析处理且比经典复杂度边界更紧，应用于低秩矩阵补全和ReLU神经网络回归与分类，展示了边界对数据结构和内在模型复杂度的适应性。

Conclusion: PAC-Bayes分析在现代过参数化和奇异模型中具有提供精确有限样本泛化保证的潜力，为理解深度学习泛化提供了新工具。

Abstract: We derive explicit non-asymptotic PAC-Bayes generalization bounds for Gibbs posteriors, that is, data-dependent distributions over model parameters obtained by exponentially tilting a prior with the empirical risk. Unlike classical worst-case complexity bounds based on uniform laws of large numbers, which require explicit control of the model space in terms of metric entropy (integrals), our analysis yields posterior-averaged risk bounds that can be applied to overparameterized models and adapt to the data structure and the intrinsic model complexity. The bound involves a marginal-type integral over the parameter space, which we analyze using tools from singular learning theory to obtain explicit and practically meaningful characterizations of the posterior risk. Applications to low-rank matrix completion and ReLU neural network regression and classification show that the resulting bounds are analytically tractable and substantially tighter than classical complexity-based bounds. Our results highlight the potential of PAC-Bayes analysis for precise finite-sample generalization guarantees in modern overparameterized and singular models.

</details>


### [889] [Bilinear Input Modulation for Mamba: Koopman Bilinear Forms for Memory Retention and Multiplicative Computation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17221)
*Hiroki Fujii,Masaki Yamakita*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: 提出了两种耦合状态空间模型的变体：耦合双线性输入调制（Coupled-BIM）和耦合门控调制（Coupled-GM），以增强选择性状态空间模型（如Mamba）的记忆保持和双线性计算能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 选择性状态空间模型（如Mamba）使用对角状态转移，这限制了记忆保持和双线性计算能力。需要增强SSM的能力以处理需要记忆和双线性计算的任务。

Method: 提出因子化双线性输入调制，将SSM增强为状态-输入乘积，可解释为有限维Koopman双线性形式。在引入跨通道共享状态（耦合SSM）后，调制有两种实现：1) Coupled-BIM保留完整双线性乘积但需要顺序计算；2) Coupled-GM将其线性化为门控调制，兼容并行扫描。

Result: 在多输入延迟摆（记忆保持）和NARMA-10（双线性计算）实验中显示明显分离：Coupled-GM显著改善记忆保持但不改善双线性计算，而Coupled-BIM两者都改善。Coupled-BIM在双线性计算上始终优于所有其他变体，且只有Coupled-BIM能从增加SSM状态维度中受益。

Conclusion: 双线性机制是唯一能够利用更大状态空间的方法。Coupled-BIM通过完整双线性乘积有效增强了SSM的记忆和计算能力，而门控调制仅改善记忆保持。

Abstract: Selective State Space Models (SSMs), notably Mamba, employ diagonal state transitions that limit both memory retention and bilinear computational capacity. We propose a factorized bilinear input modulation that augments the SSM with a state-input product, interpretable as a finite-dimensional Koopman bilinear form. After introducing a shared state across channels (Coupled SSM), the modulation admits two implementations. Coupled Bilinear Input Modulation (Coupled-BIM) retains the full bilinear product at the cost of sequential computation, while Coupled Gated Modulation (Coupled-GM) linearizes it into a gate modulation that is compatible with the parallel scan. Experiments on a multiple input-delay pendulum (memory retention) and NARMA-10 (bilinear computation) reveal a clear dissociation. Coupled-GM substantially improves memory retention but not bilinear computation, while Coupled-BIM improves both. A pathway ablation confirms that the two downstream routes of the bilinear signal serve complementary roles. The improvement is statistically robust, with Coupled-BIM consistently outperforming all other variants on bilinear computation. Furthermore, only Coupled-BIM benefits from increasing the SSM state dimension, while coupling or gate modulation alone show no improvement, establishing the bilin-ear mechanism as uniquely capable of exploiting larger state spaces.

</details>


### [890] [ARMove: Learning to Predict Human Mobility through Agentic Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17419)
*Chuyue Wang,Jie Feng,Yuxi Wu,Shenglin Yi,Hang Zhang*

Main category: cs.MA

Relevance: 75.0

TL;DR: ARMove是一个基于智能体推理的可迁移人类移动预测框架，通过标准化特征管理、用户定制化和大小模型协同，在保持可解释性的同时提升预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在零样本人类移动预测中存在三个主要问题：1) 黑盒推理导致可解释性有限；2) 缺乏从新数据中迭代学习的能力；3) 跨人群和区域的迁移性差。需要开发一个既准确又可解释、可迁移的预测框架。

Method: ARMove采用智能体推理框架，包含：1) 标准化特征管理（四个主要特征池）；2) 用户画像分割；3) 集成LLM知识的自动生成机制；4) 智能体决策调整特征权重以最大化准确性；5) 大小模型协同，将大模型策略蒸馏到小模型。

Result: 在四个全球数据集上的实验表明，ARMove在12个指标中的6个上优于SOTA基线（提升0.78%到10.47%），其余4个指标也达到次优结果。迁移性测试证实了其在跨区域、用户群体和模型规模上的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: ARMove通过智能体推理框架解决了人类移动预测中的可解释性、可迁移性和迭代学习问题，同时通过大小模型协同降低了计算成本，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Human mobility prediction is a critical task but remains challenging due to its complexity and variability across populations and regions. Recently, large language models (LLMs) have made progress in zero-shot prediction, but existing methods suffer from limited interpretability (due to black-box reasoning), lack of iterative learning from new data, and poor transferability. In this paper, we introduce \textbf{ARMove}, a fully transferable framework for predicting human mobility through agentic reasoning. To address these limitations, ARMove employs standardized feature management with iterative optimization and user-specific customization: four major feature pools for foundational knowledge, user profiles for segmentation, and an automated generation mechanism integrating LLM knowledge. Robust generalization is achieved via agentic decision-making that adjusts feature weights to maximize accuracy while providing interpretable decision paths. Finally, large-small model synergy distills strategies from large LLMs (e.g., 72B) to smaller ones (e.g., 7B), reducing costs and enhancing performance ceilings. Extensive experiments on four global datasets show ARMove outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on 6 out of 12 metrics (gains of 0.78\% to 10.47\%), with transferability tests confirming robustness across regions, users, and scales. The other 4 items also achieved suboptimal results. Transferability tests confirm its 19 robustness across regions, user groups, and model scales, while interpretability 20 analysis highlights its transparency in decision-making. Our codes are available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ARMove-F847.

</details>


### [891] [SetFlow: Generating Structured Sets of Representations for Multiple Instance Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16362)
*Nikola Jovišić,Milica Škipina,Vanja Švenda*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: SetFlow：一种用于多示例学习（MIL）的生成式架构，直接在表示空间中建模整个MIL包（集合），通过流匹配和Set Transformer设计捕获实例间依赖关系，用于数据增强和隐私敏感任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实应用中数据稀缺和弱监督问题限制了机器学习性能，特别是在乳腺X光检查等MIL任务中。现有方法在实例级别操作，无法捕获包内实例间的依赖关系，而基础模型提供的语义表示需要有效增强。

Method: 提出SetFlow架构，结合流匹配范式和Set Transformer设计，直接在表示空间中生成整个MIL包。模型以类别标签和输入尺度为条件，处理排列不变的输入，捕获包内实例间的交互作用。

Result: 在大规模乳腺X光基准测试中，使用最先进的MIL-PF分类流程评估。生成样本与原始数据分布高度匹配，用于数据增强时能提升下游性能。仅使用合成数据训练也能获得有竞争力的结果。

Conclusion: SetFlow展示了表示空间生成建模在数据稀缺和隐私敏感任务中的有效性，为MIL任务提供了一种新的数据增强方法，能够生成语义一致且保持包内依赖关系的表示集合。

Abstract: Data scarcity and weak supervision continue to limit the performance of machine learning models in many real-world applications, such as mammography, where Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) often offers the best formulation. While recent foundation models provide strong semantic representations out of the box, effective augmentation of such representations of MIL data remains limited, as existing methods operate at the instance level and fail to capture intra-bag dependencies. In this work, we introduce SetFlow, a generative architecture that models entire MIL bags (i.e., sets) directly in the representation space. Our approach leverages the flow matching paradigm combined with a Set Transformer-inspired design, enabling it to handle permutation-invariant inputs while capturing interactions between instances within each bag. The model is conditioned on both class labels and input scale, allowing it to generate coherent and semantically consistent sets of representations. We evaluate SetFlow on a large-scale mammography benchmark using a state-of-the-art MIL-PF classification pipeline. The generated samples are shown to closely match the original data distribution and even improve downstream performance when used for augmentation. Furthermore, training on synthetic data alone shows competitive results, demonstrating the effectiveness of representation-space generative modeling for data-scarce and privacy-sensitive tasks.

</details>


### [892] [Matched-Learning-Rate Analysis of Attention Drift and Transfer Retention in Fine-Tuned CLIP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16410)
*Ruize Xia*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文通过匹配学习率的控制实验比较了CLIP模型上Full Fine-Tuning和LoRA两种适配方法，发现学习率对注意力漂移和迁移能力有显著影响，LoRA在保持零样本迁移能力方面明显优于Full Fine-Tuning。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CLIP适配通常能提高域内准确性，但会降低域外迁移能力。现有研究中对Full Fine-Tuning和LoRA的比较常因学习率设置不同而产生混淆，需要控制学习率变量来准确比较两种方法的性能差异。

Method: 采用匹配学习率的控制实验设计，在CLIP ViT-B/32模型上对EuroSAT和Oxford-IIIT Pets数据集进行80次实验，涵盖4个共享学习率和5个随机种子。评估注意力漂移指标、最佳验证准确率和适配器感知的CIFAR-100零样本准确率。

Result: 学习率强烈调节结构变化：在EuroSAT上，Full FT从10^-6时的轻微熵增到5×10^-5时的显著熵减，而LoRA在整个匹配网格中保持熵增。在匹配学习率下，LoRA保持的零样本迁移能力显著优于Full FT（EuroSAT: 45.13% vs 11.28%，Pets: 58.01% vs 8.54%）。

Conclusion: 匹配学习率评估显著改变了Full FT与LoRA的比较解释，注意力漂移更适合作为表示保持的描述性诊断指标，而非迁移行为的因果解释。LoRA在保持预训练知识方面具有优势。

Abstract: CLIP adaptation can improve in-domain accuracy while degrading out-of-domain transfer, but comparisons between Full Fine-Tuning (Full FT) and LoRA are often confounded by different learning-rate conventions. We study how adaptation method and optimization scale jointly shape attention drift and transfer retention in CLIP using a controlled matched-learning-rate comparison of Full FT and LoRA. The completed matrix contains 80 runs on CLIP ViT-B/32 across EuroSAT and Oxford-IIIT Pets, spanning four shared learning rates ($10^{-6}$, $5{\times}10^{-6}$, $10^{-5}$, $5{\times}10^{-5}$) and five seeds, and evaluates attention-drift metrics, best validation accuracy, and adapter-aware CIFAR-100 zero-shot accuracy. Learning rate strongly modulates structural change: on EuroSAT, Full FT moves from mild entropy broadening at $10^{-6}$ to marked contraction at $5{\times}10^{-5}$, whereas LoRA remains entropy-positive across the full matched grid. At matched learning rates, LoRA preserves substantially more zero-shot transfer than Full FT, averaging $45.13\%$ versus $11.28\%$ CIFAR-100 accuracy on EuroSAT and $58.01\%$ versus $8.54\%$ on Pets. Oxford-IIIT Pets also reveals a regime effect: low-learning-rate LoRA underfits in-domain, so method-only averages can obscure when LoRA becomes competitive. Supporting rollout, patch-to-patch, and CKA analyses are directionally consistent with the controlled matrix. Overall, matched-learning-rate evaluation materially changes the interpretation of Full FT versus LoRA, and attention drift is most useful as a descriptive diagnostic of representation preservation rather than a causal explanation of transfer behavior.

</details>


### [893] [Non-Stationarity in the Embedding Space of Time Series Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16428)
*Jinmyeong Choi,Brad Shook,Artur Dubrawski*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了时间序列基础模型嵌入空间中非平稳性的可检测性，区分了分布非平稳性（均值漂移、方差变化、线性趋势）和时间非平稳性（持续性），发现不同模型在检测这些非平稳性时表现出不同的失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前时间序列基础模型作为通用特征提取器被广泛应用，但其嵌入空间中的非平稳性概念理解不足。现有研究常将非平稳性与分布漂移混为一谈，模糊了经典时间序列分析和统计过程控制中的基本区别。统计过程控制中，非平稳性标志着过程离开稳定状态，检测这种偏离对于质量监控和变点分析至关重要。

Method: 在受控条件下研究不同形式的分布非平稳性（均值漂移、方差变化、线性趋势）如何在TSFM嵌入空间中线性可访问。进一步研究由持续性引起的时间非平稳性，这反映了由于长记忆或近单位根行为导致的弱平稳性违反。通过扫描漂移强度并探测多个TSFM，分析嵌入空间非平稳性检测能力。

Result: 研究发现嵌入空间对非平稳性的可检测性平滑下降，不同模型表现出独特的、模型特定的失败模式。不同TSFM在检测不同类型的非平稳性时表现出不同的敏感性和能力。

Conclusion: 该研究为理解时间序列基础模型嵌入空间中的非平稳性提供了系统框架，区分了分布非平稳性和时间非平稳性，揭示了不同模型在检测这些特性时的特定行为模式，对时间序列分析和模型评估具有重要意义。

Abstract: Time series foundation models (TSFMs) are widely used as generic feature extractors, yet the notion of non-stationarity in their embedding spaces remains poorly understood. Recent work often conflates non-stationarity with distribution shift, blurring distinctions fundamental to classical time-series analysis and long-standing methodologies such as statistical process control (SPC). In SPC, non-stationarity signals a process leaving a stable regime - via shifts in mean, variance, or emerging trends - and detecting such departures is central to quality monitoring and change-point analysis. Motivated by this diagnostic tradition, we study how different forms of distributional non-stationarity - mean shifts, variance changes, and linear trends - become linearly accessible in TSFM embedding spaces under controlled conditions. We further examine temporal non-stationarity arising from persistence, which reflects violations of weak stationarity due to long-memory or near-unit-root behavior rather than explicit distributional shifts. By sweeping shift strength and probing multiple TSFMs, we find that embedding-space detectability of non-stationarity degrades smoothly and that different models exhibit distinct, model-specific failure modes.

</details>


### [894] [Towards Reliable Testing of Machine Unlearning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16536)
*Anna Mazhar,Sainyam Galhotra*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文将机器学习遗忘测试视为软件工程问题，提出因果模糊测试方法，通过预算干预来评估残留影响并生成可操作的"泄漏报告"。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着法规要求从部署模型中删除敏感数据，机器学习遗忘成为实际替代完全重新训练的方法。但遗忘测试面临挑战：在现实部署约束和不完美预言机下，如何测试模型是否不再依赖目标信息？

Method: 提出因果模糊测试方法，采用因果、路径中心视角，生成预算干预来估计残留的直接和间接影响，产生可操作的"泄漏报告"。该方法需要覆盖代理和中介影响路径，提供可调试诊断，在查询预算下进行成本有效的回归式执行，并适用于黑盒API部署模型。

Result: 概念验证结果表明，标准归因检查可能因代理路径、抵消效应和子群掩蔽而错过残留影响，这促使因果测试成为遗忘测试的有前景方向。

Conclusion: 该论文将遗忘测试框架化为软件工程问题，提出因果模糊测试作为实用解决方案，强调需要覆盖影响路径并提供可调试诊断，为机器学习遗忘的质量保证提供了新视角。

Abstract: Machine learning components are now central to AI-infused software systems, from recommendations and code assistants to clinical decision support. As regulations and governance frameworks increasingly require deleting sensitive data from deployed models, machine unlearning is emerging as a practical alternative to full retraining. However, unlearning introduces a software quality-assurance challenge: under realistic deployment constraints and imperfect oracles, how can we test that a model no longer relies on targeted information? This paper frames unlearning testing as a first-class software engineering problem. We argue that practical unlearning tests must provide (i) thorough coverage over proxy and mediated influence pathways, (ii) debuggable diagnostics that localize where leakage persists, (iii) cost-effective regression-style execution under query budgets, and (iv) black-box applicability for API-deployed models. We outline a causal, pathway-centric perspective, causal fuzzing, that generates budgeted interventions to estimate residual direct and indirect effects and produce actionable "leakage reports". Proof-of-concept results illustrate that standard attribution checks can miss residual influence due to proxy pathways, cancellation effects, and subgroup masking, motivating causal testing as a promising direction for unlearning testing.

</details>


### [895] [In Search of Lost DNA Sequence Pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16570)
*Zhijiang Tang,Jiaxin Qi,Yan Cui,Jinli Ou,Yuhua Zheng,Jianqiang Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文揭示了DNA序列预训练中三个被忽视的关键问题：不合适的下游数据集、邻居掩码策略的内在缺陷、以及词汇表分析的缺失，并提出了相应的指导原则和标准化测试平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管大规模DNA序列预训练取得了显著进展，但现有研究过度强调预训练规模和自定义下游评估数据集，而忽视了预训练范式中一些基本组件。论文旨在揭示DNA预训练中三个关键但被忽视的问题。

Method: 通过全面调查提出原则性指导方针，包括评估数据集的选择标准、指导任务设计、以及深入的词汇表分析。进行大量实验验证所识别问题的重要性，并引入标准化测试平台。

Result: 大量实验验证了所识别问题的重要性，并支持提出的建议。标准化测试平台能够实现DNA预训练方法的可重复和严格基准测试。

Conclusion: 论文揭示了DNA预训练中的关键问题，提出了相应的解决方案和指导原则，并通过标准化测试平台推动基因组基础模型的发展。

Abstract: DNA sequence encoding is fundamental to gene function prediction, protein synthesis, and diverse downstream biological tasks. Despite the substantial progress achieved by large-scale DNA sequence pretraining, existing studies have overwhelmingly emphasized pretraining scale and custom downstream evaluation datasets, while neglecting some essential components of the pretraining paradigm. In this paper, we reveal three critical yet heretofore overlooked problems in DNA pretraining: inappropriate downstream datasets, inherent flaws in the neighbor-masking strategy, and the lack of detailed discussion on vocabulary. Therefore, we undertake comprehensive investigations and propose principled guidelines, including selection criteria for evaluation datasets, guiding task design, and in-depth vocabulary analysis. Extensive experiments validate the significance of our identified problems and support the rationale behind our recommendations. Finally, we introduce a standardized testbed that enables reproducible and rigorous benchmarking of DNA pretraining methods to advance the development of genomic foundation models.

</details>


### [896] [A Systematic Survey and Benchmark of Deep Learning for Molecular Property Prediction in the Foundation Model Era](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16586)
*Zongru Li,Xingsheng Chen,Honggang Wen,Regina Qianru Zhang,Ming Li,Xiaojin Zhang,Hongzhi Yin,Qiang Yang,Kwok-Yan Lam,Pietro Lio,Siu-Ming Yiu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文系统综述了分子性质预测的四大范式（量子、描述符机器学习、几何深度学习、基础模型），提出了统一分类法，分析了现有基准的局限性，并提出了三个前瞻方向：物理感知学习、不确定性校准基础模型、多模态基准生态系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分子性质预测是连接分子结构与物理化学/生物行为的关键技术，但现有研究存在范式分散、基准不统一、数据质量参差不齐等问题。论文旨在系统梳理该领域的发展脉络，建立统一分类框架，并推动更透明、可靠的基准设计。

Method: 采用系统性文献综述方法，分析四大范式（量子方法、描述符机器学习、几何深度学习、基础模型）的代表性工作；构建统一分类法连接分子表示、模型架构和应用领域；整合分析广泛使用的数据集和工业界视角的数据集；评估数据管理、划分策略和评估协议的现状。

Result: 识别出现有基准的主要挑战：立体化学不一致、异质检测来源、随机或定义不清的数据划分导致的复现性问题；提出基准现代化方向：更透明、时间感知、骨架感知的方法论；建立了分子性质预测的全面分类框架。

Conclusion: 分子性质预测需要向更可靠、物理一致、不确定性校准的方向发展。三个关键方向是：(1)嵌入量子一致性的物理感知学习，(2)可信推理的不确定性校准基础模型，(3)整合计算与实验数据的现实多模态基准生态系统。

Abstract: Molecular property prediction integrates quantum chemistry, cheminformatics, and deep learning to connect molecular structure with physicochemical and biological behavior. This survey traces four complementary paradigms, including Quantum, Descriptor Machine Learning, Geometric Deep Learning, and Foundation Models, and outlines a unified taxonomy linking molecular representations, model architectures, and interdisciplinary applications. Benchmark analyses integrate evidence from both widely used datasets and datasets reflecting industry perspectives, encompassing quantum, physicochemical, physiological, and biophysical domains. The survey examines current standards in data curation, splitting strategies, and evaluation protocols, highlighting challenges including inconsistent stereochemistry, heterogeneous assay sources, and reproducibility limitations under random or poorly defined splits. These observations motivate the modernization of benchmark design toward more transparent, time- and scaffold-aware methodologies. We further propose three forward-looking directions: (i) physics-aware learning embedding quantum consistency, (ii) uncertainty-calibrated foundation models for trustworthy inference, and (iii) realistic multimodal benchmark ecosystems integrating computational and experimental data. Repository: https://github.com/Zongru-Li/Survey-and-Benchmarks-of-DL-for-Molecular-Property-Prediction-in-the-Foundation-Model-Era.

</details>


### [897] [LLM-Extracted Covariates for Clinical Causal Inference: Rethinking Integration Strategies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16763)
*Lei Liu,Jialin Chen,Kathy Macropol*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 研究比较了七种协变量整合策略，发现将LLM提取的协变量直接加入倾向评分模型效果最佳，在真实数据中将治疗效果估计从0.055降至0.027，与随机试验结果方向一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电子健康记录中的因果推断受限于未测量的混杂因素（如虚弱、护理目标、精神状态等），这些信息仅存在于自由文本记录中。虽然大语言模型可以提取这些潜在混杂因素，但如何有效将其整合到因果估计流程中尚未得到系统研究。

Method: 使用MIMIC-IV数据库中21,859名脓毒症患者，比较七种协变量整合策略：包括仅表格基线、传统NLP表示和三种LLM增强方法。核心是比较不同整合策略的效果，特别是在倾向评分模型中直接加入LLM协变量与基于文本分类距离的双卡钳匹配等方法。

Result: 在已知真实效果的半合成实验中，LLM增强的倾向评分将估计偏差从0.0143降至0.0003。在真实数据中，加入LLM提取的协变量将治疗效果估计从0.055降至0.027，与CLOVERS随机试验结果方向一致，双重稳健估计器得到0.019的结果确认了这一发现的稳健性。

Conclusion: LLM提取的文本协变量能显著改善重症监护中的因果估计，但并非所有整合策略都同样有效。直接增强倾向评分模型是最佳方法，而基于文本距离的匹配策略可能限制供体池并降低估计质量。

Abstract: Causal inference from electronic health records (EHR) is fundamentally limited by unmeasured confounding: critical clinical states such as frailty, goals of care, and mental status are documented in free-text notes but absent from structured data. Large language models can extract these latent confounders as interpretable, structured covariates, yet how to effectively integrate them into causal estimation pipelines has not been systematically studied. Using the MIMIC-IV database with 21,859 sepsis patients, we compare seven covariate-integration strategies for estimating the effect of early vasopressor initiation on 28-day mortality, spanning tabular-only baselines, traditional NLP representations, and three LLM-augmented approaches. A central finding is that not all integration strategies are equally effective: directly augmenting the propensity score model with LLM covariates achieves the best performance, while dual-caliper matching on text-derived categorical distances restricts the donor pool and degrades estimation. In semi-synthetic experiments with known ground-truth effects, LLM-augmented propensity scores reduce estimation bias from 0.0143 to 0.0003 relative to tabular-only methods, and this advantage persists under substantial simulated extraction error. On real data, incorporating LLM-extracted covariates reduces the estimated treatment effect from 0.055 to 0.027, directionally consistent with the CLOVERS randomized trial, and a doubly robust estimator yielding 0.019 confirms the robustness of this finding. Our results offer practical guidance on when and how text-derived covariates improve causal estimation in critical care.

</details>


### [898] [RosettaSearch: Multi-Objective Inference-Time Search for Protein Sequence Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17175)
*Meghana Kshirsagar,Allen Nie,Ching-An Cheng,Fanglei Xue,Rahul Dodhia,Juan Lavista Ferres,Kevin K. Yang,Frank DiMaio*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: RosettaSearch是一种用于蛋白质序列优化的推理时多目标优化方法，使用LLMs作为生成优化器，结合RosettaFold3结构预测模型进行奖励计算，显著提升蛋白质设计成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有蛋白质序列设计模型（如LigandMPNN）的单次解码方法无法产生高质量设计，需要一种能够在推理时进行多目标优化的方法，结合结构预测反馈来改进序列设计。

Method: 使用LLMs作为生成优化器，在搜索算法中结合探索和利用策略，利用RosettaFold3结构预测模型计算奖励，通过多轮迭代优化蛋白质序列。还展示了多模态扩展，使用视觉语言模型分析预测的蛋白质结构图像。

Result: 在400个次优序列上，RosettaSearch将结构保真度指标提升18-68%，设计成功率提高2.5倍。这些改进在不同LLM家族（o4-mini和Gemini-3）和独立结构预测器（Chai-1）上表现稳健，并能推广到计算生成的蛋白质骨架。

Conclusion: RosettaSearch提供了一种有效的蛋白质序列优化框架，将LLMs与结构预测模型结合，显著提升蛋白质设计质量，并为序列设计模型提供有价值的训练数据。

Abstract: We introduce RosettaSearch, an inference-time multi-objective optimization approach for protein sequence optimization. We use large language models (LLMs) as a generative optimizer within a search algorithm capable of controlled exploration and exploitation, using rewards computed from RosettaFold3, a structure prediction model. In a large-scale evaluation, we apply RosettaSearch to 400 suboptimal sequences generated by LigandMPNN (a state-of-the-art model trained for protein sequence design), recovering high-fidelity designs that LigandMPNN's single-pass decoding fails to produce. RosettaSearch's designs show improvements in structural fidelity metrics ranging between 18\% to 68\%, translating to a 2.5$\times$ improvement in design success rate. We observe that these gains in success rate are robust when RosettaSearch-designed sequences are evaluated with an independent structure prediction oracle (Chai-1) and generalize across two distinct LLM families (o4-mini and Gemini-3), with performance scaling consistently with reasoning capability. We further demonstrate that RosettaSearch improves sequence fidelity for ProteinMPNN-designed sequences on \textit{de novo} backbones from the Dayhoff atlas, showing that the approach generalizes beyond native protein structures to computationally generated backbones. We also demonstrate a multi-modal extension of RosettaSearch with vision-language models, where images of predicted protein structures are used as feedback to incorporate structural context to guide protein sequence generation. The sequence trajectories generated by our approach can be used as training data in sequence design models or in post-training and will be released along with the code and datasets upon publication.

</details>


### [899] [Interpolating Discrete Diffusion Models with Controllable Resampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17310)
*Marcel Kollovieh,Sirine Ayadi,Stephan Günnemann*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: IDDM是一种插值离散扩散模型，通过可控重采样机制减少对中间潜在状态的依赖，在分子图生成和文本生成任务中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散扩散模型存在根本性限制：掩码扩散模型因早期解掩码导致不可逆错误，均匀扩散模型虽然支持自校正但过度依赖中间潜在状态导致样本质量低。

Method: 提出IDDM（插值离散扩散模型），核心是可控重采样机制，将部分概率质量重置到边缘分布，减少错误累积并实现更有效的标记校正。生成过程在保持当前状态、从先验重采样和向目标状态翻转之间插值，同时保持边缘一致性并完全解耦训练与推理。

Result: 在分子图生成和文本生成任务上与最先进的离散扩散模型进行基准测试，展示了具有竞争力的性能。

Conclusion: IDDM通过减少对中间潜在状态的依赖，解决了现有离散扩散模型的局限性，在保持边缘一致性的同时实现了更有效的生成过程。

Abstract: Discrete diffusion models form a powerful class of generative models across diverse domains, including text and graphs. However, existing approaches face fundamental limitations. Masked diffusion models suffer from irreversible errors due to early unmasking, while uniform diffusion models, despite enabling self-correction, often yield low-quality samples due to their strong reliance on intermediate latent states. We introduce IDDM, an Interpolating Discrete Diffusion Model, that improves diffusion by reducing dependence on intermediate latent states. Central to IDDM is a controllable resampling mechanism that partially resets probability mass to the marginal distribution, mitigating error accumulation and enabling more effective token corrections. IDDM specifies a generative process whose transitions interpolate between staying at the current state, resampling from a prior, and flipping toward the target state, while enforcing marginal consistency and fully decoupling training from inference. We benchmark our model against state-of-the-art discrete diffusion models across molecular graph generation as well as text generation tasks, demonstrating competitive performance.

</details>


### [900] [SVL: Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning as Survival Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17551)
*Franki Nguimatsia Tiofack,Fabian Schramm,Théotime Le Hellard,Justin Carpentier*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: SVL将目标条件强化学习重构为生存学习问题，通过建模从每个状态到目标的时间分布，使用生存概率的折现和来估计价值函数，在离线GCRL基准上表现出色


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于时序差分学习的GCRL方法存在不稳定和样本效率低的问题，需要更稳定、更有效的替代方案

Method: 将GCRL重构为生存学习问题，建模从状态到目标的时间分布，通过生存概率折现和表达价值函数，使用最大似然训练危险模型，提出三种实际价值估计器

Result: 在离线GCRL基准测试中，SVL结合分层actor匹配或超越了强基线方法，在复杂长视野任务上表现优异

Conclusion: SVL为GCRL提供了稳定、样本高效的替代方案，特别适用于长视野任务，展示了生存学习框架在强化学习中的潜力

Abstract: Standard approaches to goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL) that rely on temporal-difference learning can be unstable and sample-inefficient due to bootstrapping. While recent work has explored contrastive and supervised formulations to improve stability, we present a probabilistic alternative, called survival value learning (SVL), that reframes GCRL as a survival learning problem by modeling the time-to-goal from each state as a probability distribution. This structured distributional Monte Carlo perspective yields a closed-form identity that expresses the goal-conditioned value function as a discounted sum of survival probabilities, enabling value estimation via a hazard model trained via maximum likelihood on both event and right-censored trajectories. We introduce three practical value estimators, including finite-horizon truncation and two binned infinite-horizon approximations to capture long-horizon objectives. Experiments on offline GCRL benchmarks show that SVL combined with hierarchical actors matches or surpasses strong hierarchical TD and Monte Carlo baselines, excelling on complex, long-horizon tasks.

</details>


### [901] [Recovery Guarantees for Continual Learning of Dependent Tasks: Memory, Data-Dependent Regularization, and Data-Dependent Weights](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17578)
*Liangzu Peng,Uday Kiran Reddy Tadipatri,Ziqing Xu,Eric Eaton,René Vidal*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文为持续学习（CL）提供了首个理论框架，通过建模任务间的非线性依赖关系，证明了多种实际CL方法（包括经验回放、知识蒸馏等）的统计恢复保证和误差界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持续学习虽然近年来在实证方面取得了显著进展，但其理论发展仍处于初级阶段。核心挑战在于不同任务间的数据分布会发生变化，而现有理论未能充分建模任务间的依赖关系，导致在某些情况下给出无意义的边界。

Method: 作者提出了一种新的理论框架，将当前任务的数据建模为先前数据的非线性变换，从而显式地建模任务依赖关系。在此模型和自然假设下，他们分析了多种实际CL范式：1）带数据无关正则化的经验回放；2）带数据无关任务损失平衡权重的回放；3）带数据相关权重的回放；4）带数据相关正则化的持续学习（如知识蒸馏）。

Result: 论文证明了这些CL范式的统计恢复保证（具体为估计误差界）。与先前工作相比，这些边界在先前工作给出无意义边界的情况下仍然具有信息性，为实际CL方法提供了首个严格的理论保证。

Conclusion: 通过显式建模任务间的非线性依赖关系，该研究为持续学习建立了首个有意义的理论框架，为实际CL方法的有效性提供了理论依据，填补了CL理论发展的空白。

Abstract: Continual learning (CL) is concerned with learning multiple tasks sequentially without forgetting previously learned tasks. Despite substantial empirical advances over recent years, the theoretical development of CL remains in its infancy. At the heart of developing CL theory lies the challenge that the data distribution varies across tasks, and we argue that properly addressing this challenge requires understanding this variation--dependency among tasks. To explicitly model task dependency, we consider nonlinear regression tasks and propose the assumption that these tasks are dependent in such a way that the data of the current task is a nonlinear transformation of previous data. With this model and under natural assumptions, we prove statistical recovery guarantees (more specifically, bounds on estimation errors) for several CL paradigms in practical use, including experience replay with data-independent regularization and data-independent weights that balance the losses of tasks, replay with data-dependent weights, and continual learning with data-dependent regularization (e.g., knowledge distillation). To the best of our knowledge, our bounds are informative in cases where prior work gives vacuous bounds.

</details>


### [902] [How Much Data is Enough? The Zeta Law of Discoverability in Biomedical Data, featuring the enigmatic Riemann zeta function](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17581)
*Paul M. Thompson*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了基于数据协方差算子谱结构的跨模态可发现性缩放定律框架，将性能指标表达为可识别谱模式上累积的信噪比能量，推导出由黎曼zeta函数主导的缩放定律，可预测不同模型在不同数据规模下的交叉表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着生物医学数据集扩展到数百万样本，AI模型容量不断增长，需要理论指导来预测何时增加数据会显著改善性能。当前模型开发依赖经验性缩放曲线，缺乏理论框架来预测性能何时会改善、饱和或出现交叉行为。

Method: 基于数据协方差算子的谱结构、任务对齐的信号投影和学习表示，提出跨模态可发现性的缩放定律框架。将AUC等性能指标表达为编码器和跨模态算子的可识别谱模式上累积的信噪比能量，在温和假设下推导出由协方差谱的幂律衰减和对齐信号能量主导的zeta类缩放定律。

Result: 该框架预测了交叉机制：简单模型在小样本量下表现最佳，而一旦有足够数据稳定额外自由度，更高容量或多模态编码器会超越它们。稀疏模型、低秩嵌入和多模态对比目标等表示学习方法通过将有用信号集中到早期稳定模式来提高样本效率。

Conclusion: zeta定律为预测何时扩展数据、改进表示或添加模态最有可能加速科学发现提供了原则性方法，适用于多模态疾病分类、成像遗传学、功能MRI和拓扑数据分析等应用。

Abstract: How much data is enough to make a scientific discovery? As biomedical datasets scale to millions of samples and AI models grow in capacity, progress increasingly depends on predicting when additional data will substantially improve performance. In practice, model development often relies on empirical scaling curves measured across architectures, modalities, and dataset sizes, with limited theoretical guidance on when performance should improve, saturate, or exhibit cross-over behavior.
  We propose a scaling-law framework for cross-modal discoverability based on spectral structure of data covariance operators, task-aligned signal projections, and learned representations. Many performance metrics, including AUC, can be expressed in terms of cumulative signal-to-noise energy accumulated across identifiable spectral modes of an encoder and cross-modal operator. Under mild assumptions, this accumulation follows a zeta-like scaling law governed by power-law decay of covariance spectra and aligned signal energy, leading naturally to the appearance of the Riemann zeta function. Representation learning methods such as sparse models, low-rank embeddings, and multimodal contrastive objectives improve sample efficiency by concentrating useful signal into earlier stable modes, effectively steepening spectral decay and shifting scaling curves.
  The framework predicts cross-over regimes in which simpler models perform best at small sample sizes, while higher-capacity or multimodal encoders outperform them once sufficient data stabilizes additional degrees of freedom. Applications include multimodal disease classification, imaging genetics, functional MRI, and topological data analysis. The resulting zeta law provides a principled way to anticipate when scaling data, improving representations, or adding modalities is most likely to accelerate discovery.

</details>


### [903] [Grokking of Diffusion Models: Case Study on Modular Addition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17673)
*Joon Hyeok Kim,Yong-Hyun Park,Mattis Dalsætra Østby,Jiatao Gu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 扩散模型在流匹配目标训练下，在模加任务上表现出"顿悟"现象（过拟合后延迟泛化），揭示了其内部计算机制：通过组合操作数的周期性表示实现模加，并在多样图像数据中利用迭代采样过程将任务分解为算术计算和视觉去噪两个阶段。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管扩散模型在实证上取得了成功，但从机制角度理解其如何泛化仍然不足。本文旨在通过研究扩散模型在模加任务上的"顿悟"现象，揭示其内部计算机制，理解这些模型如何连接连续像素空间生成和离散符号推理。

Method: 使用流匹配目标训练扩散模型，在模加任务上研究"顿悟"现象。在两个数据机制下进行分析：1）单图像机制，通过机制解剖分析模型内部表示；2）多样图像机制（高类内变异性），分析模型如何利用迭代采样过程分解任务。

Result: 在单图像机制中，模型通过组合操作数的周期性表示实现模加；在多样图像机制中，模型利用迭代采样过程将任务分解为算术计算阶段和视觉去噪阶段，这两个阶段由一个关键时间步阈值分隔。

Conclusion: 本文提供了扩散模型中算法学习的机制分解，揭示了这些模型如何桥接连续像素空间生成和离散符号推理，为理解扩散模型的泛化机制提供了新的视角。

Abstract: Despite their empirical success, how diffusion models generalize remains poorly understood from a mechanistic perspective. We demonstrate that diffusion models trained with flow-matching objectives exhibit grokking--delayed generalization after overfitting--on modular addition, enabling controlled analysis of their internal computations. We study this phenomenon across two levels of data regime. In a single-image regime, mechanistic dissection reveals that the model implements modular addition by composing periodic representations of individual operands. In a diverse-image regime with high intraclass variability, we find that the model leverages its iterative sampling process to partition the task into an arithmetic computation phase followed by a visual denoising phase, separated by a critical timestep threshold. Our work provides the mechanistic decomposition of algorithmic learning in diffusion models, revealing how these models bridge continuous pixel-space generation and discrete symbolic reasoning.

</details>


### [904] [M100: An Orchestrated Dataflow Architecture Powering General AI Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17862)
*Yan Xie,Changkui Mao,Changsong Wu,Chao Lu,Chao Suo,Cheng Qian,Chun Yang,Danyang Zhu,Hengchang Xiong,Hongzhan Lu,Hongzhen Liu,Jiafu Liu,Jie Chen,Jie Dai,Junfeng Tang,Kai Liu,Kun Li,Lipeng Ge,Meng Sun,Min Luo,Peng Chen,Peng Wang,Shaodong Yang,Shibin Tang,Shibo Chen,Weikang Zhang,Xiao Ling,Xiaobo Du,Xin Wu,Yang Liu,Yi Jiang,Yihua Jin,Yin Huang,Yuli Zhang,Zhen Yuan,Zhiyuan Man,Zhongxiao Yao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: M100是理想汽车提出的面向自动驾驶、大语言模型和智能交互的AI推理架构，采用数据流并行设计和软硬件协同优化，以张量为基本数据单元，相比GPGPU架构在效率和成本上更具优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着深度学习AI技术的发展，对通用AI计算架构的需求日益增长。GPGPU架构虽然通用但效率和成本效益不足，而领域专用架构（DSA）又难以适应快速演进的AI应用场景。理想汽车需要为自动驾驶、大语言模型等关键应用提供高性能、高性价比的AI推理架构。

Method: 采用数据流并行架构，通过编译器-架构协同设计管理计算和数据在时空中的流动。以张量为基本数据单元，在编译器、固件和硬件层面选择合适的操作粒度。通过软硬件协同设计减少缓存需求，让张量计算由编译器管理的流数据驱动。

Result: M100在自动驾驶（UniAD）和大语言模型（LLaMA）等多样化推理应用中展现出通用AI计算能力。基准测试显示，在AD应用中M100相比GPGPU架构具有更高的利用率，表现出更好的性能。

Conclusion: M100通过数据流计算效率和软硬件协同设计，为通用AI计算提供了一个有前景的方向，在保持高性能的同时降低了硬件复杂度和成本。

Abstract: As deep learning-based AI technologies gain momentum, the demand for general-purpose AI computing architectures continues to grow. While GPGPU-based architectures offer versatility for diverse AI workloads, they often fall short in efficiency and cost-effectiveness. Various Domain-Specific Architectures (DSAs) excel at particular AI tasks but struggle to extend across broader applications or adapt to the rapidly evolving AI landscape. M100 is Li Auto's response: a performant, cost-effective architecture for AI inference in Autonomous Driving (AD), Large Language Models (LLMs), and intelligent human interactions, domains crucial to today's most competitive automobile platforms. M100 employs a dataflow parallel architecture, where compiler-architecture co-design orchestrates not only computation but, more critically, data movement across time and space. Leveraging dataflow computing efficiency, our hardware-software co-design improves system performance while reducing hardware complexity and cost. M100 largely eliminates caching: tensor computations are driven by compiler- and runtime-managed data streams flowing between computing elements and on/off-chip memories, yielding greater efficiency and scalability than cache-based systems. Another key principle was selecting the right operational granularity for scheduling, issuing, and execution across compiler, firmware, and hardware. Recognizing commonalities in AI workloads, we chose the tensor as the fundamental data element. M100 demonstrates general AI computing capability across diverse inference applications, including UniAD (for AD) and LLaMA (for LLMs). Benchmarks show M100 outperforms GPGPU architectures in AD applications with higher utilization, representing a promising direction for future general AI computing.

</details>


### [905] [Online Conformal Prediction with Adversarial Semi-bandit Feedback via Regret Minimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17984)
*Junyoung Yang,Kyungmin Kim,Sangdon Park*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的在线共形预测方法，处理部分反馈场景（仅当真实标签在预测集内时才被揭示），通过将问题建模为对抗性多臂老虎机问题，实现了长期覆盖率保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线不确定性量化在安全关键系统中至关重要，现有在线共形预测方法通常假设完全反馈设置（总能观察到真实标签），但在实际应用中，真实标签往往只在预测集内时才被揭示，这形成了更具挑战性的部分反馈场景。

Method: 将在线共形预测问题建模为对抗性多臂老虎机问题，将每个候选预测集视为一个臂。基于现有的对抗性老虎机算法，通过建立学习器遗憾与覆盖率之间的明确联系，实现长期覆盖率保证。

Result: 在独立同分布和非独立同分布设置下，该方法成功控制了未覆盖率，同时保持了合理的预测集大小，实证验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的方法解决了在线共形预测中的部分反馈挑战，通过对抗性老虎机框架实现了理论保证，为安全关键系统中的不确定性量化提供了实用工具。

Abstract: Uncertainty quantification is crucial in safety-critical systems, where decisions must be made under uncertainty. In particular, we consider the problem of online uncertainty quantification, where data points arrive sequentially. Online conformal prediction is a principled online uncertainty quantification method that dynamically constructs a prediction set at each time step. While existing methods for online conformal prediction provide long-run coverage guarantees without any distributional assumptions, they typically assume a full feedback setting in which the true label is always observed. In this paper, we propose a novel learning method for online conformal prediction with partial feedback from an adaptive adversary-a more challenging setup where the true label is revealed only when it lies inside the constructed prediction set. Specifically, we formulate online conformal prediction as an adversarial bandit problem by treating each candidate prediction set as an arm. Building on an existing algorithm for adversarial bandits, our method achieves a long-run coverage guarantee by explicitly establishing its connection to the regret of the learner. Finally, we empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in both independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) and non-i.i.d. settings, showing that it successfully controls the miscoverage rate while maintaining a reasonable size of the prediction set.

</details>


### [906] [Causally-Constrained Probabilistic Forecasting for Time-Series Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17998)
*Pooyan Khosravinia,João Gama,Bruno Veloso*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出Causally Guided Transformer (CGT)模型，将时间滞后因果图先验与深度序列建模结合，用于多元时间序列异常检测，实现最先进的检测性能和更好的可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业监控中多元时间序列异常检测面临复杂时间动态和跨传感器交互的挑战。现有深度学习方法（如图神经网络和Transformer）主要基于相关性，缺乏因果解释和根因定位能力。

Method: 提出因果约束概率预测框架CGT：1）使用因果发现得到的硬父节点掩码限制主要预测路径；2）潜在高斯头捕获预测不确定性；3）影子辅助路径通过停止梯度隔离和安全门控混合机制利用剩余相关性信息；4）使用负对数似然分数和自适应流阈值检测异常；5）通过维度概率归因和反事实夹紧确定根因变量。

Result: 在ASD和SMD基准测试中达到最先进检测性能：ASD上F1分数96.19%，SMD上95.32%。同时提高了变量级归因质量。

Conclusion: 因果结构先验可以提高多元传感器系统中深度异常检测的鲁棒性和可解释性。

Abstract: Anomaly detection in multivariate time series is a central challenge in industrial monitoring, as failures frequently arise from complex temporal dynamics and cross-sensor interactions. While recent deep learning models, including graph neural networks and Transformers, have demonstrated strong empirical performance, most approaches remain primarily correlational and offer limited support for causal interpretation and root-cause localization. This study introduces a causally-constrained probabilistic forecasting framework which is a Causally Guided Transformer (CGT) model for multivariate time-series anomaly detection, integrating an explicit time-lagged causal graph prior with deep sequence modeling. For each target variable, a dedicated forecasting block employs a hard parent mask derived from causal discovery to restrict the main prediction pathway to graph-supported causes, while a latent Gaussian head captures predictive uncertainty. To leverage residual correlational information without compromising the causal representation, a shadow auxiliary path with stop-gradient isolation and a safety-gated blending mechanism is incorporated to suppress non-causal contributions when reliability is low. Anomalies are identified using negative log-likelihood scores with adaptive streaming thresholding, and root-cause variables are determined through per-dimension probabilistic attribution and counterfactual clamping. Experiments on the ASD and SMD benchmarks indicate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art detection performance, with F1-scores of 96.19% on ASD and 95.32% on SMD, and enhances variable-level attribution quality. These findings suggest that causal structural priors can improve both robustness and interpretability in detecting deep anomalies in multivariate sensor systems.

</details>


### [907] [Towards a Foundation-Model Paradigm for Aerodynamic Prediction in Three-dimensional Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18062)
*Yunjia Yang,Babak Gholami,Caglar Gurbuz,Mohammad Rashed,Nils Thuerey*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出AeroTransformer方法，通过大规模预训练+少量任务特定样本微调，实现高精度气动预测，在翼型表面流动预测上达到0.36%误差，比从头训练减少84.2%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 气动预测的机器学习模型对于加速形状优化至关重要，但复杂三维构型的训练数据生成成本高，开发准确模型具有挑战性。需要高效构建用于设计目的的代理模型。

Method: 提出两阶段方法：1）在多样化几何数据集SuperWing（近30000个样本）上预训练大规模Transformer模型AeroTransformer；2）使用少量任务特定样本（如450个）进行微调。系统研究了模型配置和训练策略。

Result: 在跨音速翼型上，仅用450个任务特定样本，表面流动预测误差达到0.36%，比从头训练减少84.2%。发布了数据集、预训练模型和在线交互设计工具。

Conclusion: 该方法通过大规模预训练+少量微调，在有限数据和计算预算下有效构建高精度气动预测模型，为气动设计优化提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Accurate machine-learning models for aerodynamic prediction are essential for accelerating shape optimization, yet remain challenging to develop for complex three-dimensional configurations due to the high cost of generating training data. This work introduces a methodology for efficiently constructing accurate surrogate models for design purposes by first pre-training a large-scale model on diverse geometries and then fine-tuning it with a few more detailed task-specific samples. A Transformer-based architecture, AeroTransformer, is developed and tailored for large-scale training to learn aerodynamics. The methodology is evaluated on transonic wings, where the model is pre-trained on SuperWing, a dataset of nearly 30000 samples with broad geometric diversity, and subsequently fine-tuned to handle specific wing shapes perturbed from the Common Research Model. Results show that, with 450 task-specific samples, the proposed methodology achieves 0.36% error on surface-flow prediction, reducing 84.2% compared to training from scratch. The influence of model configurations and training strategies is also systematically studied to provide guidance on effectively training and deploying such models under limited data and computational budgets. To facilitate reuse, we release the datasets and the pre-trained models at https://github.com/tum-pbs/AeroTransformer. An interactive design tool is also built on the pre-trained model and is available online at https://webwing.pbs.cit.tum.de.

</details>


### [908] [Towards E-Value Based Stopping Rules for Bayesian Deep Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18089)
*Emanuel Sommer,Rickmer Schulte,Sarah Deubner,Julius Kobialka,David Rügamer*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出基于E值的停止规则，用于贝叶斯深度集成中的MCMC采样，通过序列假设检验判断何时停止采样以获得显著改进


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 贝叶斯深度集成结合了深度集成的鲁棒性和MCMC的灵活性，但MCMC采样成本高昂。现有研究表明在优化后的深度集成基础上进行采样能显著改进，但缺乏指导何时停止采样的原则性方法。

Method: 提出基于E值的停止规则，将集成构建建模为序列任意时间有效的假设检验，零假设为MCMC相比基线无改进。通过E值判断是否拒绝零假设，从而早期停止采样。

Result: 实验结果表明该方法有效，且通常只需要完整链预算的一小部分就能获得显著改进。

Conclusion: 基于E值的停止规则为贝叶斯深度集成中的MCMC采样提供了原则性的早期停止方法，显著降低计算成本。

Abstract: Bayesian Deep Ensembles (BDEs) represent a powerful approach for uncertainty quantification in deep learning, combining the robustness of Deep Ensembles (DEs) with flexible multi-chain MCMC. While DEs are affordable in most deep learning settings, (long) sampling of Bayesian neural networks can be prohibitively costly. Yet, adding sampling after optimizing the DEs has been shown to yield significant improvements. This leaves a critical practical question: How long should the sequential sampling process continue to yield significant improvements over the initial optimized DE baseline? To tackle this question, we propose a stopping rule based on E-values. We formulate the ensemble construction as a sequential anytime-valid hypothesis test, providing a principled way to decide whether or not to reject the null hypothesis that MCMC offers no improvement over a strong baseline, to early stop the sampling. Empirically, we study this approach for diverse settings. Our results demonstrate the efficacy of our approach and reveal that only a fraction of the full-chain budget is often required.

</details>


### [909] [Generalization Boundaries of Fine-Tuned Small Language Models for Graph Structural Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18092)
*Michal Podstawski*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该研究系统评估了微调后的小型语言模型在图结构推理任务中的泛化能力，重点关注图大小和图族分布两个维度，发现模型在超出训练范围的情况下仍能保持一定的结构推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管微调后的小型语言模型在图属性估计任务中表现出色，但其在训练条件之外的泛化能力尚不明确。研究者希望系统探究这些模型在结构推理任务中的泛化边界，特别是针对图大小和图族分布的泛化能力。

Method: 使用三个3-4B参数的指令微调模型和两种图序列化格式，在受控实验设置下评估模型性能。测试包括远大于训练范围的图以及保留的随机图族，系统研究模型在图大小和图族分布两个维度上的泛化能力。

Result: 微调模型在不同结构图族之间保持强序一致性，即使在输入图远大于训练样本时仍能按结构属性对图进行排序。不同架构模型表现出特定的性能退化模式，模型在图结构推理任务中展现出一定的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 研究明确了微调后小型语言模型在图结构推理任务中可靠泛化的边界，为其在图推理任务中的应用提供了实证基础，揭示了模型在超出训练条件时的泛化特性。

Abstract: Small language models fine-tuned for graph property estimation have demonstrated strong in-distribution performance, yet their generalization capabilities beyond training conditions remain poorly understood. In this work, we systematically investigate the boundaries of structural inference in fine-tuned small language models along two generalization axes - graph size and graph family distribution - and assess domain-learning capability on real-world graph benchmarks. Using a controlled experimental setup with three instruction-tuned models in the 3-4B parameter class and two graph serialization formats, we evaluate performance on graphs substantially larger than the training range and across held-out random graph families. Our results show that fine-tuned models maintain strong ordinal consistency across structurally distinct graph families and continue to rank graphs by structural properties on inputs substantially larger than those seen during training, with distinct architecture-specific degradation profiles. These findings delineate where fine-tuned small language models generalize reliably, providing empirical grounding for their use in graph-based reasoning tasks.

</details>


### [910] [LoRaQ: Optimized Low Rank Approximation for 4-bit Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18117)
*Yann Bouquet,Alireza Khodamoradi,Sophie Yáng Shen,Kristof Denolf,Mathieu Salzmann*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: LoRaQ是一种用于扩散变换器的数据无关后训练量化方法，通过低秩近似补偿量化误差，首次实现全子16位量化管道，在同等内存开销下优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 后训练量化对于在资源受限硬件上部署大型扩散变换器至关重要，但激进的4位量化会显著降低生成性能。现有低秩近似方法需要高精度分支和大量数据依赖校准，限制了实际部署。

Method: 提出LoRaQ（低秩近似量化），一种简单、数据无关的校准方法，优化量化误差补偿。克服了高精度分支的需求，使低秩分支本身也能被量化，实现全子16位量化管道。

Result: 在Pixart-Σ和SANA上，同等内存开销下LoRaQ优于现有方法。混合精度配置（如W8A8、W6A6、W4A8低秩分支配合W4主层）在保持全量化架构的同时获得更好结果。

Conclusion: LoRaQ通过数据无关校准和全子16位量化管道，为扩散变换器的高效部署提供了实用解决方案，兼容现代混合精度硬件。

Abstract: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is essential for deploying large diffusion transformers on resource-constrained hardware, but aggressive 4-bit quantization significantly degrades generative performance. Low-rank approximation methods have emerged as a promising solution by appending auxiliary linear branches to restore performance. However, current state-of-the-art approaches assume these branches must retain high precision (W16A16) and rely on heavy, data-dependent calibration for initialization. We challenge both limitations with LoRaQ (Low-Rank Approximated Quantization), a simple, data-free calibration approach that optimizes quantization error compensation. By overcoming the need for high-precision branches, LoRaQ enables the first fully sub-16 bit pipeline, allowing the low-rank branch itself to be quantized. We demonstrate that, at equal memory overhead, LoRaQ outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in their native implementations on Pixart-$Σ$ and SANA. We also analyze mixed-precision configurations, showing that setups such as W8A8, W6A6, and W4A8 for the low-rank branch, alongside a W4 main layer, yield superior results while maintaining a fully quantized architecture compatible with modern mixed-precision hardware.

</details>


### [911] [Randomly Initialized Networks Can Learn from Peer-to-Peer Consensus](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18390)
*Esteban Rodríguez-Betancourt,Edgar Casasola-Murillo*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了自蒸馏在学习动态中的作用，通过去除投影器、预测器等常见组件，仅使用随机初始化的网络进行自蒸馏训练，发现即使在这种最小化设置下也能学习到对下游任务有用的表示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自监督学习中的自蒸馏方法表现出色，但现有方法通常依赖于复杂的机制集成，许多设计选择是经验性的且缺乏理论理解。本文旨在探究自蒸馏在学习动态中的核心作用。

Method: 通过训练一组随机初始化的网络来隔离自蒸馏效应，移除了投影器、预测器甚至预训练任务等所有常见组件，仅保留自蒸馏过程。

Result: 即使在这种最小化设置下，学习到的表示在下游任务上相比随机基线仍有非平凡改进。研究还展示了不同超参数如何影响这种效应，并对模型学习内容进行了简要分析。

Conclusion: 自蒸馏本身具有独立的学习能力，无需复杂组件即可学习有用表示，这为理解自蒸馏机制提供了新视角。

Abstract: In self-supervised learning, self-distilled methods have shown impressive performance, learning representations useful for downstream tasks and even displaying emergent properties. However, state-of-the-art methods usually rely on ensembles of complex mechanisms, with many design choices that are empirically motivated and not well understood.
  In this work, we explore the role of self-distillation within learning dynamics. Specifically, we isolate the effect of self-distillation by training a group of randomly initialized networks, removing all other common components such as projectors, predictors, and even pretext tasks. Our findings show that even this minimal setup can lead to learned representations with non-trivial improvements over a random baseline on downstream tasks. We also demonstrate how this effect varies with different hyperparameters and present a short analysis of what is being learned by the models under this setup.

</details>


### [912] [ProtoCLIP: Prototype-Aligned Latent Refinement for Robust Zero-Shot Chest X-Ray Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18444)
*Florian Kittler,Sheethal Bhat,Andreas Maier*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: ProtoCLIP：针对医学影像分类的CLIP风格视觉语言模型改进策略，通过病理聚焦数据筛选和锚点对齐蒸馏，提升零样本分类性能，在VinDr-CXR数据集上AUC提升2-10个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本视觉语言模型在胸部X光片分类中存在三个主要问题：标签共现导致的混淆、长尾类别不平衡、以及领域迁移的不稳定性，限制了其在医学影像分析中的实际应用。

Method: 1. 构建病理聚焦的训练子集，通过筛选负样本来减少共现偏差；2. 引入表示保持蒸馏目标，通过锚点对齐稳定模型适应过程，同时保持语义结构并改善临床相关共现病理的区分能力。

Result: 在未见数据集VinDr-CXR上，ProtoCLIP相比强CLIP基线在多个发现上的AUC提升2-10个百分点。特别对于气胸分类，达到了0.94的SOTA AUC性能。

Conclusion: 锚点引导的细化策略，结合筛选监督和受控适应，能够在不进行大规模重新训练的情况下，缓解医学视觉语言模型中常见的零样本迁移失败问题。

Abstract: Zero-shot vision-language models (VLMs) have shown promise for chest radiograph classification, but their performance is often limited by confounding label co-occurrence, long-tail class imbalance, and transfer instability under domain shift. We propose ProtoCLIP, a refinement strategy for CLIP-style VLMs that improves zero-shot discrimination through targeted data curation and distilled anchor alignment. Specifically, we construct pathology-focused training subsets with curated negative samples to reduce co-occurrence bias. We also introduce a representation-preserving distillation objective to stabilize adaptation while maintaining semantic structure and improving discrimination of clinically relevant co-occurring pathologies. Evaluated on an unseen dataset VinDr-CXR, ProtoCLIP improves AUC by 2-10 percentage points over a strong CLIP-based baseline across multiple findings. For pneumothorax specifically, ProtoCLIP achieves a state-of-the-art AUC of 0.94. These results demonstrate that anchor-guided refinement, coupled with curated supervision and controlled adaptation, can mitigate common zero-shot transfer failures in medical VLMs without requiring large-scale retraining.

</details>


### [913] [AutoPPA: Automated Circuit PPA Optimization via Contrastive Code-based Rule Library Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18445)
*Chongxiao Li,Pengwei Jin,Di Huang,Guangrun Sun,Husheng Han,Jianan Mu,Xinyao Zheng,Jiaguo Zhu,Shuyi Xing,Hanjun Wei,Tianyun Ma,Shuyao Cheng,Rui Zhang,Ying Wang,Zidong Du,Qi Guo,Xing Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: AutoPPA：一个完全自动化的PPA优化框架，通过探索-评估-归纳工作流自动生成优化规则，在RTL设计中超越手动优化和现有SOTA方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM自动化PPA优化方法效率不足：反馈式方法缺乏先验知识，知识式方法过度依赖人工总结的优化规则。需要一种能自动生成优化规则的方法来提升RTL设计中的PPA优化效率。

Method: 提出AutoPPA框架，采用探索-评估-归纳(E²I)工作流：1) 探索阶段生成多样化代码对；2) 评估阶段对比分析PPA指标；3) 归纳阶段从对比中抽象出优化规则。同时采用自适应多步搜索框架，为特定电路选择最有效的规则。

Result: 实验表明AutoPPA在PPA优化方面超越了手动优化和当前最先进的方法SymRTLO和RTLRewriter，证明了自动生成规则的优越性。

Conclusion: AutoPPA通过自动生成优化规则的方法，实现了比人工规则更有效的PPA优化，为RTL设计自动化提供了新思路。

Abstract: Performance, power, and area (PPA) optimization is a fundamental task in RTL design, requiring a precise understanding of circuit functionality and the relationship between circuit structures and PPA metrics. Recent studies attempt to automate this process using LLMs, but neither feedback-based nor knowledge-based methods are efficient enough, as they either design without any prior knowledge or rely heavily on human-summarized optimization rules.
  In this paper, we propose AutoPPA, a fully automated PPA optimization framework. The key idea is to automatically generate optimization rules that enhance the search for optimal solutions. To do this, AutoPPA employs an Explore-Evaluate-Induce ($E^2I$) workflow that contrasts and abstracts rules from diverse generated code pairs rather than manually defined prior knowledge, yielding better optimization patterns. To make the abstracted rules more generalizable, AutoPPA employs an adaptive multi-step search framework that adopts the most effective rules for a given circuit. Experiments show that AutoPPA outperforms both the manual optimization and the state-of-the-art methods SymRTLO and RTLRewriter.

</details>


### [914] [A Note on TurboQuant and the Earlier DRIVE/EDEN Line of Work](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18555)
*Ran Ben-Basat,Yaniv Ben-Itzhak,Gal Mendelson,Michael Mitzenmacher,Amit Portnoy,Shay Vargaftik*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文澄清了TurboQuant与早期DRIVE/EDEN量化方案的关系，指出TurboQuant是EDEN的特殊/次优版本，实验证明EDEN在各方面都优于TurboQuant。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 澄清近期TurboQuant工作与早期DRIVE（NeurIPS 2021）和EDEN（ICML 2022）量化方案之间的关系，指出TurboQuant实际上是EDEN的特殊或次优版本，需要纠正相关误解。

Method: 通过理论分析和实验验证：1）TurboQuant_mse是EDEN在固定标度参数S=1时的特例；2）TurboQuant_prod结合了有偏(b-1)位EDEN和无偏1位QJL残差量化，存在三个次优问题；3）重复TurboQuant论文中的所有实验进行对比验证。

Result: 实验证明：1）有偏EDEN（优化S）比TurboQuant_mse更准确；2）无偏EDEN明显优于TurboQuant_prod，通常优势超过1位（如2位EDEN优于3位TurboQuant_prod）；3）在所有实验设置中EDEN都优于TurboQuant。

Conclusion: TurboQuant是EDEN量化方案的特殊或次优版本，EDEN在理论设计和实验性能上都全面优于TurboQuant，建议使用EDEN而非TurboQuant进行模型量化。

Abstract: This note clarifies the relationship between the recent TurboQuant work and the earlier DRIVE (NeurIPS 2021) and EDEN (ICML 2022) schemes. DRIVE is a 1-bit quantizer that EDEN extended to any $b>0$ bits per coordinate; we refer to them collectively as EDEN.
  First, TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$ is a special case of EDEN obtained by fixing EDEN's scalar scale parameter to $S=1$. EDEN supports both biased and unbiased quantization, each optimized by a different $S$ (chosen via methods described in the EDEN works). The fixed choice $S=1$ used by TurboQuant is generally suboptimal, although the optimal $S$ for biased EDEN converges to $1$ as the dimension grows; accordingly TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$ approaches EDEN's behavior for large $d$.
  Second, TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$ combines a biased $(b-1)$-bit EDEN step with an unbiased 1-bit QJL quantization of the residual. It is suboptimal in three ways: (1) its $(b-1)$-bit step uses the suboptimal $S=1$; (2) its 1-bit unbiased residual quantization has worse MSE than (unbiased) 1-bit EDEN; (3) chaining a biased $(b-1)$-bit step with a 1-bit unbiased residual step is inferior to unbiasedly quantizing the input directly with $b$-bit EDEN.
  Third, some of the analysis in the TurboQuant work mirrors that of the EDEN works: both exploit the connection between random rotations and the shifted Beta distribution, use the Lloyd-Max algorithm, and note that Randomized Hadamard Transforms can replace uniform random rotations.
  Experiments support these claims: biased EDEN (with optimized $S$) is more accurate than TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$, and unbiased EDEN is markedly more accurate than TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$, often by more than a bit (e.g., 2-bit EDEN beats 3-bit TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$). We also repeat all accuracy experiments from the TurboQuant paper, showing that EDEN outperforms it in every setup we have tried.

</details>


### [915] [A multimodal and temporal foundation model for virtual patient representations at healthcare system scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18570)
*Andrew Zhang,Tong Ding,Sophia J. Wagner,Caiwei Tian,Ming Y. Lu,Rowland Pettit,Joshua E. Lewis,Alexandre Misrahi,Dandan Mo,Long Phi Le,Faisal Mahmood*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: Apollo是一个多模态时序基础模型，整合了30年医院记录，包含250亿条记录、720万患者、28种医疗模态，学习统一的医疗概念表示空间，用于疾病预测、进展、治疗反应等临床任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代医学产生大量多模态数据，但现有模型无法整合临床记录的完整广度和时间深度。需要统一的患者表示来建模整个患者护理旅程。

Method: 训练多模态时序基础模型，整合28种医疗模态（包括图像和临床文本），学习包含超过10万个独特医疗事件的统一表示空间，将结构化/非结构化事件序列压缩为虚拟患者表示。

Result: 在322个预后和检索任务上评估，展示临床预测潜力：预测5年内新疾病发病风险（95任务）、疾病进展（78任务）、治疗反应（59任务）、治疗相关不良事件风险（17任务）、医院运营终点（12任务）。特征归因显示预测与临床可解释多模态生物标志物一致。

Conclusion: Apollo为可计算医学奠定基础，使患者护理的完整上下文可被计算推理访问，建立医疗概念图谱作为计算基质。

Abstract: Modern medicine generates vast multimodal data across siloed systems, yet no existing model integrates the full breadth and temporal depth of the clinical record into a unified patient representation. We introduce Apollo, a multimodal temporal foundation model trained and evaluated on over three decades of longitudinal hospital records from a major US hospital system, composed of 25 billion records from 7.2 million patients, representing 28 distinct medical modalities and 12 major medical specialties. Apollo learns a unified representation space integrating over 100 thousand unique medical events in our clinical vocabulary as well as images and clinical text. This "atlas of medical concepts" forms a computational substrate for modeling entire patient care journeys comprised of sequences of structured and unstructured events, which are compressed by Apollo into virtual patient representations. To assess the potential of these whole-patient representations, we created 322 prognosis and retrieval tasks from a held-out test set of 1.4 million patients. We demonstrate the generalized clinical forecasting potential of Apollo embeddings, including predicting new disease onset risk up to five years in advance (95 tasks), disease progression (78 tasks), treatment response (59 tasks), risk of treatment-related adverse events (17 tasks), and hospital operations endpoints (12 tasks). Using feature attribution techniques, we show that model predictions align with clinically-interpretable multimodal biomarkers. We evaluate semantic similarity search on 61 retrieval tasks, and moreover demonstrate the potential of Apollo as a multimodal medical search engine using text and image queries. Together, these modeling capabilities establish the foundation for computable medicine, where the full context of patient care becomes accessible to computational reasoning.

</details>


### [916] [A Mechanism Study of Delayed Loss Spikes in Batch-Normalized Linear Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16809)
*Peifeng Gao,Wenyi Fang,Yang Zheng,Difan Zou*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 论文研究批归一化如何通过逐渐增加有效学习率导致延迟损失尖峰，在批归一化线性模型中建立了理论分析框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络训练中观察到延迟损失尖峰现象，现有理论主要解释早期非单调行为（由固定学习率过大引起）。本文研究批归一化如何通过逐渐增加有效学习率，在原本稳定的下降过程中推迟不稳定性。

Method: 分析批归一化线性模型：1) 白化平方损失线性回归，推导无上升边和延迟起始条件，界定方向起始等待时间，证明上升边在有限迭代内自稳定；2) 逻辑回归，在高度限制的活动边界假设下，证明刀锋区域内的有限时域方向前兆。

Result: 1) 白化平方损失线性回归中建立了具体的延迟尖峰机制；2) 逻辑回归中仅得到有限时域方向前兆；3) 结果隔离了批归一化诱导的一种具体延迟不稳定性路径。

Conclusion: 本文是机制研究而非神经网络损失尖峰的通用解释，在限定范围内隔离了批归一化诱导的一种具体延迟不稳定性路径。

Abstract: Delayed loss spikes have been reported in neural-network training, but existing theory mainly explains earlier non-monotone behavior caused by overly large fixed learning rates. We study one stylized hypothesis: normalization can postpone instability by gradually increasing the effective learning rate during otherwise stable descent. To test this hypothesis at theorem level, we analyze batch-normalized linear models. Our flagship result concerns whitened square-loss linear regression, where we derive explicit no-rising-edge and delayed-onset conditions, bound the waiting time to directional onset, and show that the rising edge self-stabilizes within finitely many iterations. Combined with a square-loss decomposition, this yields a concrete delayed-spike mechanism in the whitened regime. For logistic regression, under highly restrictive active-margin assumptions, we prove only a supporting finite-horizon directional precursor in a knife-edge regime, with an optional appendix-only loss lower bound under an extra non-degeneracy condition. The paper should therefore be read as a stylized mechanism study rather than a general explanation of neural-network loss spikes. Within that scope, the results isolate one concrete delayed-instability pathway induced by batch normalization.

</details>


### [917] [SPaRSe-TIME: Saliency-Projected Low-Rank Temporal Modeling for Efficient and Interpretable Time Series Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17350)
*K. A. Shahriar*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: SPaRSe-TIME：一种结构化时间序列预测框架，将时间序列分解为显著性、记忆和趋势三个互补组件，通过投影到信息子空间实现高效、可解释的时序建模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统序列架构（如RNN和注意力机制）统一处理所有时间步，计算成本高，而真实世界时间信号通常具有异构结构，信息模式稀疏分布且与冗余观测交织。需要一种更高效、可解释的时间序列建模方法。

Method: 将时间序列分解为三个组件：1) 显著性（数据相关的稀疏化算子），2) 记忆（捕获主导的低秩时序模式），3) 趋势（编码低频动态）。通过轻量级自适应映射集成这些组件，实现简化、选择性和可解释的时序推理。

Result: 在多样化真实世界数据集上的实验表明，SPaRSe-TIME相比循环和注意力架构实现了有竞争力的预测性能，同时显著降低了计算复杂度。在具有清晰时序组件的结构化时间序列中特别有效，并通过组件贡献提供显式可解释性。

Conclusion: SPaRSe-TIME为整体序列模型提供了原则性替代方案，在效率、可解释性和性能之间架起桥梁，为时间序列学习提供了可扩展框架。分析揭示了基于分解建模的优势和局限性，特别是在高度随机和复杂多变量设置中的挑战。

Abstract: Time series forecasting is traditionally dominated by sequence-based architectures such as recurrent neural networks and attention mechanisms, which process all time steps uniformly and often incur substantial computational cost. However, real-world temporal signals typically exhibit heterogeneous structure, where informative patterns are sparsely distributed and interspersed with redundant observations. This work introduces \textbf{SPaRSe-TIME}, a structured and computationally efficient framework that models time series through a decomposition into three complementary components: saliency, memory, and trend. The proposed approach reformulates temporal modeling as a projection onto informative subspaces, where saliency acts as a data-dependent sparsification operator, memory captures dominant low-rank temporal patterns, and trend encodes low-frequency dynamics. These components are integrated through a lightweight, adaptive mapping that enables simplified, selective, and interpretable temporal reasoning. Extensive experiments on diverse real-world datasets demonstrate that SPaRSe-TIME achieves competitive predictive performance compared to recurrent and attention-based architectures, while significantly reducing computational complexity. The model is particularly effective in structured time series with clear temporal components and provides explicit interpretability through component-wise contributions. Furthermore, analysis reveals both the strengths and limitations of decomposition-based modeling, highlighting challenges in highly stochastic and complex multivariate settings. Overall, SPaRSe-TIME offers a principled alternative to monolithic sequence models, bridging efficiency, interpretability, and performance, and providing a scalable framework for time series learning.

</details>


### [918] [Matlas: A Semantic Search Engine for Mathematics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17484)
*Haocheng Ju,Leheng Chen,Peihao Wu,Bryan Dai,Bin Dong*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: Matlas是一个数学语句语义搜索引擎，基于从43.5万篇论文和1900本教科书中提取的807万条数学语句构建，支持自然语言查询检索数学结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数学知识检索在人类研究和AI系统中都至关重要，但数学文献规模庞大且结构复杂，结果分散在数百万文档中，单个语句因依赖先前的定义和定理而难以独立理解。

Method: 从435K篇同行评审论文和1.9K本教科书中提取807万条数学语句及其依赖关系，构建文档级依赖图，按拓扑顺序递归展开语句以生成更自包含的表示，在此基础上开发语义检索系统。

Result: 构建了大规模数学语句语料库和语义检索系统，能够高效搜索数学结果，支持自然语言查询。

Conclusion: Matlas可以提高数学家检索定理的效率，为处理研究级数学问题的AI系统提供结构化基础，并作为数学知识检索基础设施的一部分。

Abstract: Retrieving mathematical knowledge is a central task in both human-driven research, such as determining whether a result already exists, finding related results, and identifying historical origins, and in emerging AI systems for mathematics, where reliable grounding is essential. However, the scale and structure of the mathematical literature pose significant challenges: results are distributed across millions of documents, and individual statements are often difficult to interpret in isolation due to their dependence on prior definitions and theorems. In this paper, we introduce Matlas, a semantic search engine for mathematical statements. Matlas is built on a large-scale corpus of 8.07 million statements extracted from 435K peer-reviewed papers spanning 1826 to 2025, drawn from a curated set of 180 journals selected using an ICM citation-based criterion, together with 1.9K textbooks. From these sources, we extract mathematical statements together with their dependencies, construct document-level dependency graphs, and recursively unfold statements in topological order to produce more self-contained representations. On top of this corpus, we develop a semantic retrieval system that enables efficient search for mathematical results using natural language queries. We hope that Matlas can improve the efficiency of theorem retrieval for mathematicians and provide a structured source of grounding for AI systems tackling research-level mathematical problems, and serve as part of the infrastructure for mathematical knowledge retrieval.

</details>


### [919] [Target Parameterization in Diffusion Models for Nonlinear Spatiotemporal System Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17566)
*Achraf El Messaoudi,Noureddine Khaous,Karim Cherifi*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了在湍流非线性时空系统识别中，扩散模型的目标参数化选择问题，发现直接预测清洁状态比速度或噪声预测更稳定且误差更小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统非线性系统识别方法在湍流等高维、强非线性、对误差敏感的系统中表现不佳。扩散模型在此场景下显示出更强的鲁棒性，但现有实现大多继承图像生成中的目标参数化（噪声或速度预测），这些参数化在时空系统识别中是否最优尚不明确。

Method: 使用简单的、自包含的基于补丁的Transformer模型，直接在物理场上操作，以湍流模拟为代表性测试平台。比较三种目标参数化：清洁状态预测、速度预测和噪声预测。

Result: 清洁状态预测在滚动稳定性方面表现最好，长期误差最小。随着每个token维度的增加，清洁状态预测相对于速度/噪声预测的优势更加明显。

Conclusion: 目标参数化是扩散基非线性时空系统识别中的关键建模选择，清洁状态预测在湍流等高维系统中具有显著优势。

Abstract: Machine learning is becoming increasingly important for nonlinear system identification, including dynamical systems with spatially distributed outputs. However, classical identification and forecasting approaches become markedly less reliable in turbulent-flow regimes, where the dynamics are high-dimensional, strongly nonlinear, and highly sensitive to compounding rollout errors.
