Across multiple ICU prediction tasks on MIMIC, OC-Distill demonstrates improved label efficiency and achieves state-of-the-art performance among methods that use only vital signs at inference.

</details>


### [957] [Test-Time Adaptation for EEG Foundation Models: A Systematic Study under Real-World Distribution Shifts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16926)
*Gabriel Jason Lee,Jathurshan Pradeepkumar,Jimeng Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文介绍了NeuroAdapt-Bench，一个用于评估EEG基础模型在现实分布偏移下测试时适应方法的系统基准。研究发现标准TTA方法在EEG领域表现不一致且常导致性能下降，而无需优化的方法更稳定可靠。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EEG基础模型在临床部署中面临跨临床环境、设备和人群的分布偏移挑战。测试时适应（TTA）能够在推理时适应未标记的目标数据，无需访问源数据，这在受隐私法规和有限标记数据约束的医疗环境中很有价值，但其在EEG领域的有效性尚未充分探索。

Method: 引入NeuroAdapt-Bench基准，评估来自其他领域的代表性TTA方法，涵盖多个预训练基础模型、多样化下游任务和异构数据集，包括分布内、分布外和极端模态偏移（如Ear-EEG）。

Result: 标准TTA方法在EEG上表现不一致，常导致性能下降，基于梯度的方法尤其容易出现严重退化。相比之下，无需优化的方法表现出更好的稳定性和更可靠的改进。

Conclusion: 现有TTA技术在EEG领域存在局限性，需要领域特定的适应策略。研究结果为未来开发提供了指导，并强调了针对EEG领域定制适应方法的重要性。

Abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) foundation models have shown strong potential for learning generalizable representations from large-scale neural data, yet their clinical deployment is hindered by distribution shifts across clinical settings, devices, and populations. Test-time adaptation (TTA) offers a promising solution by enabling models to adapt to unlabeled target data during inference without access to source data, a valuable property in healthcare settings constrained by privacy regulations and limited labeled data. However, its effectiveness for EEG remains largely underexplored. In this work, we introduce NeuroAdapt-Bench, a systematic benchmark for evaluating test-time adaptation methods on EEG foundation models under realistic distribution shifts. We evaluate representative TTA approaches from other domains across multiple pretrained foundation models, diverse downstream tasks, and heterogeneous datasets spanning in-distribution, out-of-distribution, and extreme modality shifts (e.g., Ear-EEG). Our results show that standard TTA methods yield inconsistent gains and often degrade performance, with gradient-based approaches particularly prone to heavy degradation. In contrast, optimization-free methods demonstrate greater stability and more reliable improvements. These findings highlight the limitations of existing TTA techniques in EEG, provide guidance for future development, and underscore the need for domain-specific adaptation strategies.

</details>


### [958] [Hyperbolic Enhanced Representation Learning for Incomplete Multi-view Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16959)
*Tianyi Chen,Haobo Wang,Kai Tang,Gengyu Lyu,Tianlei Hu,Gang Chen,Hong Ma,Meixiang Xiang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出HERL框架，利用双曲几何增强不完整多视图聚类，通过角度和距离约束优化表示学习，解决语义模糊问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于欧几里得空间的不完整多视图聚类方法在处理具有内在层次结构的真实世界数据时存在几何不匹配问题，导致语义模糊——表示会漂移到空间邻近但语义不同的邻居。需要一种能更好建模层次结构的方法。

Method: 提出HERL（双曲增强表示学习）框架，在庞加莱球中操作，构建结构感知的潜在空间。设计双约束双曲对比机制：基于角度的损失通过方向对齐保持语义身份，基于距离的损失强制层次紧凑性。引入双曲原型头来对齐跨视图的层次感知原型分布，纠正全局结构漂移。

Result: 广泛的实验结果表明，HERL在多个数据集上持续优于最先进的方法，能够解耦细粒度语义相关性以锐化聚类边界，并施加几何约束以纠正数据恢复过程。

Conclusion: HERL通过双曲几何有效解决了不完整多视图聚类中的语义模糊问题，提供了更好的层次结构建模能力，显著提升了聚类性能。

Abstract: Incomplete Multi-View Clustering (IMVC) faces the challenge of learning discriminative representations from fragmentary observations while maintaining robustness against missing views. However, prevalent Euclidean-based methods suffer from a geometric mismatch when modeling real-world data with intrinsic hierarchies, leading to semantic blurring where representations drift towards spatially proximal but semantically distinct neighbors. To bridge this gap, we propose HERL, a Hyperbolic Enhanced Representation Learning framework for IMVC. Operating within the Poincaré ball, HERL constructs a structure-aware latent space to enhance representation learning. Specifically, we design a dual-constraint hyperbolic contrastive mechanism optimizing: an angular-based loss to preserve semantic identity via directional alignment, and a distance-based loss to enforce hierarchical compactness. Furthermore, a hyperbolic prototype head is introduced to rectify global structural drift by aligning cross-view hierarchy-aware prototype distributions. Consequently, HERL disentangles fine-grained semantic correlations to sharpen cluster boundaries and imposes geometric constraints to rectify the data recovery process. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that HERL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches.

</details>


### [959] [When Spike Sparsity Does Not Translate to Deployed Cost: VS-WNO on Jetson Orin Nano](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17040)
*Jason Yoo,Shailesh Garg,Souvik Chakraborty,Syed Bahauddin Alam*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 脉冲神经算子理论上能通过稀疏活动降低延迟和能耗，但在Jetson Orin Nano GPU上的实际部署中，稀疏性并未转化为性能优势，反而比密集版本更慢更耗能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究脉冲神经算子在商用边缘GPU软件栈上的实际部署效果，验证理论上的稀疏性优势是否能转化为实际部署中的延迟和能耗降低。

Method: 在Jetson Orin Nano 8GB上对比5个预训练的变脉冲小波神经算子(VS-WNO)和5个匹配的密集小波神经算子(WNO)，使用Darcy矩形基准测试，通过Nsight Systems分析性能。

Result: VS-WNO在算法层面确实有显著稀疏性（脉冲率从54.26%降至18.15%），但在部署中表现更差：延迟59.6ms vs 53.2ms，动态能耗228.0mJ vs 180.7mJ，且误差略高（1.81% vs 1.77%）。

Conclusion: 在当前Jetson级GPU软件栈上，脉冲稀疏性虽然可测量但无法降低部署成本，因为运行时不会随着脉冲活动减少而抑制密集计算工作。

Abstract: Spiking neural operators are appealing for neuromorphic edge computing because event-driven substrates can, in principle, translate sparse activity into lower latency and energy. Whether that advantage survives deployment on commodity edge-GPU software stacks, however, remains unclear. We study this question on a Jetson Orin Nano 8 GB using five pretrained variable-spiking wavelet neural operator (VS-WNO) checkpoints and five matched dense wavelet neural operator (WNO) checkpoints on the Darcy rectangular benchmark. On a reference-aligned path, VS-WNO exhibits substantial algorithmic sparsity, with mean spike rates decreasing from 54.26% at the first spiking layer to 18.15% at the fourth. On a deployment-style request path, however, this sparsity does not reduce deployed cost: VS-WNO reaches 59.6 ms latency and 228.0 mJ dynamic energy per inference, whereas dense WNO reaches 53.2 ms and 180.7 mJ, while also achieving slightly lower reference-path error (1.77% versus 1.81%). Nsight Systems indicates that the request path remains launch-dominated and dense rather than sparsity-aware: for VS-WNO, cudaLaunchKernel accounts for 81.6% of CUDA API time within the latency window, and dense convolution kernels account for 53.8% of GPU kernel time; dense WNO shows the same pattern. On this Jetson-class GPU stack, spike sparsity is measurable but does not reduce deployed cost because the runtime does not suppress dense work as spike activity decreases.

</details>


### [960] [Live LTL Progress Tracking: Towards Task-Based Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17106)
*Noel Brindise,Cedric Langbort,Melkior Ornik*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出Live LTL Progress Tracking框架，用于在强化学习中追踪和表示智能体在复杂多阶段任务中的进展，基于有限线性时序逻辑规范建立跟踪向量，为性能度量、多样化探索和奖励塑造提供工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对强化学习中非马尔可夫目标的挑战，需要一种能够追踪智能体在复杂多阶段任务中进展的框架。传统方法难以有效处理时序逻辑规范，特别是在任务执行过程中需要动态评估进度状态的情况。

Method: 提出Live LTL Progress Tracking框架，基于有限线性时序逻辑(LTL)规范建立"跟踪向量"。该向量在轨迹展开的每个时间步更新，表示规范的状态（真、假或"开放"状态）。将LTL公式树应用于跟踪向量，编码任务执行过程中的详细信息。

Result: 正式提出了框架和算法，给出了简单的工作示例，并展示了将其集成到RL模型中的途径。跟踪向量能够提供详细的执行信息，为新的性能度量、多样化探索和奖励塑造提供潜在工具。

Conclusion: Live LTL Progress Tracking框架为解决RL中非马尔可夫目标问题提供了新方法，未来将应用于任务空间探索和RL中多样化解决方案发现等问题。

Abstract: Motivated by the challenge presented by non-Markovian objectives in reinforcement learning (RL), we present a novel framework to track and represent the progress of autonomous agents through complex, multi-stage tasks. Given a specification in finite linear temporal logic (LTL), the framework establishes a 'tracking vector' which updates at each time step in a trajectory rollout. The values of the vector represent the status of the specification as the trajectory develops, assigning true, false, or 'open' labels (where 'open' is used for indeterminate cases). Applied to an LTL formula tree, the tracking vector can be used to encode detailed information about how a task is executed over a trajectory, providing a potential tool for new performance metrics, diverse exploration, and reward shaping. In this paper, we formally present the framework and algorithm, collectively named Live LTL Progress Tracking, give a simple working example, and demonstrate avenues for its integration into RL models. Future work will apply the framework to problems such as task-space exploration and diverse solution-finding in RL.

</details>


### [961] [Fully Analog Resonant Recurrent Neural Network via Metacircuit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17277)
*Zixin Zhou,Tianxi Jiang,Menglong Yang,Zhihua Feng,Qingbo He,Shiwu Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种完全模拟的谐振递归神经网络（R²NN），通过耦合电谐振器的元电路架构实现，能够直接处理原始模拟输入，无需模数转换，在触觉感知、语音识别和状态监测等任务中展示效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理神经网络在边缘智能中具有优势，但实现可扩展的端到端全模拟递归神经网络用于时序信息处理仍然困难，主要挑战在于如何将训练好的网络模型准确映射到物理硬件上。

Method: 采用元电路架构，由耦合的电谐振器组成。通过重新表述的机械-电类比，在R²NN模型和元电路元件之间建立直接映射。整合可联合训练的全局电阻耦合和局部谐振，产生有效的频率相关负电阻，形成阻抗景观，引导电流沿频率选择性路径流动。

Result: 该框架在集成硬件上展示了跨领域应用能力，包括触觉感知、语音识别和状态监测。能够直接提取判别性频谱特征，实现原始模拟输入的实时时序分类，同时绕过模数转换。

Conclusion: 这项工作建立了一个可扩展的、完全模拟的智能时序处理范式，为低延迟、资源高效的物理神经硬件在边缘智能中的应用铺平了道路。

Abstract: Physical neural networks offer a transformative route to edge intelligence, providing superior inference speed and energy efficiency compared to conventional digital architectures. However, realizing scalable, end-to-end, fully analog recurrent neural networks for temporal information processing remains challenging due to the difficulty of faithfully mapping trained network models onto physical hardware. Here we present a fully analog resonant recurrent neural network (R$^2$NN) implemented via a metacircuit architecture composed of coupled electrical local resonators. A reformulated mechanical-electrical analogy establishes a direct mapping between the R$^2$NN model and metacircuit elements, enabling accurate physical implementation of trained neural network parameters. By integrating jointly trainable global resistive coupling and local resonances, which generate effective frequency-dependent negative resistances, the architecture shapes an impedance landscape that steers currents along frequency-selective pathways. This mechanism enables direct extraction of discriminative spectral features, facilitating real-time temporal classification of raw analog inputs while bypassing analog-to-digital conversion. We demonstrate the cross-domain versatility of this framework using integrated hardware for tactile perception, speech recognition, and condition monitoring. This work establishes a scalable, fully analog paradigm for intelligent temporal processing and paves the way for low-latency, resource-efficient physical neural hardware for edge intelligence.

</details>


### [962] [FLARE: Task-agnostic embedding model evaluation through a normalization process](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17344)
*Jingzhou Jiang,Yixuan Tang,Yi Yang,Kar Yan Tam*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出FLARE方法，一种基于流的无标签嵌入评估方法，通过归一化流直接估计信息充分性，避免高维空间中的密度估计问题，在11个数据集和8个嵌入器上达到0.90的Spearman相关系数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当特定任务标签不可用时，难以为目标语料库选择合适的嵌入模型。现有的基于核估计或高斯混合的无标签度量方法在高维空间中失效，导致排名不稳定。

Method: 提出基于流的无标签表示嵌入评估（FLARE），利用归一化流直接从对数似然估计信息充分性，避免基于距离的密度估计。该方法给出了有限样本边界，表明估计误差取决于数据流形的内在维度而非原始嵌入维度。

Result: 在11个数据集和8个嵌入器上，FLARE在监督基准下达到Spearman相关系数ρ=0.90，并在高维嵌入（d≥3,584）中保持稳定，而现有的无标签基线方法失效。

Conclusion: FLARE提供了一种有效的无标签嵌入评估方法，能够稳定地评估高维嵌入质量，解决了现有方法在高维空间中的失效问题。

Abstract: When task-specific labels are not available, it becomes difficult to select an embedding model for a specific target corpus. Existing labelless measures based on kernel estimators or Gaussian mixes fail in high-dimensional space, resulting in unstable rankings. We propose a flow-based labelless representation embedding evaluation (FLARE), which utilizes normalized streams to estimate information sufficiency directly from log-likelihood and avoid distance-based density estimation. We give a finite sample boundary, indicating that the estimation error depends on the intrinsic dimension of the data manifold rather than the original embedding dimension. On 11 datasets and 8 embedders, FLARE reached Spearman's $ρ$ of 0.90 under the supervised benchmark and remained stable in high-dimensional embeddings ($d \geq 3{,}584$) as the existing labelless baseline collapsed.

</details>


### [963] [Back to Repair: A Minimal Denoising Network\ for Time Series Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17388)
*Kadir-Kaan Özer,René Ebeling,Markus Enzweiler*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: JuRe是一个用于时间序列异常检测的极简去噪网络，仅使用单个深度可分离卷积残差块，通过修复损坏的时间序列窗口进行训练，在推理时使用无参数的结构差异函数评分，在多个基准测试中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 本文挑战了时间序列异常检测中复杂架构的必要性，提出当训练目标正确实现流形投影原理时，架构复杂性是不必要的。作者旨在证明去噪目标而非网络容量是检测质量的主要驱动因素。

Method: JuRe采用极简架构：单个深度可分离卷积残差块（隐藏维度128），训练时修复损坏的时间序列窗口，推理时使用固定的无参数结构差异函数评分。不使用注意力机制、潜在变量或对抗组件。

Result: 在TSB-AD多变量基准测试中排名第二（AUC-PR 0.404），在UCR单变量档案中AUC-PR排名第二（0.198），在所有神经基线中AUC-PR和VUS-PR领先。消融实验显示训练时损坏是主导因素（移除后ΔAUC-PR=0.047）。

Conclusion: 架构复杂性对于时间序列异常检测是不必要的，当训练目标正确实现流形投影原理时，极简的去噪网络就能取得优异性能。去噪目标而非网络容量是检测质量的主要驱动因素。

Abstract: We introduce JuRe (Just Repair), a minimal denoising network for time series anomaly detection that exposes a central finding: architectural complexity is unnecessary when the training objective correctly implements the manifold-projection principle. JuRe consists of a single depthwise-separable convolutional residual block with hidden dimension 128, trained to repair corrupted time series windows and scored at inference by a fixed, parameter-free structural discrepancy function. Despite using no attention, no latent variable, and no adversarial component, JuRe ranks second on the TSB-AD multivariate benchmark (AUC-PR 0.404, 180 series, 17 datasets) and second on the UCR univariate archive by AUC-PR (0.198, 250 series), leading all neural baselines on AUC-PR and VUS-PR. Component ablation on TSB-AD identifies training-time corruption as the dominant factor ($Δ$AUC-PR $= 0.047$ on removal), confirming that the denoising objective, not network capacity, drives detection quality. Pairwise Wilcoxon signed-rank tests establish statistical significance against 21 of 25 baselines on TSB-AD. Code is available at the URL https://github.com/iis-esslingen/JuRe.

</details>


### [964] [On the Generalization Bounds of Symbolic Regression with Genetic Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17402)
*Masahiro Nomura,Ryoki Hamano,Isao Ono*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文为基于遗传编程的符号回归提供了学习理论分析，推导了表达式树表示下的泛化边界，将泛化差距分解为结构选择和常数拟合两个可解释分量，为GP实践提供了理论解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管基于遗传编程的符号回归在经验上取得了成功，但对其为何能在训练数据之外泛化的理论理解仍然有限。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，为GP-SR的泛化特性提供严格的理论分析。

Method: 采用学习理论分析方法，针对表达式树表示的符号回归模型，在树大小、深度和可学习常数约束下推导泛化边界。将泛化差距分解为两个可解释分量：结构选择项（反映选择表达式树结构的组合复杂性）和常数拟合项（捕捉固定结构内优化数值常数的复杂性）。

Result: 推导出的泛化边界为GP中的多种常用实践提供了理论解释：简约压力、深度限制、数值稳定算子和区间算术。分析表明结构限制减少了假设类的增长，而稳定性机制控制了预测对参数扰动的敏感性。

Conclusion: 通过将实际设计选择与泛化边界中的显式复杂性项联系起来，本文为GP-SR中常见经验行为提供了原则性解释，有助于更严格地理解其泛化特性。

Abstract: Symbolic regression (SR) with genetic programming (GP) aims to discover interpretable mathematical expressions directly from data. Despite its strong empirical success, the theoretical understanding of why GP-based SR generalizes beyond the training data remains limited. In this work, we provide a learning-theoretic analysis of SR models represented as expression trees. We derive a generalization bound for GP-style SR under constraints on tree size, depth, and learnable constants. Our result decomposes the generalization gap into two interpretable components: a structure-selection term, reflecting the combinatorial complexity of choosing an expression-tree structure, and a constant-fitting term, capturing the complexity of optimizing numerical constants within a fixed structure. This decomposition provides a theoretical perspective on several widely used practices in GP, including parsimony pressure, depth limits, numerically stable operators, and interval arithmetic. In particular, our analysis shows how structural restrictions reduce hypothesis-class growth while stability mechanisms control the sensitivity of predictions to parameter perturbations. By linking these practical design choices to explicit complexity terms in the generalization bound, our work offers a principled explanation for commonly observed empirical behaviors in GP-based SR and contributes towards a more rigorous understanding of its generalization properties.

</details>


### [965] [TransXion: A High-Fidelity Graph Benchmark for Realistic Anti-Money Laundering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17420)
*Keyang Chen,Mingxuan Jiang,Yongsheng Zhao,Zeping Li,Zaiyuan Chen,Weiqi Luo,Zhixin Li,Sen Liu,Yinan Jing,Guangnan Ye,Xihong Wu,Hongfeng Chai*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: TransXion是一个用于反洗钱研究的基准生态系统，通过整合基于实体的正常活动模拟和随机的非法子图合成，解决了现有交易图数据集缺乏现实性的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有反洗钱交易图数据集存在两个普遍限制：1) 节点语义稀疏，仅有匿名标识符；2) 依赖模板驱动的异常注入，导致基准偏向静态结构模式，对模型鲁棒性的评估过于乐观。这阻碍了反洗钱研究的进展。

Method: TransXion整合了基于实体档案的正常活动模拟和随机的、非模板的非法子图合成。该方法联合建模持久性实体档案和条件交易行为，能够评估"角色外"异常（即观察到的活动与实体的社会经济背景相矛盾）。

Result: 生成的数据集包含约300万笔交易和5万个实体，每个实体都有丰富的人口统计和行为属性。实证分析表明TransXion重现了支付网络的关键结构特性。在多种检测模型上，TransXion的检测性能显著低于广泛使用的基准，表明其难度和现实性更高。

Conclusion: TransXion为开发上下文感知和鲁棒的反洗钱检测方法提供了更真实的测试平台，数据集和代码已公开。

Abstract: Money laundering poses severe risks to global financial systems, driving the widespread adoption of machine learning for transaction monitoring. However, progress remains stifled by the lack of realistic benchmarks. Existing transaction-graph datasets suffer from two pervasive limitations: (i) they provide sparse node-level semantics beyond anonymized identifiers, and (ii) they rely on template-driven anomaly injection, which biases benchmarks toward static structural motifs and yields overly optimistic assessments of model robustness. We propose TransXion, a benchmark ecosystem for Anti-Money Laundering (AML) research that integrates profile-aware simulation of normal activity with stochastic, non-template synthesis of illicit subgraphs.TransXion jointly models persistent entity profiles and conditional transaction behavior, enabling evaluation of "out-of-character" anomalies where observed activity contradicts an entity's socio-economic context. The resulting dataset comprises approximately 3 million transactions among 50,000 entities, each endowed with rich demographic and behavioral attributes. Empirical analyses show that TransXion reproduces key structural properties of payment networks, including heavy-tailed activity distributions and localized subgraph structure. Across a diverse array of detection models spanning multiple algorithmic paradigms, TransXion yields substantially lower detection performance than widely used benchmarks, demonstrating increased difficulty and realism. TransXion provides a more faithful testbed for developing context-aware and robust AML detection methods. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/chaos-max/TransXion.

</details>


### [966] [Neural Adjoint Method for Meta-optics: Accelerating Volumetric Inverse Design via Fourier Neural Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17425)
*Chanik Kang,Hyewon Suk,Haejun Chung*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出神经伴随方法，使用傅里叶神经算子预测3D伴随梯度场，将元光学设计时间从数小时减少到数秒


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 元光学设计是一个高维优化问题，需要反复求解计算昂贵的麦克斯韦方程。即使使用伴随优化，宽带设计也需要数千次麦克斯韦求解，导致工业规模优化缓慢且成本高昂。

Method: 提出神经伴随方法，使用傅里叶神经算子从体素化介电常数体积预测3D伴随梯度场。引入阶段式FNO，逐步细化残差误差，并增加对高频分量的关注。构建了来自配对前向/伴随FDTD模拟的元光学数据集。

Result: 方法在三个任务上评估：光谱排序（颜色路由器）、消色差聚焦（超透镜）和波导模式转换。设计时间从数小时减少到数秒。

Conclusion: 神经伴随方法为快速、大规模的体积元光学设计提供了一条实用途径，通过AI加速科学计算实现。

Abstract: Meta-optics promises compact, high-performance imaging and color routing. However, designing high-performance structures is a high-dimensional optimization problem: mapping a desired optical output back to a physical 3D structure requires solving computationally expensive Maxwell's equations iteratively. Even with adjoint optimization, broadband design can require thousands of Maxwell solves, making industrial-scale optimization slow and costly. To overcome this challenge, we propose the Neural Adjoint Method, a solver-supervised surrogate that predicts 3D adjoint gradient fields from a voxelized permittivity volume using a Fourier Neural Operator (FNO). By learning the dense, per-voxel sensitivity field that drives gradient-based updates, our method can replace per-iteration adjoint solves with fast predictions, greatly reducing the computational cost of full-wave simulations required during iterative refinement. To better preserve sensitivity peaks, we introduce a stage-wise FNO that progressively refines residual errors with increasing emphasis on higher-frequency components. We curate a meta-optics dataset from paired forward/adjoint FDTD simulations and evaluate it across three tasks: spectral sorting (color routers), achromatic focusing (metalenses), and waveguide mode conversion. Our method reduces design time from hours to seconds. These results suggest a practical route toward fast, large-scale volumetric meta-optical design enabled by AI-accelerated scientific computing.

</details>


### [967] [Machine Learning Hamiltonian Dynamical Systems with Sparse and Noisy Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17470)
*Vedanta Thapar,Abhinav Gupta*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出ASRNNs（自适应辛循环神经网络），通过结合哈密顿量学习和辛循环积分，从极稀疏、噪声、不规则采样的数据中学习非线性哈密顿动力系统的符号表示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在观测数据稀疏、噪声大或不规则采样时性能严重下降，需要能够从极端数据稀缺条件下学习哈密顿动力系统符号表示的方法。

Method: 提出ASRNNs：参数感知、结构保持的模型，结合哈密顿量学习和辛循环积分，避免时间导数估计，在噪声下实现稳定学习。使用ASRNNs作为结构保持数据生成器，再通过独立回归方法（SINDy和PySR）进行符号发现。

Result: ASRNNs能够准确预测长期动力学，即使每个训练轨迹只有两个不规则间隔的时间点且可能被相关噪声污染。能够恢复多项式系统的精确符号方程，以及对非多项式哈密顿量的一致多项式逼近。

Conclusion: 这种架构为从稀疏和噪声数据中发现可解释的哈密顿动力学提供了稳健途径。

Abstract: Machine learning has become a powerful tool for discovering governing laws of dynamical systems from data. However, most existing approaches degrade severely when observations are sparse, noisy, or irregularly sampled. In this work, we address the problem of learning symbolic representations of nonlinear Hamiltonian dynamical systems under extreme data scarcity by explicitly incorporating physical structure into the learning architecture. We introduce Adaptable Symplectic Recurrent Neural Networks (ASRNNs), a parameter-cognizant, structure-preserving model that combines Hamiltonian learning with symplectic recurrent integration, avoiding time derivative estimation, and enabling stable learning under noise. We demonstrate that ASRNNs can accurately predict long-term dynamics even when each training trajectory consists of only two irregularly spaced time points, possibly corrupted by correlated noise. Leveraging ASRNNs as structure-preserving data generators, we further enable symbolic discovery using independent regression methods (SINDy and PySR), recovering exact symbolic equations for polynomial systems and consistent polynomial approximations for non-polynomial Hamiltonians. Our results show that such architectures can provide a robust pathway to interpretable discovery of Hamiltonian dynamics from sparse and noisy data.

</details>


### [968] [Diverse Dictionary Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17568)
*Yujia Zheng,Zijian Li,Shunxing Fan,Andrew Gordon Wilson,Kun Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种新的字典学习问题——多样性字典学习，用于在无法完全识别潜在变量的情况下，通过集合论方法恢复潜在变量的交集、补集和对称差等结构化信息，并证明了这些信息在弱假设下是可识别的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常需要线性假设或辅助监督，这些假设在实践中难以验证且容易失效。在无法完全识别潜在变量的现实场景中，需要探索哪些信息仍然可以可靠恢复，以及可以采用哪些通用偏差。

Method: 引入多样性字典学习问题，通过集合论方法证明潜在变量的交集、补集和对称差以及潜在到观测的依赖结构在适当的不确定性下是可识别的。这些集合论结果可以通过集合代数组合，构建隐藏世界的结构化视图。当存在足够结构多样性时，可以进一步实现所有潜在变量的完全识别。

Result: 理论证明了在弱假设下，潜在变量的集合运算结果和依赖结构是可识别的。通过简单的归纳偏差可以集成到大多数模型中。在合成和真实世界数据上验证了理论的有效性。

Conclusion: 即使在无法完全识别潜在变量的情况下，通过多样性字典学习框架，仍然可以可靠地恢复隐藏世界的结构化视图。该方法为理解复杂系统中的潜在变量提供了实用的理论保证。

Abstract: Given only observational data $X = g(Z)$, where both the latent variables $Z$ and the generating process $g$ are unknown, recovering $Z$ is ill-posed without additional assumptions. Existing methods often assume linearity or rely on auxiliary supervision and functional constraints. However, such assumptions are rarely verifiable in practice, and most theoretical guarantees break down under even mild violations, leaving uncertainty about how to reliably understand the hidden world. To make identifiability actionable in the real-world scenarios, we take a complementary view: in the general settings where full identifiability is unattainable, what can still be recovered with guarantees, and what biases could be universally adopted? We introduce the problem of diverse dictionary learning to formalize this view. Specifically, we show that intersections, complements, and symmetric differences of latent variables linked to arbitrary observations, along with the latent-to-observed dependency structure, are still identifiable up to appropriate indeterminacies even without strong assumptions. These set-theoretic results can be composed using set algebra to construct structured and essential views of the hidden world, such as genus-differentia definitions. When sufficient structural diversity is present, they further imply full identifiability of all latent variables. Notably, all identifiability benefits follow from a simple inductive bias during estimation that can be readily integrated into most models. We validate the theory and demonstrate the benefits of the bias on both synthetic and real-world data.

</details>


### [969] [Conditional Attribution for Root Cause Analysis in Time-Series Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17616)
*Shashank Mishra,Karan Patil,Cedric Schockaert,Didier Stricker,Jason Rambach*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出条件归因框架，通过检索上下文相似正常状态来解释时间序列异常，避免不现实特征扰动，保持依赖关系，提高根因分析准确性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列异常检测的根因分析方法存在两个主要问题：1) 依赖不现实的单特征扰动，忽略特征间和时间依赖性；2) 使用边际或随机基线导致不可靠归因。需要一种能保持系统依赖关系并提供操作上有意义的解释方法。

Method: 提出条件归因框架：1) 基于异常观测检索上下文相似正常实例作为基线，而非边际或随机基线；2) 使用变分自编码器潜在空间和UMAP流形嵌入进行低维表示学习，支持高维时间序列；3) 在系统学习到的流形上进行检索，避免分布外伪影；4) 引入置信感知和时间评估指标评估解释可靠性。

Result: 在SWaT和MSDS基准测试上，该方法一致提高了根因识别准确性、时间定位能力和鲁棒性，优于现有解释方法，支持多种异常检测模型。

Conclusion: 条件归因框架为复杂时间序列系统提供依赖保持、操作上有意义的异常解释，显著提升根因分析实用性和可靠性，代码和模型将公开。

Abstract: Root cause analysis (RCA) for time-series anomaly detection is critical for the reliable operation of complex real-world systems. Existing explanation methods often rely on unrealistic feature perturbations and ignore temporal and cross-feature dependencies, leading to unreliable attributions. We propose a conditional attribution framework that explains anomalies relative to contextually similar normal system states. Instead of using marginal or randomly sampled baselines, our method retrieves representative normal instances conditioned on the anomalous observation, enabling dependency-preserving and operationally meaningful explanations. To support high-dimensional time-series data, contextual retrieval is performed in learned low-dimensional representations using both variational autoencoder latent spaces and UMAP manifold embeddings. By grounding the retrieval process in the system's learned manifold, this strategy avoids out-of-distribution artifacts and ensures attribution fidelity while maintaining computational efficiency. We further introduce confidence-aware and temporal evaluation metrics for assessing explanation reliability and responsiveness. Experiments on the SWaT and MSDS benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently improves root-cause identification accuracy, temporal localization, and robustness across multiple anomaly detection models. These results highlight the practical utility of conditional attribution for explainable anomaly diagnosis in complex time-series systems. Code and models will be publicly released.

</details>


### [970] [FlashFPS: Efficient Farthest Point Sampling for Large-Scale Point Clouds via Pruning and Caching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17720)
*Yuzhe Fu,Hancheng Ye,Cong Guo,Junyao Zhang,Qinsi Wang,Yueqian Lin,Changchun Zhou,Hai,Li,Yiran Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: FlashFPS：一种硬件无关的即插即用框架，通过剪枝和缓存技术加速点云神经网络中的最远点采样，显著减少推理延迟


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 点云神经网络中的最远点采样（FPS）操作在推理时产生显著延迟，尤其是在大规模处理中。尽管已有CUDA和硬件级优化，FPS仍然是瓶颈，阻碍了PNN的可扩展性

Method: 提出FlashFPS框架，包含FPS-Prune和FPS-Cache两个组件：FPS-Prune通过候选点剪枝和迭代剪枝减少冗余计算；FPS-Cache通过缓存和重用消除层间冗余

Result: 在GPU上比标准CUDA基线加速5.16倍，在PNN加速器上加速2.69倍，精度损失可忽略，实现了高效可扩展的PNN推理

Conclusion: FlashFPS有效解决了FPS在点云神经网络中的计算瓶颈问题，为大规模点云处理提供了实用的加速解决方案

Abstract: Point-based Neural Networks (PNNs) have become a key approach for point cloud processing. However, a core operation in these models, Farthest Point Sampling (FPS), often introduces significant inference latency, especially for large-scale processing. Despite existing CUDA- and hardware-level optimizations, FPS remains a major bottleneck due to exhaustive computations across multiple network layers in PNNs, which hinders scalability. Through systematic analysis, we identify three substantial redundancies in FPS, including unnecessary full-cloud computations, redundant late-stage iterations, and predictable inter-layer outputs that make later FPS computations avoidable. To address these, we propose \textbf{\textit{FlashFPS}}, a hardware-agnostic, plug-and-play framework for FPS acceleration, composed of \textit{FPS-Prune} and \textit{FPS-Cache}. \textit{FPS-Prune} introduces candidate pruning and iteration pruning to reduce redundant computations in FPS while preserving sampling quality, and \textit{FPS-Cache} eliminates layer-wise redundancy via cache-and-reuse. Integrated into existing CUDA libraries and state-of-the-art PNN accelerators, \textit{FlashFPS} achieves 5.16$\times$ speedup over the standard CUDA baseline on GPU and 2.69$\times$ on PNN accelerators, with negligible accuracy loss, enabling efficient and scalable PNN inference. Codes are released at https://github.com/Yuzhe-Fu/FlashFPS.

</details>


### [971] [Ranking Abuse via Strategic Pairwise Data Perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17805)
*Junyi Yao,Zihao Zheng,Jiayu Long*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了基于最大似然估计（MLE）的成对排名系统（如Bradley-Terry模型）在对抗性数据操纵下的脆弱性，提出了一种自适应子集选择攻击（ASSA）方法，发现MLE排名在超过小扰动预算后会出现急剧的相变行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管基于MLE的成对排名系统（如Bradley-Terry模型）被广泛用于聚合成对比较的偏好，但其在策略性数据操纵下的鲁棒性尚未得到充分理解。论文旨在探究这些排名系统对对抗性扰动的脆弱性。

Method: 将操纵任务形式化为约束组合优化问题，提出自适应子集选择攻击（ASSA）方法，高效识别高影响力的扰动。在合成数据和真实世界选举数据集上进行实验验证。

Result: 实验结果显示MLE排名表现出尖锐的相变行为：超过小扰动预算后，有限数量的策略性投票者能显著改变全局排名。ASSA方法在约束预算下始终优于随机和贪婪基线方法。

Conclusion: 这些发现揭示了MLE排名机制对结构化扰动的基本敏感性，强调了在集体决策系统中需要更鲁棒的聚合方法。

Abstract: Pairwise ranking systems based on Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE), such as the Bradley-Terry model, are widely used to aggregate preferences from pairwise comparisons. However, their robustness under strategic data manipulation remains insufficiently understood.
  In this paper, we study the vulnerability of MLE-based ranking systems to adversarial perturbations. We formulate the manipulation task as a constrained combinatorial optimization problem and propose an Adaptive Subset Selection Attack (ASSA) to efficiently identify high-impact perturbations.
  Experimental results on both synthetic data and real-world election datasets show that MLE-based rankings exhibit a sharp phase-transition behavior: beyond a small perturbation budget, a limited number of strategic voters can significantly alter the global ranking. In particular, our method consistently outperforms random and greedy baselines under constrained budgets.
  These findings reveal a fundamental sensitivity of MLE-based ranking mechanisms to structured perturbations and highlight the need for more robust aggregation methods in collective decision-making systems.

</details>


### [972] [Federated Rule Ensemble Method in Medical Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17956)
*Ke Wan,Kensuke Tanioka,Toshio Shimokawa*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出联邦RuleFit框架，在分布式环境中构建统一可解释的全局模型，通过差分隐私直方图预处理、共享阈值规则生成和联邦双平均算法实现稀疏变量选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗机器学习需要大规模多样化数据，但单一机构数据有限，跨机构数据整合受隐私法规限制。现有联邦学习方法架构复杂且缺乏可解释性，限制了临床应用。

Method: 1) 基于差分隐私直方图的预处理，估计共享阈值实现一致规则定义；2) 使用共享阈值通过梯度提升决策树生成局部规则；3) 通过联邦双平均算法进行ℓ₁正则化优化，实现稀疏一致变量选择。

Result: 模拟研究中，该方法性能与集中式RuleFit相当，优于现有联邦方法。真实世界分析显示其能提供可解释的见解和具有竞争力的预测准确性。

Conclusion: 该框架为联邦学习环境中的可解释和可靠建模提供了实用有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Machine learning has become integral to medical research and is increasingly applied in clinical settings to support diagnosis and decision-making; however, its effectiveness depends on access to large, diverse datasets, which are limited within single institutions. Although integrating data across institutions can address this limitation, privacy regulations and data ownership constraints hinder these efforts. Federated learning enables collaborative model training without sharing raw data; however, most methods rely on complex architectures that lack interpretability, limiting clinical applicability. Therefore, we proposed a federated RuleFit framework to construct a unified and interpretable global model for distributed environments. It integrates three components: preprocessing based on differentially private histograms to estimate shared cutoff values, enabling consistent rule definitions and reducing heterogeneity across clients; local rule generation using gradient boosting decision trees with shared cutoffs; and coefficient estimation via $\ell_1$-regularized optimization using a Federated Dual Averaging algorithm for sparse and consistent variable selection. In simulation studies, the proposed method achieved a performance comparable to that of centralized RuleFit while outperforming existing federated approaches. Real-world analysis demonstrated its ability to provide interpretable insights with competitive predictive accuracy. Therefore, the proposed framework offers a practical and effective solution for interpretable and reliable modeling in federated learning environments.

</details>


### [973] [RASP-Tuner: Retrieval-Augmented Soft Prompts for Context-Aware Black-Box Optimization in Non-Stationary Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18026)
*Enze Pan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: RASP-Tuner：一种用于在线黑盒优化的上下文感知调优方法，通过检索相似上下文、使用专家混合模型预测损失，并在低维提示子空间中自适应，实现高效的非平稳环境优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多部署系统面临黑盒目标优化问题，其最优配置随外部观察到的上下文而变化。当上下文重复访问少量潜在机制时，丢弃历史的优化器会重复支付适应成本；而当每个步骤必须保持低成本时，在高观察计数下进行完整高斯过程重新拟合难以持续。

Method: 1) 通过检索相似历史上下文识别机制代理；2) 使用专家混合模型预测短期损失，其输入连接参数、上下文和检索到的软提示；3) 主要在低维提示子空间中自适应，仅在标量化误差或分歧激增时调用完整代理更新。RealErrorComposer通过EMA稳定逻辑分数将异构流指标映射到[0,1]，提供单一可微分训练目标。

Result: 在9个合成非平稳基准、对抗上下文完整性检查以及3个表格真实世界流上，RASP-Tuner在7/9合成任务中改进或匹配累积遗憾，同时在相同硬件上比滑动窗口GP-UCB每步墙钟时间低8-12倍。

Conclusion: RASP-Tuner提供了一种高效的在线上下文感知优化方法，在集群分离、强凸机制模型(RA-GD)中的理想化分析为有界动态遗憾提供了充分条件，但实际部署管道违反了其中一些前提，这些差距仍然开放。

Abstract: Many deployed systems expose black-box objectives whose minimizing configuration shifts with an externally observed context. When contexts revisit a small set of latent regimes, an optimizer that discards history pays repeated adaptation cost; when each step must remain inexpensive, full Gaussian-process (GP) refits at high observation counts are difficult to sustain. We cast online tuning as context-conditioned regret minimization and present RASP-Tuner, which instantiates a decomposition motivated by first principles: (i) identify a regime proxy by retrieving similar past contexts; (ii) predict short-horizon loss with a mixture-of-experts surrogate whose input concatenates parameters, context, and a retrieved soft prompt; (iii) adapt chiefly in a low-dimensional prompt subspace, invoking full surrogate updates only when scalarized error or disagreement spikes. A RealErrorComposer maps heterogeneous streaming metrics to [0,1] via EMA-stabilized logistic scores, supplying a single differentiable training target. On nine synthetic non-stationary benchmarks, an adversarial-context sanity check, and three tabular real-world streams (Section on real-world experiments), RASP-Tuner improves or matches cumulative regret relative to our GP-UCB and CMA-ES implementations on seven of nine synthetic tasks under paired tests at horizon T=100, while recording 8-12 times lower wall-clock per step than sliding-window GP-UCB on identical hardware. Idealized analysis in a cluster-separated, strongly convex regime model (RA-GD) supplies sufficient conditions for bounded dynamic regret; the deployed pipeline violates several of these premises, and we articulate which gaps remain open.

</details>


### [974] [Sonata: A Hybrid World Model for Inertial Kinematics under Clinical Data Scarcity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18058)
*Blaise Delaney,Salil Patel,Yuji Xing,Dominic Dootson,Karin Sevegnani*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: Sonata是一个紧凑的潜在世界模型，用于六轴躯干IMU表示学习，专门针对临床数据稀缺场景。该模型通过预测未来状态而非重建原始传感器轨迹，在临床评估任务上表现优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床队列通常只有数十到数百名患者，这使得网络规模的掩码重建目标与实际问题不匹配。需要开发能够在数据稀缺条件下有效学习IMU表示的模型，以支持神经学评估。

Method: Sonata是一个377万参数的混合模型，在9个公共数据集（739名受试者，19万个窗口）上进行预训练，采用潜在世界模型目标来预测未来状态，而不是重建原始传感器轨迹。

Result: 在与匹配的自回归预测基线（MAE）的对比中，Sonata在14个评估任务中始终表现出更强的冻结探针临床判别能力、前瞻性跌倒风险预测和跨队列迁移能力，同时产生更高秩、更结构化的潜在表示。

Conclusion: Sonata模型参数少，兼容设备端可穿戴推理，为神经学评估的通用运动学世界模型迈出了一步，特别适合临床数据稀缺场景。

Abstract: We introduce Sonata, a compact latent world model for six-axis trunk IMU representation learning under clinical data scarcity. Clinical cohorts typically comprise tens to hundreds of patients, making web-scale masked-reconstruction objectives poorly matched to the problem. Sonata is a 3.77 M-parameter hybrid model, pre-trained on a harmonised corpus of nine public datasets (739 subjects, 190k windows) with a latent world-model objective that predicts future state rather than reconstructing raw sensor traces. In a controlled comparison against a matched autoregressive forecasting baseline (MAE) on the same backbone, Sonata yields consistently stronger frozen-probe clinical discrimination, prospective fall-risk prediction, and cross-cohort transfer across a 14-arm evaluation suite, while producing higher-rank, more structured latent representations. At 3.77 M parameters the model is compatible with on-device wearable inference, offering a step toward general kinematic world models for neurological assessment.

</details>


### [975] [Towards Real-Time ECG and EMG Modeling on $μ$ NPUs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18067)
*Josh Millar,Ashok Samraj Thangarajan,Soumyajit Chatterjee,Hamed Haddadi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: PhysioLite：一种轻量级、NPU兼容的模型架构和训练框架，用于ECG/EMG信号分析，在资源受限的微控制器硬件上实现高性能生理信号处理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然微型NPU和低功耗加速器已能集成到微控制器级可穿戴硬件中，但生理信号分析（如ECG/EMG）仍无法在此类硬件上运行。现有Transformer模型性能虽好，但体积过大且与μNPU不兼容。

Method: 使用可学习小波滤波器组、CPU卸载的位置编码和硬件感知层设计，创建轻量级NPU兼容架构。通过8位量化将模型压缩至约370KB。

Result: 在ECG和EMG基准测试中达到与最先进Transformer基础模型相当的性能，同时模型大小仅为后者的<10%。在MAX78000和HX6538 WE2 μNPU上验证了延迟和资源消耗的可行性。

Conclusion: PhysioLite证明了在资源受限、电池供电的硬件上进行高性能生理信号分析的可行性，为可穿戴医疗设备提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: The miniaturisation of neural processing units (NPUs) and other low-power accelerators has enabled their integration into microcontroller-scale wearable hardware, supporting near-real-time, offline, and privacy-preserving inference. Yet physiological signal analysis has remained infeasible on such hardware; recent Transformer-based models show state-of-the-art performance but are prohibitively large for resource- and power-constrained hardware and incompatible with $μ$ NPUs due to their dynamic attention operations. We introduce PhysioLite, a lightweight, NPU-compatible model architecture and training framework for ECG/EMG signal analysis. Using learnable wavelet filter banks, CPU-offloaded positional encoding, and hardware-aware layer design, PhysioLite reaches performance comparable to state-of-the-art Transformer-based foundation models on ECG and EMG benchmarks, while being <10% of the size ($\sim$370KB with 8-bit quantization). We also profile its component-wise latency and resource consumption on both the MAX78000 and HX6538 WE2 $μ$ NPUs, demonstrating its viability for signal analysis on constrained, battery-powered hardware. We release our model(s) and training framework at: https://github.com/j0shmillar/physiolite.

</details>


### [976] [Implicit neural representations as a coordinate-based framework for continuous environmental field reconstruction from sparse ecological observations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18083)
*Agnieszka Pregowska,Hazem M. Kalaji*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文评估了隐式神经表示（INRs）作为坐标建模框架，用于从稀疏不规则观测中重建连续环境场，在物种分布、物候动态和形态分割三个场景中验证了其性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 环境建模和生物多样性信息学中，从稀疏不规则观测重建连续环境场是一个核心挑战。许多生态数据集在时空上具有异质性，使得基于网格的方法难以跨领域扩展或泛化。

Method: 使用隐式神经表示（INRs）作为坐标建模框架，直接从坐标输入学习连续空间和时空场。在三个代表性建模场景中分析其行为：物种分布重建、物候动态和从开放生物多样性数据衍生的形态分割。

Result: 神经场提供了稳定的连续表示，具有可预测的计算成本，补充了经典平滑器和基于树的方法。它们在插值行为、空间一致性和计算特性方面表现良好，支持分辨率无关查询和架构归纳偏置。

Conclusion: 坐标神经场可作为灵活的表征层，集成到环境建模流程和探索性分析框架中，适用于大规模、不规则采样数据集。

Abstract: Reconstructing continuous environmental fields from sparse and irregular observations remains a central challenge in environmental modelling and biodiversity informatics. Many ecological datasets are heterogeneous in space and time, making grid-based approaches difficult to scale or generalise across domains. Here, we evaluate implicit neural representations (INRs) as a coordinate-based modelling framework for learning continuous spatial and spatio-temporal fields directly from coordinate inputs. We analyse their behaviour across three representative modelling scenarios: species distribution reconstruction, phenological dynamics, and morphological segmentation derived from open biodiversity data. Beyond predictive performance, we examine interpolation behaviour, spatial coherence, and computational characteristics relevant for environmental modelling workflows, including scalability, resolution-independent querying, and architectural inductive bias. Results show that neural fields provide stable continuous representations with predictable computational cost, complementing classical smoothers and tree-based approaches. These findings position coordinate-based neural fields as a flexible representation layer that can be integrated into environmental modelling pipelines and exploratory analysis frameworks for large, irregularly sampled datasets.

</details>


### [977] [Scalable Neighborhood-Based Multi-Agent Actor-Critic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18190)
*Tim Goppelsroeder,Rasmus Jensen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: MADDPG-K通过将每个智能体的critic限制在k个最近邻智能体上，解决了MADDPG中集中式critic计算成本随智能体数量线性增长的问题，保持了恒定大小的critic输入。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 集中式critic方法在多智能体强化学习中表现出色，但其critic网络的输入大小随智能体数量线性增长，导致训练成本高昂，难以扩展到大规模场景。

Method: MADDPG-K将每个智能体的critic限制在k个最近邻智能体上（基于欧氏距离），从而保持critic输入大小恒定，无论总智能体数量如何。该方法保留了二次计算成本，但这些成本主要来自廉价的标量距离计算，而非昂贵的神经网络矩阵乘法。

Result: 在Multi-Particle Environment套件的合作和对抗环境中，MADDPG-K表现出与MADDPG相当或更优的性能，在合作环境中收敛更快，且随着智能体数量增加，运行时扩展性更好。

Conclusion: MADDPG-K提供了一种可扩展的多智能体强化学习方法，通过限制critic的邻域大小来平衡性能和计算效率，适用于大规模多智能体系统。

Abstract: We propose MADDPG-K, a scalable extension to Multi-Agent Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (MADDPG) that addresses the computational limitations of centralized critic approaches. Centralized critics, which condition on the observations and actions of all agents, have demonstrated significant performance gains in cooperative and competitive multi-agent settings. However, their critic networks grow linearly in input size with the number of agents, making them increasingly expensive to train at scale. MADDPG-K mitigates this by restricting each agent's critic to the $k$ closest agents under a chosen metric which in our case is Euclidean distance. This ensures a constant-size critic input regardless of the total agent count. We analyze the complexity of this approach, showing that the quadratic cost it retains arises from cheap scalar distance computations rather than the expensive neural network matrix multiplications that bottleneck standard MADDPG. We validate our method empirically across cooperative and adversarial environments from the Multi-Particle Environment suite, demonstrating competitive or superior performance compared to MADDPG, faster convergence in cooperative settings, and better runtime scaling as the number of agents grows. Our code is available at https://github.com/TimGop/MADDPG-K .

</details>


### [978] [Dissipative Latent Residual Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Modeling and Identification of Electromechanical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18277)
*Youyuan Long,Gokhan Solak,Arash Ajoudani*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: DiLaR-PINN：一种用于学习未建模耗散效应的物理一致耗散潜在残差PINN，通过偏斜耗散形式保证能量非增，在直升机系统上验证了其优越性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机电系统的第一性原理模型往往无法捕捉复杂的耗散效应（如关节摩擦、杂散损耗、结构阻尼）。传统的残差学习PINN使用无约束MLP可能向系统注入虚假能量，需要更物理一致的耗散建模方法。

Method: 提出DiLaR-PINN（耗散潜在残差PINN）：1）残差网络仅在不可测量的潜在状态分量上操作；2）采用偏斜耗散形式参数化，保证任何网络参数下能量非增；3）开发了基于课程学习的序列长度扩展策略的循环展开方案，用于部分可观测状态下的稳定高效训练。

Result: 在真实直升机系统上验证，相比四个基线（纯物理模型、非结构化残差MLP、软耗散约束DiLaR变体、黑盒LSTM），DiLaR-PINN更准确地捕捉耗散效应，并实现更优的长时域外推性能。

Conclusion: DiLaR-PINN能够以物理一致的方式学习未建模耗散效应，保证能量非增特性，在部分可观测条件下实现稳定高效训练，在真实系统上表现出优越的耗散建模和外推能力。

Abstract: Accurate dynamical modeling is essential for simulation and control of embodied systems, yet first-principles models of electromechanical systems often fail to capture complex dissipative effects such as joint friction, stray losses, and structural damping. While residual-learning physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) can effectively augment imperfect first-principles models with data-driven components, the residual terms are typically implemented as unconstrained multilayer perceptrons (MLPs), which may inadvertently inject artificial energy into the system.
  To more faithfully model the dissipative dynamics, we propose DiLaR-PINN, a dissipative latent residual PINN designed to learn unmodeled dissipative effects in a physically consistent manner. Structurally, the residual network operates only on unmeasurable (latent) state components and is parameterized in a skew-dissipative form that guarantees non-increasing energy for any choice of network parameters. To enable stable and data-efficient training under partial measurability of the state, we further develop a recurrent rollout scheme with a curriculum-based sequence length extension strategy.
  We validate DiLaR-PINN on a real-world helicopter system and compare it against four baselines: a pure physical model (without a residual network), an unstructured residual MLP, a DiLaR variant with a soft dissipativity constraint, and a black-box LSTM. The results demonstrate that DiLaR-PINN more accurately captures dissipative effects and achieves superior long-horizon extrapolation performance.

</details>


### [979] [Scale-free adaptive planning for deterministic dynamics & discounted rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18312)
*Peter L. Bartlett,Victor Gabillon,Jennifer Healey,Michal Valko*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: Platypoos是一种简单的无尺度规划算法，用于具有确定性动态和随机奖励的环境，能够适应未知的奖励函数尺度和平滑度，并在样本复杂度分析上优于先前工作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决在确定性动态和随机奖励环境中规划的问题，其中最优值函数未知且奖励无界。现有方法通常需要知道奖励尺度或平滑度参数，而本文旨在开发无需这些先验知识的自适应算法。

Method: 提出Platypoos算法，这是一种简单的无尺度规划算法。算法能够适应未知的奖励函数尺度和平滑度，无需知道折扣因子和奖励尺度参数。通过样本复杂度分析证明其优越性。

Result: 提供了Platypoos的样本复杂度分析，相比先前工作有所改进，并在广泛的折扣因子和奖励尺度范围内同时成立。建立了匹配的下界证明分析在常数范围内是最优的。

Conclusion: Platypoos算法在未知奖励尺度和平滑度的环境中表现出色，其理论分析达到了最优性，为确定性动态和随机奖励环境中的规划问题提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: We address the problem of planning in an environment with deterministic dynamics and stochastic rewards with discounted returns. The optimal value function is not known, nor are the rewards bounded. We propose Platypoos, a simple scale-free planning algorithm that adapts to the unknown scale and smoothness of the reward function. We provide a sample complexity analysis for Platypoos that improves upon prior work and holds simultaneously over a broad range of discount factors and reward scales, without the algorithm knowing them. We also establish a matching lower bound showing our analysis is optimal up to constants.

</details>


### [980] [Learning Invariant Modality Representation for Robust Multimodal Learning from a Causal Inference Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18460)
*Sijie Mai,Shiqin Han*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出基于因果推断的模态不变表示学习框架CmIR，通过解耦模态中的因果不变表示和环境特定伪相关表示，提升多模态情感计算的鲁棒性和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态情感计算模型容易学习到伪相关，导致在分布偏移或噪声模态下泛化能力差。需要从因果推断角度设计鲁棒的多模态学习方法。

Method: 提出CmIR框架，将每个模态解耦为"因果不变表示"和"环境特定伪相关表示"。通过不变性约束、互信息约束和重构约束确保学习到的表示既保持与标签的稳定预测关系，又保留原始输入的充分信息。

Result: 在多个多模态基准测试中达到最先进性能，特别是在分布外数据和噪声数据上表现优异，证实了其鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Conclusion: CmIR框架通过因果视角解耦模态表示，有效解决了多模态学习中的伪相关问题，为鲁棒的多模态情感计算提供了新方法。

Abstract: Multimodal affective computing aims to predict humans' sentiment, emotion, intention, and opinion using language, acoustic, and visual modalities. However, current models often learn spurious correlations that harm generalization under distribution shifts or noisy modalities. To address this, we propose a causal modality-invariant representation (CmIR) learning framework for robust multimodal learning. At its core, we introduce a theoretically grounded disentanglement method that separates each modality into `causal invariant representation' and `environment-specific spurious representation' from a causal inference perspective. CmIR ensures that the learned invariant representations retain stable predictive relationships with labels across different environments while preserving sufficient information from the raw inputs via invariance constraint, mutual information constraint, and reconstruction constraint. Experiments across multiple multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that CmIR achieves state-of-the-art performance. CmIR particularly excels on out-of-distribution data and noisy data, confirming its robustness and generalizability.

</details>


### [981] [Faster by Design: Interactive Aerodynamics via Neural Surrogates Trained on Expert-Validated CFD](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18491)
*Nicholas Thumiger,Andrea Bartezzaghi,Mattia Rigotti,Cezary Skura,Thomas Frick,Elisa Serioli,Fabrizio Arbucci,A. Cristiano I. Malossi*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了GIST（Gauge-Invariant Spectral Transformer）图神经网络算子，用于赛车空气动力学CFD模拟的替代模型，在公开基准和新的赛车数据集上达到最先进精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CFD模拟成本高昂（数万核心小时/次），限制了赛车空气动力学设计空间探索。现有AI替代模型受限于公开数据集复杂度不足，主要基于平滑乘用车形状，无法处理赛车薄、复杂、高负载组件。

Method: 1) 引入基于参数化LMP2级CAD模型的高保真RANS数据集，覆盖直线和转弯工况；2) 提出GIST图神经网络算子，其谱嵌入编码网格连接性，保证离散不变性，计算复杂度与网格大小线性相关。

Result: GIST在公开基准和提出的赛车数据集上达到最先进精度，预测精度达到早期空气动力学设计适用水平，首次验证了工业赛车工作流中交互式设计空间探索概念。

Conclusion: GIST为赛车空气动力学提供了高效准确的CFD替代模型，支持工程师交互式查询替代模型而非CFD求解器，有望显著加速设计迭代。

Abstract: Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) is central to race-car aerodynamic development, yet its cost -- tens of thousands of core-hours per high-fidelity evaluation -- severely limits the design space exploration feasible within realistic budgets. AI-based surrogate models promise to alleviate this bottleneck, but progress has been constrained by the limited complexity of public datasets, which are dominated by smoothed passenger-car shapes that fail to exercise surrogates on the thin, complex, highly loaded components governing motorsport performance. This work presents three primary contributions. First, we introduce a high-fidelity RANS dataset built on a parametric LMP2-class CAD model and spanning six operating conditions (map points) covering straight-line and cornering regimes, generated and validated by aerodynamics experts at Dallara to preserve features relevant to industrial motorsport. Second, we present the Gauge-Invariant Spectral Transformer (GIST), a graph-based neural operator whose spectral embeddings encode mesh connectivity to enhance predictions on tightly packed, complex geometries. GIST guarantees discretization invariance and scales linearly with mesh size, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy on both public benchmarks and the proposed race-car dataset. Third, we demonstrate that GIST achieves a level of predictive accuracy suitable for early-stage aerodynamic design, providing a first validation of the concept of interactive design-space exploration -- where engineers query a surrogate in place of the CFD solver -- within industrial motorsport workflows.

</details>


### [982] [Barrier-enforced multi-objective optimization for direct point and sharp interval forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18492)
*Worachit Amnuaypongsa,Yotsapat Suparanonrat,Pana Wanitchollakit,Jitkomut Songsiri*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一个多步概率预测框架，使用单一神经网络模型同时生成点预测和区间预测，通过多目标优化确保预测区间不交叉且满足目标覆盖概率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常需要手动调整标量化损失函数的权重来平衡点预测和区间预测，这导致调参困难且效果不稳定。作者希望开发一个无需手动调参、能自动保证预测区间覆盖概率的通用框架。

Method: 1) 将点预测和区间预测视为多目标优化问题，使用多梯度下降自适应选择最优权重；2) 提出基于扩展对数障碍的自适应超参数的新区间损失函数；3) 设计混合架构：共享时序模型+特定预测时段的子模型；4) 提出训练策略确保预测区间不交叉且满足覆盖概率

Result: 在日内太阳辐照度预测应用中，提出的损失函数始终优于现有方法，以最窄的区间宽度实现目标覆盖概率。与LSTM编码器-解码器和Transformer架构（包括增强Chronos基础模型的版本）相比，该方法保持高度竞争力且可无缝适配任何深度学习结构

Conclusion: 该框架通过多目标优化和自适应损失函数设计，解决了传统方法需要手动调参的问题，实现了同时保证预测区间覆盖概率和锐度的目标，具有通用性和可扩展性

Abstract: This paper proposes a multi-step probabilistic forecasting framework using a single neural-network based model to generate simultaneous point and interval forecasts. Our approach ensures non-crossing prediction intervals (PIs) through a model structure design that strictly satisfy a target coverage probability (PICP) while maximizing sharpness. Unlike existing methods that rely on manual weight tuning for scalarized loss functions, we treat point and PI forecasting as a multi-objective optimization problem, utilizing multi-gradient descent to adaptively select optimal weights. Key innovations include a new PI loss function based on an extended log-barrier with an adaptive hyperparameter to guarantee the coverage, a hybrid architecture featuring a shared temporal model with horizon-specific submodels, and a training strategy. The proposed loss is scale-independent and universally applicable; combined with our training algorithm, the framework eliminates trial-and-error hyperparameter tuning for balancing multiple objectives. Validated by an intra-day solar irradiance forecasting application, results demonstrate that our proposed loss consistently outperforms those in current literature by achieving target coverage with the narrowest PI widths. Furthermore, when compared against LSTM encoder-decoder and Transformer architectures--including those augmented with Chronos foundation models--our method remains highly competitive and can be seamlessly adapted to any deep learning structure.

</details>


### [983] [Wasserstein Distributionally Robust Risk-Sensitive Estimation via Conditional Value-at-Risk](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18546)
*Feras Al Taha,Eilyan Bitar*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种分布鲁棒的风险敏感估计方法，在Wasserstein模糊集下最小化最坏情况条件风险价值(CVaR)，通过半定规划计算仿射估计器，在电力价格预测中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统估计方法通常假设已知精确的概率分布，但实际中分布往往不确定。需要开发在分布不确定性下的鲁棒估计方法，特别关注风险敏感的性能度量（CVaR），以应对极端风险情况。

Method: 采用分布鲁棒优化框架，基于type-2 Wasserstein距离构建模糊集。在模糊集内寻找最小化最坏情况CVaR的仿射估计器。当名义分布有限支撑时，可将问题转化为可处理的半定规划求解。

Result: 理论证明当名义分布有限支撑时，最优仿射估计器可通过半定规划精确计算。在真实电力市场数据的价格预测任务中，该方法相比现有方法获得了更低的样本外CVaR平方误差。

Conclusion: 提出了一种在分布不确定性下风险敏感估计的分布鲁棒方法，提供了可计算的半定规划求解方案，并在实际应用中展示了优越的风险控制性能。

Abstract: We propose a distributionally robust approach to risk-sensitive estimation of an unknown signal x from an observed signal y. The unknown signal and observation are modeled as random vectors whose joint probability distribution is unknown, but assumed to belong to a given type-2 Wasserstein ball of distributions, termed the ambiguity set. The performance of an estimator is measured according to the conditional value-at-risk (CVaR) of the squared estimation error. Within this framework, we study the problem of computing affine estimators that minimize the worst-case CVaR over all distributions in the given ambiguity set. As our main result, we show that, when the nominal distribution at the center of the Wasserstein ball is finitely supported, such estimators can be exactly computed by solving a tractable semidefinite program. We evaluate the proposed estimators on a wholesale electricity price forecasting task using real market data and show that they deliver lower out-of-sample CVaR of squared error compared to existing methods.

</details>


### [984] [Decoding AI Tutor Effects for Educational Measurement: Temporal, Multi-Outcome, and Behavior-Cognitive Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16366)
*Yiyao Yang,Yasemin Gulbahar*

Main category: cs.CY

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出AI导师代理框架，研究AI辅助学习中的时间交互模式、多结果分析和学习者行为认知画像，通过神经策略模型和随机模拟生成学生-AI导师交互记录，发现早期交互模式可预测后期表现和信任，学生行为随时间变化，可识别潜在学习者画像。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI导师在学习环境中日益普及，需要系统研究AI辅助学习的交互模式、多结果权衡和学习者画像，以理解早期交互如何预测后期表现和信任，不同反馈条件如何影响学习结果，以及如何基于行为认知指标识别学习者类型。

Method: 开发AI导师代理提供多种反馈形式（提示、解释、示例、代码），使用神经策略模型和随机模拟框架生成人工学生-AI导师交互记录，包含响应时间、尝试次数、提示请求、正确性、测验结果、改进、满意度和信任等指标。采用时间特征预测后期表现和信任，聚类方法识别学习者画像。

Result: 早期交互模式能够预测后期表现和信任；学生在AI辅导下的行为随时间发生变化；基于行为和认知差异可以识别潜在的学生画像。

Conclusion: AI导师框架能够有效分析学习交互模式，早期交互特征对预测学习结果具有价值，学习者画像识别有助于个性化教学，为AI辅助学习系统设计提供实证依据。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) tutors have become increasingly popular in learning environments. In this study, we propose an AI agent prototype framework for exploring AI-assisted learning with temporal interaction patterns, multiple outcomes analysis, and behavioral-cognitive learner profiling. Based on three research questions, this study aims to investigate whether early interaction patterns can predict later performance and trust, how multiple outcomes can be traded off with different AI tutor feedback conditions, and if learner profiles can be identified with behavioral and cognitive indicators. An AI tutor agent has been developed to provide various feedback forms to learners, including hints, explanations, examples, and code. A neural policy model and a stochastic simulation framework are used to produce artificial student-AI tutor interaction records, which include response time, attempts, hint requests, correctness, quiz results, improvement, satisfaction, and trust. Temporal features are used to predict later correctness and trust with early interaction patterns, and clustering methods are used to find learner profiles. The results showed that early interaction patterns were predictive of later performance and trust, that student behavior changed over time with AI-based tutoring, and that latent student profiles could be identified based on their behavioral and cognitive differences.

</details>


### [985] [Thermal-GEMs: Generalized Models for Building Thermal Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16443)
*Felix Koch,Fabian Raisch,Benjamin Tischler*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文首次全面评估了建筑热动力学建模方法，包括多源迁移学习和时间序列基础模型，发现多源迁移学习比单源迁移学习误差降低63%，并确定了多源迁移学习优于时间序列基础模型所需的数据量阈值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建筑热动力学数据驱动模型需要大量测量数据，迁移学习可缓解数据需求。多源迁移学习模型理论上优于单源迁移学习，但缺乏实际评估。同时，时间序列基础模型作为高性能通用模型出现，需要系统比较这些方法。

Method: 采用四种最先进的多源迁移学习架构进行消融实验，在合成数据和真实世界数据上进行评估。比较多源迁移学习模型（仅使用建筑数据预训练）与时间序列基础模型（使用多种时间序列预训练）的性能。

Result: 多源迁移学习模型在实际应用中非常有效，相比单源迁移学习降低63%预测误差。研究发现多源迁移学习与时间序列基础模型存在权衡：当有16-32个源建筑超过1年的数据用于预训练时，多源迁移学习才能持续优于时间序列基础模型。

Conclusion: 研究为选择建筑热动力学建模策略提供了实用指导：根据可用于预训练的源建筑数量来决定使用多源迁移学习还是时间序列基础模型。当数据量充足时，多源迁移学习是最佳选择。

Abstract: Data-driven models for building thermal dynamics are a scalable approach for enabling energy-efficient operation through fault detection & diagnosis or advanced control. To obtain accurate models, measurement data from a target building spanning months to years are required. Transfer Learning (TL) mitigates this challenge by employing pretrained models based on single or multiple source buildings. General multi-source TL models promise to outperform single-source TL, but alternative multi-source modeling architectures remain to be explored, and evaluation on real-world data is missing. Moreover, time series foundation models (TSFM) have emerged as candidates for the best-performing general models. Hence, we conduct a first, comprehensive assessment of general modeling approaches for building thermal dynamics, including multi-source TL and TSFMs. Our assessment includes ablations using four state-of-the-art multi-source TL architectures and evaluations on synthetic as well as real-world data. We demonstrate that multi-source TL models are highly effective in accurately modeling buildings in real-world applications, yielding up to 63% lower forecasting errors compared to single-source TL. Moreover, our results suggest a trade-off between multi-source TL models exclusively pretrained with building data and TSFMs pretrained with a multitude of different time series, revealing that data from 16-32 source buildings must be available over 1 year for pretraining multi-source TL models to consistently outperform TSFMs as evaluated using the mean absolute error. These findings provide practical guidance for selecting modeling strategies based on the number of source buildings available for pretraining multi-source TL models.

</details>


### [986] [FM-CAC: Carbon-Aware Control for Battery-Buffered Edge AI via Time-Series Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16448)
*Kang Yang,Walid A. Hanafy,Prashant Shenoy,Mani Srivastava*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: FM-CAC：一个主动的碳感知控制框架，通过电池作为时间缓冲器，联合优化软件管道变体、硬件工作点和电池充放电，利用时间序列基础模型进行零样本碳预测，在边缘AI部署中减少碳排放同时保持服务质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘AI部署扩展到数十亿设备运行始终在线的实时复合AI管道，成为巨大的能源消耗和碳排放源。需要减少碳排放同时最大化服务质量。

Method: 提出FM-CAC框架，利用电池作为主动时间缓冲器，将能源获取与能源消耗解耦。在每个控制步骤中联合优化软件管道变体、硬件工作点和电池充放电动作。使用边缘友好的时间序列基础模型进行零样本碳预测，并集成到具有延迟成本归因的动态规划求解器中。

Result: FM-CAC减少碳排放高达65.6%，同时保持接近最大的推理准确率。

Conclusion: FM-CAC框架能有效减少边缘AI部署的碳排放，同时维持服务质量，通过电池缓冲和联合优化实现碳感知控制。

Abstract: As edge AI deployments scale to billions of devices running always-on, real-time compound AI pipelines, they represent a massive and largely unmanaged source of energy consumption and carbon emissions. To reduce carbon emissions while maximizing Quality-of-Service (QoS), this paper proposes FM-CAC, a proactive carbon-aware control framework that leverages a battery as an active temporal buffer. By decoupling energy acquisition from energy consumption, FM-CAC can maximize the use of low-carbon energy, substantially reducing carbon emissions. At each control step, FM-CAC jointly optimizes the software pipeline variant, the hardware operating point, and the battery charging and discharging actions. To support this decision process, FM-CAC leverages edge-friendly Time-Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) for zero-shot carbon forecasting and integrates these forecasts into a dynamic programming solver with deferred cost attribution to prevent myopic battery depletion. Results show that FM-CAC reduces carbon emissions by up to 65.6% while maintaining near-maximum inference accuracy.

</details>


### [987] [Modelling Gas-Phase Reaction Kinetics with Guided Particle Diffusion Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16461)
*Andrew Millard,Zheng Zhao,Henrik Pedersen*

Main category: physics.comp-ph

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出使用扩散先验的物理引导采样方法，用于求解时间依赖的偏微分方程（特别是气相反反应动力学问题），能够从稀疏观测中重建完整的时空轨迹，并推广到未见过的参数体系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于扩散先验的物理引导采样方法主要评估在基准问题上，这些基准问题未能充分展示其在时间依赖PDE中生成时间一致解的能力，通常只关注重建单个快照。作者希望将这些方法应用于更接近真实实验室实验的气相反反应动力学问题。

Method: 采用基于扩散先验的物理引导采样方法，应用于由对流-反应-扩散方程控制的气相反反应动力学问题。该方法能够从稀疏观测中重建完整的时空轨迹，而不仅仅是孤立状态。

Result: 研究表明，引导采样方法可以用于重建完整的时空轨迹，而不仅仅是孤立状态。更重要的是，这些方法能够推广到先前未见过的参数体系，显示出在现实世界应用中的潜力。

Conclusion: 基于扩散先验的物理引导采样方法在求解时间依赖PDE系统方面具有强大性能，特别是在气相反反应动力学问题中表现出良好的时间一致性和参数泛化能力，为实际应用提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: Physics-guided sampling with diffusion priors has recently shown strong performance in solving complex systems of partial differential equations (PDEs) from sparse observations. However, these methods are typically evaluated on benchmark problems that do not fully demonstrate their ability to generate temporally consistent solutions of time-dependent PDEs, often focusing instead on reconstructing a single snapshot. In this work, we apply these methods to gas-phase reaction kinetics problems governed by the advection-reaction-diffusion (ARD) equation, providing a setting that more closely reflects realistic laboratory experiments. We demonstrate that guided sampling can be used to reconstruct full spatiotemporal trajectories, rather than isolated states. Furthermore, we show that these methods generalise to previously unseen parameter regimes, highlighting their potential for real-world applications.

</details>


### [988] [Learning-Based Sparsification of Dynamic Graphs in Robotic Exploration Algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16509)
*Adithya V. Sastry,Bibek Poudel,Weizi Li*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出基于Transformer和PPO的强化学习框架，用于在机器人探索过程中动态修剪RRT图，减少96%的图大小，实现更一致的探索性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人探索算法通常依赖图结构进行前沿探索和动态路径规划，但这些图会快速膨胀，积累冗余信息并影响性能。需要一种智能方法来在探索过程中动态修剪这些图。

Method: 使用基于Transformer的框架，通过近端策略优化（PPO）进行训练，学习在机器人探索过程中智能修剪RRT图。框架在基于前沿探索的机器人模拟环境中进行评估。

Result: 学习到的策略能将图大小减少高达96%。虽然智能修剪的探索速率低于基线，但具有最低的标准差，在不同环境中产生最一致的探索性能。初步证据表明框架能从稀疏、延迟的奖励信号中学习将修剪决策与探索结果关联。

Conclusion: 这是首次证明强化学习在机器人探索算法中动态图稀疏化方面的可行性，为图结构的智能管理提供了新方法。

Abstract: Many robotic exploration algorithms rely on graph structures for frontier-based exploration and dynamic path planning. However, these graphs grow rapidly, accumulating redundant information and impacting performance. We present a transformer-based framework trained with Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) to prune these graphs during exploration, limiting their growth and reducing the accumulation of excess information. The framework was evaluated on simulations of a robotic agent using Rapidly Exploring Random Trees (RRT) to carry out frontier-based exploration, where the learned policy reduces graph size by up to 96%. We find preliminary evidence that our framework learns to associate pruning decisions with exploration outcomes despite sparse, delayed reward signals. We also observe that while intelligent pruning achieves a lower rate of exploration compared to baselines, it yields the lowest standard deviation, producing the most consistent exploration across varied environments. To the best of our knowledge, these results are the first suggesting the viability of RL in sparsification of dynamic graphs used in robotic exploration algorithms.

</details>


### [989] [Towards Deep Encrypted Training: Low-Latency, Memory-Efficient, and High-Throughput Inference for Privacy-Preserving Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16834)
*Nges Brian Njungle,Eric Jahns,Michel A. Kinsy*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出针对同态加密神经网络批量处理的优化算法和流水线架构，显著提升加密图像批量推理的效率和内存使用


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前隐私保护机器学习中，同态加密支持在加密数据上直接计算，但现有研究主要关注单张加密图像的推理，批量处理效率低下，无法满足高吞吐量推理和训练需求

Method: 开发了针对批量HE友好神经网络的优化算法，设计了最大化资源效率的流水线架构，支持不同批量大小的执行

Result: 在ResNet-20上，批量512张加密图像时，每张图像平均推理时间8.86秒，峰值内存98.96GB，相比SOTA设计实现1.78倍运行时间提升和3.74倍内存减少；在ResNet-34上，批量256张图像时，平均推理时间28.14秒，内存使用246.78GB

Conclusion: 提出的批量处理优化算法和架构显著提升了同态加密神经网络的效率和可扩展性，为隐私保护机器学习的高吞吐量应用提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Privacy-preserving machine learning (PPML) has become increasingly important in applications where sensitive data must remain confidential. Homomorphic Encryption (HE) enables computation directly on encrypted data, allowing neural network inference without revealing raw inputs. While prior works have largely focused on inference over a single encrypted image, batch processing of encrypted inputs lags behind, despite being critical for high-throughput inference scenarios and training-oriented workloads.
  In this work, we address this gap by developing optimized algorithms for batched HE-friendly neural networks. We also introduced a pipeline architecture designed to maximize resource efficiency for different batch size execution. We implemented these algorithms and evaluated our work using HE-friendly ResNet-20 and ResNet-34 models on encrypted CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 datasets, respectively.
  For ResNet-20, our approach achieves an amortized inference time of 8.86 seconds per image when processing a batch of 512 encrypted images, with a peak memory usage of 98.96 GB. These results represent a 1.78x runtime improvement and a 3.74x reduction in memory usage compared to the state-of-the-art design. For the deeper ResNet-34 model, we achieve an amortized inference time of 28.14 on a batch of 256 encrypted images using 246.78GB of RAM

</details>


### [990] [Convergence theory for Hermite approximations under adaptive coordinate transformations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16975)
*Yahya Saleh*

Main category: math.NA

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了自适应坐标变换下Hermite展开的误差估计理论，建立了等价原理：在变换基中逼近函数等价于在Hermite函数空间中逼近其拉回。分析表明非线性坐标变换可以加速Hermite展开的收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 最近研究表明，使用归一化流（可逆神经网络）参数化和优化坐标变换可以显著加速谱近似的收敛。然而，对于使用自适应坐标变换的Hermite展开逼近函数，缺乏理论误差估计。

Method: 建立了等价原理：在变换基中逼近函数f等价于在Hermite函数空间中逼近其拉回。利用Hermite展开的经典逼近理论，通过拉回函数的正则性推导变换坐标下的误差估计。构造单调传输映射，将目标函数的衰减与Hermite基对齐。

Result: 证明了非线性坐标变换可以增强Hermite展开的收敛性。对于沿实轴衰减的光滑函数，构造的单调传输映射能保证相应Hermite展开的谱收敛速率。为基于归一化流的自适应Hermite近似提供了理论洞察。

Conclusion: 本文首次为使用自适应坐标变换的Hermite展开提供了误差估计理论，建立了等价原理，并展示了非线性变换如何加速收敛。该分析为计算量子物理文献中探索的自适应Hermite近似提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Recent work has shown that parameterizing and optimizing coordinate transformations using normalizing flows, i.e., invertible neural networks, can significantly accelerate the convergence of spectral approximations. We present the first error estimates for approximating functions using Hermite expansions composed with adaptive coordinate transformations. Our analysis establishes an equivalence principle: approximating a function $f$ in the span of the transformed basis is equivalent to approximating the pullback of $f$ in the span of Hermite functions. This allows us to leverage the classical approximation theory of Hermite expansions to derive error estimates in transformed coordinates in terms of the regularity of the pullback. We present an example demonstrating how a nonlinear coordinate transformation can enhance the convergence of Hermite expansions. Focusing on smooth functions decaying along the real axis, we construct a monotone transport map that aligns the decay of the target function with the Hermite basis. This guarantees spectral convergence rates for the corresponding Hermite expansion. Our analysis provides theoretical insight into the convergence behavior of adaptive Hermite approximations based on normalizing flows, as recently explored in the computational quantum physics literature.

</details>


### [991] [E2E-WAVE: End-to-End Learned Waveform Generation for Underwater Video Multicasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17047)
*Khizar Anjum,Tingcong Jiang,Dario Pompili*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: E2E-WAVE是首个端到端学习的水下视频多播波形生成系统，通过将语义相似性嵌入物理层波形，在不可避免的解码错误时优先选择语义相似的标记，实现了在恶劣水下信道中的实时视频传输。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水下声学信道存在20-46%的比特错误率，传统前向纠错（FEC）在超过解码阈值时反而会增加错误。现有数字调制方法无法在2.3kbps的低带宽下传输视频，而SoftCast等模拟方法假设AWGN信道，不适用于频率选择性水下信道。

Method: 结合VideoGPT标记化（1024倍压缩）、可训练波形库和全可微分OFDM传输。系统将语义相似性直接嵌入物理层波形，当解码错误不可避免时，优先选择语义相似的标记而非任意损坏。

Result: 在NOF1信道中比最强FEC基线提升5dB（19.26%）PSNR和0.10（14.28%）SSIM，在2.3kbps信道下实现16FPS 128x128分辨率实时视频传输。在更恶劣信道（BCH1、NCS1）中性能差距进一步扩大。单信道训练即可泛化到未见水下环境。

Conclusion: E2E-WAVE证明了端到端学习波形生成在水下视频传输中的有效性，克服了传统数字调制和模拟方法的限制，实现了低带宽恶劣信道下的实时视频多播。

Abstract: We present E2E-WAVE, the first end-to-end learned waveform generation system for underwater video multicasting. Acoustic channels exhibit 20--46% bit error rates where forward error correction becomes counterproductive -- LDPC increases rather than decreases errors beyond its decoding threshold. E2E-WAVE addresses this by embedding semantic similarity directly into physical layer waveforms: when decoding errors are unavoidable, the system preferentially selects semantically similar tokens rather than arbitrary corruption. Combining VideoGPT tokenization (1024x compression) with a trainable waveform bank and fully differentiable OFDM transmission, E2E-WAVE achieves +5 dB (19.26%) PSNR and +0.10 (14.28%) SSIM over the strongest FEC-protected baseline in less challenging underwater channel (NOF1) while delivering real-time 16 FPS video at 128x128 resolution over 2.3 kbps channels -- impossible for conventional digital modulation. The performance gap only increases in harsher channels (BCH1, NCS1). Trained on a single channel, E2E-WAVE generalizes to unseen underwater environments without retraining, while HEVC fails at sub-5 kbps rates and SoftCast's AWGN assumptions collapse on frequency-selective channels.

</details>


### [992] [FlowRefiner: Flow Matching-Based Iterative Refinement for 3D Turbulent Flow Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17149)
*Yilong Dai,Yiming Sun,Yiheng Chen,Shengyu Chen,Xiaowei Jia,Runlong Yu*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: FlowRefiner：基于流匹配的迭代精炼框架，用于3D湍流模拟，通过确定性ODE校正、统一速度场回归目标和解耦噪声调度，实现高精度自回归预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D湍流模拟中，神经PDE求解器的自回归预测面临挑战，因为精细尺度结构的小误差会在推演过程中快速累积。需要更稳定有效的迭代精炼方法来提高预测精度和物理一致性。

Method: 提出FlowRefiner框架：1) 用确定性ODE校正替代随机去噪精炼；2) 在所有精炼阶段使用统一的速度场回归目标；3) 引入解耦的sigma调度，固定噪声范围独立于精炼深度。这些设计使小噪声区域下的精炼更加稳定有效。

Result: 在大规模3D湍流多尺度结构实验中，FlowRefiner实现了最先进的自回归预测精度和强物理一致性。虽然为湍流模拟开发，但该框架可广泛应用于科学建模中的迭代精炼问题。

Conclusion: FlowRefiner通过创新的迭代精炼设计，显著提升了3D湍流模拟的预测精度和稳定性，为科学建模中的类似问题提供了通用框架。

Abstract: Accurate autoregressive prediction of 3D turbulent flows remains challenging for neural PDE solvers, as small errors in fine-scale structures can accumulate rapidly over rollout. In this paper, we propose FlowRefiner, a flow matching-based iterative refinement framework for 3D turbulent flow simulation. The method replaces stochastic denoising refinement with deterministic ODE-based correction, uses a unified velocity-field regression objective across all refinement stages, and introduces a decoupled sigma schedule that fixes the noise range independently of refinement depth. These design choices yield stable and effective refinement in the small-noise regime. Experiments on large-scale 3D turbulence with rich multi-scale structures show that FlowRefiner achieves state-of-the-art autoregressive prediction accuracy and strong physical consistency. Although developed for turbulent flow simulation, the proposed framework is broadly applicable to iterative refinement problems in scientific modeling.

</details>


### [993] [The Virtue of Sparsity in Complexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17166)
*Nima Afsharhajari,Jonathan Yu-Meng Li*

Main category: q-fin.GN

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 论文挑战了资产定价中稀疏性与复杂性的传统对立观点，提出容量稀疏性（候选特征空间维度）与因子稀疏性（定价风险的结构）是互补的：扩大容量能够发现因子稀疏性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代高维资产定价中，稀疏性与复杂性常被视为对立原则：丰富的特征空间似乎偏好复杂性，而经济直觉长期偏好简约性。作者认为这种张力是错误的，需要重新审视容量稀疏性与因子稀疏性的关系。

Method: 基于Didisheim等人（2025）的基准实证设计，将其推向更高复杂性机制，结合非线性特征扩展和基追踪方法，构建投资组合。

Result: 在超过临界复杂性阈值后，非线性特征扩展结合基追踪的投资组合样本外表现优于无岭基准。复杂性带来的收益并非来自保留更多因子，而是来自扩大可识别稀疏定价风险结构的空间。

Conclusion: 资产定价中复杂性的价值通过因子稀疏性发挥作用，容量稀疏性与因子稀疏性是互补而非竞争关系，扩大容量能够促进稀疏结构的发现。

Abstract: Sparsity or complexity? In modern high-dimensional asset pricing, these are often viewed as competing principles: richer feature spaces appear to favor complexity, while economic intuition has long favored parsimony. We show that this tension is misplaced. We distinguish capacity sparsity-the dimensionality of the candidate feature space-from factor sparsity-the parsimonious structure of priced risks-and argue that the two are complements: expanding capacity enables the discovery of factor sparsity. Revisiting the benchmark empirical design of Didisheim et al. (2025) and pushing it to higher complexity regimes, we show that nonlinear feature expansions combined with basis pursuit yield portfolios whose out-of-sample performance dominates ridgeless benchmarks beyond a critical complexity threshold. The evidence shows that the gains from complexity arise not from retaining more factors, but from enlarging the space from which a sparse structure of priced risks can be identified. The virtue of complexity in asset pricing operates through factor sparsity.

</details>


### [994] [Leveraging Kernel Symmetry for Joint Compression and Error Mitigation in Edge Model Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17371)
*Anis Hamadouche,Mathini Sellathurai*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于自由度(DoF)的神经网络传输框架，利用卷积核的结构对称性约束来减少参数传输，仅发送对称群决定的唯一系数，在接收端确定性地重构完整权重张量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在受限通信链路上实现高效的神经网络传输，传统剪枝方法在传输损伤下容易导致灾难性精度下降，需要更可靠的方法来利用神经网络中的结构化冗余。

Method: 基于自由度(DoF)的编解码器：选择对称群（如中心偏斜对称性），仅传输对称约束决定的唯一系数；接收端通过投影步骤强制参数与对称不变子空间一致，增强对传输损伤的鲁棒性。

Result: 在MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上使用DeepCNN架构的实验表明，DoF传输在多种量化、噪声信道条件下显著减少带宽，同时比剪枝基线保持更高精度；中心偏斜对称性提供最佳精度-压缩权衡。

Conclusion: 利用卷积核的结构对称性约束可以实现高效可靠的神经网络传输，DoF方法在保持精度的同时大幅减少通信开销，为受限链路上的模型传输提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: This paper investigates communication-efficient neural network transmission by exploiting structured symmetry constraints in convolutional kernels. Instead of transmitting all model parameters, we propose a degrees-of-freedom (DoF) based codec that sends only the unique coefficients implied by a chosen symmetry group, enabling deterministic reconstruction of the full weight tensor at the receiver. The proposed framework is evaluated under quantization and noisy channel conditions across multiple symmetry patterns, signal-to-noise ratios, and bit-widths. To improve robustness against transmission impairments, a projection step is further applied at the receiver to enforce consistency with the symmetry-invariant subspace, effectively denoising corrupted parameters. Experimental results on MNIST and CIFAR-10 using a DeepCNN architecture demonstrate that DoF-based transmission achieves substantial bandwidth reduction while preserving significantly higher accuracy than pruning-based baselines, which often suffer catastrophic degradation. Among the tested symmetries, \textit{central-skew symmetry} consistently provides the best accuracy-compression tradeoff, confirming that structured redundancy can be leveraged for reliable and efficient neural model delivery over constrained links.

</details>


### [995] [A Quasi-Experimental Developer Study of Security Training in LLM-Assisted Web Application Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17763)
*Mohammed Kharma,Ahmed Sabbah,Radi Jarrar,Samer Zain,Mohammad Alkhanafseh,David Mohaisen*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 研究通过准实验设计检验安全培训是否能改善LLM辅助后端开发中的安全质量，结果显示培训后安全漏洞显著减少


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM在软件开发中的广泛应用，了解如何提高LLM辅助开发的安全性至关重要。本研究旨在探索专门的安全培训是否能在不修改模型的情况下改善开发人员使用LLM时的安全产出质量。

Method: 采用准实验设计，12名开发人员在统一界面、固定模型配置下完成匹配任务。使用混合设计：培训前后对比（组内）和专业技能因素（组间）。安全结果通过独立手动验证提交的代码库进行评估，主要终点是严重性加权的已验证漏洞得分。

Result: 培训后条件显示显著改善：已验证漏洞从162个减少到111个（减少31.5%），严重性加权负担从432减少到267（减少38.2%），关键发现从24个减少到5个（减少79.2%）。授权和对象访问漏洞减少最多（53.3%），认证和凭证策略漏洞减少44.7%。

Conclusion: 在测试条件下，安全培训能显著减少LLM辅助后端开发中的安全漏洞，但不应替代安全默认设置、静态分析、专家评审或操作强化等传统安全措施。
