Abstract: This paper presents a controlled quasi-experimental developer study examining whether a layer-based security training package is associated with improved security quality in LLM-assisted implementation of an identity-centric Java Spring Boot backend. The study uses a mixed design with a within-subject pre-training versus post-training comparison and an exploratory between-subject expertise factor. Twelve developers completed matched runs under a common interface, fixed model configuration, counterbalanced task sets, and a shared starter project. Security outcomes were assessed via independent manual validation of submitted repositories by the first and second authors. The primary participant-level endpoint was a severity-weighted validated-weakness score. The post-training condition showed a significant paired reduction under an exact Wilcoxon signed-rank test ($p = 0.0059$). In aggregate, validated weaknesses decreased from 162 to 111 (31.5\%), the severity-weighted burden decreased from 432 to 267 (38.2\%), and critical findings decreased from 24 to 5 (79.2\%). The largest reductions were in authorization and object access (53.3\%) and in authentication, credential policy, and recovery weaknesses (44.7\%). Session and browser trust-boundary issues showed minimal change, while sensitive-data and cryptographic weaknesses showed only marginal improvement.
  These results suggest that, under the tested conditions, post-training runs reduce validated security burden in LLM-assisted backend development without modifying the model. They do not support replacing secure defaults, static analysis, expert review, or operational hardening.

</details>


### [996] [Centre manifold theorem for maps along manifolds of fixed points](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18202)
*Lachlan Ewen MacDonald*

Main category: math.DS

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文证明了沿带边界流形的固定点映射的中心流形定理，并将其应用于两层矩阵分解问题中大步长梯度下降的研究


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究梯度下降算法在优化问题中的动力学行为，特别是在大步长情况下，需要理解沿流形边界的固定点稳定性。两层矩阵分解问题作为深度学习中常见的优化问题，其梯度下降动力学分析具有理论和实践意义。

Method: 1. 证明了一个关于沿带边界流形的固定点映射的中心流形定理
2. 将该定理应用于两层矩阵分解问题的梯度下降动力学分析
3. 研究大步长情况下的优化行为

Result: 建立了中心流形定理的数学框架，为分析梯度下降在矩阵分解问题中的动力学提供了理论工具，特别是对大步长情况下的行为给出了理论解释

Conclusion: 该工作为理解优化算法在非凸问题中的动力学行为提供了新的数学工具，特别是在处理带边界流形的固定点稳定性方面有理论贡献

Abstract: We prove a centre manifold theorem for a map along a manifold-with-boundary of fixed points, and provide an application to the study of gradient descent with large step size on two-layer matrix factorisation problems.

</details>


### [997] [DeepRitzSplit Neural Operator for Phase-Field Models via Energy Splitting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18261)
*Chih-Kang Huang,Ludovick Gagnon,Miha Založnik,Benoît Appolaire*

Main category: math.AP

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于神经算子的新方法，结合凸凹分裂方案和物理信息学习，用于加速相场模型的模拟。通过能量分裂变分公式训练神经算子，确保能量耗散特性，并设计专门的反应扩散神经算子架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 相场模型的模拟需要精细的时空离散化，计算成本高昂。传统数值方法计算时间长，需要开发更高效的替代模型。神经算子作为替代模型具有降低计算成本的潜力。

Method: 提出Deep Ritz方法，训练神经算子近似相场模型的变分公式。采用能量分裂变分公式训练，确保能量耗散特性。设计专门的反应扩散神经算子架构，适应模型方程的算子结构。

Result: 成功应用于各向同性Allen-Cahn方程和各向异性枝晶生长模拟。物理信息训练比数据驱动训练在分布外评估中具有更好的泛化能力，推理速度比传统傅里叶谱方法更快。

Conclusion: 提出的神经算子方法结合了物理原理和深度学习，能够有效加速相场模型模拟，同时保持物理一致性，为科学计算中的高效模拟提供了新途径。

Abstract: The multi-scale and non-linear nature of phase-field models of solidification requires fine spatial and temporal discretization, leading to long computation times. This could be overcome with artificial-intelligence approaches. Surrogate models based on neural operators could have a lower computational cost than conventional numerical discretization methods.
  We propose a new neural operator approach that bridges classical convex-concave splitting schemes with physics-informed learning to accelerate the simulation of phase-field models. It consists of a Deep Ritz method, where a neural operator is trained to approximate a variational formulation of the phase-field model. By training the neural operator with an energy-splitting variational formulation, we enforce the energy dissipation property of the underlying models.
  We further introduce a custom Reaction-Diffusion Neural Operator (RDNO) architecture, adapted to the operators of the model equations. We successfully apply the deep learning approach to the isotropic Allen-Cahn equation and to anisotropic dendritic growth simulation. We demonstrate that our physically-informed training provides better generalization in out-of-distribution evaluations than data-driven training, while achieving faster inference than traditional Fourier spectral methods.

</details>


### [998] [Incremental learning for audio classification with Hebbian Deep Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18270)
*Riccardo Casciotti,Francesco De Santis,Alberto Antonietti,Annamaria Mesaros*

Main category: eess.AS

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于赫布学习的核可塑性方法，用于声音分类的持续学习，通过在增量学习中选择性调制网络核来平衡新知识学习和旧知识保留。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受人类终身学习能力的启发，该研究旨在解决深度学习中持续学习的问题。具体到声音分类任务，研究者希望开发一种生物学启发的学习机制，能够在增量学习过程中有效平衡新信息学习和旧知识保留。

Method: 提出了一种核可塑性方法，基于赫布学习原理（一种生物学启发的学习过程）。该方法在增量学习过程中选择性调制网络核：对某些核进行调制以学习新信息，对其他核进行保护以保留先前知识。在ESC-50数据集上进行了五步增量学习的实验验证。

Result: 在ESC-50数据集上，该方法在五个增量步骤中实现了76.3%的整体准确率，显著优于没有核可塑性的基线方法（68.7%）。同时，该方法在不同任务间表现出更高的稳定性。

Conclusion: 赫布学习启发的核可塑性方法能够有效提升声音分类持续学习的性能，在准确率和稳定性方面均优于传统方法，为生物学启发的持续学习算法提供了有价值的探索。

Abstract: The ability of humans for lifelong learning is an inspiration for deep learning methods and in particular for continual learning. In this work, we apply Hebbian learning, a biologically inspired learning process, to sound classification. We propose a kernel plasticity approach that selectively modulates network kernels during incremental learning, acting on selected kernels to learn new information and on others to retain previous knowledge. Using the ESC-50 dataset, the proposed method achieves 76.3% overall accuracy over five incremental steps, outperforming a baseline without kernel plasticity (68.7%) and demonstrating significantly greater stability across tasks.

</details>


### [999] [Symmetry Guarantees Statistic Recovery in Variational Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18310)
*Daniel Marks,Dario Paccagnan,Mark van der Wilk*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了变分推断中对称性诱导统计量恢复的一般理论，统一了现有结果并应用于球面分布获得新保证


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 变分推断用于近似难以处理的目标密度，但变分族通常无法精确表示目标。现有对称性相关研究提供问题特定的统计量恢复保证，缺乏对基本机制的一般性理解

Method: 1) 刻画变分最小化器何时继承目标对称性并建立识别统计量的条件；2) 将现有位置尺度族结果统一为理论特例；3) 将框架应用于球面分布，获得von Mises-Fisher族方向统计的新保证

Result: 建立了对称性诱导统计量恢复的一般理论框架，统一了现有结果，并为球面分布提供了新的恢复保证，为各种对称性设置下的VI提供了模块化蓝图

Conclusion: 该理论提供了理解变分推断中对称性如何强制统计量恢复的基本机制，为在广泛对称性设置中推导新的恢复保证提供了系统方法

Abstract: Variational inference (VI) is a central tool in modern machine learning, used to approximate an intractable target density by optimising over a tractable family of distributions. As the variational family cannot typically represent the target exactly, guarantees on the quality of the resulting approximation are crucial for understanding which of its properties VI can faithfully capture. Recent work has identified instances in which symmetries of the target and the variational family enable the recovery of certain statistics, even under model misspecification. However, these guarantees are inherently problem-specific and offer little insight into the fundamental mechanism by which symmetry forces statistic recovery. In this paper, we overcome this limitation by developing a general theory of symmetry-induced statistic recovery in variational inference. First, we characterise when variational minimisers inherit the symmetries of the target and establish conditions under which these pin down identifiable statistics. Second, we unify existing results by showing that previously known statistic recovery guarantees in location-scale families arise as special cases of our theory. Third, we apply our framework to distributions on the sphere to obtain novel guarantees for directional statistics in von Mises-Fisher families. Together, these results provide a modular blueprint for deriving new recovery guarantees for VI in a broad range of symmetry settings.

</details>


### [1000] [Balanced Co-Clustering of Users and Items for Embedding Table Compression in Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18351)
*Runhao Jiang,Renchi Yang,Donghao Wu*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: BACO：基于平衡协同聚类的推荐系统嵌入压缩框架，通过用户-物品分组共享嵌入，在保持推荐准确性的同时大幅减少参数和计算开销


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业级推荐系统中，用户和物品的嵌入表参数巨大，带来沉重的计算和内存开销，限制了在资源受限环境下的部署。现有嵌入压缩方法要么严重损害推荐准确性，要么计算成本高昂。

Method: 提出BACO框架，利用用户-物品交互中的协同信号进行用户和物品分组，使相似用户/物品共享码本中的相同嵌入。采用平衡协同聚类目标，最大化簇内连接性同时强制簇容量平衡，通过理论分析统一经典图聚类技术。具体包括：用户和物品的加权方案、高效的标签传播求解器、以及辅助用户簇。

Result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，BACO能减少超过75%的嵌入参数，召回率下降最多1.85%，同时比最强基线快达346倍。

Conclusion: BACO提供了一种快速有效的嵌入压缩框架，在保持推荐准确性的同时显著减少参数和计算开销，解决了工业推荐系统部署中的资源约束问题。

Abstract: Recommender systems have advanced markedly over the past decade by transforming each user/item into a dense embedding vector with deep learning models. At industrial scale, embedding tables constituted by such vectors of all users/items demand a vast amount of parameters and impose heavy compute and memory overhead during training and inference, hindering model deployment under resource constraints. Existing solutions towards embedding compression either suffer from severely compromised recommendation accuracy or incur considerable computational costs.
  To mitigate these issues, this paper presents BACO, a fast and effective framework for compressing embedding tables. Unlike traditional ID hashing, BACO is built on the idea of exploiting collaborative signals in user-item interactions for user and item groupings, such that similar users/items share the same embeddings in the codebook. Specifically, we formulate a balanced co-clustering objective that maximizes intra-cluster connectivity while enforcing cluster-volume balance, and unify canonical graph clustering techniques into the framework through rigorous theoretical analyses. To produce effective groupings while averting codebook collapse, BACO instantiates this framework with a principled weighting scheme for users and items, an efficient label propagation solver, as well as secondary user clusters. Our extensive experiments comparing BACO against full models and 18 baselines over benchmark datasets demonstrate that BACO cuts embedding parameters by over 75% with a drop of at most 1.85% in recall, while surpassing the strongest baselines by being up to 346X faster.

</details>


### [1001] [Spectral bandits for smooth graph functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18420)
*Michal Valko,Rémi Munos,Branislav Kveton,Tomáš Kocák*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究图上的平滑函数bandit问题，适用于基于内容的推荐系统，提出有效维度概念和两种算法，在真实推荐任务中仅需数十次节点评估即可学习数千物品的用户偏好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图上的平滑函数在流形学习和半监督学习中广泛应用。本文研究臂的收益在图上是平滑的bandit问题，适用于涉及图的在线学习问题，如基于内容的推荐。每个可推荐物品是节点，其期望评分与邻居相似，目标是推荐高期望评分的物品。

Method: 引入有效维度的概念（在真实世界图中较小），提出两种算法：一种线性缩放于有效维度，另一种次线性缩放。算法设计旨在使相对于最优策略的累积遗憾不会随节点数量而急剧增加。

Result: 在真实世界内容推荐问题上的实验表明，仅需数十次节点评估即可学习数千物品的用户偏好估计器。算法在有效维度上表现出良好的缩放性能。

Conclusion: 该研究为图上的平滑bandit问题提供了有效的解决方案，特别适用于基于内容的推荐系统，通过利用图结构和有效维度概念，显著减少了学习所需的数据量。

Abstract: Smooth functions on graphs have wide applications in manifold and semi-supervised learning. In this paper, we study a bandit problem where the payoffs of arms are smooth on a graph. This framework is suitable for solving online learning problems that involve graphs, such as content-based recommendation. In this problem, each item we can recommend is a node and its expected rating is similar to its neighbors. The goal is to recommend items that have high expected ratings. We aim for the algorithms where the cumulative regret with respect to the optimal policy would not scale poorly with the number of nodes. In particular, we introduce the notion of an effective dimension, which is small in real-world graphs, and propose two algorithms for solving our problem that scale linearly and sublinearly in this dimension. Our experiments on real-world content recommendation problem show that a good estimator of user preferences for thousands of items can be learned from just tens of nodes evaluations.

</details>


### [1002] [Safe Control using Learned Safety Filters and Adaptive Conformal Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18482)
*Sacha Huriot,Ihab Tabbara,Hussein Sibai*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: ACoFi结合学习型安全滤波器与自适应共形推理，通过动态调整切换阈值来保证控制系统的软安全，在分布外场景中显著优于固定阈值方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统安全滤波器合成方法难以扩展到高维系统，而学习型方法虽然能处理高维问题，但其决策误差会威胁安全保证。需要一种能提供可靠安全保证的学习型安全滤波器方法。

Method: 提出自适应共形滤波(ACoFi)，结合基于Hamilton-Jacobi可达性的学习型安全滤波器与自适应共形推理。滤波器根据预测安全性的观测误差动态调整切换标准，使用名义策略输出的可能安全值范围来量化安全评估的不确定性。

Result: ACoFi保证对名义策略预测安全性的不确定性量化错误率渐近上界由用户定义参数控制。在Dubins汽车仿真和Safety Gymnasium环境中，相比固定切换阈值基线方法，ACoFi实现了更高的学习安全值和更少的安全违规，尤其在分布外场景中表现突出。

Conclusion: ACoFi为学习型安全滤波器提供了一种实用的软安全保证方法，通过自适应不确定性量化显著提升了安全性能，特别适用于分布外场景。

Abstract: Safety filters have been shown to be effective tools to ensure the safety of control systems with unsafe nominal policies. To address scalability challenges in traditional synthesis methods, learning-based approaches have been proposed for designing safety filters for systems with high-dimensional state and control spaces. However, the inevitable errors in the decisions of these models raise concerns about their reliability and the safety guarantees they offer. This paper presents Adaptive Conformal Filtering (ACoFi), a method that combines learned Hamilton-Jacobi reachability-based safety filters with adaptive conformal inference. Under ACoFi, the filter dynamically adjusts its switching criteria based on the observed errors in its predictions of the safety of actions. The range of possible safety values of the nominal policy's output is used to quantify uncertainty in safety assessment. The filter switches from the nominal policy to the learned safe one when that range suggests it might be unsafe. We show that ACoFi guarantees that the rate of incorrectly quantifying uncertainty in the predicted safety of the nominal policy is asymptotically upper bounded by a user-defined parameter. This gives a soft safety guarantee rather than a hard safety guarantee. We evaluate ACoFi in a Dubins car simulation and a Safety Gymnasium environment, empirically demonstrating that it significantly outperforms the baseline method that uses a fixed switching threshold by achieving higher learned safety values and fewer safety violations, especially in out-of-distribution scenarios.

</details>


### [1003] [Reference-state System Reliability method for scalable uncertainty quantification of coherent systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17066)
*Ji-Eun Byun,Hyeuk Ryu,Junho Song*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出RSR方法用于概率评估大型系统可靠性，通过参考状态分类蒙特卡洛样本而非分解状态空间，利用矩阵运算实现高效计算，可处理数十万参考状态的大规模系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于分解的系统可靠性评估方法在组件数量增加时扩展性差，难以处理大规模实际系统（如基础设施网络、供应链）的概率评估问题。

Method: RSR方法使用参考状态表征系统状态边界，但不同于传统方法将状态空间分解为不相交超立方体，而是用参考状态分类蒙特卡洛样本。通过矩阵存储样本和参考状态，利用批处理矩阵运算实现高效分类。

Result: RSR能在10秒内评估119节点、295边图的系统状态概率，可扩展到数十万参考状态的问题，远超现有方法能力范围，并能自然扩展到多状态系统。

Conclusion: RSR为大规模系统实时风险评估提供了有效工具，但当边界参考状态数量极大时收敛速度会减慢，这促使未来研究基于学习的系统状态边界表示方法。

Abstract: Coherent systems are representative of many practical applications, ranging from infrastructure networks to supply chains. Probabilistic evaluation of such systems remains challenging, however, because existing decomposition-based methods scale poorly as the number of components grows. To address this limitation, this study proposes the Reference-state System Reliability (RSR) method. Like existing approaches, RSR characterises the boundary between different system states using reference states in the component-state space. Where it departs from these methods is in how the state space is explored: rather than using reference states to decompose the space into disjoint hypercubes, RSR uses them to classify Monte Carlo samples, making computational cost significantly less sensitive to the number of reference states. To make this classification efficient, samples and reference states are stored as matrices and compared using batched matrix operations, allowing RSR to exploit the advances in high-throughput matrix computing driven by modern machine learning. We demonstrate that RSR evaluates the system-state probability of a graph with 119 nodes and 295 edges within 10~seconds, highlighting its potential for real-time risk assessment of large-scale systems. We further show that RSR scales to problems involving hundreds of thousands of reference states -- well beyond the reach of existing methods -- and extends naturally to multi-state systems. Nevertheless, when the number of boundary reference states grows exceedingly large, RSR's convergence slows down, a limitation shared with existing reference-state-based approaches that motivates future research into learning-based representations of system-state boundaries.

</details>


### [1004] [IDOBE: Infectious Disease Outbreak forecasting Benchmark Ecosystem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18521)
*Aniruddha Adiga,Jingyuan Chou,Anshul Chiranth,Bryan Lewis,Ana I. Bento,Shaun Truelove,Geoffrey Fox,Madhav Marathe,Harry Hochheiser,Srini Venkatramanan*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: IDOBE是一个用于传染病暴发预测的标准化基准数据集，包含超过100年的监测数据、13种疾病、10,000多个暴发事件，并提供了11个基线模型的性能评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传染病预测已成为实时疫情应对的重要组成部分，但目前缺乏标准化的基准数据集来评估统计和机器学习方法。此外，对于历史数据有限的新发疫情，这些方法的性能了解不足。

Method: 创建IDOBE数据集：从多个数据仓库收集超过一个世纪的流行病学时间序列数据，使用导数基分割方法生成10,000多个暴发事件，涵盖13种疾病。采用信息论和分布度量量化数据集的流行病学多样性。使用11个基线模型进行多时间尺度短期预测（1-4周前）。

Result: MLP-based方法表现最稳健，统计方法在疫情峰值前阶段略有优势。数据集和基线模型已公开发布，支持标准化、可复现的暴发预测方法基准测试。

Conclusion: IDOBE为暴发预测提供了标准化的基准数据集和评估框架，有助于推动该领域的方法发展和性能比较。

Abstract: Epidemic forecasting has become an integral part of real-time infectious disease outbreak response. While collaborative ensembles composed of statistical and machine learning models have become the norm for real-time forecasting, standardized benchmark datasets for evaluating such methods are lacking. Further, there is limited understanding on performance of these methods for novel outbreaks with limited historical data. In this paper, we propose IDOBE, a curated collection of epidemiological time series focused on outbreak forecasting. IDOBE compiles from multiple data repositories spanning over a century of surveillance and across U.S. states and global locations. We perform derivative-based segmentation to generate over 10,000 outbreaks covering multiple outcomes such as cases and hospitalizations for 13 diseases. We consider a variety of information-theoretic and distributional measures to quantify the epidemiological diversity of the dataset. Finally, we perform multi-horizon short-term forecasting (1- to 4-week-ahead) through the progression of the outbreak using 11 baseline models and report on their performance. In addition to standard metrics such as NMSE and MAPE for point forecasts, we include probabilistic scoring rules such as Normalized Weighted Interval Score (NWIS) to quantify the performance. We find that MLP-based methods have the most robust performance, with statistical methods having a slight edge during the pre-peak phase. IDOBE dataset along with baselines are released publicly on https://github.com/NSSAC/IDOBE to enable standardized, reproducible benchmarking of outbreak forecasting methods.

</details>


### [1005] [StrEBM: A Structured Latent Energy-Based Model for Blind Source Separation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17381)
*Yuan-Hao Wei*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: StrEBM提出了一种结构化潜在能量模型，通过为不同潜在维度分配可学习的结构偏置，实现可识别和解耦的潜在表示学习，在盲源分离任务中验证了框架有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 本文动机是促进可识别和解耦的潜在组织，通过为不同潜在维度分配各自的可学习结构偏置，而不是用单一共享能量约束整个潜在表示。盲源分离被用作具体可验证的测试平台。

Method: 提出StrEBM框架，直接优化潜在轨迹、观测生成映射和源级结构参数。每个潜在维度关联自己的能量基公式，允许不同潜在组件在训练中逐渐演化到不同的源类角色。使用高斯过程启发的能量设计，但框架不限于高斯过程。

Result: 在线性和非线性混合设置的合成多通道信号实验中，模型能有效恢复源组件，提供了框架的初步经验验证。同时揭示了重要的优化特性，包括晚期收敛缓慢和非线性观测映射下的稳定性降低。

Conclusion: 该研究不仅阐明了当前基于GP实例化的实际行为，还为未来研究更丰富的源级能量家族和更鲁棒的非线性优化策略奠定了基础。

Abstract: This paper proposes StrEBM, a structured latent energy-based model for source-wise structured representation learning. The framework is motivated by a broader goal of promoting identifiable and decoupled latent organization by assigning different latent dimensions their own learnable structural biases, rather than constraining the entire latent representation with a single shared energy. In this sense, blind source separation is adopted here as a concrete and verifiable testbed, through which the evolution of latent dimensions toward distinct underlying components can be directly examined. In the proposed framework, latent trajectories are optimized directly together with an observation-generation map and source-wise structural parameters. Each latent dimension is associated with its own energy-based formulation, allowing different latent components to gradually evolve toward distinct source-like roles during training. In the present study, this source-wise energy design is instantiated using Gaussian-process-inspired energies with learnable length-scales, but the framework itself is not restricted to Gaussian processes and is intended as a more general structured latent EBM formulation. Experiments on synthetic multichannel signals under linear and nonlinear mixing settings show that the proposed model can recover source components effectively, providing an initial empirical validation of the framework. At the same time, the study reveals important optimization characteristics, including slow late-stage convergence and reduced stability under nonlinear observation mappings. These findings not only clarify the practical behavior of the current GP-based instantiation, but also establish a basis for future investigation of richer source-wise energy families and more robust nonlinear optimization strategies.

</details>


### [1006] [Enhancing Anomaly-Based Intrusion Detection Systems with Process Mining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18066)
*Francesco Vitale,Francesco Grimaldi,Massimiliano Rak,Nicola Mazzocca*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于过程挖掘的方法，为基于异常的入侵检测系统提供过程级别的警报严重性评级和解释，在USB-IDS-TC数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于深度学习的入侵检测系统虽然性能有效，但由于黑盒架构导致可信度有限。现有的可解释技术虽然能提供警报洞察，但缺乏基于数据包序列分析的过程级别解释。

Method: 采用过程挖掘技术增强基于异常的入侵检测系统，提供基于过程的警报严重性评级和解释。方法优先处理关键警报，保持网络行为可见性，同时通过允许误分类的良性流量通过来最小化干扰。

Result: 在包含Slowloris DoS攻击变种的USB-IDS-TC数据集上，该方法能够区分低到极高严重性警报，同时保持高达99.94%的召回率和99.99%的精确率，有效消除误报并为真阳性提供不同程度的严重性评级。

Conclusion: 过程挖掘方法能够增强入侵检测系统的可解释性和可信度，提供过程级别的警报解释和严重性评级，在保持高检测性能的同时减少误报。

Abstract: Anomaly-based Intrusion Detection Systems (IDSs) ensure protection against malicious attacks on networked systems. While deep learning-based IDSs achieve effective performance, their limited trustworthiness due to black-box architectures remains a critical constraint. Despite existing explainable techniques offering insight into the alarms raised by IDSs, they lack process-based explanations grounded in packet-level sequencing analysis. In this paper, we propose a method that employs process mining techniques to enhance anomaly-based IDSs by providing process-based alarm severity ratings and explanations for alerts. Our method prioritizes critical alerts and maintains visibility into network behavior, while minimizing disruption by allowing misclassified benign traffic to pass. We apply the method to the publicly available USB-IDS-TC dataset, which includes anomalous traffic affected by different variants of the Slowloris DoS attack. Results show that our method is able to discriminate between low- to very-high-severity alarms while preserving up to 99.94% recall and 99.99% precision, effectively discarding false positives while providing different degrees of severity for the true positives.

</details>


### [1007] [Duality for the Adversarial Total Variation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18540)
*Leon Bungert,Lucas Schmitt*

Main category: math.AP

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 该论文将二元分类器的对抗训练重新表述为涉及非局部全变分的正则化风险最小化问题，并利用对偶技术建立了该全变分的次微分特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究二元分类器对抗训练的数学基础，将其重新表述为带有非局部全变分正则化的优化问题，以便更好地理解对抗训练的理论性质。

Method: 1. 将对抗训练重新表述为非局部全变分的正则化风险最小化问题
2. 推导非局部全变分的对偶表示和相关的分部积分公式
3. 在适当度量空间和欧几里得域上建立对偶陈述
4. 在附加条件下提供次微分的特征化

Result: 1. 建立了非局部全变分的对偶表示
2. 推导了涉及非局部梯度和散度的分部积分公式
3. 在连续函数空间和有界函数空间上提供了对偶陈述
4. 在某些条件下获得了次微分的完整特征

Conclusion: 该研究为对抗训练提供了严格的数学框架，通过非局部变分方法和对偶技术建立了理论基础，有助于深入理解对抗训练的性质。

Abstract: Adversarial training of binary classifiers can be reformulated as regularized risk minimization involving a nonlocal total variation. Building on this perspective, we establish a characterization of the subdifferential of this total variation using duality techniques. To achieve this, we derive a dual representation of the nonlocal total variation and a related integration of parts formula, involving a nonlocal gradient and divergence. We provide such duality statements both in the space of continuous functions vanishing at infinity on proper metric spaces and for the space of essentially bounded functions on Euclidean domains. Furthermore, under some additional conditions we provide characterizations of the subdifferential in these settings.

</details>


### [1008] [ConforNets: Latents-Based Conformational Control in OpenFold3](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18559)
*Minji Lee,Colin Kalicki,Minkyu Jeon,Aymen Qabel,Alisia Fadini,Mohammed AlQuraishi*

Main category: q-bio.BM

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: ConforNets：通过通道仿射变换调制AlphaFold3的潜在表示，实现蛋白质构象控制的新方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AlphaFold系列模型通常只能预测蛋白质的主要构象，但无法捕捉生物学相关的替代构象状态。现有方法通过临时扰动AF模型或输入来获取构象变异性，但效率低下且无法一致恢复主要构象模式。

Method: 研究AF3架构中潜在表示扰动的最佳位置和操作方式，提出ConforNets：对pre-Pairformer对潜在表示进行通道仿射变换，全局调制AF3表示，使其可在不同蛋白质间复用。

Result: 在无监督生成替代构象状态方面，ConforNets在所有现有多状态基准测试中达到最先进的成功率。在构象转移的新监督任务中，基于一个源蛋白训练的ConforNets可在整个蛋白质家族中诱导保守的构象变化。

Conclusion: ConforNets为AF3基模型引入了构象控制机制，能够高效、一致地生成蛋白质的替代构象状态，并实现跨蛋白质的构象转移。

Abstract: Models from the AlphaFold (AF) family reliably predict one dominant conformation for most well-ordered proteins but struggle to capture biologically relevant alternate states. Several efforts have focused on eliciting greater conformational variability through ad hoc inference-time perturbations of AF models or their inputs. Despite their progress, these approaches remain inefficient and fail to consistently recover major conformational modes. Here, we investigate both the optimal location and manner-of-operation for perturbing latent representations in the AF3 architecture. We distill our findings in ConforNets: channel-wise affine transforms of the pre-Pairformer pair latents. Unlike previous methods, ConforNets globally modulate AF3 representations, making them reusable across proteins. On unsupervised generation of alternate states, ConforNets achieve state-of-the-art success rates on all existing multi-state benchmarks. On the novel supervised task of conformational transfer, ConforNets trained on one source protein can induce a conserved conformational change across a protein family. Collectively, these results introduce a mechanism for conformational control in AF3-based models.

</details>


### [1009] [Multi-Label Phase Diagram Prediction in Complex Alloys via Physics-Informed Graph Attention Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16468)
*Eunjeong Park,Amrita Basak*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于物理信息图注意力网络的合金相图预测方法，用于Ag-Bi-Cu-Sn合金系统的多标签相集预测，结合元素感知表示和热力学约束，实现快速相映射和合金筛选。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统CALPHAD方法在多组分合金相图计算中计算成本高昂，通常只能处理稀疏截面。需要开发快速相映射和合金筛选的替代方法，同时保持热力学一致性。

Method: 使用物理信息图注意力网络(GAT)，将合金成分-温度点表示为四节点元素图，节点特征包含原子分数和元素描述符。结合图注意力、全局池化和多层感知器预测九个相关相，并通过训练惩罚或推理时投影加入热力学约束。

Result: 在六个二元和三个三元子系统中，基线模型获得0.951的宏观F1分数和93.98%的精确集匹配率。物理信息解码将精确集准确率提高到约96%。模型在未见三元截面达到99.32%准确率，在700°C四元截面达到91.78%准确率。

Conclusion: 基于注意力的图学习结合热力学约束执行，为高分辨率相映射和外推合金筛选提供了有效且物理一致的替代方法。

Abstract: Accurate phase equilibria are foundational to alloy design because they encode the underlying thermodynamics governing stability, transformations, and processing windows. However, while the CALculation of Phase Diagrams (CALPHAD) provides a rigorous thermodynamic framework, exploring multicomponent composition-temperature space remains computationally expensive and is typically limited to sparse section. To enable rapid phase mapping and alloy screening, we propose a physics-informed graph attention network (GAT) that learns element-aware representations and couples them with thermodynamic constraints for multi-label phase-set prediction in the Ag-Bi-Cu-Sn alloy system. Using about 25,000 equilibrium states generated with pycalphad, each composition-temperature point is represented as a four-node element graph with atomic fractions and elemental descriptors as node features. The model combines graph attention, global pooling, and a multilayer perceptron to predict nine relevant phases. To improve physical consistency, we incorporate thermodynamic constraints, applied as training penalties or as an inference-time projection. Across six binary and three ternary subsystems, the baseline model achieves a macro-F1 score of 0.951 and 93.98% exact-set match, while physics-informed decoding improves robustness and raises exact-set accuracy to about 96% on dense in-domain grids. The surrogate also generalizes to an unseen ternary section with 99.32% exact-set accuracy and to a quaternary section at 700 °C with 91.78% accuracy. These results demonstrate that attention-based graph learning coupled with thermodynamic constraint enforcement provides an effective and physically consistent surrogate for high-resolution phase mapping and extrapolative alloy screening.

</details>


### [1010] [Cross-Modal Generation: From Commodity WiFi to High-Fidelity mmWave and RFID Sensing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16558)
*Zhixiong Yang,Long Jing,Yao Li,Shuli Cheng,Guoxuan Chi,Chenyu Wen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: RF-CMG：一种基于扩散的跨模态生成方法，利用数据丰富的WiFi信号合成稀缺的mmWave和RFID射频数据，通过高频引导和低频约束实现高质量跨模态生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无线通信领域存在显著的射频模态数据不平衡问题：WiFi数据丰富，但mmWave和RFID数据稀缺且获取成本高，导致难以训练高质量的生成模型。

Method: 提出RF-CMG方法，将跨模态生成解耦为高频引导和低频约束：1）MGE模块引导反向扩散轨迹朝向目标高频分布；2）LFMC模块逐步强制执行低频约束，抑制源模态结构偏差积累。

Result: 与多种主流生成模型相比，RF-CMG在合成RFID和mmWave信号方面表现优异；生成的合成数据在手势识别任务中有效，并分析了合成数据比例对下游性能的影响。

Conclusion: RF-CMG通过解耦高频引导和低频约束，成功利用数据丰富的WiFi信号合成高质量的稀缺模态射频数据，解决了无线通信领域的数据不平衡问题。

Abstract: AIGC has shown remarkable success in CV and NLP, and has recently demonstrated promising potential in the wireless domain. However, significant data imbalance exists across RF modalities, with abundant WiFi data but scarce mmWave and RFID data due to high acquisition cost. This makes it difficult to train high-quality generative models for these data-scarce modalities. In this work, we propose RF-CMG, a diffusion-based cross-modal generative method that leverages data-rich WiFi signals to synthesize high-fidelity RF data for scarce modalities including mmWave and RFID. The key insight of RF-CMG is to decouple cross-modal generation into high-frequency guidance and low-frequency constraint, which respectively learn high-frequency distribution from limited target modality data and preserve the underlying physical structure via low-frequency constraints during generation. On this basis, we introduce a Modality-Guided Embedding (MGE) module to steer the reverse diffusion trajectory toward the target high-frequency distribution, and a Low-Frequency Modality Consistency (LFMC) module to progressively enforce low-frequency constraints to suppress the accumulation of source-modality structural biases during inference, enabling high-quality target-modality generation. Performance comparison with several prevalent generative models demonstrates that RF-CMG achieves superior performance in synthesizing RFID and mmWave signals. We further showcase the effectiveness of the data generated by RF-CMG in gesture recognition tasks, and analyze the impact of the proportion of synthetic data on downstream performance.

</details>


### [1011] [Evaluating Temporal and Structural Anomaly Detection Paradigms for DDoS Traffic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16575)
*Yasmin Souza Lima,Rodrigo Moreira,Larissa F. Rodrigues Moreira,Tereza Cristina M. de B. Carvalho,Flávio de Oliveira Silva*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 论文提出一个轻量级决策框架，用于在云原生5G网络DDoS攻击检测中，根据数据特征自动选择时间特征或结构特征进行异常检测，避免固定特征表示的假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前无监督异常检测在云原生5G网络DDoS攻击检测中广泛使用，但大多数研究假设固定的流量表示（时间或结构特征），没有验证哪种特征空间最适合数据。这可能导致次优的检测性能。

Method: 提出轻量级决策框架，在训练前通过两个诊断指标优先选择时间或结构特征：1) 聚合流信号的滞后1自相关；2) PCA累积解释方差。当诊断结果不确定时，框架保留混合选项作为未来备用方案而非经验验证的分支。在两种统计特性不同的数据集上使用隔离森林、一类SVM和KMeans进行实验验证。

Result: 实验结果表明，结构特征始终匹配或优于时间特征，且随着时间依赖性减弱，性能差距会扩大。这挑战了传统假设，表明结构特征在DDoS异常检测中可能更具优势。

Conclusion: 结构特征在云原生5G网络DDoS攻击检测中通常优于时间特征，特别是在时间依赖性较弱的情况下。提出的决策框架能够根据数据特征自动选择最优特征表示，提高异常检测性能。

Abstract: Unsupervised anomaly detection is widely used to detect Distributed Denial-of-Service (DDoS) attacks in cloud-native 5G networks, yet most studies assume a fixed traffic representation, either temporal or structural, without validating which feature space best matches the data. We propose a lightweight decision framework that prioritizes temporal or structural features before training, using two diagnostics: lag-1 autocorrelation of an aggregated flow signal and PCA cumulative explained variance. When the probes are inconclusive, the framework reserves a hybrid option as a future fallback rather than an empirically validated branch. Experiments on two statistically distinct datasets with Isolation Forest, One-Class SVM, and KMeans show that structural features consistently match or outperform temporal ones, with the performance gap widening as temporal dependence weakens.

</details>


### [1012] [Hybrid Spectro-Temporal Fusion Framework for Structural Health Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16589)
*Jongyeop Kim,Jinki Kim,Doyun Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于结构健康监测的谱时对齐和混合谱时融合框架，通过结合到达时间间隔描述符和频谱特征来捕捉振动动态，在LDS V406电动振动台数据上验证了其优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 结构健康监测对于确保工程结构安全至关重要，传统方法在捕捉振动响应的精细和粗尺度动态方面存在局限，需要更有效的特征表示方法来提高监测的准确性和可靠性。

Method: 提出了谱时对齐框架和混合谱时融合框架，整合到达时间间隔描述符与频谱特征，捕捉振动响应的精细和粗尺度动态。通过不同时间分辨率(Δτ)配置，优化传统机器学习和深度学习模型的性能。

Result: 实验表明，提出的谱时表示显著优于传统输入形式。时间分辨率Δτ=0.02适合传统机器学习模型，而Δτ=0.008能充分发挥深度学习架构潜力。混合框架在准确性和稳定性方面均优于基准方法。

Conclusion: 该框架为基于振动的结构健康监测提供了鲁棒、准确和可靠的解决方案，通过谱时特征融合有效提升了监测性能。

Abstract: Structural health monitoring plays a critical role in ensuring structural safety by analyzing vibration responses from engineering systems. This paper proposes a Spectro-Temporal Alignment framework and a Hybrid Spectro-Temporal Fusion framework that integrate arrival-time interval descriptors with spectral features to capture both fine-scale and coarse-scale vibration dynamics. Experiments conducted on data collected from an LDS V406 electrodynamic shaker demonstrate that the proposed spectro-temporal representations significantly outperform conventional input formulations. The results indicate that a temporal resolution (Δτ) of 0.008 of 0.02 favors traditional machine learning models, whereas a finer resolution (Δτ) of 0.008 effectively unlocks the performance potential of deep learning architectures. Beyond classification accuracy, a comprehensive stability analysis based on condensed indices, including mean performance, standard deviation, coefficient of variation, and balanced score, shows that the proposed hybrid framework consistently achieves higher accuracy with substantially lower variability compared to baseline and alignment-only approaches. Overall, these results demonstrate that the proposed framework provides a robust, accurate, and reliable solution for vibration-based structural health monitoring.

</details>


### [1013] [R&F-Inventory: A Large-Scale Dataset for Monotonic Inventory Estimation in Reach and Frequency Advertising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16821)
*Yunshan Peng,Ji Wu,Wentao Bai,Yunke Bai,Jinan Pang,Wenzheng Shu,Yanxiang Zeng,Xialong Liu,Peng Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文发布了一个大规模R&F合约库存估计数据集，用于研究广告预算-性能曲线，包含基于时间窗口的频率控制机制，支持单点性能预测和曲线重建等基准任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有广告数据集多为独立样本，缺乏对R&F合约中"预算-性能曲线"核心结构的刻画。广告主在创建R&F合约时需要实时查看不同预算水平下的UV、PV变化曲线，但缺乏相应的数据集支持研究。

Method: 构建以"定向-排期-频控"为基本上下文的大规模R&F合约库存估计数据集，在同一上下文中提供多个预算点对应的UV和PV观测值，形成完整预算-性能曲线。数据集包含时间窗口频控机制，满足单调性和边际收益递减特性，并使用理论最大曝光天花板进行一致性检验。

Result: 发布了包含完整预算-性能曲线的大规模R&F合约数据集，定义了单点性能预测和预算-性能曲线重建两个标准化基准任务，提供了可复现的基线方法和评估协议。

Conclusion: 该数据集支持结构约束学习、单调回归、曲线一致性建模和R&F合约规划等问题的系统研究，为广告库存估计提供了重要的数据资源。

Abstract: Reach and Frequency (R&F) contract advertising is an important form of widely used brand advertising. Unlike performance advertising, R&F contracts emphasize controllable delivery of UV and PV under given targeting, scheduling, and frequency control constraints. In practical systems, advertisers typically need to view the UV, PV change curves at different budget levels in real time when creating an R&F contract. However, most existing publicly available advertising datasets are based on independent samples, lacking a characterization of the core structure of the "budget-performance curve" (including UV and PV) in R&F contracts.This paper proposes and releases a large-scale R&F contract inventory estimation dataset. This dataset uses the R&F contract context consisting of "targeting-scheduling-frequency control" as the basic context, providing observations of UV and PV corresponding to multiple budget points within the same context, thus forming a complete budget-performance curve. The dataset explicitly includes a time-window-based frequency control mechanism (e.g.,"no more than 3 times within 5 days") and naturally satisfies the monotonicity and diminishing marginal returns characteristics in the budget and scheduling dimensions. We further derive the theoretical maximum exposure ceiling and use it as a consistency check to evaluate data quality and the feasibility of model predictions. Using this data set, this paper defines two standardized benchmark tasks: single-point performance prediction and reconstruction of budget-performance curves, and provides a set of reproducible baseline methods and evaluation protocols. This dataset can support systematic research on problems such as structural constraint learning, monotonic regression, curve consistency modeling, and R&F contract planning.The code for our experiments can be found at https://github.com/pengyunshan/RF-Inventory.

</details>


### [1014] [Towards Fully Parameter-Free Stochastic Optimization: Grid Search with Self-Bounding Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16888)
*Yuheng Zhao,Yu-Hu Yan,Amit Attia,Tomer Koren,Lijun Zhang,Peng Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出GRASP框架，实现完全参数自由的随机优化方法，无需任何关于问题参数的先验知识或不可验证条件，在非凸和凸情况下都达到接近最优的收敛率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有参数自由方法虽然不依赖具体参数值，但仍需要参数的上下界等先验知识（部分参数自由）。本文旨在实现完全参数自由方法，即算法输入无需满足任何与真实问题参数相关的不可验证条件。

Method: 提出GRASP网格搜索框架，采用新颖的自边界分析技术有效确定参数搜索范围。框架包含模型集成作为最后一步，并在插值方差特征下提供更尖锐的保证。

Result: 1) 非凸情况：提出完全参数自由方法，达到接近最优的收敛率（对数因子内）；2) 凸情况：参数自由方法在加速和通用性方面具有强竞争力。

Conclusion: GRASP框架实现了完全参数自由的随机优化，通过自边界分析技术有效确定搜索范围，在非凸和凸优化问题中都表现出优越性能。

Abstract: Parameter-free stochastic optimization aims to design algorithms that are agnostic to the underlying problem parameters while still achieving convergence rates competitive with optimally tuned methods. While some parameter-free methods do not require the specific values of the problem parameters, they still rely on prior knowledge, such as the lower or upper bounds of them. We refer to such methods as ``partially parameter-free''. In this work, we target achieving ``fully parameter-free'' methods, i.e., the algorithmic inputs do not need to satisfy any unverifiable condition related to the true problem parameters. We propose a powerful and general grid search framework, named \textsc{Grasp}, with a novel self-bounding analysis technique that effectively determines the search ranges of parameters, in contrast to previous work. Our method demonstrates generality in: (i) the non-convex case, where we propose a fully parameter-free method that achieves near-optimal convergence rate, up to logarithmic factors; (ii) the convex case, where our parameter-free methods are competitive with strong performance in terms of acceleration and universality. Finally, we contribute a sharper guarantee for the model ensemble, a final step of the grid search framework, under interpolated variance characterization.

</details>


### [1015] [BOIL: Learning Environment Personalized Information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17137)
*Rohan Patil,Henrik I. Christensen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: BOIL（Blackbox Oracle Information Learning）是一种用于多智能体系统的可扩展解决方案，通过PageRank算法和公共信息最大化从环境结构中提取有价值信息，以指导长期行为策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统在复杂环境中面临挑战，需要从有限信息中高效提取洞察。现有方法在复杂环境中难以有效指导长期行为策略。

Method: 提出BOIL过程，结合PageRank算法和公共信息最大化，从环境结构中提取有价值信息，用于指导智能体的长期行为策略。

Result: 实验表明BOIL能生成有利于长期性能提升的策略分布，在复杂环境中超越启发式方法。

Conclusion: BOIL为多智能体系统在复杂环境中的导航问题提供了一种有效的可扩展解决方案，适用于覆盖、巡逻和随机可达性等问题。

Abstract: Navigating complex environments poses challenges for multi-agent systems, requiring efficient extraction of insights from limited information. In this paper, we introduce the Blackbox Oracle Information Learning (BOIL) process, a scalable solution for extracting valuable insights from the environment structure. Leveraging the Pagerank algorithm and common information maximization, BOIL facilitates the extraction of information to guide long-term agent behavior applicable to problems such as coverage, patrolling, and stochastic reachability. Through experiments, we demonstrate the efficacy of BOIL in generating strategy distributions conducive to improved performance over extended time horizons, surpassing heuristic approaches in complex environments.

</details>


### [1016] [Uncertainty Quantification in PINNs for Turbulent Flows: Bayesian Inference and Repulsive Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17156)
*Khemraj Shukla,Zongren Zou,Theo Kaeufer,Michael Triantafyllou,George Em Karniadakis*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了概率物理信息神经网络框架，用于湍流建模中的不确定性量化，评估了贝叶斯PINNs、蒙特卡洛dropout和排斥性深度集成三种方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PINNs是确定性的，无法量化认知不确定性，这在数据驱动的RANS建模等不适定问题中至关重要。需要开发能够可靠量化不确定性的概率PINNs框架。

Method: 提出了三种概率PINNs扩展：1) 使用哈密顿蒙特卡洛采样和温度调节多分量似然的贝叶斯PINNs；2) 蒙特卡洛dropout；3) 在函数空间强制多样性的排斥性深度集成。特别关注集成多样性和似然温度调节在改进PDE约束逆问题不确定性校准中的作用。

Result: 在Van der Pol振荡器和湍流圆柱绕流(Re=3,900和10,000)测试中，贝叶斯PINNs在所有推断量上提供最一致的不确定性估计，而函数空间排斥性集成在主要流动变量上提供计算高效的近似，具有竞争力的准确性。

Conclusion: 研究为物理信息学习中准确性、计算成本和不确定性校准之间的权衡提供了量化见解，为数据驱动湍流建模中的不确定性量化提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have emerged as a promising framework for solving inverse problems governed by partial differential equations (PDEs), including the reconstruction of turbulent flow fields from sparse data. However, most existing PINN formulations are deterministic and do not provide reliable quantification of epistemic uncertainty, which is critical for ill-posed problems such as data-driven Reynolds-averaged Navier-Stokes (RANS) modeling. In this work, we develop and systematically evaluate a set of probabilistic extensions of PINNs for uncertainty quantification in turbulence modeling. The proposed framework combines (i) Bayesian PINNs with Hamiltonian Monte Carlo sampling and a tempered multi-component likelihood, (ii) Monte Carlo dropout, and (iii) repulsive deep ensembles that enforce diversity in function space. Particular emphasis is placed on the role of ensemble diversity and likelihood tempering in improving uncertainty calibration for PDE-constrained inverse problems. The methods are assessed on a hierarchy of test cases, including the Van der Pol oscillator and turbulent flow past a circular cylinder at Reynolds numbers Re=3,900 (direct numerical simulation data) and Re = 10,000 (experimental particle image velocimetry data). The results demonstrate that Bayesian PINNs provide the most consistent uncertainty estimates across all inferred quantities, while function-space repulsive ensembles offer a computationally efficient approximation with competitive accuracy for primary flow variables. These findings provide quantitative insight into the trade-offs between accuracy, computational cost, and uncertainty calibration in physics-informed learning, and offer practical guidance for uncertainty quantification in data-driven turbulence modeling.

</details>


### [1017] [Contraction and Hourglass Persistence for Learning on Graphs, Simplices, and Cells](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17548)
*Mattie Ji,Indradyumna Roy,Vikas Garg*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出Hourglass Persistence，一种结合包含和收缩序列的拓扑描述符，用于提升图神经网络的表达能力、可学习性和稳定性，并在真实图数据集上取得优于传统持久同调方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统持久同调方法在图神经网络中通常采用包含序列，但这种方法存在局限性。作者发现收缩作为拓扑操作在图表示学习中具有优势，因此研究如何结合包含和收缩序列来提升拓扑描述符的性能。

Method: 提出Contraction Homology (CH) 分析收缩序列的持久性，然后引入Hourglass Persistence——一种结合包含和收缩序列的拓扑描述符。设计了可微分的高效算法，可集成到端到端的图神经网络管道中。

Result: 在标准真实世界图数据集上，Hourglass Persistence方法相比传统持久同调方法取得了显著且一致的性能提升。该方法可扩展到单纯和细胞网络。

Conclusion: 通过结合包含和收缩序列的Hourglass Persistence方法，能够克服传统持久同调的局限性，提升图神经网络的拓扑表示能力，为图表示学习提供了新的拓扑描述符框架。

Abstract: Persistent homology (PH) encodes global information, such as cycles, and is thus increasingly integrated into graph neural networks (GNNs). PH methods in GNNs typically traverse an increasing sequence of subgraphs. In this work, we first expose limitations of this inclusion procedure. To remedy these shortcomings, we analyze contractions as a principled topological operation, in particular, for graph representation learning. We study the persistence of contraction sequences, which we call Contraction Homology (CH). We establish that forward PH and CH differ in expressivity. We then introduce Hourglass Persistence, a class of topological descriptors that interleave a sequence of inclusions and contractions to boost expressivity, learnability, and stability. We also study related families parametrized by two paradigms. We also discuss how our framework extends to simplicial and cellular networks. We further design efficient algorithms that are pluggable into end-to-end differentiable GNN pipelines, enabling consistent empirical improvements over many PH methods across standard real-world graph datasets. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/Aalto-QuML/Hourglass}{this https URL}.

</details>


### [1018] [Clusterability-Based Assessment of Potentially Noisy Views for Multi-View Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18024)
*Mudi Jiang,Jiahui Zhou,Xinying Liu,Zengyou He,Zhikui Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了首个专门为多视图数据设计的聚类性评分方法（MVCS），用于在聚类前评估视图质量并检测噪声视图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多视图聚类中不同视图的质量差异很大，低质量或退化的视图会损害整体聚类性能。现有研究主要在聚类过程中通过视图加权或噪声鲁棒优化来解决这个问题，而对聚类前的数据级评估关注有限。

Method: 提出了多视图聚类性评分（MVCS），通过三个互补组件量化多视图数据中潜在聚类相关结构的强度：1）单视图结构聚类性；2）联合空间聚类性；3）跨视图邻域一致性。这是首个专门为多视图数据设计的聚类性评分方法。

Result: 在真实世界数据集上的大量实验表明，噪声视图会显著降低聚类性能，与为单视图数据设计的现有聚类性度量相比，该方法能更有效地支持噪声视图分析和检测。

Conclusion: 该研究首次从聚类性角度研究多视图数据中的预聚类噪声视图分析问题，提出的MVCS方法为多视图聚类前的数据质量评估提供了有效工具。

Abstract: In multi-view clustering, the quality of different views may vary substantially, and low-quality or degraded views can impair overall clustering performance. However, existing studies mainly address this issue within the clustering process through view weighting or noise-robust optimization, while paying limited attention to data-level assessment before clustering. In this paper, we study the problem of pre-clustering noisy-view analysis in multi-view data from a clusterability perspective. To this end, we propose a Multi-View Clusterability Score (MVCS), which quantifies the strength of latent cluster-related structures in multi-view data through three complementary components: per-view structural clusterability, joint-space clusterability, and cross-view neighborhood consistency. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first clusterability score specifically designed for multi-view data. We further use it to perform potentially noisy view analysis and noisy-view detection before clustering. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that noisy views can significantly degrade clustering performance, and that, compared with existing clusterability measures designed for single-view data, the proposed method more effectively supports noisy-view analysis and detection.

</details>


### [1019] [Variational Autoencoder Domain Adaptation for Cross-System Generalization in ML-Based SOP Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18035)
*Leyla Sadighi,Stefan Karlsson,Carlos Natalino,Mojtaba Eshghie,Fehmida Usmani,Eoin Kenny,Lena Wosinska,Paolo Monti,Marija Furdek,Marco Ruffini*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出基于变分自编码器的领域自适应框架，用于光学纤维系统中物理层威胁检测的跨系统迁移，显著提升跨系统性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在光学纤维系统中，由于工作波长、光纤特性和网络架构的差异，在一个系统上训练的物理层威胁检测模型在另一个系统上往往表现很差。需要解决跨系统迁移问题。

Method: 提出基于变分自编码器的领域自适应框架：首先在来自两个不同光学系统（21km O波段暗光纤测试床和63.4km C波段实时城域环网）的合并数据上训练共享编码器，学习捕捉两个系统共有的事件特征同时抑制系统特定差异。然后冻结编码器，使用单个系统的标签训练分类器。

Result: 从系统1到系统2的跨系统准确率达到95.3%，反向迁移达到73.5%。相比在单个系统上训练的完全监督深度神经网络基线，分别获得83.4%和51%的性能提升，同时保持系统内性能。

Conclusion: 提出的VAE-based领域自适应框架能有效解决光学纤维系统中物理层威胁检测的跨系统迁移问题，显著提升模型在不同系统间的泛化能力。

Abstract: Machine learning (ML) models trained to detect physical-layer threats on one optical fiber system often fail catastrophically when applied to a different system, due to variations in operating wavelength, fiber properties, and network architecture. To overcome this, we propose a Domain Adaptation (DA) framework based on a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) that learns a shared representation capturing event signatures common to both systems while suppressing system-specific differences. The shared encoder is first trained on the combined data from two distinct optical systems: a 21 km O-band dark-fiber testbed (System 1) and a 63.4 km C-band live metro ring (System 2). The encoder is then frozen, and a classifier is trained using labels from an individual system. The proposed approach achieves 95.3% and 73.5% cross-system accuracy when moving from System 1 to System 2 and vice versa, respectively. This corresponds to gains of 83.4% and 51% over a fully supervised Deep Neural Network (DNN) baseline trained on a single system, while preserving intra-system performance.

</details>


### [1020] [An `Inverse' Experimental Framework to Estimate Market Efficiency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18130)
*Thomas Asikis,Heinrich Nax*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于订单簿数据预测市场分配效率的量化框架，通过分位数归一化技术处理非结构化市场数据，使用线性回归和梯度提升树等模型进行预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数字市场作为关键基础设施缺乏系统性的性能测量框架，传统订单簿数据无法反映真实的市场效率，因为买卖报价不代表真实的交易意愿，需要开发能够从复杂市场数据中预测市场效率的方法。

Method: 采用实验数据"反转"传统的诱导价值方法，提出分位数归一化技术处理非结构化、非平稳、非线性的订单簿数据，构建基于供需模型的量化输入特征，开发线性回归和梯度提升树等多种预测模型。

Result: 模型能够从最早的买卖报价中合理预测分配效率，随着价格实现数据的增加预测精度提高，不同预测技术和市场类型表现存在差异，框架在真实市场数据中具有应用潜力。

Conclusion: 该框架为数字市场提供了在交易实现前评估市场效率的新方法，有助于算法治理决策，对市场效率和公平性分析具有重要价值。

Abstract: Digital marketplaces processing billions of dollars annually represent critical infrastructure in sociotechnical ecosystems, yet their performance optimization lacks principled measurement frameworks that can inform algorithmic governance decisions regarding market efficiency and fairness from complex market data. By looking at orderbook data from double auction markets alone, because bids and asks do not represent true maximum willingnesses to buy and true minimum willingnesses to sell, there is little an economist can say about the market's actual performance in terms of allocative efficiency. We turn to experimental data to address this issue, `inverting' the standard induced value approach of double auction experiments. Our aim is to predict key market features relevant to market efficiency, particularly allocative efficiency, using orderbook data only -- specifically bids, asks and price realizations, but not the induced reservation values -- as early as possible. Since there is no established model of strategically optimal behavior in these markets, and because orderbook data is highly unstructured, non-stationary and non-linear, we propose quantile-based normalization techniques that help us build general predictive models. We develop and train several models, including linear regressions and gradient boosting trees, leveraging quantile-based input from the underlying supply-demand model. Our models can predict allocative efficiency with reasonable accuracy from the earliest bids and asks, and these predictions improve with additional realized price data. The performance of the prediction techniques varies by target and market type. Our framework holds significant potential for application to real-world market data, offering valuable insights into market efficiency and performance, even prior to any trade realizations.

</details>


### [1021] [FSEVAL: Feature Selection Evaluation Toolbox and Dashboard](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18227)
*Muhammad Rajabinasab,Arthur Zimek*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: FSEVAL是一个特征选择评估工具箱，提供标准化评估框架和可视化仪表板，帮助研究人员全面评估特征选择算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 特征选择是机器学习中的基础任务，但缺乏标准化评估工具。现有评估方法分散，难以全面比较不同算法。作者希望提供一个统一的评估框架，简化特征选择算法的评估过程。

Method: 开发FSEVAL工具箱，包含标准化评估指标和可视化仪表板。支持监督和无监督设置下的特征选择评估，提供统一的评估接口和可视化工具。

Result: 创建了一个开源的特征选择评估工具箱，使研究人员能够轻松进行全面的算法评估和比较，提高了评估的标准化程度。

Conclusion: FSEVAL为特征选择研究提供了有价值的工具，促进了该领域的标准化评估和算法比较，有助于推动特征选择技术的发展。

Abstract: Feature selection is a fundamental machine learning and data mining task, involved with discriminating redundant features from informative ones. It is an attempt to address the curse of dimensionality by removing the redundant features, while unlike dimensionality reduction methods, preserving explainability. Feature selection is conducted in both supervised and unsupervised settings, with different evaluation metrics employed to determine which feature selection algorithm is the best. In this paper, we propose FSEVAL, a feature selection evaluation toolbox accompanied with a visualization dashboard, with the goal to make it easy to comprehensively evaluate feature selection algorithms. FSEVAL aims to provide a standardized, unified, evaluation and visualization toolbox to help the researchers working in the field, conduct extensive and comprehensive evaluation of feature selection algorithms with ease.

</details>


### [1022] [Bridge-Centered Metapath Classification Using R-GCN-VGAE for Disaster-Resilient Maintenance Decisions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18399)
*Takato Yasuno*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于异构图和R-GCN-VGAE的方法，通过元路径分析将桥梁分类为供应链、医疗访问和居民保护三类灾害准备类别，为有限预算下的桥梁维护优先级决策提供支持。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单一指标方法无法量化桥梁在灾害场景中的多维作用，而有限的维护预算需要科学的优先级决策方法，以维持城市基础设施的韧性。

Method: 构建包含道路、桥梁和建筑层的异构图，使用关系图卷积网络变分自编码器(R-GCN-VGAE)学习基于元路径的特征表示，将桥梁分类为三类灾害准备类别。

Result: 在日本茨城县三个城市(共1103座桥梁)上验证了方法有效性，建立了基于开放数据的城市异构图构建方法，并展示了UMAP在可视化方面的优越性。

Conclusion: 该方法能够重新定义桥梁在灾害场景中的角色，为维护预算决策提供支持，有助于提升城市基础设施的灾害韧性。

Abstract: Daily infrastructure management in preparation for disasters is critical for urban resilience. When bridges remain resilient against disaster-induced external forces, access to hospitals, shops, and residences via metapaths can be sustained, maintaining essential urban functions. However, prioritizing bridge maintenance under limited budgets requires quantifying the multi-dimensional roles that bridges play in disaster scenarios -- a challenge that existing single-indicator approaches fail to address. We focus on metapaths from national highways through bridges to buildings (hospitals, shops, residences), constructing a heterogeneous graph with road, bridge, and building layers. A Relation-centric Graph Convolutional Network Variational Autoencoder (R-GCN-VGAE) learns metapath-based feature representations, enabling classification of bridges into disaster-preparedness categories: Supply Chain (commercial logistics), Medical Access (emergency healthcare), and Residential Protection (preventing isolation). Using OSMnx and open data, we validate our methodology on three diverse cities in Ibaraki Prefecture, Japan: Mito (697 bridges), Chikusei (258 bridges), and Moriya (148 bridges), totaling 1,103 bridges. The heterogeneous graph construction from open data enables redefining bridge roles for disaster scenarios, supporting maintenance budget decision-making. We contributed that (1) Open-data methodology for constructing urban heterogeneous graphs. (2) Redefinition of bridge roles for disaster scenarios via metapath-based classification. (3) Establishment of maintenance budget decision support methodology. (4) k-NN tuning strategy validated across diverse city scales. (5) Empirical demonstration of UMAP superiority over t-SNE/PCA for multi-role bridge visualization.

</details>


### [1023] [Balance-Guided Sparse Identification of Multiscale Nonlinear PDEs with Small-coefficient Terms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18414)
*Zhenhua Dang,Lei Zhang,Long Wang,Guowei He*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: BG-SINDy方法通过平衡引导的稀疏回归，解决了多尺度系统中小系数项难以发现的问题，使用项级ℓ₂,₀正则化和渐进剪枝策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据驱动的控制方程发现方法在处理多尺度系统时存在局限，特别是当动态重要项具有小系数时难以准确识别。

Method: 基于主导平衡原理，将ℓ₀约束稀疏回归重新表述为项级ℓ₂,₀正则化问题，采用渐进剪枝策略，根据项对控制方程平衡的相对贡献而非绝对系数大小进行排序和选择。

Result: 在KdV方程（小色散系数）、修正Burgers方程（消失超粘性）、修正Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程（多小系数项）和二维反应扩散系统上的数值实验验证了BG-SINDy发现小系数项的有效性。

Conclusion: BG-SINDy为发现包含小系数项的控制方程提供了有效方法，特别适用于多尺度系统分析。

Abstract: Data-driven discovery of governing equations has advanced significantly in recent years; however, existing methods often struggle in multiscale systems where dynamically significant terms may have small coefficients. Therefore, we propose Balance-Guided SINDy (BG-SINDy) inspired by the principle of dominant balance, which reformulates $\ell_0$-constrained sparse regression as a term-level $\ell_{2,0}$-regularized problem and solves it using a progressive pruning strategy. Terms are ranked according to their relative contributions to the governing equation balance rather than their absolute coefficient magnitudes. Based on this criterion, BG-SINDy alternates between least-squares regression and elimination of negligible terms, thereby preserving dynamically significant terms even when their coefficients are small. Numerical experiments on the Korteweg--de Vries equation with a small dispersion coefficient, a modified Burgers equation with vanishing hyperviscosity, a modified Kuramoto--Sivashinsky equation with multiple small-coefficient terms, and a two-dimensional reaction--diffusion system demonstrate the validity of BG-SINDy in discovering small-coefficient terms. The proposed method thus provides an efficient approach for discovering governing equations that contain small-coefficient terms.

</details>


### [1024] [An Integrated Deep-Learning Framework for Peptide-Protein Interaction Prediction and Target-Conditioned Peptide Generation with ConGA-PePPI and TC-PepGen](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18467)
*Chupei Tang,Junxiao Kong,Moyu Tang,Di Wang,Jixiu Zhai,Ronghao Xie,Shangkun Sima,Tianchi Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一个整合框架用于早期肽筛选，结合了伙伴感知的预测定位模型(ConGA-PepPI)和目标条件生成模型(TC-PepGen)，在肽-蛋白相互作用预测和生成方面表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 肽-蛋白相互作用(PepPIs)在细胞调控和肽治疗中至关重要，但实验表征速度太慢。现有方法通常只关注相互作用预测或肽生成，缺乏候选优先级排序、残基级解释和目标条件扩展的整合。

Method: 1. ConGA-PepPI：使用非对称编码、双向交叉注意力和从配对预测到结合位点定位的渐进转移；2. TC-PepGen：通过层级条件化在自回归解码过程中保持目标信息。

Result: ConGA-PepPI在五折交叉验证中达到0.839准确率和0.921 AUROC，结合位点AUPR值在蛋白侧为0.601，肽侧为0.950；TC-PepGen在长度条件基准测试中，40.39%的肽在AlphaFold 3 ipTM上超过原生模板。

Conclusion: 该整合框架为早期肽筛选提供了有效的解决方案，将预测、定位和生成功能统一，在肽-蛋白相互作用研究中具有重要应用价值。

Abstract: Motivation: Peptide-protein interactions (PepPIs) are central to cellular regulation and peptide therapeutics, but experimental characterization remains too slow for large-scale screening. Existing methods usually emphasize either interaction prediction or peptide generation, leaving candidate prioritization, residue-level interpretation, and target-conditioned expansion insufficiently integrated. Results: We present an integrated framework for early-stage peptide screening that combines a partner-aware prediction and localization model (ConGA-PepPI) with a target-conditioned generative model (TC-PepGen). ConGA-PepPI uses asymmetric encoding, bidirectional cross-attention, and progressive transfer from pair prediction to binding-site localization, while TC-PepGen preserves target information throughout autoregressive decoding via layerwise conditioning. In five-fold cross-validation, ConGA-PepPI achieved 0.839 accuracy and 0.921 AUROC, with binding-site AUPR values of 0.601 on the protein side and 0.950 on the peptide side, and remained competitive on external benchmarks. Under a controlled length-conditioned benchmark, 40.39% of TC-PepGen peptides exceeded native templates in AlphaFold 3 ipTM, and unconstrained generation retained evidence of target-conditioned signal.

</details>


### [1025] [Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Biological $2\mathrm{D}{+}t$ Reaction-Diffusion Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18548)
*William Lavery,Jodie A. Cochrane,Christian Olesen,Dagim S. Tadele,John T. Nardini,Sara Hamis*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种扩展的生物信息神经网络框架，用于从实验数据中发现二维时空反应-扩散系统的控制方程，并在肺癌细胞群体动力学中进行了验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生物信息神经网络研究局限于1D+时间系统，且主要用于前向预测而非方程识别。需要开发能够从真实实验数据中发现2D+时空系统控制方程的框架。

Method: 结合数据预处理、BINN方程学习和符号回归后处理的PINN框架，扩展BINN到2D+时间系统，通过可训练神经子网络学习本构项，并利用软残差惩罚保持已知微分算子结构。

Result: 成功从延时显微镜数据中学习到肺癌细胞群体动力学的控制方程，恢复了2D+时间反应-扩散模型，证明了框架在真实世界应用中的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的框架可扩展到其他时空系统，为从数据中快速发现解析方程提供了实用且可解释的工具。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) provide a powerful framework for learning governing equations of dynamical systems from data. Biologically-informed neural networks (BINNs) are a variant of PINNs that preserve the known differential operator structure (e.g., reaction-diffusion) while learning constitutive terms via trainable neural subnetworks, enforced through soft residual penalties. Existing BINN studies are limited to $1\mathrm{D}{+}t$ reaction-diffusion systems and focus on forward prediction, using the governing partial differential equation as a regulariser rather than an explicit identification target. Here, we extend BINNs to $2\mathrm{D}{+}t$ systems within a PINN framework that combines data preprocessing, BINN-based equation learning, and symbolic regression post-processing for closed-form equation discovery. We demonstrate the framework's real-world applicability by learning the governing equations of lung cancer cell population dynamics from time-lapse microscopy data, recovering $2\mathrm{D}{+}t$ reaction-diffusion models from experimental observations. The proposed framework is readily applicable to other spatio-temporal systems, providing a practical and interpretable tool for fast analytic equation discovery from data.

</details>


### [1026] [Cooperative Coevolution versus Monolithic Evolutionary Search for Semi-Supervised Tabular Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16412)
*Jamal Toutouh*

Main category: cs.NE

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种合作协同进化方法（CC-SSL），用于极端低标签率下的半监督表格分类，通过进化特征子集视图和伪标签策略，在25个数据集上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决极端低标签率（如1%标记数据）下的半监督表格分类问题，传统方法在这种极端条件下效果有限，需要更有效的特征选择和伪标签策略。

Method: 提出合作协同进化方法CC-SSL，同时进化两个特征子集视图和伪标签策略；与单一进化基线EA-SSL和三个轻量级SSL基线进行比较。

Result: CC-SSL和EA-SSL在测试MacroF1上优于轻量级基线，尤其在1%标记数据时差异最大；CC-SSL与EA-SSL在最终测试性能上统计无差异；EA-SSL在搜索过程中显示更高的适应度和多样性。

Conclusion: 协同进化方法在极端低标签率表格分类中有效，但合作协同进化与单一进化在最终性能上差异不大，主要优势体现在搜索过程特性上。

Abstract: This paper studies semi-supervised tabular classification in the extreme low-label regime using lightweight base learners. The paper proposes a cooperative coevolutionary method (CC-SSL) that evolves (i) two feature-subset views and (ii) a pseudo-labeling policy, and compares it to a matched monolithic evolutionary baseline (EA-SSL) and three lightweight SSL baselines. Experiments on 25 OpenML datasets with labeled fractions {1%,5%,10%} evaluate test MacroF1 and accuracy, together with evolutionary and pseudo-label diagnostics. CC-SSL and EA-SSL achieve higher median test MacroF1 than the lightweight baselines, with the largest separations at 1% labeled data. Most CC-SSL vs. EA-SSL comparisons are statistical draws on final test performance. EA-SSL shows higher best-so-far fitness and higher diversity during search, while time-to-target is comparable and generations-to-target favors EA-SSL in several multiclass settings. Pseudo-label volume, ProbeDrop, and validation optimism show no significant differences between CC-SSL and EA-SSL under the shared protocol.

</details>


### [1027] [Horizon-Aware Forecasting of Passenger Assistance Demand for Rail Station Workforce Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16464)
*Michael Sheehan,Irina Timoshenko*

Main category: stat.AP

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个数据驱动的决策支持框架，用于预测车站级别的乘客协助需求，并将其转化为劳动力规划，应用于铁路运营中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 铁路乘客协助服务的需求在不同车站和时间段变化很大，这给劳动力规划和人员排班带来了挑战。需要一种系统化的方法来准确预测需求并优化人员配置。

Method: 1. 预测组件：采用horizon-aware Prophet建模方法，利用多源运营数据进行需求预测
2. 规划组件：通过可解释的红-黄-绿风险框架，将需求预测映射到服务约束下的员工需求
3. 系统实现：在生产级系统中实施，支持日常规划和人员配置决策

Result: 1. 预测准确性相比逐年基线方法显著提升，绝对误差减少高达76.9%
2. 基于预测的人员配置使因员工可用性导致的乘客协助失败交付减少了约50%
3. 系统已在LNER管理的车站中实际部署应用

Conclusion: 该研究证明了将可解释的预测方法与运营工作相结合的价值，能够显著改善铁路乘客协助服务的效率和可靠性。

Abstract: Passenger assistance services are essential for accessible rail travel, yet demand varies substantially across stations and over time, creating challenges for workforce planning and staff rostering. This paper presents a data-driven decision support framework for forecasting station-level passenger assistance demand and translating forecasts into workforce plans. The forecasting component applies a horizon-aware Prophet modelling approach using multi-source operational data, while the planning component maps demand forecasts to staffing requirements under service and operational constraints through an interpretable red-amber-green risk framework. The approach has been implemented within a production-grade system to support routine planning and staffing decisions across LNER-managed stations. Results demonstrate improved forecast accuracy relative to year-on-year baseline methods, with absolute error reduced by up to 76.9%, and show that forecast-informed staffing is associated with an approximate 50% reduction in failed passenger assistance deliveries attributable to staff availability. These findings highlight the value of integrating interpretable forecasting with operational work.

</details>


### [1028] [Q-SINDy: Quantum-Kernel Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics with Provable Coefficient Debiasing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16779)
*Samrendra Roy,Syed Bahauddin Alam*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: Q-SINDy框架将量子特征映射与SINDy结合，但发现存在系数吞噬问题，通过正交化量子特征与多项式基空间来消除偏差，在多个动力系统中验证有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子特征映射为经典学习任务提供了富有表达力的嵌入，但将其与稀疏识别非线性动力学(SINDy)结合的方向尚未探索。研究者希望利用量子特征增强SINDy的性能，但发现了量子特征会"吞噬"多项式基系数的问题。

Method: 提出Q-SINDy框架，将量子核增强的SINDy与多项式基结合。发现系数吞噬问题，推导出偏差公式Δξ_P = (P^T P)^{-1} P^T Q ξ_Q。提出在拟合时正交化量子特征与多项式列空间的方法来消除偏差。

Result: 正交化Q-SINDy在六个经典动力系统和三种量子特征映射架构上都能匹配原始SINDy的结构恢复能力，而未校正的增强会使真阳性率下降高达100%。提出的R^2_Q诊断能显著预测吞噬严重程度。方法在2%的硬件噪声下保持鲁棒，并能扩展到Burgers方程。

Conclusion: 量子特征映射可以成功增强SINDy，但必须通过正交化处理系数吞噬问题。该方法为量子机器学习与经典动力学建模的结合提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Quantum feature maps offer expressive embeddings for classical learning tasks, and augmenting sparse identification of nonlinear dynamics (SINDy) with such features is a natural but unexplored direction. We introduce Q-SINDy, a quantum-kernel-augmented SINDy framework, and identify a specific failure mode that arises: coefficient cannibalization, in which quantum features absorb coefficient mass that rightfully belongs to the polynomial basis, corrupting equation recovery. We derive the exact cannibalization-bias formula Delta xi_P = (P^T P)^{-1} P^T Q xi_Q and prove that orthogonalizing quantum features against the polynomial column space at fit time eliminates this bias exactly. The claim is verified numerically to machine precision (<10^-12) on multiple systems. Empirically, across six canonical dynamical systems (Duffing, Van der Pol, Lorenz, Lotka-Volterra, cubic oscillator, Rossler) and three quantum feature map architectures (ZZ-angle encoding, IQP, data re-uploading), orthogonalized Q-SINDy consistently matches vanilla SINDy's structural recovery while uncorrected augmentation degrades true-positive rates by up to 100%. A refined dynamics-aware diagnostic, R^2_Q for X-dot, predicts cannibalization severity with statistical significance (Pearson r=0.70, p=0.023). An RBF classical-kernel control across 20 hyperparameter configurations fails more severely than any quantum variant, ruling out feature count as the cause. Orthogonalization remains robust under depolarizing hardware noise up to 2% per gate, and the framework extends without modification to Burgers' equation.

</details>


### [1029] [Scalable Quantum Error Mitigation with Physically Informed Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16815)
*Huaxin Wang,Xinge Wu,Jiajun Liu,Ruiqing He,Jiandong Shang,Hengliang Guo,Qiang Chen*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于图神经网络的量子误差缓解框架（GEM），通过将量子电路编码为属性图，利用硬件级物理信息（如T1、T2、读出误差等）作为节点和边特征，建模误差在物理耦合结构中的传播，实现可扩展的量子误差缓解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统量子误差缓解策略（如ZNE和CDR）依赖于噪声缩放或全局回归，其性能受系统自由度指数增长的约束。需要一种能够利用物理结构信息、具有更好可扩展性和泛化能力的误差缓解方法。

Method: 将量子电路编码为属性图：节点特征包含局部噪声参数（T1、T2、读出误差），边特征包含耦合相关信息（双量子比特门误差）。使用图神经网络建模误差沿物理耦合结构的传播和累积，采用双分支仿射校正保持物理约束一致性。

Result: 在10量子比特和16量子比特随机电路上的实验表明，GEM在小规模上提供与CDR相当的精度，同时在零样本迁移到更大系统时具有更低的平均绝对误差和更好的稳定性。相比传统全局回归方法，GEM利用局部物理结构展现出更好的可扩展性和泛化能力。

Conclusion: GEM框架通过将物理信息融入模型表示，为NISQ设备提供了一种实用且可扩展的量子误差缓解方法，能够更好地捕捉局部相互作用和由此产生的非局部相关性，在系统自由度增长时保持可靠性。

Abstract: Quantum error mitigation (QEM) provides a practical route for estimating reliable observables on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices. Traditional QEM strategies, including zero-noise extrapolation (ZNE) and Clifford data regression (CDR), rely on noise scaling or global regression, and their performance is constrained by the exponential growth of the system degrees of freedom. We construct a graph-enhanced mitigation (GEM) framework, which incorporates physical information into the model representation. In this work, quantum circuits are encoded as attributed graphs. Hardware-level physical information is mapped to node and edge features: local noise parameters such as calibration parameters $T_1$, $T_2$, and readout errors are encoded at nodes, while coupling-related information such as two-qubit gate errors is encoded as edge features. Graph neural networks are used to model how errors propagate along the physical coupling structure and build up into non-local correlations. This allows the model to capture local interactions and part of the resulting non-local correlations across qubits. A dual-branch affine correction is applied to maintain consistency with physical constraints. Experiments on 10-qubit and 16-qubit random circuits executed on superconducting quantum processors show that GEM provides a level of accuracy comparable to CDR at small scales, while yielding lower mean absolute error and improved stability in zero-shot transfer to larger systems. Results of the traditional QEM strategy indicate that global regression methods remain effective in low-dimensional settings but become less reliable as system degrees of freedom grow. In contrast, GEM makes use of local physical structures to show better scalability and generalization, while preserving the overall error propagation patterns. This work provides a practical scalable approach to QEM for NISQ devices.

</details>


### [1030] [Extraction of informative statistical features in the problem of forecasting time series generated by It{ô}-type processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16865)
*Victor Korolev,Mikhail Ivanov,Tatiana Kukanova,Artyom Rukavitsa,Alexander Vakshin,Peter Solomonov,Alexander Zeifman*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出从满足伊藤随机微分方程的时间序列中提取统计特征的方法，通过均匀和非均匀技术重建漂移和扩散系数，并将这些特征用于时间序列预测，证明能改进预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列分析中，从随机过程观测值中提取信息特征是一个重要问题。传统方法可能依赖额外信息，而本文旨在仅利用时间序列本身的信息，通过统计方法提取有意义的特征来改进预测。

Method: 基于伊藤随机微分方程框架，使用统计分离正态混合的方法重建漂移和扩散系数。采用两种技术：1）均匀技术（系数不依赖于过程当前值），2）非均匀技术（考虑系数对过程值的依赖，类似于时间序列的随机泰勒展开）。将这些重建系数作为额外特征用于自回归预测算法。

Result: 实验表明，使用提取的统计特征能够改进时间序列预测性能。为了避免神经网络架构选择等无关因素影响，仅使用简单的自回归算法进行验证，确保了结论的纯粹性。

Conclusion: 从时间序列中提取的统计特征（通过重建伊藤过程的系数）能够有效改进预测性能，为时间序列分析提供了新的特征工程方法。

Abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem of extraction of most informative features from time series that are regarded as observed values of stochastic processes satisfying the It{ô} stochastic differential equations with unknown random drift and diffusion coefficients. We do not attract any additional information and use only the information contained in the time series as it is. Therefore, as additional features, we use the parameters of statistically adjusted mixture-type models of the observed regularities of the behavior of the time series. Several algorithms of construction of these parameters are discussed. These algorithms are based on statistical reconstruction of the coefficients which, in turn, is based on statistical separation of normal mixtures. We obtain two types of parameters by the techniques of the uniform and non-uniform statistical reconstruction of the coefficients of the underlying It{ô} process. The reconstructed coefficients obtained by uniform techniques do not depend on the current value of the process, while the non-uniform techniques reconstruct the coefficients with the account of their dependence on the value of the process. Actually, the non-uniform techniques used in this paper represent a stochastic analog of the Taylor expansion for the time series. The efficiency of the obtained additional features is compared by using them in the autoregressive algorithms of prediction of time series. In order to obtain pure conclusion that is not affected by unwanted factors, say, related to a special choice of the architecture of the neural network prediction methods, we used only simple autoregressive algorithms. We show that the use of additional statistical features improves the prediction.

</details>


### [1031] [Neighbor Embedding for High-Dimensional Sparse Poisson Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16932)
*Noga Mudrik,Adam S. Charles*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了p-SNE（泊松随机邻域嵌入），一种专门为泊松分布计数数据设计的非线性降维方法，使用泊松分布的KL散度衡量相似性，Hellinger距离优化嵌入


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多科学领域的测量数据都是计数数据（如文档词频、神经尖峰计数、邮件计数），这些数据通常近似泊松分布且稀疏。现有降维方法（如PCA、t-SNE）假设连续欧几里得几何，与离散稀疏的计数数据不匹配

Method: 提出p-SNE方法：1）使用泊松分布的KL散度计算数据点间的相似性；2）在低维嵌入空间中使用Hellinger距离优化嵌入；3）专门针对泊松结构的计数数据设计

Result: 在合成泊松数据和真实计数数据集上测试：1）成功恢复邮件通信的星期模式；2）识别OpenReview论文的研究领域聚类；3）揭示神经尖峰记录中的时间漂移和刺激梯度

Conclusion: p-SNE是一种专门为泊松分布计数数据设计的有效降维方法，能够更好地处理稀疏计数数据的结构，相比传统方法更适用于计数数据的可视化分析

Abstract: Across many scientific fields, measurements often represent the number of times an event occurs. For example, a document can be represented by word occurrence counts, neural activity by spike counts per time window, or online communication by daily email counts. These measurements yield high-dimensional count data that often approximate a Poisson distribution, frequently with low rates that produce substantial sparsity and complicate downstream analysis. A useful approach is to embed the data into a low-dimensional space that preserves meaningful structure, commonly termed dimensionality reduction. Yet existing dimensionality reduction methods, including both linear (e.g., PCA) and nonlinear approaches (e.g., t-SNE), often assume continuous Euclidean geometry, thereby misaligning with the discrete, sparse nature of low-rate count data. Here, we propose p-SNE (Poisson Stochastic Neighbor Embedding), a nonlinear neighbor embedding method designed around the Poisson structure of count data, using KL divergence between Poisson distributions to measure pairwise dissimilarity and Hellinger distance to optimize the embedding. We test p-SNE on synthetic Poisson data and demonstrate its ability to recover meaningful structure in real-world count datasets, including weekday patterns in email communication, research area clusters in OpenReview papers, and temporal drift and stimulus gradients in neural spike recordings.

</details>


### [1032] [Forecast Sports Outcomes under Efficient Market Hypothesis: Theoretical and Experimental Analysis of Odds-Only and Generalised Linear Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17194)
*Kaito Goto,Naoya Takeishi,Takehisa Yairi*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了两种改进投注赔率转换为概率的方法：OO-EPC（无需历史数据）和FL-GLM（使用历史数据），在足球和篮球数据上均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有投注赔率转换方法存在局限性：1) 无需历史数据的odds-only方法（如Multiplicative、Shin、Power）无法调整数据中的偏差和关系；2) 使用历史数据的广义线性模型试图捕捉有效市场假说已包含的关系。需要更准确的方法将赔率转换为概率，用于体育预测和市场效率分析。

Method: 1) OO-EPC方法：基于庄家对每个结果具有相等盈利信心的定价目标，无需历史数据拟合；2) FL-GLM方法：使用历史数据的广义线性模型，仅用一个参数捕捉热门-冷门偏差，提供更可解释的替代方案。

Result: 1) 在5个庄家的90014场足球比赛数据中，OO-EPC方法在多数庄家上优于现有odds-only方法；2) 在年度篮球结果预测竞赛中成功应用6次；3) 在所有庄家的历史足球比赛中，FL-GLM方法优于现有的多项式和逻辑广义线性模型。

Conclusion: 提出的两种方法在不同场景下均优于现有赔率转换方法，为体育预测和市场效率分析提供了更准确的基准。

Abstract: Converting betting odds into accurate outcome probabilities is a fundamental challenge in order to use betting odds as a benchmark for sports forecasting and market efficiency analysis. In this study, we propose two methods to overcome the limitations of existing conversion methods. Firstly, we propose an odds-only method to convert betting odds to probabilities without using historical data for model fitting. While existing odds-only methods, such as Multiplicative, Shin, and Power exist, they do not adjust for biases or relationships we found in our betting odds dataset, which consists of 90014 football matches across five different bookmakers. To overcome these limitations, our proposed Odds-Only-Equal-Profitability-Confidence (OO-EPC) method aligns with the bookmakers' pricing objectives of having equal confidence in profitability for each outcome. We provide empirical evidence from our betting odds dataset that, for the majority of bookmakers, our proposed OO-EPC method outperforms the existing odds-only methods. Beyond controlled experiments, we applied the OO-EPC method under real-world uncertainty by using it for six iterations of an annual basketball outcome forecasting competition. Secondly, we propose a generalised linear model that utilises historical data for model fitting and then converts betting odds to probabilities. Existing generalised linear models attempt to capture relationships that the Efficient Market Hypothesis already captures. To overcome this shortcoming, our proposed Favourite-Longshot-Bias-Adjusted Generalised Linear Model (FL-GLM) fits just one parameter to capture the favourite-longshot bias, providing a more interpretable alternative. We provide empirical evidence from historical football matches where, for all bookmakers, our proposed FL-GLM outperforms the existing multinomial and logistic generalised linear models.

</details>
